# HTML, CSS, ve JS yazımı

## Prompt 1

### You
*2026-03-22 00:14:34 +03*

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#06060e">
    <title>Modül TV v6.0 Ultra Pro</title>
    <style>
        *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
        :root{
            --bg-primary:#06060e;--bg-secondary:#0d0d18;--bg-card:#151528;--bg-hover:#1e1e3a;
            --bg-glass:rgba(15,15,30,0.88);--accent:#e50914;--accent-glow:rgba(229,9,20,0.35);
            --accent2:#ff6b35;--accent3:#7c3aed;--accent4:#06b6d4;--accent5:#10b981;
            --text-primary:#ffffff;--text-secondary:#a0a0be;--text-muted:#555570;
            --border:#1e1e38;--success:#10b981;--warning:#f59e0b;--danger:#ef4444;
            --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#e50914,#ff6b35);
            --gradient-purple:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7);
            --gradient-cyan:linear-gradient(135deg,#06b6d4,#22d3ee);
            --radius:14px;--radius-sm:8px;--radius-lg:20px;
            --shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);--shadow-lg:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --sb-width:260px;--topbar-h:56px;
            --transition:all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
        }
        html{font-size:16px;}
        body{
            font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;
            background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text-primary);
            overflow:hidden;height:100vh;height:100dvh;
            user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* ── SPLASH ── */
        .splash{
            position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);
            display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            z-index:99999;transition:opacity 0.8s,visibility 0.8s;
        }
        .splash.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
        .splash-logo{
            width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:28px;
            background:var(--gradient-main);
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            font-size:3.5rem;
            box-shadow:0 0 60px var(--accent-glow);
            animation:splashPop 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;
        }
        @keyframes splashPop{from{transform:scale(0.5);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
        .splash h1{
            margin-top:24px;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-1px;
            background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
        }
        .splash-v{
            font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--text-muted);
            margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;
        }
        .splash-bar{
            margin-top:40px;width:200px;height:2px;
            background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;
        }
        .splash-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient-main);border-radius:2px;animation:splashLoad 2.6s ease forwards;}
        @keyframes splashLoad{0%{width:0%;}60%{width:70%;}100%{width:100%;}}
        .splash-feat{
            margin-top:16px;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);
            min-height:1.2em;animation:fadeSlide 0.3s ease;
        }
        @keyframes fadeSlide{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}

        /* ── APP SHELL ── */
        .app{display:flex;height:100vh;height:100dvh;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.5s;}
        .app.show{opacity:1;}

        /* ── SIDEBAR ── */
        .sidebar{
            width:var(--sb-width);min-width:var(--sb-width);
            background:var(--bg-secondary);
            border-right:1px solid var(--border);
            display:flex;flex-direction:column;
            transition:var(--transition);z-index:200;
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        .sidebar.mini{width:64px;min-width:64px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-text,.sidebar.mini .sb-badge,.sidebar.mini .sb-sep-label{display:none;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-logo-wrap{justify-content:center;padding:0 14px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-item{justify-content:center;padding:11px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-item-icon{margin:0;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-section{display:none;}

        .sb-logo-wrap{
            height:var(--topbar-h);display:flex;align-items:center;
            justify-content:space-between;padding:0 16px;
            border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .sb-logo{
            font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;
            background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
            white-space:nowrap;
        }
        .sb-toggle-btn{
            background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
            cursor:pointer;padding:6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;
            transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .sb-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}

        .sb-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding:8px 6px 20px;}
        .sb-section{
            font-size:0.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;
            color:var(--text-muted);padding:14px 10px 4px;
        }
        .sb-item{
            display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
            padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;
            transition:var(--transition);color:var(--text-secondary);
            margin-bottom:1px;font-size:0.85rem;position:relative;
        }
        .sb-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .sb-item.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
        .sb-item.active .sb-item-icon{color:#fff;}
        .sb-item-icon{font-size:1.1rem;width:26px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-badge{
            margin-left:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;
            font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .sb-item.active .sb-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}
        .sb-badge.new{background:var(--accent3);}
        .sb-badge.hot{background:var(--danger);}

        /* ── MAIN ── */
        .main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-width:0;}

        /* ── TOPBAR ── */
        .topbar{
            height:var(--topbar-h);padding:0 16px;
            display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
            background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
            flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .mob-menu-btn{
            display:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);
            cursor:pointer;padding:7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .mob-menu-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}

        /* Search */
        .search-wrap{flex:1;max-width:420px;position:relative;}
        .search-wrap input{
            width:100%;padding:8px 14px 8px 36px;
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
            color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .search-wrap input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
        .search-wrap .si{position:absolute;left:11px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.88rem;pointer-events:none;}
        .search-clear{
            position:absolute;right:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
            background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;
            font-size:0.85rem;display:none;padding:2px;
        }
        .search-wrap input:not(:placeholder-shown) + .si + .search-clear{display:block;}

        /* Topbar actions */
        .tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-left:auto;}
        .tb-icon-btn{
            position:relative;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            color:var(--text-secondary);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;
            cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .tb-icon-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tb-icon-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tb-icon-btn .dot{
            position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;width:7px;height:7px;
            background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--bg-secondary);
        }

        /* Live clock in topbar */
        .tb-clock{
            font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);
            font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;
        }

        /* ── CONTENT ── */
        .content{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
        .page{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}
        .page.active{display:flex;}

        /* ── CHANNEL PANEL ── */
        .ch-panel{
            width:300px;min-width:300px;
            background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);
            display:flex;flex-direction:column;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .ch-panel-head{
            padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
            border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .ch-panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;flex:1;}
        .ch-count-badge{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;
        }
        .ch-collapse-btn{
            background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
            cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:6px;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .ch-collapse-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}

        /* Category pills */
        .cat-bar{
            display:flex;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px;
            overflow-x:auto;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .cat-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
        .cat-pill{
            padding:4px 11px;border-radius:16px;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;
            cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;background:var(--bg-card);
            color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);
            flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .cat-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .cat-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

        /* Toolbar */
        .ch-toolbar{
            display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 10px;
            border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .ch-toolbar select{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:7px;
            font-size:0.75rem;outline:none;cursor:pointer;flex:1;
        }
        .view-btns{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
        .view-btn{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            color:var(--text-muted);padding:5px 8px;border-radius:6px;
            cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .view-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

        /* Channel list */
        .ch-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
        .ch-item{
            display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
            padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;
            transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;
            margin-bottom:2px;position:relative;
        }
        .ch-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
        .ch-item.playing{background:rgba(229,9,20,0.08);border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.3);}
        .ch-item.playing .ch-name{color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-logo{
            width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--bg-card);
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);
            overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .ch-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .ch-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
        .ch-name{
            font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;
            white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
        }
        .ch-meta{
            font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;
            display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;
        }
        .ch-actions{display:flex;gap:2px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-act{
            background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
            cursor:pointer;padding:4px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.82rem;
            transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .ch-act:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--bg-card);}
        .ch-act.faved{color:var(--warning);}
        .live-dot{
            width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;
            display:inline-block;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;flex-shrink:0;
        }
        @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.3;}}

        /* Grid view */
        .ch-list.grid{
            display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(120px,1fr));gap:6px;
        }
        .ch-list.grid .ch-item{
            flex-direction:column;text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;
        }
        .ch-list.grid .ch-logo{width:48px;height:48px;margin:0 auto;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-meta{justify-content:center;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-actions{display:none;}

        /* ── PLAYER AREA ── */
        .player-area{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;min-width:0;}

        .video-wrap{
            flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            overflow:hidden;background:#000;min-height:0;
        }
        .video-wrap video{
            width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;
            transition:filter 0.3s;
        }

        /* Placeholder */
        .ph{
            position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
            align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:30px;
            background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center, #0d0d20 0%, #06060e 100%);
        }
        .ph-icon{font-size:5rem;opacity:0.15;margin-bottom:16px;}
        .ph h2{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .ph p{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:24px;}

        /* ── OSD ── */
        .osd{
            position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;right:14px;
            display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;
            pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;
        }
        .video-wrap:hover .osd,.video-wrap.osd-on .osd{opacity:1;}
        .osd-chip{
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
            padding:7px 14px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
        }
        .osd-live{font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
        .osd-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;}
        .osd-btns{display:flex;gap:5px;pointer-events:all;}
        .osd-btn{
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
            border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
            color:#fff;padding:7px 9px;border-radius:8px;
            cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .osd-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* ── PLAYER CONTROLS ── */
        .p-controls{
            position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
            background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.97));
            padding:40px 16px 14px;
            opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;
        }
        .video-wrap:hover .p-controls,.video-wrap.osd-on .p-controls{opacity:1;}
        .p-progress{
            width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
            border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px;
            transition:height 0.2s;
        }
        .p-progress:hover{height:5px;}
        .p-prog-buf{
            position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:3px;
        }
        .p-prog-fill{
            height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:3px;width:0;
            transition:width 0.1s linear;
        }
        .p-prog-dot{
            position:absolute;top:50%;right:0;transform:translate(50%,-50%);
            width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;
            opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;
        }
        .p-progress:hover .p-prog-dot{opacity:1;}
        .p-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
        .p-left,.p-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
        .p-btn{
            background:none;border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;
            font-size:1rem;padding:5px 7px;border-radius:7px;transition:var(--transition);
            display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;
        }
        .p-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
        .p-btn .lbl{font-size:0.73rem;}
        .vol-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .vol-slider{
            width:70px;height:3px;-webkit-appearance:none;
            background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;
        }
        .vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{
            -webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;
            background:#fff;border-radius:50%;
        }
        .p-time{font-size:0.73rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

        /* ── BOTTOM PANELS ── */
        .panels-area{flex-shrink:0;max-height:45%;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}

        /* Video Filters */
        .vf-panel,.eq-panel{
            background:var(--bg-card);padding:14px 16px;
            border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:none;
        }
        .vf-panel.show,.eq-panel.show{display:block;}
        .panel-head{
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
            margin-bottom:12px;
        }
        .panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.85rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .panel-close{
            background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;
            padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:5px;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .panel-close:hover{color:var(--danger);}

        .vf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;}
        .vf-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
        .vf-row label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
        .vf-slider{
            -webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;
            background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;
        }
        .vf-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{
            -webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:13px;
            background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;
        }
        .chip-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
        .chip{
            padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;
            background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;
            border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .chip.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}

        /* EQ */
        .eq-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;justify-content:center;height:100px;margin-bottom:10px;}
        .eq-band{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .eq-vslider{
            -webkit-appearance:none;width:3px;height:90px;
            background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;
            writing-mode:vertical-lr;direction:rtl;cursor:pointer;
        }
        .eq-vslider::-webkit-slider-thumb{
            -webkit-appearance:none;width:14px;height:7px;
            background:var(--accent4);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;
        }
        .eq-lbl{font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── FLOATING WIDGETS ── */

        /* Sleep */
        .sleep-badge{
            position:fixed;top:68px;right:16px;z-index:500;
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
            border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
            padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow);font-size:0.8rem;
        }
        .sleep-badge.show{display:flex;}
        .sleep-t{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .sleep-x{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px;}
        .sleep-x:hover{color:var(--danger);}

        /* REC */
        .rec-badge{
            position:fixed;top:68px;right:16px;z-index:501;
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
            border:1px solid var(--danger);border-radius:12px;
            padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow);animation:recBlink 1s infinite;
        }
        .rec-badge.show{display:flex;}
        .rec-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;}
        .rec-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);font-size:0.8rem;}
        .rec-t{font-size:0.8rem;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .rec-stop{
            background:var(--danger);border:none;color:#fff;
            padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.73rem;
        }
        @keyframes recBlink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.75;}}

        /* BW Monitor */
        .bw-widget{
            position:fixed;bottom:70px;left:16px;z-index:500;
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
            border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
            padding:10px 14px;display:none;gap:14px;align-items:center;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow);
        }
        .bw-widget.show{display:flex;}
        .bw-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;}
        .bw-val{font-weight:700;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .bw-lbl{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* Perf Monitor */
        .perf-widget{
            position:fixed;top:68px;left:16px;z-index:500;
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
            border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
            padding:10px 12px;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow);font-size:0.7rem;min-width:160px;
        }
        .perf-widget.show{display:flex;}
        .perf-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}
        .perf-k{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .perf-v{font-weight:600;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .perf-v.g{color:var(--success);}.perf-v.w{color:var(--warning);}.perf-v.b{color:var(--danger);}

        /* ── MINI PLAYER ── */
        .mini-player{
            position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
            border-top:1px solid var(--border);
            padding:10px 16px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;
        }
        .mini-player.show{display:flex;}
        .mini-thumb{width:56px;height:38px;background:#000;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;}
        .mini-thumb video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .mini-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
        .mini-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
        .mini-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .mini-ctrl{display:flex;gap:6px;}
        .mini-btn{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;
            border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .mini-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

        /* ── PIP ── */
        .pip-win{
            position:fixed;z-index:800;border:2px solid var(--accent);
            border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;
            box-shadow:0 15px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
            display:none;cursor:move;
            width:360px;height:210px;bottom:80px;right:16px;
            resize:both;
        }
        .pip-win.show{display:block;animation:pipIn 0.3s ease-out;}
        @keyframes pipIn{from{transform:scale(0.6);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
        .pip-win video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;pointer-events:none;}
        .pip-bar{
            position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;
            background:linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.8),transparent);
            padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
            opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;
        }
        .pip-win:hover .pip-bar{opacity:1;}
        .pip-name{font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;}
        .pip-close{
            background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;
            width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.62rem;
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
        }

        /* ── CHANNEL PREVIEW TOOLTIP ── */
        .ch-preview{
            position:fixed;z-index:900;
            background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:12px;padding:10px;width:220px;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:none;
        }
        .ch-preview.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.15s ease-out;}
        @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.96);}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}}
        .ch-prev-video{width:100%;height:120px;background:#000;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .ch-prev-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .ch-prev-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.82rem;}
        .ch-prev-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── CONTEXT MENU ── */
        .ctx-menu{
            position:fixed;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:12px;padding:5px;min-width:200px;z-index:3000;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);display:none;
        }
        .ctx-menu.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.15s ease-out;}
        .ctx-item{
            display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
            padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;
            font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-secondary);transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .ctx-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .ctx-item.danger:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:var(--danger);}
        .ctx-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 10px;}

        /* ── PIN OVERLAY ── */
        .pin-overlay{
            position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            z-index:9000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .pin-overlay.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
        .pin-box{
            background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:20px;padding:36px;text-align:center;width:320px;
        }
        .pin-inputs{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
        .pin-input{
            width:48px;height:52px;text-align:center;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;
            background:var(--bg-card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
            color:var(--text-primary);outline:none;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .pin-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}

        /* ── MULTI-VIEW ── */
        .mv-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
        .mv-toolbar{
            padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;
            background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
        }
        .mv-grid{
            flex:1;display:grid;gap:3px;padding:3px;background:var(--bg-primary);
            overflow:hidden;
        }
        .mv-grid.g2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
        .mv-grid.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
        .mv-grid.g6{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
        .mv-grid.g9{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:repeat(3,1fr);}
        .mv-cell{
            background:#111;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            border:2px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);cursor:pointer;
        }
        .mv-cell:hover{border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.5);}
        .mv-cell.active-cell{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent-glow);}
        .mv-cell video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
        .mv-lbl{
            position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:6px;
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
            padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;
        }
        .mv-rm{
            position:absolute;top:5px;right:5px;
            background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);border:none;color:#fff;
            width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.62rem;
            opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;
        }
        .mv-cell:hover .mv-rm{opacity:1;}
        .mv-add{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:2px dashed var(--border);
            display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.82rem;gap:6px;
            border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .mv-add:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
        .mv-add-icon{font-size:2rem;}

        /* ── GRID PAGES (Fav/History) ── */
        .grid-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;align-content:start;}
        .g-card{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;text-align:center;
            cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .g-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .g-card:active{transform:translateY(-1px);}
        .g-card-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .g-card-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
        .g-card-sub{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── CAST PAGE ── */
        .cast-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
        .cast-devices{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
        .cast-device{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px 22px;text-align:center;
            cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);min-width:150px;
        }
        .cast-device:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .cast-device.connected{border-color:var(--success);background:rgba(16,185,129,0.08);}
        .cast-device-icon{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .cast-device-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;margin-bottom:3px;}
        .cast-device-status{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .cast-device.connected .cast-device-status{color:var(--success);}

        /* ── STATS PAGE ── */
        .stats-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
        .stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:12px;padding:16px;}
        .stat-card{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px;
        }
        .stat-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .stat-val{font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:2px;}
        .stat-lbl{font-size:0.77rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── SETTINGS PAGE ── */
        .settings-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
        .settings-inner{padding:20px;max-width:680px;}
        .set-section{margin-bottom:22px;}
        .set-sec-title{
            font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;
            padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .set-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 0;}
        .set-info h4{font-size:0.86rem;margin-bottom:2px;}
        .set-info p{font-size:0.73rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        /* Toggle */
        .tgl{position:relative;width:42px;height:22px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}
        .tgl input{display:none;}
        .tgl-track{
            position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-card);
            border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .tgl-thumb{
            position:absolute;width:16px;height:16px;background:var(--text-muted);
            border-radius:50%;top:2px;left:3px;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .tgl input:checked ~ .tgl-track{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tgl input:checked ~ .tgl-thumb{transform:translateX(19px);background:#fff;}

        /* Theme cards */
        .theme-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:10px;}
        .theme-card{
            padding:10px;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;
            border:2px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .theme-card:hover{border-color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .theme-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent-glow);}
        .theme-preview{width:100%;height:28px;border-radius:5px;margin-bottom:5px;}
        .theme-name{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;}

        /* ── EPG ── */
        .epg-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;max-width:700px;}

        /* ── WORLD CLOCK ── */
        .wc-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;max-width:800px;}
        .wc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(100px,1fr));gap:10px;margin:16px 0;}
        .wc-card{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:12px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center;
        }
        .wc-flag{font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:5px;}
        .wc-time{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .wc-city{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px;}

        /* ── WATCH PARTY ── */
        .wp-page{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
        .wp-video{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;position:relative;}
        .wp-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
        .wp-sidebar{
            width:280px;min-width:280px;background:var(--bg-secondary);
            border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;
        }
        .wp-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px;}
        .wp-msg{margin-bottom:6px;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;}
        .wp-msg-user{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
        .wp-msg-text{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .wp-input-row{
            display:flex;gap:5px;padding:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .wp-input{
            flex:1;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.8rem;outline:none;
        }
        .wp-send{
            background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;
            padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.88rem;
        }

        /* ── ABOUT PAGE ── */
        .about-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;}

        /* ── MODALS ── */
        .modal-bg{
            position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.75);backdrop-filter:blur(5px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(5px);
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            z-index:5000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .modal-bg.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
        .modal{
            background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:20px;padding:24px;width:92%;max-width:520px;
            max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:scale(0.94);transition:transform 0.25s;
        }
        .modal-bg.show .modal{transform:scale(1);}
        .modal-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:18px;}
        .modal-title{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;}
        .modal-x{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);
            width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;
            display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .modal-x:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}

        /* Form */
        .fg{margin-bottom:14px;}
        .fl{display:block;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:5px;}
        .fi,.ft,.fs{
            width:100%;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:9px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .fi:focus,.ft:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
        .ft{resize:vertical;min-height:85px;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;}

        /* Buttons */
        .btn{
            padding:8px 16px;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-size:0.85rem;
            font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);
            display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
        }
        .btn-p{background:var(--gradient-main);color:#fff;}
        .btn-p:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 5px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
        .btn-p:active{transform:translateY(0);}
        .btn-s{background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);}
        .btn-s:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .btn-danger{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.1);color:var(--danger);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);}
        .btn-danger:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
        .btn-row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:16px;}

        /* ── TOASTS ── */
        .toast-stack{position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:99998;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
        .toast{
            background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:11px;
            padding:10px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;min-width:260px;
            box-shadow:var(--shadow);animation:toastIn 0.3s ease-out;
        }
        .toast.out{animation:toastOut 0.3s forwards;}
        .t-ok{border-left:3px solid var(--success);}
        .t-err{border-left:3px solid var(--danger);}
        .t-warn{border-left:3px solid var(--warning);}
        .t-info{border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);}
        .toast-icon{font-size:1rem;}
        .toast-msg{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:500;}
        @keyframes toastIn{from{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
        @keyframes toastOut{to{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}}

        /* ── NEW: Gesture indicators ── */
        .gesture-hint{
            position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
            pointer-events:none;z-index:20;
        }
        .gesture-bubble{
            background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;
            border-radius:12px;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;
            opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;
        }
        .gesture-bubble.show{opacity:1;}

        /* ── NEW: Channel number overlay ── */
        .ch-num-overlay{
            position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
            background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);color:#fff;
            font-size:4rem;font-weight:900;padding:20px 30px;
            border-radius:16px;display:none;z-index:30;
            font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
        }
        .ch-num-overlay.show{display:block;}

        /* ── NEW: Snapshot flash ── */
        .snap-flash{
            position:absolute;inset:0;background:#fff;
            opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;transition:opacity 0.1s;
        }
        .snap-flash.flash{opacity:0.8;}

        /* ── NEW: Buffering spinner ── */
        .buf-spinner{
            position:absolute;z-index:15;
            display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;
        }
        .buf-spinner.show{display:flex;}
        .spinner{
            width:40px;height:40px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
            border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;
            animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;
        }
        @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
        .buf-text{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);}

        /* ── NEW: Suggest cards in placeholder ── */
        .suggest-row{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:4px;max-width:580px;}
        .suggest-row::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
        .suggest-chip{
            flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);
            text-align:center;min-width:100px;
        }
        .suggest-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
        .suggest-chip-icon{font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
        .suggest-chip-name{font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:90px;}
        .suggest-chip-cat{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── NEW: Reminder badge ── */
        .reminder-item{
            display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px;
            background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:5px;
            border:1px solid var(--border);
        }
        .rem-time{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);min-width:45px;font-size:0.8rem;}
        .rem-ch{flex:1;font-weight:600;font-size:0.82rem;}
        .rem-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:3px;}
        .rem-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

        /* ── NEW: Equalizer volume viz ── */
        .eq-viz{
            display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:30px;
            margin-left:auto;
        }
        .eq-viz-bar{
            width:3px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:1px;
            animation:eqAnim var(--d,0.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;
        }
        @keyframes eqAnim{from{height:4px;}to{height:var(--h,20px);}}

        /* ── NEW: Schedule/ACS timeline ── */
        .acs-timeline{display:flex;gap:6px;overflow-x:auto;padding:8px 0;}
        .acs-slot{
            min-width:90px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
            border-radius:9px;padding:8px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);
        }
        .acs-slot:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
        .acs-slot.current{border-color:var(--success);background:rgba(16,185,129,0.1);}
        .acs-slot-time{font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--accent4);font-weight:700;}
        .acs-slot-name{font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;margin-top:3px;}

        /* ── FULLSCREEN MODE ── */
        .fs-mode .sidebar,.fs-mode .ch-panel,.fs-mode .topbar,.fs-mode .mini-player{display:none!important;}
        .fs-mode .player-area{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9990;}

        /* ── RESPONSIVE ── */
        @media(max-width:1100px){
            .sidebar{position:fixed;left:-270px;height:100%;z-index:600;box-shadow:none;}
            .sidebar.open{left:0;box-shadow:5px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
            .mob-menu-btn{display:flex;}
            :root{--sb-width:250px;}
        }
        @media(max-width:820px){
            .ch-panel{
                position:fixed;left:0;top:0;height:100%;width:100%;
                z-index:550;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform 0.3s;
            }
            .ch-panel.open{transform:translateX(0);}
            .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
            .theme-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
            .vf-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
            .wp-sidebar{width:240px;min-width:240px;}
        }
        @media(max-width:580px){
            .grid-page{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));}
            .cast-device{min-width:120px;padding:14px 16px;}
            .modal{padding:18px;}
            .pip-win{width:280px;height:165px;}
            .tb-clock{display:none;}
            .vol-slider{width:55px;}
            .wp-sidebar{display:none;}
            .wc-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(85px,1fr));}
        }
        @media(max-width:420px){
            .p-right .p-btn:not(:last-child){display:none;}
            .suggest-chip{min-width:85px;}
        }
        @media(hover:none){
            .osd,.p-controls{opacity:1!important;}
            .ch-item{-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
        }
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SPLASH -->
<div class="splash" id="splash">
    <div class="splash-logo">📺</div>
    <h1>MODÜL TV</h1>
    <div class="splash-v">v6.0 ULTRA PRO</div>
    <div class="splash-bar"><div class="splash-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="splash-feat" id="splashFeat">Başlatılıyor…</div>
</div>

<!-- TOASTS -->
<div class="toast-stack" id="toasts"></div>

<!-- FLOATING WIDGETS -->
<div class="sleep-badge" id="sleepBadge">😴 <span class="sleep-t" id="sleepT">00:00</span><button class="sleep-x" onclick="cancelSleep()">✕</button></div>
<div class="rec-badge" id="recBadge"><div class="rec-dot"></div><span class="rec-lbl">REC</span><span class="rec-t" id="recT">00:00</span><button class="rec-stop" onclick="stopRec()">⏹</button></div>
<div class="bw-widget" id="bwWidget">
    <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwDown">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">↓ KB/s</div></div>
    <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwBuf">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">Buffer</div></div>
    <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwBit">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">Kbps</div></div>
</div>
<div class="perf-widget" id="perfWidget">
    <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.73rem;color:var(--accent4);margin-bottom:4px;">📊 Performans</div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">FPS</span><span class="perf-v g" id="pFps">60</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Çözünürlük</span><span class="perf-v" id="pRes">—</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Bitrate</span><span class="perf-v" id="pBit">—</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Buffer</span><span class="perf-v" id="pBuf">—</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Codec</span><span class="perf-v" id="pCodec">—</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Dropped</span><span class="perf-v" id="pDrop">0</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Latency</span><span class="perf-v" id="pLat">—</span></div>
</div>

<!-- CONTEXT MENU -->
<div class="ctx-menu" id="ctxMenu">
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxPlay()">▶️ Oynat</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxFav()">⭐ Favoriye Ekle/Çıkar</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxAddMV()">🖥️ Çoklu Ekrana Ekle</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxRate()">⭐ Puanla</div>
    <div class="ctx-sep"></div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxCopy()">🔗 URL Kopyala</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxInfo()">ℹ️ Kanal Bilgisi</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxReminder()">⏰ Hatırlatıcı</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxCast()">📡 Yansıt</div>
    <div class="ctx-sep"></div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxLock()">🔒 Ebeveyn Kilidi</div>
    <div class="ctx-item danger" onclick="ctxHide()">🚫 Gizle</div>
</div>

<!-- CHANNEL PREVIEW -->
<div class="ch-preview" id="chPreview">
    <div class="ch-prev-video"><video id="previewVid" muted playsinline></video></div>
    <div class="ch-prev-name" id="previewName"></div>
    <div class="ch-prev-cat" id="previewCat"></div>
</div>

<!-- PIN OVERLAY -->
<div class="pin-overlay" id="pinOverlay">
    <div class="pin-box">
        <div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:12px;">🔒</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;">Ebeveyn Kontrolü</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:4px;">PIN kodunuzu girin</div>
        <div class="pin-inputs">
            <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin0" oninput="pinNext(0)">
            <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin1" oninput="pinNext(1)">
            <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin2" oninput="pinNext(2)">
            <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin3" oninput="pinNext(3)">
        </div>
        <div class="btn-row" style="justify-content:center;">
            <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="closePin()">İptal</button>
            <button class="btn btn-p" onclick="checkPin()">Doğrula</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- CUSTOM PIP -->
<div class="pip-win" id="pipWin">
    <video id="pipVid" muted playsinline></video>
    <div class="pip-bar">
        <span class="pip-name" id="pipName">—</span>
        <button class="pip-close" onclick="closePip()">✕</button>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- APP -->
<div class="app" id="app">

    <!-- SIDEBAR -->
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
        <div class="sb-logo-wrap">
            <span class="sb-logo sb-text">📺 MODÜL TV</span>
            <button class="sb-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleSB()">☰</button>
        </div>
        <nav class="sb-scroll">
            <div class="sb-section">ANA MENÜ</div>
            <div class="sb-item active" data-p="tv" onclick="goPage('tv')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">📺</span><span class="sb-text">Canlı TV</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="multiview" onclick="goPage('multiview')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">🖥️</span><span class="sb-text">Çoklu Ekran</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="favorites" onclick="goPage('favorites')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">⭐</span><span class="sb-text">Favoriler</span>
                <span class="sb-badge" id="favCnt">0</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="history" onclick="goPage('history')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">🕐</span><span class="sb-text">Geçmiş</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="watchparty" onclick="goPage('watchparty')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">🎉</span><span class="sb-text">Watch Party</span>
                <span class="sb-badge new">YENİ</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="cast" onclick="goPage('cast')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">📡</span><span class="sb-text">Ekran Yansıtma</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-section">ARAÇLAR</div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('plModal')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">📋</span><span class="sb-text">Playlist Yükle</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('sleepModal')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">😴</span><span class="sb-text">Uyku Zamanlayıcı</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('reminderModal')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">⏰</span><span class="sb-text">Hatırlatıcılar</span>
                <span class="sb-badge hot" id="remCnt" style="display:none;">0</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('acsModal')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">🔄</span><span class="sb-text">Oto. Kanal Geçişi</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="stats" onclick="goPage('stats')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">📊</span><span class="sb-text">İstatistikler</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="epg" onclick="goPage('epg')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">📅</span><span class="sb-text">Program Rehberi</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="worldclock" onclick="goPage('worldclock')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">🌍</span><span class="sb-text">Dünya Saati</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-section">SİSTEM</div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="settings" onclick="goPage('settings')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">⚙️</span><span class="sb-text">Ayarlar</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('shortcutsModal')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">⌨️</span><span class="sb-text">Kısayollar</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="toggleBW()">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">📶</span><span class="sb-text">Ağ Monitörü</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="togglePerf()">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">📊</span><span class="sb-text">Performans</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="about" onclick="goPage('about')">
                <span class="sb-item-icon">ℹ️</span><span class="sb-text">Hakkında</span>
            </div>
        </nav>
    </aside>

    <!-- MAIN -->
    <main class="main">

        <!-- TOPBAR -->
        <div class="topbar">
            <button class="mob-menu-btn" id="mobMenuBtn" onclick="toggleSBMobile()">☰</button>
            <div class="search-wrap">
                <span class="si">🔍</span>
                <input id="searchIn" placeholder="Kanal ara… (Ctrl+K)" oninput="doSearch(this.value)" autocomplete="off">
                <button class="search-clear" onclick="clearSearch()">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="tb-right">
                <span class="tb-clock" id="tbClock">00:00</span>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleVF()" title="Video Filtreler">🎨</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleEQ()" title="Ekolayzır">🎛️</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" id="recBtn" onclick="toggleRec()" title="Kayıt">⏺️</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleMini()" title="Mini Oynatıcı">🎵</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="togglePiP()" title="PiP">🖼️</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleFS()" title="Tam Ekran">⛶</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="openModal('plModal')" title="Playlist">📋</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleChPanel()" title="Kanal Paneli" id="chPanelBtn">◀</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- CONTENT -->
        <div class="content">

            <!-- ═══ TV PAGE ═══ -->
            <div class="page active" id="pg-tv">
                <!-- Channel Panel -->
                <div class="ch-panel" id="chPanel">
                    <div class="ch-panel-head">
                        <span class="ch-panel-title">📡 Kanallar</span>
                        <span class="ch-count-badge" id="chCount">0</span>
                        <button class="ch-collapse-btn" onclick="toggleChPanel()" title="Gizle">✕</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="cat-bar" id="catBar"></div>
                    <div class="ch-toolbar">
                        <select id="sortSel" onchange="doSort(this.value)">
                            <option value="">Sırala</option>
                            <option value="az">A → Z</option>
                            <option value="za">Z → A</option>
                            <option value="group">Kategori</option>
                            <option value="recent">Son İzlenen</option>
                            <option value="rated">En Beğenilen</option>
                            <option value="mostwatch">En Çok İzlenen</option>
                        </select>
                        <div class="view-btns">
                            <button class="view-btn active" id="lvBtn" onclick="setView('list')">☰</button>
                            <button class="view-btn" id="gvBtn" onclick="setView('grid')">⊞</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ch-list" id="chList"></div>
                </div>

                <!-- Player -->
                <div class="player-area" id="playerArea">
                    <div class="video-wrap" id="videoWrap">

                        <!-- Placeholder -->
                        <div class="ph" id="ph">
                            <div class="ph-icon">📺</div>
                            <h2>Modül TV v6.0</h2>
                            <p>İzlemek için bir kanal seçin</p>
                            <div id="phSuggest"></div>
                        </div>

                        <video id="vid" style="display:none;" playsinline></video>

                        <!-- Buffering -->
                        <div class="buf-spinner" id="bufSpinner">
                            <div class="spinner"></div>
                            <div class="buf-text">Yükleniyor…</div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Snapshot flash -->
                        <div class="snap-flash" id="snapFlash"></div>

                        <!-- Channel number overlay -->
                        <div class="ch-num-overlay" id="chNumOverlay"></div>

                        <!-- Gesture hint -->
                        <div class="gesture-hint"><div class="gesture-bubble" id="gestureBubble"></div></div>

                        <!-- OSD -->
                        <div class="osd" id="osd">
                            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
                                <div class="osd-chip">
                                    <span class="osd-live"><span class="live-dot"></span> CANLI</span>
                                    <span class="osd-name" id="osdName">—</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="osd-chip" id="osdQuality" style="font-size:0.72rem;display:none;">Auto</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="osd-btns">
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="takeSnap()" title="Ekran görüntüsü">📸</button>
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="toggleRec()" title="Kayıt">⏺️</button>
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="togglePiP()" title="PiP">🖼️</button>
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="toggleFS()" title="Tam Ekran">⛶</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Controls -->
                        <div class="p-controls" id="pControls">
                            <div class="p-progress" id="pProg" onclick="seekVid(event)">
                                <div class="p-prog-buf" id="pBufBar"></div>
                                <div class="p-prog-fill" id="pFill"></div>
                                <div class="p-prog-dot"></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="p-row">
                                <div class="p-left">
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="prevCh()" title="Önceki">⏮</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" id="playBtn" onclick="togglePlay()">⏸</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="nextCh()" title="Sonraki">⏭</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="stopPlay()" title="Durdur">⏹</button>
                                    <div class="vol-wrap">
                                        <button class="p-btn" id="muteBtn" onclick="toggleMute()">🔊</button>
                                        <input type="range" class="vol-slider" id="volSlider" min="0" max="100" value="80" oninput="setVol(this.value)">
                                    </div>
                                    <span class="p-time" id="pTime">00:00:00</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-right">
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="cycleSpeed()"><span class="lbl" id="speedLbl">1×</span></button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="cycleAspect()" title="Görüntü Oranı">📐</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" id="qualBtn" onclick="cycleQ()">🎯 Auto</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="toggleSubs()">💬</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="toggleFS()">⛶</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Bottom Panels -->
                    <div class="panels-area" id="panelsArea">
                        <!-- Video Filters -->
                        <div class="vf-panel" id="vfPanel">
                            <div class="panel-head">
                                <span class="panel-title">🎨 Video Filtreleri</span>
                                <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
                                    <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="resetVF()" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.72rem;">↺ Sıfırla</button>
                                    <button class="panel-close" onclick="toggleVF()">✕</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="vf-grid">
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Parlaklık <span id="vfBr">100%</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyVF('brightness',this.value,'vfBr','%')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Kontrast <span id="vfCo">100%</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyVF('contrast',this.value,'vfCo','%')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Doygunluk <span id="vfSa">100%</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyVF('saturate',this.value,'vfSa','%')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Ton <span id="vfHu">0°</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="360" value="0" oninput="applyVF('hue-rotate',this.value,'vfHu','°')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Bulanıklık <span id="vfBl">0px</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="10" value="0" step="0.5" oninput="applyVF('blur',this.value,'vfBl','px')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Sepya <span id="vfSe">0%</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="100" value="0" oninput="applyVF('sepia',this.value,'vfSe','%')"></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="chip-row" id="vfPresets"></div>
                        </div>
                        <!-- EQ -->
                        <div class="eq-panel" id="eqPanel">
                            <div class="panel-head">
                                <span class="panel-title">🎛️ Ses Ekolayzırı
                                    <div class="eq-viz" id="eqViz"></div>
                                </span>
                                <button class="panel-close" onclick="toggleEQ()">✕</button>
                            </div>
                            <div class="eq-bars" id="eqBars"></div>
                            <div class="chip-row" id="eqPresets"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ MULTI-VIEW ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-multiview">
                <div class="mv-wrap">
                    <div class="mv-toolbar">
                        <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;">🖥️ Çoklu Ekran</span>
                        <select id="mvLayout" onchange="setMVLayout(this.value)" style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:5px 9px;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.78rem;">
                            <option value="g2">2 Ekran</option>
                            <option value="g4" selected>4 Ekran</option>
                            <option value="g6">6 Ekran</option>
                            <option value="g9">9 Ekran</option>
                        </select>
                        <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="clearMV()" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:0.78rem;padding:5px 10px;">🗑️ Temizle</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mv-grid g4" id="mvGrid"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ FAVORITES ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-favorites">
                <div class="grid-page" id="favGrid"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ HISTORY ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-history">
                <div class="grid-page" id="histGrid"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ WATCH PARTY ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-watchparty">
                <div class="wp-page">
                    <div class="wp-video">
                        <video id="wpVid" playsinline style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;"></video>
                        <div id="wpPh" style="position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text-muted);">
                            <div style="font-size:4rem;margin-bottom:10px;">🎉</div>
                            <h2 style="font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--text-secondary);">Watch Party</h2>
                            <p style="font-size:0.82rem;">Oda oluşturun veya katılın</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="wp-sidebar">
                        <div style="padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                            <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.88rem;">💬 Sohbet</span>
                            <span style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:auto;" id="wpUsers">0 kişi</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
                            <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;margin-bottom:6px;">
                                <button class="btn btn-p" onclick="createWPRoom()" style="font-size:0.75rem;padding:5px 10px;flex:1;justify-content:center;">🏠 Oluştur</button>
                                <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="joinWPRoom()" style="font-size:0.75rem;padding:5px 10px;flex:1;justify-content:center;">🚪 Katıl</button>
                            </div>
                            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);" id="wpRoomInfo">Oda yok</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="wp-msgs" id="wpMsgs"></div>
                        <div class="wp-input-row">
                            <input class="wp-input" id="wpInput" placeholder="Mesaj…" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')sendWP()">
                            <button class="wp-send" onclick="sendWP()">📤</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ CAST ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-cast">
                <div class="cast-page">
                    <div style="font-size:5rem;opacity:0.2;margin-bottom:16px;">📡</div>
                    <h2 style="font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;">Ekran Yansıtma</h2>
                    <p style="color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:24px;text-align:center;max-width:460px;">Canlı yayını TV veya diğer cihazlara yansıtın</p>
                    <div class="cast-devices" id="castDevices">
                        <div class="cast-device" onclick="connectDevice(this)">
                            <div class="cast-device-icon">📺</div>
                            <div class="cast-device-name">Salon TV</div>
                            <div class="cast-device-status">Chromecast · Hazır</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="cast-device" onclick="connectDevice(this)">
                            <div class="cast-device-icon">🖥️</div>
                            <div class="cast-device-name">Yatak Odası</div>
                            <div class="cast-device-status">AirPlay · Hazır</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="cast-device" onclick="connectDevice(this)">
                            <div class="cast-device-icon">🔊</div>
                            <div class="cast-device-name">Hoparlör</div>
                            <div class="cast-device-status">DLNA · Hazır</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="cast-device" onclick="scanDevices()">
                            <div class="cast-device-icon">🔄</div>
                            <div class="cast-device-name">Cihaz Tara</div>
                            <div class="cast-device-status">Yeni cihaz bul</div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;">
                        <button class="btn btn-p" onclick="startScreenShare()">🖥️ Ekran Paylaşımı</button>
                        <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="startSecondScreen()">📱 İkinci Ekran</button>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ STATS ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-stats">
                <div class="stats-page">
                    <div class="stats-grid" id="statsGrid"></div>
                    <div style="padding:0 16px 20px;">
                        <div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px;">
                            <h3 style="margin-bottom:14px;font-size:0.9rem;">📈 Son 7 Günlük İzleme</h3>
                            <canvas id="statsCanvas" height="180" style="width:100%;"></canvas>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ EPG ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-epg">
                <div class="epg-page">
                    <h2 style="margin-bottom:16px;">📅 Program Rehberi</h2>
                    <div class="fg">
                        <label class="fl">XMLTV EPG URL</label>
                        <input class="fi" id="epgUrl" placeholder="https://epg.example.com/guide.xml">
                    </div>
                    <button class="btn btn-p" onclick="loadEPG()">📥 Yükle</button>
                    <div id="epgData" style="margin-top:18px;"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ WORLD CLOCK ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-worldclock">
                <div class="wc-page">
                    <h2 style="margin-bottom:6px;">🌍 Dünya Saati</h2>
                    <p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.82rem;margin-bottom:16px;">Uluslararası yayınlar için saat takibi</p>
                    <div class="wc-grid" id="wcGrid"></div>
                    <h3 style="font-size:0.9rem;margin:16px 0 10px;">📺 Şu An Önerilen</h3>
                    <div id="wcBroadcasts" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:10px;"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ SETTINGS ═══ -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-settings">
                <div class="settings-page">
                    <div class="settings-inner">
                        <h2 style="margin-bottom:20px;">⚙️ Ayarlar</h2>

                        <div class="set-section">
                            <div class="set-sec-title">🎬 Oynatıcı</div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Otomatik Oynat</h4><p>Kanal seçiminde başlat</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" checked id="sAutoPlay"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Düşük Gecikme</h4><p>Minimum gecikme modu</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" id="sLowLat"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Otomatik Kalite</h4><p>Bant genişliğine göre</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" checked id="sAutoQ"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Kanal Önizleme</h4><p>Hover önizlemesi</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" checked id="sPreview"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Ses Normalleştirme</h4><p>Dengeli ses seviyesi</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" id="sNorm"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Dokunma Hareketleri</h4><p>Kaydırma ile ses/ileri-geri</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" checked id="sGestures"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Masaüstü Bildirimleri</h4><p>Hatırlatıcı bildirimleri</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" id="sNotify" onchange="reqNotif()"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="set-section">
                            <div class="set-sec-title">🔒 Ebeveyn Kontrolü</div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Ebeveyn Kilidi</h4><p>PIN gerektir</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" id="sParental"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>PIN Değiştir</h4><p>4 haneli kod</p></div><button class="btn btn-s" onclick="openModal('pinModal')">🔑 Değiştir</button></div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="set-section">
                            <div class="set-sec-title">🎨 Tema</div>
                            <div class="theme-grid" id="themeGrid"></div>
                            <div class="set-row" style="margin-top:12px;">
                                <div class="set-info"><h4>Özel Renk</h4><p>Vurgu rengi</p></div>
                                <input type="color" value="#e50914" id="sColor" onchange="changeAccent(this.value)" style="width:36px;height:28px;border:none;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;background:transparent;">
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="set-section">
                            <div class="set-sec-title">📡 Ağ</div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Proxy</h4><p>CORS sorunları için</p></div><label class="tgl"><input type="checkbox" checked id="sProxy"><span class="tgl-track"></span><span class="tgl-thumb"></span></label></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Hız Testi</h4><p>İnternet hızını ölç</p></div><button class="btn btn-s" onclick="speedTest()">🚀 Test Et</button></div>
                        </div>

                        <div class="set-section">
                            <div class="set-sec-title">💾 Veri</div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Dışa Aktar</h4></div><button class="btn btn-s" onclick="exportAll()">📤 Export</button></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>İçe Aktar</h4></div><button class="btn btn-s" onclick="importAll()">📥 Import</button></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Önbellek Temizle</h4></div><button class="btn btn-s" onclick="clearCache()">🗑️ Temizle</button></div>
                            <div class="set-row"><div class="set-info"><h4>Fabrika Sıfırlama</h4></div><button class="btn btn-danger" onclick="factoryReset()">⚠️ Sıfırla</button></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- ═══ ABOUT ═══ -->
