        case'arrowdown':e.preventDefault();{const v=document.getElementById('vid');v.volume=Math.max(0,v.volume-0.05);document.getElementById('volSlider').value=v.volume*100;showGesture(`🔊 ${Math.round(v.volume*100)}%`);}break;
        case'arrowleft':e.preventDefault();prevCh();break;
        case'arrowright':e.preventDefault();nextCh();break;
        case'p':togglePiP();break;
        case'e':toggleEQ();break;
        case's':takeSnap();break;
        case'r':toggleRec();break;
        case'v':toggleVF();break;
        case'escape':
            if(isFS)toggleFS();
            document.querySelectorAll('.modal-bg.show').forEach(m=>m.classList.remove('show'));
            closePin();closePip();
            break;
        default:
            if(e.key>='1'&&e.key<='9'){
                chNumBuf+=e.key;showChNum(chNumBuf);
                clearTimeout(chNumTmr);
                chNumTmr=setTimeout(()=>{
                    const idx=parseInt(chNumBuf)-1;
                    if(idx>=0&&idx<filtered.length)selectCh(idx);
                    chNumBuf='';
                },1000);
            }
    }
    if(e.ctrlKey&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='k'){
        e.preventDefault();document.getElementById('searchIn').focus();
    }
});

document.getElementById('videoWrap').addEventListener('dblclick',()=>toggleFS());

window.addEventListener('beforeunload',()=>{trackEnd();});

document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const sb=document.getElementById('sidebar');
    if(window.innerWidth<=1100&&sb.classList.contains('open')){
        if(!sb.contains(e.target)&&e.target.id!=='mobMenuBtn')sb.classList.remove('open');
    }
});

// Responsive check
function checkResp(){
    document.getElementById('mobMenuBtn').style.display=window.innerWidth<=1100?'flex':'none';
    if(window.innerWidth<=820){
        document.getElementById('chPanel').classList.remove('open');
    }
}
checkResp();
window.addEventListener('resize',checkResp);
</script>

</body>
</html> geliştiemey devam edelim özgurce yenı zoleıkler yenı fonskıyonlar ekle entegre et devam e delım onerılerın varsa ekle entegre et

Aşağıdaki özellikleri ekledim:

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#06060e">
    <title>Modül TV v6.1 Ultra Pro</title>
    <style>
        *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
        :root{
            --bg-primary:#06060e;--bg-secondary:#0d0d18;--bg-card:#151528;--bg-hover:#1e1e3a;
            --bg-glass:rgba(15,15,30,0.88);--accent:#e50914;--accent-glow:rgba(229,9,20,0.35);
            --accent2:#ff6b35;--accent3:#7c3aed;--accent4:#06b6d4;--accent5:#10b981;
            --text-primary:#ffffff;--text-secondary:#a0a0be;--text-muted:#555570;
            --border:#1e1e38;--success:#10b981;--warning:#f59e0b;--danger:#ef4444;
            --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#e50914,#ff6b35);
            --radius:14px;--radius-sm:8px;--radius-lg:20px;
            --shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);--shadow-lg:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --sb-width:260px;--topbar-h:56px;
            --transition:all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
        }
        html{font-size:16px;}
        body{
            font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;
            background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text-primary);
            overflow:hidden;height:100vh;height:100dvh;
            user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;
        }
        ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* SPLASH */
        .splash{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;transition:opacity 0.8s,visibility 0.8s;}
        .splash.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
        .splash-logo{width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:28px;background:var(--gradient-main);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5rem;box-shadow:0 0 60px var(--accent-glow);animation:splashPop 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;}
        @keyframes splashPop{from{transform:scale(0.5);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
        .splash h1{margin-top:24px;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
        .splash-v{font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;}
        .splash-bar{margin-top:40px;width:200px;height:2px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;}
        .splash-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient-main);border-radius:2px;animation:splashLoad 2.6s ease forwards;}
        @keyframes splashLoad{0%{width:0%;}60%{width:70%;}100%{width:100%;}}
        .splash-feat{margin-top:16px;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);min-height:1.2em;}
        @keyframes fadeSlide{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}

        /* APP SHELL */
        .app{display:flex;height:100vh;height:100dvh;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.5s;}
        .app.show{opacity:1;}

        /* SIDEBAR */
        .sidebar{width:var(--sb-width);min-width:var(--sb-width);background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);z-index:200;overflow:hidden;}
        .sidebar.mini{width:64px;min-width:64px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-text,.sidebar.mini .sb-badge,.sidebar.mini .sb-sep-label{display:none;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-logo-wrap{justify-content:center;padding:0 14px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-item{justify-content:center;padding:11px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-item-icon{margin:0;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-section{display:none;}
        .sb-logo-wrap{height:var(--topbar-h);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-logo{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;white-space:nowrap;}
        .sb-toggle-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .sb-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding:8px 6px 20px;}
        .sb-section{font-size:0.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:14px 10px 4px;}
        .sb-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:1px;font-size:0.85rem;position:relative;}
        .sb-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .sb-item.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
        .sb-item.active .sb-item-icon{color:#fff;}
        .sb-item-icon{font-size:1.1rem;width:26px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-badge{margin-left:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-item.active .sb-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}
        .sb-badge.new{background:var(--accent3);}
        .sb-badge.hot{background:var(--danger);}

        /* MAIN */
        .main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-width:0;}

        /* TOPBAR */
        .topbar{height:var(--topbar-h);padding:0 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .mob-menu-btn{display:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;padding:7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .mob-menu-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .search-wrap{flex:1;max-width:420px;position:relative;}
        .search-wrap input{width:100%;padding:8px 14px 8px 36px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}
        .search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .search-wrap input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
        .search-wrap .si{position:absolute;left:11px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.88rem;pointer-events:none;}
        .search-clear{position:absolute;right:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;display:none;padding:2px;}
        .search-wrap input:not(:placeholder-shown)+.si+.search-clear{display:block;}
        .tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-left:auto;}
        .tb-icon-btn{position:relative;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}
        .tb-icon-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tb-icon-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tb-icon-btn .dot{position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--bg-secondary);}
        .tb-clock{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;}

        /* CONTENT */
        .content{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
        .page{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}
        .page.active{display:flex;}

        /* CHANNEL PANEL */
        .ch-panel{width:300px;min-width:300px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);}
        .ch-panel-head{padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;flex:1;}
        .ch-count-badge{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;}
        .ch-collapse-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:6px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .ch-collapse-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .cat-bar{display:flex;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px;overflow-x:auto;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .cat-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
        .cat-pill{padding:4px 11px;border-radius:16px;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}
        .cat-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .cat-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-toolbar select{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:7px;font-size:0.75rem;outline:none;cursor:pointer;flex:1;}
        .view-btns{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
        .view-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);padding:5px 8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .view-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
        .ch-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;margin-bottom:2px;position:relative;}
        .ch-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
        .ch-item.playing{background:rgba(229,9,20,0.08);border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.3);}
        .ch-item.playing .ch-name{color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-logo{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--bg-card);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border);}
        .ch-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .ch-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
        .ch-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
        .ch-meta{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
        .ch-actions{display:flex;gap:2px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-act{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.82rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .ch-act:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--bg-card);}
        .ch-act.faved{color:var(--warning);}
        .live-dot{width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;flex-shrink:0;}
        @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.3;}}
        .ch-list.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(120px,1fr));gap:6px;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-item{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-logo{width:48px;height:48px;margin:0 auto;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-meta{justify-content:center;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-actions{display:none;}

        /* PLAYER AREA */
        .player-area{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;min-width:0;}
        .video-wrap{flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;background:#000;min-height:0;}
        .video-wrap video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;transition:filter 0.3s;}
        .ph{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:30px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,#0d0d20 0%,#06060e 100%);}
        .ph-icon{font-size:5rem;opacity:0.15;margin-bottom:16px;}
        .ph h2{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .ph p{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:24px;}

        /* OSD */
        .osd{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;right:14px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;}
        .video-wrap:hover .osd,.video-wrap.osd-on .osd{opacity:1;}
        .osd-chip{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);padding:7px 14px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);}
        .osd-live{font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
        .osd-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;}
        .osd-btns{display:flex;gap:5px;pointer-events:all;}
        .osd-btn{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#fff;padding:7px 9px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .osd-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* PLAYER CONTROLS */
        .p-controls{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.97));padding:40px 16px 14px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;}
        .video-wrap:hover .p-controls,.video-wrap.osd-on .p-controls{opacity:1;}
        .p-progress{width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px;transition:height 0.2s;}
        .p-progress:hover{height:5px;}
        .p-prog-buf{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:3px;}
        .p-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width 0.1s linear;}
        .p-prog-dot{position:absolute;top:50%;right:0;transform:translate(50%,-50%);width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .p-progress:hover .p-prog-dot{opacity:1;}
        .p-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
        .p-left,.p-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
        .p-btn{background:none;border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:5px 7px;border-radius:7px;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;}
        .p-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
        .p-btn .lbl{font-size:0.73rem;}
        .vol-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .vol-slider{width:70px;height:3px;-webkit-appearance:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
        .vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;}
        .p-time{font-size:0.73rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

        /* BOTTOM PANELS */
        .panels-area{flex-shrink:0;max-height:45%;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
        .vf-panel,.eq-panel,.gallery-panel,.editor-panel,.rss-panel{background:var(--bg-card);padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:none;}
        .vf-panel.show,.eq-panel.show,.gallery-panel.show,.editor-panel.show,.rss-panel.show{display:block;}
        .panel-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
        .panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.85rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .panel-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:5px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .panel-close:hover{color:var(--danger);}
        .vf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;}
        .vf-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
        .vf-row label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
        .vf-slider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
        .vf-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:13px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;}
        .chip-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
        .chip{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);}
        .chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .chip.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
        .eq-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;justify-content:center;height:100px;margin-bottom:10px;}
        .eq-band{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .eq-vslider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:3px;height:90px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;writing-mode:vertical-lr;direction:rtl;cursor:pointer;}
        .eq-vslider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:14px;height:7px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;}
        .eq-lbl{font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .eq-viz{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:30px;margin-left:auto;}
        .eq-viz-bar{width:3px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:1px;animation:eqAnim var(--d,0.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
        @keyframes eqAnim{from{height:4px;}to{height:var(--h,20px);}}

        /* FLOATING WIDGETS */
        .sleep-badge,.rec-badge,.bw-widget,.perf-widget{position:fixed;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .sleep-badge{top:68px;right:16px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:0.8rem;}
        .sleep-badge.show{display:flex;}
        .sleep-t{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .sleep-x{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px;}
        .sleep-x:hover{color:var(--danger);}
        .rec-badge{top:68px;right:16px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-color:var(--danger);animation:recBlink 1s infinite;z-index:501;}
        .rec-badge.show{display:flex;}
        .rec-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;}
        .rec-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);font-size:0.8rem;}
        .rec-t{font-size:0.8rem;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .rec-stop{background:var(--danger);border:none;color:#fff;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.73rem;}
        @keyframes recBlink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.75;}}
        .bw-widget{bottom:70px;left:16px;padding:10px 14px;display:none;gap:14px;align-items:center;}
        .bw-widget.show{display:flex;}
        .bw-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;}
        .bw-val{font-weight:700;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .bw-lbl{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .perf-widget{top:68px;left:16px;padding:10px 12px;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;font-size:0.7rem;min-width:160px;}
        .perf-widget.show{display:flex;}
        .perf-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}
        .perf-k{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .perf-v{font-weight:600;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .perf-v.g{color:var(--success);}.perf-v.w{color:var(--warning);}.perf-v.b{color:var(--danger);}

        /* MINI PLAYER */
        .mini-player{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 16px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
        .mini-player.show{display:flex;}
        .mini-thumb{width:56px;height:38px;background:#000;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;}
        .mini-thumb video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .mini-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
        .mini-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
        .mini-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .mini-ctrl{display:flex;gap:6px;}
        .mini-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}
        .mini-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

        /* PIP */
        .pip-win{position:fixed;z-index:800;border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 15px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);display:none;cursor:move;width:360px;height:210px;bottom:80px;right:16px;resize:both;}
        .pip-win.show{display:block;animation:pipIn 0.3s ease-out;}
        @keyframes pipIn{from{transform:scale(0.6);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
        .pip-win video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;pointer-events:none;}
        .pip-bar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.8),transparent);padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .pip-win:hover .pip-bar{opacity:1;}
        .pip-name{font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;}
        .pip-close{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.62rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}

        /* CHANNEL PREVIEW */
        .ch-preview{position:fixed;z-index:900;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px;width:220px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:none;}
        .ch-preview.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.15s ease-out;}
        @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.96);}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}}
        .ch-prev-video{width:100%;height:120px;background:#000;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .ch-prev-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .ch-prev-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.82rem;}
        .ch-prev-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* CONTEXT MENU */
        .ctx-menu{position:fixed;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:5px;min-width:200px;z-index:3000;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);display:none;}
        .ctx-menu.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.15s ease-out;}
        .ctx-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-secondary);transition:var(--transition);}
        .ctx-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .ctx-item.danger:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:var(--danger);}
        .ctx-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 10px;}

        /* PIN OVERLAY */
        .pin-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.92);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);}
        .pin-overlay.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
        .pin-box{background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:36px;text-align:center;width:320px;}
        .pin-inputs{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
        .pin-input{width:48px;height:52px;text-align:center;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;background:var(--bg-card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}
        .pin-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}

        /* MULTI-VIEW */
        .mv-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
        .mv-toolbar{padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .mv-grid{flex:1;display:grid;gap:3px;padding:3px;background:var(--bg-primary);overflow:hidden;}
        .mv-grid.g2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.mv-grid.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
        .mv-grid.g6{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}.mv-grid.g9{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:repeat(3,1fr);}
        .mv-cell{background:#111;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:2px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);cursor:pointer;}
        .mv-cell:hover{border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.5);}.mv-cell.active-cell{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent-glow);}
        .mv-cell video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
        .mv-lbl{position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:6px;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;}
        .mv-rm{position:absolute;top:5px;right:5px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);border:none;color:#fff;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.62rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .mv-cell:hover .mv-rm{opacity:1;}
        .mv-add{background:var(--bg-card);border:2px dashed var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.82rem;gap:6px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
        .mv-add:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}.mv-add-icon{font-size:2rem;}

        /* GRID PAGES */
        .grid-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;align-content:start;}
        .g-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
        .g-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .g-card:active{transform:translateY(-1px);}
        .g-card-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .g-card-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
        .g-card-sub{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* CAST PAGE */
        .cast-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
        .cast-devices{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
        .cast-device{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px 22px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);min-width:150px;}
        .cast-device:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .cast-device.connected{border-color:var(--success);background:rgba(16,185,129,0.08);}
        .cast-device-icon{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .cast-device-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;margin-bottom:3px;}
        .cast-device-status{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .cast-device.connected .cast-device-status{color:var(--success);}

        /* STATS PAGE */
        .stats-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
        .stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:12px;padding:16px;}
        .stat-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px;}
        .stat-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .stat-val{font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:2px;}
        .stat-lbl{font-size:0.77rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* SETTINGS */
        .settings-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
        .settings-inner{padding:20px;max-width:680px;}
        .set-section{margin-bottom:22px;}
        .set-sec-title{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
        .set-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 0;}
        .set-info h4{font-size:0.86rem;margin-bottom:2px;}.set-info p{font-size:0.73rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .tgl{position:relative;width:42px;height:22px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}
        .tgl input{display:none;}.tgl-track{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .tgl-thumb{position:absolute;width:16px;height:16px;background:var(--text-muted);border-radius:50%;top:2px;left:3px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .tgl input:checked~.tgl-track{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tgl input:checked~.tgl-thumb{transform:translateX(19px);background:#fff;}
        .theme-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:10px;}
        .theme-card{padding:10px;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition);}
        .theme-card:hover{border-color:var(--text-secondary);}.theme-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent-glow);}
        .theme-preview{width:100%;height:28px;border-radius:5px;margin-bottom:5px;}
        .theme-name{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;}

        /* WATCH PARTY */
        .wp-page{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
        .wp-video{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;position:relative;}
        .wp-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
        .wp-sidebar{width:280px;min-width:280px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
        .wp-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px;}
        .wp-msg{margin-bottom:6px;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;}
        .wp-msg-user{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
        .wp-msg-text{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .wp-input-row{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
        .wp-input{flex:1;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.8rem;outline:none;}
        .wp-send{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.88rem;}

        /* MODALS */
        .modal-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.75);backdrop-filter:blur(5px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(5px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:5000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);}
        .modal-bg.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
        .modal{background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:24px;width:92%;max-width:520px;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:scale(0.94);transition:transform 0.25s;}
        .modal-bg.show .modal{transform:scale(1);}
        .modal-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:18px;}
        .modal-title{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;}
        .modal-x{background:var(--bg-card);border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}
        .modal-x:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
        .fg{margin-bottom:14px;}
        .fl{display:block;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:5px;}
        .fi,.ft,.fs{width:100%;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}
        .fi:focus,.ft:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
        .ft{resize:vertical;min-height:85px;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;}
        .btn{padding:8px 16px;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .btn-p{background:var(--gradient-main);color:#fff;}.btn-p:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 5px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
        .btn-p:active{transform:translateY(0);}
        .btn-s{background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);}
        .btn-s:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .btn-danger{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.1);color:var(--danger);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);}
        .btn-danger:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
        .btn-row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:16px;}

        /* TOASTS */
        .toast-stack{position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:99998;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
        .toast{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:11px;padding:10px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;min-width:260px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);animation:toastIn 0.3s ease-out;}
        .toast.out{animation:toastOut 0.3s forwards;}
        .t-ok{border-left:3px solid var(--success);}.t-err{border-left:3px solid var(--danger);}
        .t-warn{border-left:3px solid var(--warning);}.t-info{border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);}
        .toast-icon{font-size:1rem;}.toast-msg{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:500;}
        @keyframes toastIn{from{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
        @keyframes toastOut{to{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}}

        /* NEW: Gesture bubble */
        .gesture-hint{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;pointer-events:none;z-index:20;}
        .gesture-bubble{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:12px;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .gesture-bubble.show{opacity:1;}
        .ch-num-overlay{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);color:#fff;font-size:4rem;font-weight:900;padding:20px 30px;border-radius:16px;display:none;z-index:30;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .ch-num-overlay.show{display:block;}
        .snap-flash{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#fff;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;transition:opacity 0.1s;}
        .snap-flash.flash{opacity:0.8;}
        .buf-spinner{position:absolute;z-index:15;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
        .buf-spinner.show{display:flex;}
        .spinner{width:40px;height:40px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;}
        @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
        .buf-text{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);}
        .suggest-row{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:4px;max-width:580px;}
        .suggest-row::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
        .suggest-chip{flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);text-align:center;min-width:100px;}
        .suggest-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
        .suggest-chip-icon{font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
        .suggest-chip-name{font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:90px;}
        .suggest-chip-cat{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .reminder-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:5px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
        .rem-time{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);min-width:45px;font-size:0.8rem;}
        .rem-ch{flex:1;font-weight:600;font-size:0.82rem;}
        .rem-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:3px;}.rem-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

        /* EPG, World Clock */
        .epg-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;max-width:700px;}
        .wc-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;max-width:800px;}
        .wc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(100px,1fr));gap:10px;margin:16px 0;}
        .wc-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center;}
        .wc-flag{font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:5px;}.wc-time{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.wc-city{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px;}
        .about-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;}

        /* FULLSCREEN */
        .fs-mode .sidebar,.fs-mode .ch-panel,.fs-mode .topbar,.fs-mode .mini-player{display:none!important;}
        .fs-mode .player-area{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9990;}

        /* ═══ NEW FEATURES STYLES ═══ */

        /* Voice Command Button */
        .voice-btn{position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
        .voice-btn.listening{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);animation:voicePulse 1s infinite;}
        @keyframes voicePulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 var(--accent-glow);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px transparent;}}
        .voice-transcript{position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 30px;z-index:9500;display:none;text-align:center;min-width:300px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
        .voice-transcript.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.2s ease-out;}
        .voice-transcript .vt-text{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .voice-transcript .vt-status{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .voice-wave{display:flex;gap:3px;justify-content:center;margin:12px 0;height:30px;align-items:center;}
        .voice-wave span{width:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;animation:vWave var(--d,0.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
        @keyframes vWave{from{height:6px;}to{height:var(--h,22px);}}

        /* Screenshot Gallery */
        .gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:8px;max-height:250px;overflow-y:auto;}
        .gallery-item{position:relative;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;aspect-ratio:16/9;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition);}
        .gallery-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:scale(1.03);}
        .gallery-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .gallery-item .gi-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.6);opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;}
        .gallery-item:hover .gi-overlay{opacity:1;}
        .gi-btn{background:var(--bg-glass);border:none;color:#fff;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
        .gi-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}
        .gallery-empty{text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);padding:40px 20px;font-size:0.85rem;}

        /* RSS Feed */
        .rss-items{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;}
        .rss-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
        .rss-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
        .rss-item-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
        .rss-item-title{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;flex:1;}
        .rss-item-time{font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .rss-item-cat{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* Stream Health */
        .health-bar{width:100%;height:8px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;margin:6px 0;}
        .health-fill{height:100%;border-radius:4px;transition:width 0.5s,background 0.5s;}
        .health-score{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:700;}
        .health-excellent{background:rgba(16,185,129,0.12);color:var(--success);}
        .health-good{background:rgba(6,182,212,0.12);color:var(--accent4);}
        .health-fair{background:rgba(245,158,11,0.12);color:var(--warning);}
        .health-poor{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:var(--danger);}

        /* Quick Channel Switcher */
        .qcs-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:8000;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-top:60px;}
        .qcs-overlay.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn 0.15s;}
        .qcs-search{width:90%;max-width:500px;padding:14px 20px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--accent);border-radius:14px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:1.1rem;outline:none;margin-bottom:16px;box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--accent-glow);}
        .qcs-search::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .qcs-results{width:90%;max-width:500px;max-height:60vh;overflow-y:auto;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;}
        .qcs-result{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 16px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
        .qcs-result:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
        .qcs-result:hover,.qcs-result.selected{background:var(--bg-hover);}
        .qcs-result.selected{border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
        .qcs-num{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);min-width:28px;}
        .qcs-name{font-weight:600;flex:1;}
        .qcs-cat{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* Editor Panel */
        .editor-list{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;}
        .editor-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
        .editor-item input{flex:1;padding:5px 8px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.8rem;outline:none;}
        .editor-item input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
        .editor-item select{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px 6px;border-radius:6px;font-size:0.75rem;}
        .editor-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.85rem;border-radius:4px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .editor-btn:hover{color:var(--accent);}
        .editor-btn.del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

        /* Audio Visualizer */
        .audio-viz{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:60px;pointer-events:none;z-index:5;opacity:0.6;}

        /* Channel Number Badge */
        .ch-num-badge{position:absolute;top:-4px;left:-4px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:0.55rem;font-weight:700;padding:1px 4px;border-radius:4px;line-height:1;z-index:2;}

        /* STREAM HEALTH WIDGET */
        .stream-health{
            position:absolute;top:50px;right:14px;
            background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
            border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
            padding:8px 12px;display:none;z-index:11;font-size:0.72rem;min-width:140px;
        }
        .video-wrap:hover .stream-health{display:block;}
        .sh-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:3px;}
        .sh-k{color:var(--text-muted);}.sh-v{font-weight:600;}

        /* AUDIO ONLY MODE OVERLAY */
        .audio-only-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:25;}
        .audio-only-overlay.show{display:flex;}
        .ao-icon{font-size:4rem;margin-bottom:16px;animation:aoFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
        @keyframes aoFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}}
        .ao-name{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;}
        .ao-cat{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;}
        .ao-bars{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:20px;align-items:flex-end;height:40px;}
        .ao-bar{width:4px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--accent);animation:aoBar var(--d,0.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
        @keyframes aoBar{from{height:6px;}to{height:var(--h,35px);}}

        /* TIMELINE BADGE FOR STREAM */
        .stream-timeline{position:absolute;bottom:60px;left:14px;right:14px;z-index:11;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;}
        .video-wrap:hover .stream-timeline{opacity:1;}
        .st-channels{display:flex;gap:4px;overflow-x:auto;padding:4px 0;}
        .st-ch{flex-shrink:0;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:0.68rem;background:var(--bg-glass);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);white-space:nowrap;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);}
        .st-ch:hover,.st-ch.now{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}

        /* ADVANCED SEARCH */
        .adv-search{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9000;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);display:none;flex-direction:column;padding:60px 20px 20px;}
        .adv-search.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn 0.15s;}
        .adv-top{display:flex;gap:10px;max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;}
        .adv-input{flex:1;padding:14px 20px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:14px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:1.1rem;outline:none;box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--accent-glow);}
        .adv-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .adv-filters{display:flex;gap:8px;max-width:700px;margin:12px auto 0;flex-wrap:wrap;}
        .adv-filter{padding:5px 12px;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
        .adv-filter:hover,.adv-filter.active{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
        .adv-results{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;max-width:700px;margin:16px auto 0;width:100%;}
        .adv-result{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border-radius:8px;}
        .adv-result:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
        .adv-result-logo{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-card);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:0.8rem;flex-shrink:0;}
        .adv-result-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
        .adv-result-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.9rem;}
        .adv-result-meta{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:2px;}
        .adv-result-rating{color:var(--warning);}
        .adv-close{position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;z-index:9001;}

        /* MEDIA TIMER BADGE */
        .timer-badge{position:fixed;top:68px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--warning);border-radius:10px;padding:6px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:0.8rem;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .timer-badge.show{display:flex;}
        .timer-val{font-weight:700;color:var(--warning);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .timer-lbl{color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ABOUT PAGE IMPROVEMENTS */
        .about-feats{background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:15px;padding:22px;text-align:left;line-height:2.2;font-size:0.83rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .about-feats h3{color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:8px;}

        /* RESPONSIVE */
        @media(max-width:1100px){
            .sidebar{position:fixed;left:-270px;height:100%;z-index:600;box-shadow:none;}
            .sidebar.open{left:0;box-shadow:5px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
            .mob-menu-btn{display:flex;}
            :root{--sb-width:250px;}
        }
        @media(max-width:820px){
            .ch-panel{position:fixed;left:0;top:0;height:100%;width:100%;z-index:550;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform 0.3s;}
            .ch-panel.open{transform:translateX(0);}
            .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
            .theme-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
            .vf-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
            .wp-sidebar{width:240px;min-width:240px;}
        }
        @media(max-width:580px){
            .grid-page{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));}
            .cast-device{min-width:120px;padding:14px 16px;}
            .modal{padding:18px;}
            .pip-win{width:280px;height:165px;}
            .tb-clock{display:none;}
            .vol-slider{width:55px;}
            .wp-sidebar{display:none;}
            .wc-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(85px,1fr));}
            .gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
        }
        @media(max-width:420px){.p-right .p-btn:not(:last-child){display:none;}.suggest-chip{min-width:85px;}}
        @media(hover:none){.osd,.p-controls{opacity:1!important;}}
    </style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SPLASH -->
<div class="splash" id="splash">
    <div class="splash-logo">📺</div>
    <h1>MODÜL TV</h1>
    <div class="splash-v">v6.1 ULTRA PRO</div>
    <div class="splash-bar"><div class="splash-fill"></div></div>
    <div class="splash-feat" id="splashFeat">Başlatılıyor…</div>
</div>

<!-- TOASTS -->
<div class="toast-stack" id="toasts"></div>

<!-- FLOATING WIDGETS -->
<div class="sleep-badge" id="sleepBadge">😴 <span class="sleep-t" id="sleepT">00:00</span><button class="sleep-x" onclick="cancelSleep()">✕</button></div>
<div class="rec-badge" id="recBadge"><div class="rec-dot"></div><span class="rec-lbl">REC</span><span class="rec-t" id="recT">00:00</span><button class="rec-stop" onclick="stopRec()">⏹</button></div>
<div class="timer-badge" id="timerBadge"><span class="timer-lbl">⏱ Kalan:</span><span class="timer-val" id="timerVal">00:00</span><button class="sleep-x" onclick="stopMediaTimer()">✕</button></div>
<div class="bw-widget" id="bwWidget">
    <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwDown">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">↓ KB/s</div></div>
    <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwBuf">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">Buffer</div></div>
    <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwBit">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">Kbps</div></div>
</div>
<div class="perf-widget" id="perfWidget">
    <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.73rem;color:var(--accent4);margin-bottom:4px;">📊 Performans</div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">FPS</span><span class="perf-v g" id="pFps">60</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Çözünürlük</span><span class="perf-v" id="pRes">—</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Bitrate</span><span class="perf-v" id="pBit">—</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Buffer</span><span class="perf-v" id="pBuf">—</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Codec</span><span class="perf-v" id="pCodec">—</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Dropped</span><span class="perf-v" id="pDrop">0</span></div>
    <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Latency</span><span class="perf-v" id="pLat">—</span></div>
</div>

<!-- VOICE TRANSCRIPT -->
<div class="voice-transcript" id="voiceTranscript">
    <div class="vt-text" id="vtText">Dinleniyor…</div>
    <div class="vt-status" id="vtStatus">Bir komut söyleyin</div>
    <div class="voice-wave" id="voiceWave"></div>
</div>

<!-- CONTEXT MENU -->
<div class="ctx-menu" id="ctxMenu">
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxPlay()">▶️ Oynat</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxFav()">⭐ Favoriye Ekle/Çıkar</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxAddMV()">🖥️ Çoklu Ekrana Ekle</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxRate()">⭐ Puanla</div>
    <div class="ctx-sep"></div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxCopy()">🔗 URL Kopyala</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxInfo()">ℹ️ Kanal Bilgisi</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxReminder()">⏰ Hatırlatıcı</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxCast()">📡 Yansıt</div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxTimer()">⏱ Zamanlayıcı</div>
    <div class="ctx-sep"></div>
    <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxLock()">🔒 Ebeveyn Kilidi</div>
    <div class="ctx-item danger" onclick="ctxHide()">🚫 Gizle</div>
</div>

<!-- CHANNEL PREVIEW -->
<div class="ch-preview" id="chPreview">
    <div class="ch-prev-video"><video id="previewVid" muted playsinline></video></div>
    <div class="ch-prev-name" id="previewName"></div>
    <div class="ch-prev-cat" id="previewCat"></div>
</div>

<!-- PIN OVERLAY -->
<div class="pin-overlay" id="pinOverlay">
    <div class="pin-box">
        <div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:12px;">🔒</div>
        <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;">Ebeveyn Kontrolü</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:4px;">PIN kodunuzu girin</div>
        <div class="pin-inputs">
            <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin0" oninput="pinNext(0)">
            <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin1" oninput="pinNext(1)">
            <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin2" oninput="pinNext(2)">
            <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin3" oninput="pinNext(3)">
        </div>
        <div class="btn-row" style="justify-content:center;">
            <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="closePin()">İptal</button>
            <button class="btn btn-p" onclick="checkPin()">Doğrula</button>
        </div>
    </div>
</div>

<!-- CUSTOM PIP -->
<div class="pip-win" id="pipWin">
    <video id="pipVid" muted playsinline></video>
    <div class="pip-bar"><span class="pip-name" id="pipName">—</span><button class="pip-close" onclick="closePip()">✕</button></div>
</div>

<!-- QUICK CHANNEL SWITCHER -->
<div class="qcs-overlay" id="qcsOverlay">
    <input class="qcs-search" id="qcsSearch" placeholder="Hızlı kanal geçişi… ESC ile kapat" oninput="filterQCS(this.value)">
    <div class="qcs-results" id="qcsResults"></div>
</div>

<!-- ADVANCED SEARCH -->
<div class="adv-search" id="advSearch">
    <button class="adv-close" onclick="closeAdvSearch()">✕</button>
    <div class="adv-top">
        <input class="adv-input" id="advInput" placeholder="🔍 Gelişmiş arama…" oninput="doAdvSearch()">
    </div>
    <div class="adv-filters" id="advFilters"></div>
    <div class="adv-results" id="advResults"></div>
</div>

<!-- APP -->
<div class="app" id="app">

    <!-- SIDEBAR -->
    <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
        <div class="sb-logo-wrap">
            <span class="sb-logo sb-text">📺 MODÜL TV</span>
            <button class="sb-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleSB()">☰</button>
        </div>
        <nav class="sb-scroll">
            <div class="sb-section">ANA MENÜ</div>
            <div class="sb-item active" data-p="tv" onclick="goPage('tv')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📺</span><span class="sb-text">Canlı TV</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="multiview" onclick="goPage('multiview')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🖥️</span><span class="sb-text">Çoklu Ekran</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="favorites" onclick="goPage('favorites')"><span class="sb-item-icon">⭐</span><span class="sb-text">Favoriler</span><span class="sb-badge" id="favCnt">0</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="history" onclick="goPage('history')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🕐</span><span class="sb-text">Geçmiş</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="gallery" onclick="goPage('gallery')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📷</span><span class="sb-text">Galeri</span><span class="sb-badge" id="galCnt" style="display:none;">0</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="watchparty" onclick="goPage('watchparty')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🎉</span><span class="sb-text">Watch Party</span><span class="sb-badge new">YENİ</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="rss" onclick="goPage('rss')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📰</span><span class="sb-text">Canlı Haberler</span><span class="sb-badge hot" id="rssBadge" style="display:none;">0</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="cast" onclick="goPage('cast')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📡</span><span class="sb-text">Ekran Yansıtma</span></div>
            <div class="sb-section">ARAÇLAR</div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('plModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📋</span><span class="sb-text">Playlist Yükle</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('sleepModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">😴</span><span class="sb-text">Uyku Zamanlayıcı</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('reminderModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">⏰</span><span class="sb-text">Hatırlatıcılar</span><span class="sb-badge hot" id="remCnt" style="display:none;">0</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('timerModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">⏱️</span><span class="sb-text">Oto. Durdurma</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('acsModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🔄</span><span class="sb-text">Oto. Kanal Geçişi</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="toggleAudioOnly()"><span class="sb-item-icon">🎧</span><span class="sb-text">Ses Modu</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="toggleVoiceCmd()"><span class="sb-item-icon">🎤</span><span class="sb-text">Sesli Komut</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="stats" onclick="goPage('stats')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📊</span><span class="sb-text">İstatistikler</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="epg" onclick="goPage('epg')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📅</span><span class="sb-text">Program Rehberi</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="worldclock" onclick="goPage('worldclock')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🌍</span><span class="sb-text">Dünya Saati</span></div>
            <div class="sb-section">SİSTEM</div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="settings" onclick="goPage('settings')"><span class="sb-item-icon">⚙️</span><span class="sb-text">Ayarlar</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('shortcutsModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">⌨️</span><span class="sb-text">Kısayollar</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="toggleBW()"><span class="sb-item-icon">📶</span><span class="sb-text">Ağ Monitörü</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" onclick="togglePerf()"><span class="sb-item-icon">📊</span><span class="sb-text">Performans</span></div>
            <div class="sb-item" data-p="about" onclick="goPage('about')"><span class="sb-item-icon">ℹ️</span><span class="sb-text">Hakkında</span></div>
        </nav>
    </aside>

    <!-- MAIN -->
    <main class="main">
        <!-- TOPBAR -->
        <div class="topbar">
            <button class="mob-menu-btn" onclick="toggleSBMobile()">☰</button>
            <div class="search-wrap">
                <span class="si">🔍</span>
                <input id="searchIn" placeholder="Kanal ara… (Ctrl+K)" oninput="doSearch(this.value)" autocomplete="off">
                <button class="search-clear" onclick="clearSearch()">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="tb-right">
                <span class="tb-clock" id="tbClock">00:00</span>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn voice-btn" id="voiceBtn" onclick="toggleVoiceCmd()" title="Sesli Komut">🎤</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="openAdvSearch()" title="Gelişmiş Arama (Ctrl+Shift+F)">🔍</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleVF()" title="Video Filtreler">🎨</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleEQ()" title="Ekolayzır">🎛️</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" id="recBtn" onclick="toggleRec()" title="Kayıt">⏺️</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleMini()" title="Mini Oynatıcı">🎵</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="togglePiP()" title="PiP">🖼️</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleFS()" title="Tam Ekran">⛶</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="openModal('plModal')" title="Playlist">📋</button>
                <button class="tb-icon-btn" onclick="toggleChPanel()" title="Kanal Paneli" id="chPanelBtn">◀</button>
            </div>
        </div>

        <!-- CONTENT -->
        <div class="content">
            <!-- TV PAGE -->
            <div class="page active" id="pg-tv">
                <div class="ch-panel" id="chPanel">
                    <div class="ch-panel-head">
                        <span class="ch-panel-title">📡 Kanallar</span>
                        <span class="ch-count-badge" id="chCount">0</span>
                        <button class="ch-collapse-btn" onclick="toggleChPanel()" title="Gizle">✕</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="cat-bar" id="catBar"></div>
                    <div class="ch-toolbar">
                        <select id="sortSel" onchange="doSort(this.value)">
                            <option value="">Sırala</option><option value="az">A → Z</option><option value="za">Z → A</option>
                            <option value="group">Kategori</option><option value="recent">Son İzlenen</option>
                            <option value="rated">En Beğenilen</option><option value="mostwatch">En Çok İzlenen</option>
                        </select>
                        <div class="view-btns">
                            <button class="view-btn active" id="lvBtn" onclick="setView('list')">☰</button>
                            <button class="view-btn" id="gvBtn" onclick="setView('grid')">⊞</button>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="ch-list" id="chList"></div>
                </div>

                <div class="player-area" id="playerArea">
                    <div class="video-wrap" id="videoWrap">
                        <div class="ph" id="ph">
                            <div class="ph-icon">📺</div>
                            <h2>Modül TV v6.1</h2>
                            <p>İzlemek için bir kanal seçin veya basın "/" tuşu ile hızlı geçiş yapın</p>
                            <div id="phSuggest"></div>
                        </div>
                        <video id="vid" style="display:none;" playsinline></video>
                        <div class="buf-spinner" id="bufSpinner"><div class="spinner"></div><div class="buf-text">Yükleniyor…</div></div>
                        <div class="snap-flash" id="snapFlash"></div>
                        <div class="ch-num-overlay" id="chNumOverlay"></div>
                        <div class="gesture-hint"><div class="gesture-bubble" id="gestureBubble"></div></div>

                        <!-- Audio Only Mode Overlay -->
                        <div class="audio-only-overlay" id="aoOverlay">
                            <div class="ao-icon">🎧</div>
                            <div class="ao-name" id="aoName">—</div>
                            <div class="ao-cat" id="aoCat">Sadece Ses Modu</div>
                            <div class="ao-bars" id="aoBars"></div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Audio Visualizer Canvas -->
                        <canvas class="audio-viz" id="audioViz"></canvas>

                        <!-- OSD -->
                        <div class="osd" id="osd">
                            <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;">
                                <div class="osd-chip">
                                    <span class="osd-live"><span class="live-dot"></span> CANLI</span>
                                    <span class="osd-name" id="osdName">—</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="osd-chip" id="osdQuality" style="font-size:0.72rem;display:none;">Auto</div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="osd-btns">
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="takeSnap()" title="Ekran görüntüsü">📸</button>
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="toggleRec()" title="Kayıt">⏺️</button>
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="togglePiP()" title="PiP">🖼️</button>
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="toggleAudioOnly()" title="Ses Modu">🎧</button>
                                <button class="osd-btn" onclick="toggleFS()" title="Tam Ekran">⛶</button>
                            </div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Stream Health Widget -->
                        <div class="stream-health" id="streamHealth">
                            <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--accent4);margin-bottom:6px;">🎯 Stream Sağlık</div>
                            <div class="health-bar"><div class="health-fill" id="healthFill" style="width:85%;background:var(--success);"></div></div>
                            <div class="sh-row"><span class="sh-k">Skor</span><span class="sh-v" id="healthScore" style="color:var(--success);">85/100</span></div>
                            <div class="sh-row"><span class="sh-k">Gecikme</span><span class="sh-v" id="healthLat">—</span></div>
                            <div class="sh-row"><span class="sh-k">Tutarlılık</span><span class="sh-v" id="healthCon">—</span></div>
                            <div class="sh-row"><span class="sh-k">Düşen K.</span><span class="sh-v" id="healthDrop">0</span></div>
                        </div>

                        <!-- Quick Channel Timeline -->
                        <div class="stream-timeline" id="streamTimeline"><div class="st-channels" id="stChannels"></div></div>

                        <!-- Controls -->
                        <div class="p-controls" id="pControls">
                            <div class="p-progress" id="pProg" onclick="seekVid(event)">
                                <div class="p-prog-buf" id="pBufBar"></div>
                                <div class="p-prog-fill" id="pFill"></div>
                                <div class="p-prog-dot"></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="p-row">
                                <div class="p-left">
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="prevCh()" title="Önceki">⏮</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" id="playBtn" onclick="togglePlay()">⏸</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="nextCh()" title="Sonraki">⏭</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="stopPlay()" title="Durdur">⏹</button>
                                    <div class="vol-wrap">
                                        <button class="p-btn" id="muteBtn" onclick="toggleMute()">🔊</button>
                                        <input type="range" class="vol-slider" id="volSlider" min="0" max="100" value="80" oninput="setVol(this.value)">
                                    </div>
                                    <span class="p-time" id="pTime">00:00:00</span>
                                </div>
                                <div class="p-right">
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="cycleSpeed()"><span class="lbl" id="speedLbl">1×</span></button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="cycleAspect()" title="Görüntü Oranı">📐</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" id="qualBtn" onclick="cycleQ()">🎯 Auto</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="toggleSubs()">💬</button>
                                    <button class="p-btn" onclick="toggleFS()">⛶</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Bottom Panels -->
                    <div class="panels-area" id="panelsArea">
                        <!-- Video Filters -->
                        <div class="vf-panel" id="vfPanel">
                            <div class="panel-head">
                                <span class="panel-title">🎨 Video Filtreleri</span>
                                <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;">
                                    <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="resetVF()" style="padding:3px 10px;font-size:0.72rem;">↺ Sıfırla</button>
                                    <button class="panel-close" onclick="toggleVF()">✕</button>
                                </div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="vf-grid">
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Parlaklık <span id="vfBr">100%</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyVF('brightness',this.value,'vfBr','%')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Kontrast <span id="vfCo">100%</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyVF('contrast',this.value,'vfCo','%')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Doygunluk <span id="vfSa">100%</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="200" value="100" oninput="applyVF('saturate',this.value,'vfSa','%')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Ton <span id="vfHu">0°</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="360" value="0" oninput="applyVF('hue-rotate',this.value,'vfHu','°')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Bulanıklık <span id="vfBl">0px</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="10" value="0" step="0.5" oninput="applyVF('blur',this.value,'vfBl','px')"></div>
                                <div class="vf-row"><label>Sepya <span id="vfSe">0%</span></label><input type="range" class="vf-slider" min="0" max="100" value="0" oninput="applyVF('sepia',this.value,'vfSe','%')"></div>
                            </div>
                            <div class="chip-row" id="vfPresets"></div>
                        </div>
                        <!-- EQ -->
                        <div class="eq-panel" id="eqPanel">
                            <div class="panel-head">
                                <span class="panel-title">🎛️ Ses Ekolayzırı <div class="eq-viz" id="eqViz"></div></span>
                                <button class="panel-close" onclick="toggleEQ()">✕</button>
                            </div>
                            <div class="eq-bars" id="eqBars"></div>
                            <div class="chip-row" id="eqPresets"></div>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- MULTI-VIEW -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-multiview">
                <div class="mv-wrap">
                    <div class="mv-toolbar">
                        <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;">🖥️ Çoklu Ekran</span>
                        <select id="mvLayout" onchange="setMVLayout(this.value)" style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:5px 9px;border-radius:8px;font-size:0.78rem;">
                            <option value="g2">2 Ekran</option><option value="g4" selected>4 Ekran</option><option value="g6">6 Ekran</option><option value="g9">9 Ekran</option>
                        </select>
                        <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="clearMV()" style="margin-left:auto;font-size:0.78rem;padding:5px 10px;">🗑️ Temizle</button>
                    </div>
                    <div class="mv-grid g4" id="mvGrid"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- FAVORITES -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-favorites"><div class="grid-page" id="favGrid"></div></div>

            <!-- HISTORY -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-history"><div class="grid-page" id="histGrid"></div></div>

            <!-- GALLERY -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-gallery">
                <div style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;">
                    <h2 style="margin-bottom:4px;">📷 Ekran Görüntüsü Galerisi</h2>
                    <p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.82rem;margin-bottom:16px;">Canlı yayından yakalanan anlar</p>
                    <div class="gallery-grid" id="galleryGrid"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- RSS -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-rss">
                <div style="flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;max-width:700px;">
                    <h2 style="margin-bottom:4px;">📰 Canlı Haber Akışı</h2>
                    <p style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.82rem;margin-bottom:16px;">RSS beslemelerinden güncel haberler</p>
                    <div class="fg"><label class="fl">RSS URL</label><input class="fi" id="rssUrl" placeholder="https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/turkish/rss.xml" value="https://feeds.bbci.co.uk/turkish/rss.xml"></div>
                    <button class="btn btn-p" onclick="loadRSS()">📥 Yükle</button>
                    <div class="rss-items" id="rssItems" style="margin-top:14px;"></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- WATCH PARTY -->
            <div class="page" id="pg-watchparty">
                <div class="wp-page">
                    <div class="wp-video">
                        <video id="wpVid" playsinline style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;"></video>
                        <div id="wpPh" style="position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text-muted);">
                            <div style="font-size:4rem;margin-bottom:10px;">🎉</div>
                            <h2 style="font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--text-secondary);">Watch Party</h2>
                            <p style="font-size:0.82rem;">Oda oluşturun veya katılın</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="wp-sidebar">
                        <div style="padding:10px 12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;">
                            <span style="font-weight:700;font-size:0.88rem;">💬 Sohbet</span>
                            <span style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-left:auto;" id="wpUsers">0 kişi</span>
                        </div>
                        <div style="padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);">
                            <div style="display:flex;gap:5px;margin-bottom:6px;">
                                <button class="btn btn-p" onclick="createWPRoom()" style="font-size:0.75rem;padding:5px 10px;flex:1;justify-content:center;">🏠 Oluştur</button>
                                <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="joinWPRoom()" style="font-size:0.75rem;padding:5px 10px;flex:1;justify-content:center;">🚪 Katıl</button>
                            </div>
                            <div style="font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);" id="wpRoomInfo">Oda yok</div>
                        </div>
                        <div class="wp-msgs" id="wpMsgs"></div>
                        <div class="wp-input-row">
                            <input class="wp-input" id="wpInput" placeholder="Mesaj…" onkeydown="if(event.key==='Enter')sendWP()">
```
