```html
function setSleep(mins){if(!mins||mins<=0){toast('Geçerli süre girin','warn');return;}cancelSleep();sleepLeft=mins*60;document.getElementById('sleepBadge').classList.add('show');updSleep();sleepTimer=setInterval(()=>{sleepLeft--;updSleep();if(sleepLeft<=0){cancelSleep();document.getElementById('vid').pause();setPlayBtn(true);toast('😴 Oynatma durduruldu','info');}},1000);toast(`😴 ${mins} dk sonra kapanacak`,'ok');}
function updSleep(){const m=Math.floor(sleepLeft/60),s=sleepLeft%60;document.getElementById('sleepT').textContent=`${String(m).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')}`;}
function cancelSleep(){if(sleepTimer){clearInterval(sleepTimer);sleepTimer=null;}sleepLeft=0;document.getElementById('sleepBadge').classList.remove('show');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MULTI-VIEW
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initMV(){mvSlots=[null,null,null,null];renderMV();}
function renderMV(){const grid=document.getElementById('mvGrid');const layout=document.getElementById('mvLayout').value;grid.className='mv-grid '+layout;const cnt=parseInt(layout.replace('g',''));while(mvSlots.length<cnt)mvSlots.push(null);let html='';for(let i=0;i<cnt;i++){if(mvSlots[i])html+=`<div class="mv-cell ${i===0?'active-cell':''}" onclick="mvSelect(${i})"><video id="mvVid${i}" muted autoplay playsinline></video><div class="mv-lbl">${mvSlots[i].name}</div><button class="mv-rm" onclick="event.stopPropagation();removeMV(${i})">✕</button></div>`;else html+=`<div class="mv-add" onclick="mvPick(${i})"><div class="mv-add-icon">+</div><div>Kanal Ekle</div></div>`;}grid.innerHTML=html;for(let i=0;i<cnt;i++){if(mvSlots[i]){const vid=document.getElementById(`mvVid${i}`);if(vid)attachMVStream(vid,mvSlots[i].url,i);}}}
function attachMVStream(vid,url,idx){if(mvHls[idx]){mvHls[idx].destroy();mvHls[idx]=null;}if(url.includes('.m3u8')&&Hls.isSupported()){const h=new Hls({enableWorker:true,maxBufferLength:10});h.loadSource(url);h.attachMedia(vid);h.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED,()=>vid.play().catch(()=>{}));mvHls[idx]=h;}else{vid.src=url;vid.play().catch(()=>{});}}
function addToMV(ch){const empty=mvSlots.findIndex(s=>s===null);if(empty===-1){toast('Tüm slotlar dolu','warn');return;}mvSlots[empty]=ch;toast(`🖥️ ${ch.name} eklendi (Slot ${empty+1})`,'ok');if(document.getElementById('pg-multiview').classList.contains('active'))renderMV();}
function removeMV(idx){if(mvHls[idx]){mvHls[idx].destroy();mvHls[idx]=null;}mvSlots[idx]=null;renderMV();toast('Slot temizlendi','info');}
function clearMV(){mvHls.forEach(h=>{if(h)h.destroy();});mvHls=[];mvSlots=mvSlots.map(()=>null);renderMV();toast('🗑️ Tüm slotlar temizlendi','info');}
function setMVLayout(v){renderMV();}
function mvSelect(idx){document.querySelectorAll('.mv-cell').forEach((c,i)=>{c.classList.toggle('active-cell',i===idx);const v=document.getElementById(`mvVid${i}`);if(v)v.muted=(i!==idx);});}
function mvPick(slot){const names=channels.map(c=>c.name);let pick=prompt('Kanal adı girin:\n\n'+names.slice(0,15).join(', ')+(names.length>15?'...':''));if(!pick)return;const ch=channels.find(c=>c.name.toLowerCase().includes(pick.toLowerCase()));if(ch){mvSlots[slot]=ch;renderMV();toast(`✅ ${ch.name}`,'ok');}else toast('Kanal bulunamadı','warn');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CAST
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function connectDevice(el){document.querySelectorAll('.cast-device').forEach(d=>d.classList.remove('connected'));el.classList.add('connected');el.querySelector('.cast-device-status').textContent='✅ Bağlandı';toast('📡 Bağlandı','ok');if(curCh)toast(`📺 ${curCh.name} yansıtılıyor...`,'info');}
function scanDevices(){toast('🔄 Taranıyor...','info');setTimeout(()=>toast('Yeni cihaz bulunamadı','info'),2000);}
async function startScreenShare(){try{const stream=await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({video:{cursor:'always'},audio:true});toast('🖥️ Ekran paylaşımı başladı','ok');stream.getVideoTracks()[0].onended=()=>toast('Paylaşım sonlandı','info');}catch(e){toast('İptal edildi','warn');}}
function startSecondScreen(){if(!curCh){toast('Kanal seçin','warn');return;}const w=window.open('','ss','width=800,height=500');w.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>${curCh.name}</title><style>*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}body{background:#000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100vh;overflow:hidden;}video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}.info{position:fixed;top:10px;left:10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);color:#fff;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-family:sans-serif;font-size:13px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}</style></head><body><div class="info"><span style="color:#e50914;font-weight:bold;">● CANLI</span> ${curCh.name}</div><video id="v" autoplay playsinline></video><script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/hls.js@latest"><\/script><script>const v=document.getElementById('v');const url='${curCh.url}';if(url.includes('.m3u8')&&Hls.isSupported()){const h=new Hls();h.loadSource(url);h.attachMedia(v);h.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED,()=>v.play());}else{v.src=url;v.play();}<\/script></body></html>`);toast('📱 İkinci ekran açıldı','ok');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PIP & MINI PLAYER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function togglePiP(){const pip=document.getElementById('pipWin');if(pip.classList.contains('show')){closePip();return;}if(!curCh){toast('Kanal seçin','warn');return;}pip.classList.add('show');document.getElementById('pipName').textContent=curCh.name;const pv=document.getElementById('pipVid');if(pipHls){pipHls.destroy();pipHls=null;}pipHls=attachStream(pv,curCh.url,null);toast('🖼️ PiP açıldı','info');makeDraggable(pip);}
function closePip(){document.getElementById('pipWin').classList.remove('show');if(pipHls){pipHls.destroy();pipHls=null;}document.getElementById('pipVid').src='';}
function makeDraggable(el){let isDrag=false,sX,sY,oX,oY;const bar=el.querySelector('.pip-bar');if(!bar)return;bar.onmousedown=e=>{isDrag=true;sX=e.clientX;sY=e.clientY;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();oX=r.left;oY=r.top;e.preventDefault();};document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{if(!isDrag)return;el.style.left=(oX+e.clientX-sX)+'px';el.style.top=(oY+e.clientY-sY)+'px';el.style.right='auto';el.style.bottom='auto';});document.addEventListener('mouseup',()=>isDrag=false);}
function toggleMini(){miniOn=!miniOn;document.getElementById('miniPlayer').classList.toggle('show',miniOn);if(miniOn&&curCh){document.getElementById('miniName').textContent=curCh.name;document.getElementById('miniCat').textContent=curCh.group||'';const mv=document.getElementById('miniVid');attachStream(mv,curCh.url,null);}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WORLD CLOCK
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderWorldClock(){const grid=document.getElementById('wcGrid');if(!grid)return;grid.innerHTML=WORLD_CITIES.map(c=>{const now=new Date();const ts=now.toLocaleTimeString('tr-TR',{timeZone:c.tz,hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'});const h=parseInt(now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{timeZone:c.tz,hour:'numeric',hour12:false}));const day=h>=6&&h<20;return`<div class="wc-card"><div class="wc-flag">${c.flag}</div><div class="wc-time" style="color:${day?'var(--warning)':'var(--accent4)'};">${ts}</div><div class="wc-city">${c.city} ${day?'☀️':'🌙'}</div></div>`;}).join('');const bc=document.getElementById('wcBroadcasts');if(bc){const h=new Date().getHours();let recs=[];if(h>=6&&h<12)recs=[{n:'Sabah Haberleri',g:'Haber'},{n:'Çocuk Kuşağı',g:'Çocuk'}];else if(h>=12&&h<18)recs=[{n:'Öğle Haberleri',g:'Haber'},{n:'Spor',g:'Spor'}];else if(h>=18&&h<23)recs=[{n:'Ana Haber',g:'Haber'},{n:'Prime Time',g:'Dizi/Film'}];else recs=[{n:'Gece Sineması',g:'Film'},{n:'Belgesel',g:'Belgesel'}];bc.innerHTML=recs.map(r=>`<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;"><div style="font-weight:600;margin-bottom:3px;">📺 ${r.n}</div><div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);">${r.g}</div></div>`).join('');}}
setInterval(renderWorldClock,1000);

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EPG
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
async function loadEPG(){const url=document.getElementById('epgUrl').value.trim();if(!url){toast('EPG URL girin','warn');return;}toast('📅 Yükleniyor...','info');try{const res=await fetch(`https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=${encodeURIComponent(url)}`);const text=await res.text();const parser=new DOMParser();const xml=parser.parseFromString(text,'text/xml');const progs=xml.querySelectorAll('programme');let html='<div style="margin-top:12px;">';const shown=new Set();progs.forEach(p=>{const ch=p.getAttribute('channel');const title=p.querySelector('title')?.textContent||'?';const start=p.getAttribute('start');if(!shown.has(ch+title)&&shown.size<50){shown.add(ch+title);const ts=start?`${start.substr(8,2)}:${start.substr(10,2)}`:'';html+=`<div style="padding:9px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;"><span style="color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;min-width:45px;">${ts}</span><span style="font-weight:600;">${title}</span><span style="color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.72rem;margin-left:auto;">${ch}</span></div>`;}});html+='</div>';document.getElementById('epgData').innerHTML=html;toast(`📅 ${progs.length} program yüklendi`,'ok');}catch(e){toast('EPG yüklenemedi','err');}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// THEMES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initThemes(){const cur=localStorage.getItem('mtv_theme')||'Default';document.getElementById('themeGrid').innerHTML=Object.entries(THEMES).map(([n,t])=>`<div class="theme-card ${n===cur?'active':''}" onclick="applyTheme('${n}')" id="thm-${n}"><div class="theme-preview" style="background:${t.grad};"></div><div class="theme-name">${n}</div></div>`).join('');}
function applyTheme(name){const t=THEMES[name];if(!t)return;document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-primary',t.bg1);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-secondary',t.bg2);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-card',t.bg3);changeAccent(t.accent);document.querySelectorAll('.theme-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));const el=document.getElementById(`thm-${name}`);if(el)el.classList.add('active');localStorage.setItem('mtv_theme',name);toast(`🎨 ${name}`,'ok');}
function changeAccent(c){document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent',c);const r=parseInt(c.substr(1,2),16),g=parseInt(c.substr(3,2),16),b=parseInt(c.substr(5,2),16);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent-glow',`rgba(${r},${g},${b},0.35)`);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--gradient-main',`linear-gradient(135deg,${c},#ff6b35)`);localStorage.setItem('mtv_accent',c);}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BW & PERF
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleBW(){const el=document.getElementById('bwWidget');if(el.classList.contains('show')){el.classList.remove('show');if(bwInterval){clearInterval(bwInterval);bwInterval=null;}return;}el.classList.add('show');bwInterval=setInterval(updBW,1000);}
function updBW(){const vid=document.getElementById('vid');let bit=0,buf=0;if(hls&&hls.levels&&hls.currentLevel>=0){const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];if(l)bit=Math.round((l.bitrate||0)/1000);}if(vid.buffered.length){const bEnd=vid.buffered.end(vid.buffered.length-1);buf=Math.min(100,Math.round((bEnd-vid.currentTime)/30*100));}const dl=bit>0?Math.round(bit/8):Math.round(Math.random()*400+100);document.getElementById('bwDown').textContent=dl>1000?(dl/1000).toFixed(1)+' MB/s':dl+' KB/s';document.getElementById('bwBuf').textContent=buf+'%';document.getElementById('bwBit').textContent=bit>0?bit+'':'-';}
function togglePerf(){const el=document.getElementById('perfWidget');if(el.classList.contains('show')){el.classList.remove('show');if(perfInterval){clearInterval(perfInterval);perfInterval=null;}return;}el.classList.add('show');perfInterval=setInterval(updPerf,500);}
function updPerf(){const vid=document.getElementById('vid');document.getElementById('pRes').textContent=vid.videoWidth&&vid.videoHeight?`${vid.videoWidth}x${vid.videoHeight}`:'—';let bit='—';if(hls&&hls.levels&&hls.currentLevel>=0){const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];if(l&&l.bitrate)bit=Math.round(l.bitrate/1000)+' Kbps';}document.getElementById('pBit').textContent=bit;let bufStr='—';if(vid.buffered.length){const ahead=(vid.buffered.end(vid.buffered.length-1)-vid.currentTime).toFixed(1);bufStr=ahead+'s';const el=document.getElementById('pBuf');el.textContent=bufStr;el.className='perf-v '+(ahead>5?'g':ahead>2?'w':'b');}else document.getElementById('pBuf').textContent='—';if(vid.getVideoPlaybackQuality){const q=vid.getVideoPlaybackQuality();const d=q.droppedVideoFrames||0;const del=document.getElementById('pDrop');del.textContent=d;del.className='perf-v '+(d<10?'g':d<50?'w':'b');}if(hls&&hls.levels&&hls.currentLevel>=0){const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];document.getElementById('pCodec').textContent=(l?.codecSet||l?.videoCodec||'—').substring(0,12);}if(hls&&hls.latency!==undefined)document.getElementById('pLat').textContent=hls.latency.toFixed(1)+'s';}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DATA MANAGEMENT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function clearCache(){if(confirm('Önbellek temizlensin mi?')){history=[];localStorage.removeItem('mtv_hist');toast('🗑️ Temizlendi','ok');}}
function exportAll(){const data={channels,favorites,history,stats,locked,hidden,pin,ratings,reminders,screenshots,accent:localStorage.getItem('mtv_accent'),theme:localStorage.getItem('mtv_theme'),version:'6.1'};const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});const a=document.createElement('a');a.download=`modulTV_backup_${Date.now()}.json`;a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.click();toast('📤 Yedek oluşturuldu','ok');}
function importAll(){const inp=document.createElement('input');inp.type='file';inp.accept='.json';inp.onchange=e=>{const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{try{const d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);if(d.channels){channels=d.channels;localStorage.setItem('mtv_channels',JSON.stringify(channels));}if(d.favorites){favorites=d.favorites;localStorage.setItem('mtv_fav',JSON.stringify(favorites));}if(d.history){history=d.history;localStorage.setItem('mtv_hist',JSON.stringify(history));}if(d.stats){stats=d.stats;localStorage.setItem('mtv_stats',JSON.stringify(stats));}if(d.locked){locked=d.locked;localStorage.setItem('mtv_locked',JSON.stringify(locked));}if(d.hidden){hidden=d.hidden;localStorage.setItem('mtv_hidden',JSON.stringify(hidden));}if(d.pin){pin=d.pin;localStorage.setItem('mtv_pin',pin);}if(d.ratings){ratings=d.ratings;localStorage.setItem('mtv_ratings',JSON.stringify(ratings));}if(d.reminders){reminders=d.reminders;localStorage.setItem('mtv_reminders',JSON.stringify(reminders));}if(d.screenshots){screenshots=d.screenshots;localStorage.setItem('mtv_snaps',JSON.stringify(screenshots));}if(d.theme)applyTheme(d.theme);else if(d.accent)changeAccent(d.accent);processChannels();updateFavCnt();renderReminders();updateRemCnt();renderSuggestions();updateGalCnt();renderGallery();toast('📥 Yedek geri yüklendi','ok');}catch(e){toast('Geçersiz dosya','err');}};r.readAsText(f);};inp.click();}
function factoryReset(){if(!confirm('⚠️ TÜM VERİLER SİLİNECEK! Emin misiniz?'))return;if(!confirm('Son kez: Gerçekten sıfırlamak istiyor musunuz?'))return;['mtv_channels','mtv_fav','mtv_hist','mtv_stats','mtv_locked','mtv_hidden','mtv_pin','mtv_accent','mtv_theme','mtv_ratings','mtv_reminders','mtv_snaps'].forEach(k=>localStorage.removeItem(k));toast('⚠️ Sıfırlandı. Yenileniyor...','warn');setTimeout(()=>location.reload(),2000);}
function speedTest(){toast('🚀 Test başlatılıyor...','info');const start=Date.now();const img=new Image();img.onload=()=>{const dur=(Date.now()-start)/1000;const speed=((6000000*8)/dur/1024/1024).toFixed(2);toast(`🚀 ~${speed} Mbps`,'ok');};img.onerror=()=>toast('Test başarısız','err');img.src='https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/3f/Fronalpstock_big.jpg?t='+Date.now();}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PLAYLIST LOADER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function loadPL(){const url=document.getElementById('plUrl').value.trim();const content=document.getElementById('plContent').value.trim();if(url)fetchPL(url);else if(content)parseM3U(content);else{toast('URL veya içerik girin','warn');return;}closeModal('plModal');}
async function fetchPL(url){toast('Yükleniyor...','info');try{let res=await fetch(url);parseM3U(await res.text());}catch{try{let res=await fetch(`https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=${encodeURIComponent(url)}`);parseM3U(await res.text());}catch{toast('Yüklenemedi','err');}}}
function parseM3U(txt){const lines=txt.split('\n').map(l=>l.trim()).filter(l=>l);const chs=[];let info=null,id=channels.length+1;for(const line of lines){if(line.startsWith('#EXTINF:')){const nm=line.match(/,(.+)$/),gr=line.match(/group-title="([^"]*)"/),lg=line.match(/tvg-logo="([^"]*)"/);info={name:nm?nm[1].trim():`Ch ${id}`,group:gr?gr[1]:'Genel',logo:lg?lg[1]:'',id:id++};}else if(line.startsWith('http')&&info){info.url=line;chs.push(info);info=null;}}if(chs.length){channels=chs;localStorage.setItem('mtv_channels',JSON.stringify(channels));processChannels();renderSuggestions();renderReminders();renderEditor();toast(`✅ ${chs.length} kanal yüklendi`,'ok');}else toast('Kanal bulunamadı','warn');}
function handleFile(e){const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{document.getElementById('plContent').value=ev.target.result;toast(`📄 ${f.name}`,'info');};r.readAsText(f);}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WATCH PARTY
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
let wpRoom=null;
function createWPRoom(){wpRoom={id:'WP-'+Math.random().toString(36).substr(2,6).toUpperCase(),host:'Sen',users:['Sen'],created:Date.now()};document.getElementById('wpRoomInfo').innerHTML=`<strong style="color:var(--accent);">Oda: ${wpRoom.id}</strong><br><button class="btn btn-s" onclick="navigator.clipboard.writeText('${wpRoom.id}');toast('Kopyalandı','ok')" style="padding:2px 7px;font-size:0.68rem;margin-top:3px;">📋 Kopyala</button>`;document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent='1 kişi';addWPSys('Oda oluşturuldu: '+wpRoom.id);toast('🎉 Watch Party odası oluşturuldu','ok');setTimeout(()=>{wpRoom.users.push('Kullanıcı_42');document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent=wpRoom.users.length+' kişi';addWPSys('Kullanıcı_42 katıldı');},3000);setTimeout(()=>{wpRoom.users.push('Viewer_88');document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent=wpRoom.users.length+' kişi';addWPSys('Viewer_88 katıldı');},7000);if(curCh){document.getElementById('wpPh').style.display='none';const wv=document.getElementById('wpVid');if(wpHls){wpHls.destroy();wpHls=null;}wpHls=attachStream(wv,curCh.url,null);}}
function joinWPRoom(){const code=prompt('Oda kodu:');if(!code)return;toast(`🚪 ${code} odasına katılınıyor...`,'info');setTimeout(()=>{wpRoom={id:code,host:'Başkası',users:['Başkası','Sen'],created:Date.now()};document.getElementById('wpRoomInfo').innerHTML=`<strong style="color:var(--accent);">Oda: ${code}</strong>`;document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent='2 kişi';addWPSys('Odaya katıldınız: '+code);toast('🎉 Katıldınız','ok');},1500);}
function addWPSys(txt){const el=document.getElementById('wpMsgs');el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg" style="border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);"><div class="wp-msg-text" style="color:var(--accent4);font-size:0.73rem;">📌 ${txt}</div></div>`;el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;}
function sendWP(){const inp=document.getElementById('wpInput');const txt=inp.value.trim();if(!txt)return;const el=document.getElementById('wpMsgs');el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg"><div class="wp-msg-user">Sen</div><div class="wp-msg-text">${txt}</div></div>`;inp.value='';el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;if(wpRoom&&wpRoom.users.length>1){const ru=wpRoom.users.filter(u=>u!=='Sen');const rn=ru[Math.floor(Math.random()*ru.length)];const resps=['👍','Harika!','😂','Katılıyorum','Güzel!','🔥','Süper','👏','😮'];setTimeout(()=>{el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg"><div class="wp-msg-user" style="color:var(--accent3);">${rn}</div><div class="wp-msg-text">${resps[Math.floor(Math.random()*resps.length)]}</div></div>`;el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;},1000+Math.random()*2500);}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SUGGESTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderSuggestions(){const el=document.getElementById('phSuggest');if(!el||!channels.length)return;let sg=[];const grpCnt={};history.slice(0,20).forEach(h=>{const c=channels.find(ch=>ch.name===h.name);if(c&&c.group)grpCnt[c.group]=(grpCnt[c.group]||0)+1;});const topGrps=Object.entries(grpCnt).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,3).map(e=>e[0]);if(topGrps.length>0)sg=channels.filter(c=>topGrps.includes(c.group)&&!history.slice(0,5).some(h=>h.name===c.name));if(sg.length<5)sg=[...sg,...channels.filter(c=>(ratings[c.name]||0)>=4&&!sg.find(s=>s.name===c.name))];if(sg.length<3)sg=channels.slice(0,6);sg=sg.slice(0,6);el.innerHTML=`<div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px;">💡 Önerilen Kanallar</div><div class="suggest-row">${sg.map(c=>`<div class="suggest-chip" onclick="playFromAnywhere('${c.name}')"><div class="suggest-chip-icon">📺</div><div class="suggest-chip-name">${c.name}</div><div class="suggest-chip-cat">${c.group||''}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SHORTCUTS MODAL
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initShortcutsModal(){document.getElementById('shortcutList').innerHTML=SHORTCUTS.map(([k,d])=>`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><kbd style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--accent);font-family:monospace;">${k}</kbd><span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-secondary);">${d}</span></div>`).join('');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NAVIGATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
function goPage(p){
    document.querySelectorAll('.sb-item').forEach(el=>el.classList.toggle('active',el.dataset.p===p));
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
    const pg=document.getElementById(`pg-${p}`);if(pg)pg.classList.add('active');
    currentPage=p;
    if(p==='favorites')renderFavs();
    if(p==='history')renderHist();
    if(p==='stats')renderStats();
    if(p==='multiview')renderMV();
    if(p==='worldclock')renderWorldClock();
    if(p==='gallery')renderGallery();
    document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
    if(p!=='tv'&&curCh)trackEnd();
}

function toggleSB(){document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('mini');}
function toggleSBMobile(){document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open');}
function toggleChPanel(){chPanelOpen=!chPanelOpen;document.getElementById('chPanel').classList.toggle('open',chPanelOpen);if(window.innerWidth>820){document.getElementById('chPanel').style.display=chPanelOpen?'':'none';}document.getElementById('chPanelBtn').textContent=chPanelOpen?'◀':'▶';}

function openModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('show');}
function closeModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('show');}
document.querySelectorAll('.modal-bg').forEach(m=>{m.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===m)m.classList.remove('show');});});

function toast(msg,type='info'){const c=document.getElementById('toasts');const icons={ok:'✅',err:'❌',warn:'⚠️',info:'ℹ️'};const t=document.createElement('div');t.className=`toast t-${type}`;t.innerHTML=`<span class="toast-icon">${icons[type]||'ℹ️'}</span><span class="toast-msg">${msg}</span>`;c.appendChild(t);setTimeout(()=>{t.classList.add('out');setTimeout(()=>t.remove(),300);},3500);}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
// KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
    if(['INPUT','TEXTAREA','SELECT'].includes(e.target.tagName)){if(e.key==='Escape')e.target.blur();return;}
    if(qcsOpen){if(e.key==='Escape')closeQCS();if(e.key==='Enter'){const first=document.querySelector('.qcs-result.selected');if(first)first.click();}return;}
    if(advSearchOpen){if(e.key==='Escape')closeAdvSearch();return;}
    switch(e.key.toLowerCase()){
        case' ':e.preventDefault();togglePlay();break;
        case'f':toggleFS();break;
        case'm':toggleMute();break;
        case'g':toggleAudioOnly();break;
        case't':openModal('timerModal');break;
        case'n':goPage('rss');break;
        case'/':e.preventDefault();openQCS();break;
        case'arrowup':e.preventDefault();{const v=document.getElementById('vid');v.volume=Math.min(1,v.volume+0.05);document.getElementById('volSlider').value=v.volume*100;showGesture(`🔊 ${Math.round(v.volume*100)}%`);}break;
        case'arrowdown':e.preventDefault();{const v=document.getElementById('vid');v.volume=Math.max(0,v.volume-0.05);document.getElementById('volSlider').value=v.volume*100;showGesture(`🔊 ${Math.round(v.volume*100)}%`);}break;
        case'arrowleft':e.preventDefault();prevCh();break;
        case'arrowright':e.preventDefault();nextCh();break;
        case'p':togglePiP();break;
        case'e':toggleEQ();break;
        case's':takeSnap();break;
        case'r':toggleRec();break;
        case'v':toggleVF();break;
        case'escape':if(isFS)toggleFS();document.querySelectorAll('.modal-bg.show').forEach(m=>m.classList.remove('show'));closePin();closePip();break;
        default:
            if(e.key>='1'&&e.key<='9'){chNumBuf+=e.key;showChNum(chNumBuf);clearTimeout(chNumTmr);chNumTmr=setTimeout(()=>{const idx=parseInt(chNumBuf)-1;if(idx>=0&&idx<filtered.length)selectCh(idx);chNumBuf='';},1000);}
    }
    if(e.ctrlKey&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='k'){e.preventDefault();document.getElementById('searchIn').focus();}
    if(e.ctrlKey&&e.shiftKey&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='f'){e.preventDefault();openAdvSearch();}
});

document.getElementById('videoWrap').addEventListener('dblclick',()=>toggleFS());
window.addEventListener('beforeunload',()=>{trackEnd();});
document.addEventListener('click',e=>{const sb=document.getElementById('sidebar');if(window.innerWidth<=1100&&sb.classList.contains('open')){if(!sb.contains(e.target))sb.classList.remove('open');}});
function checkResp(){document.getElementById('mobMenuBtn').style.display=window.innerWidth<=1100?'flex':'none';if(window.innerWidth<=820)document.getElementById('chPanel').classList.remove('open');}
checkResp();window.addEventListener('resize',checkResp);
</script>
</body>
</html>
```

## Eklenen Yeni Özellikler Özeti

| # | Özellik | Açıklama |
|---|---------|----------|
| 1 | **🎤 Sesli Komut** | Web Speech API ile "oynat", "durdur", "sonraki", kanal adı söyleyerek geçiş |
| 2 | **📷 Galeri** | Ekran görüntüleri galerisi — görüntüle, indir, sil |
| 3 | **📰 RSS Haber Akışı** | BBC/Anadolu gibi RSS beslemelerinden canlı haberler |
| 4 | **⏱ Otomatik Durdurma** | X dakika sonra oynatmayı otomatik durdurur |
| 5 | **🎧 Ses Modu** | Video gizlenir, arka planda sadece ses dinlenir |
| 6 | **🔊 Ses Görselleştirme** | Web Audio API ile oynatıcıda dalga efekti |
| 7 | **✏️ Playlist Editörü** | Kanal ekle/sil/düzenle, M3U export |
| 8 | **⚡ Hızlı Geçiş** | `/` tuşuyla açılan floating kanal switcher |
| 9 | **🎯 Stream Sağlık** | Canlı skor (gecikme, tutarlılık, düşen kareler) |
| 10 | **🔍 Gelişmiş Arama** | Kategori filtreleri ile fullscreen arama (`Ctrl+Shift+F`) |
| 11 | **📊 Gelişmiş İstatistikler** | Galeri sayısı, ses modu durumu eklendi |
| 12 | **📸 Snap Tam Görüntüleme** | Modal ile ekran görüntüsü büyük boyut görüntüleme |
| 13 | **Kanal Zamanlayıcı (Context)** | Sağ tık menüsünden kanala özel zamanlayıcı |
