- Reaction system
- Channel note indicator
- Playlist manager

**New HTML:**
- Subtitle overlay div on video
- Zoom controls on video
- Network quality in topbar
- Watch later button in topbar
- Watch later queue widget
- 4 new sidebar sections
- 4 new pages (vod, gallery, speeddial, xtream)
- 6 new modals

**New JS:**
- Subtitle parser (SRT + VTT)
- Subtitle display engine
- Video zoom system
- VOD detection
- Gallery system with session storage
- Speed dial system
- Watch later queue
- Channel notes
- Network quality monitor
- Watch party reactions
- Auto-refresh playlist
- EPG timeline render
- Dark mode auto-scheduler
- Schedule recording
- Playlist manager
- Xtream Codes API client
- Logo gradient generator

I'm also refining existing features with smoother animations, better mobile responsiveness, more keyboard shortcuts, and improved search with debouncing. Adding channel logo fallbacks with gradient colors based on channel names, better error handling, category pills that display channel counts, a current watching indicator in the channel list, toast notifications with progress bars, and improved loading states.

Now I'm implementing the subtitle system with parsers for both SRT and VTT formats, then building the display engine that syncs subtitles to video playback...

Writing video zoom functionality... Still writing the VOD detection logic...

Now I'm setting up the watch later queue with localStorage persistence, so users can add channels and play them in order. Then I'm building out the speed dial feature with eight customizable slots for quick access.

Looking at network quality detection next, where I'm checking the HLS bitrate to determine signal strength and update the UI accordingly. After that, I'm defining the emoji reactions available for watch parties.

Now I'm setting up the reaction system where users can send floating emoji that animate upward and disappear after a couple seconds, with the ability to simulate other users reacting as well.

I've got a solid plan for the full implementation. Time to write out the complete v7.0 as one self-contained HTML file with all the pieces working together.

Writing the complete file now...

I'm thinking through which features would have the most impact for an IPTV player—subtitles are essential, a VOD browser would let users browse content, speed dial gives quick channel access, and watch later queues help with content management. Xtream Codes support is important since it's a popular IPTV format, and features like video zoom, channel notes, and a screenshot gallery would round out the experience nicely.

Now I'm ready to write the complete v7.0 file with all the existing features preserved plus these new additions, which will bring the total to around 2200-2500 lines.

Writing the complete implementation... I've settled on ten core features that'll actually work well together rather than spreading myself thin, then I'm adding some polish touches like better buffer visualization and improved suggestions. Now I'm ready to write the complete v7.0 code, keeping an eye on file size to stay within limits while making sure everything is functional and efficient.

Writing the full implementation... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Still writing styles... Writing stylesheet rules... Still writing styles... Writing the complete HTML file...

</think>

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#06060e">
    <title>Modül TV v7.0 Ultra Pro</title>
    <style>
        *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
        :root{
            --bg-primary:#06060e;--bg-secondary:#0d0d18;--bg-card:#151528;--bg-hover:#1e1e3a;
            --bg-glass:rgba(15,15,30,0.88);--accent:#e50914;--accent-glow:rgba(229,9,20,0.35);
            --accent2:#ff6b35;--accent3:#7c3aed;--accent4:#06b6d4;--accent5:#10b981;
            --text-primary:#ffffff;--text-secondary:#a0a0be;--text-muted:#555570;
            --border:#1e1e38;--success:#10b981;--warning:#f59e0b;--danger:#ef4444;
            --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#e50914,#ff6b35);
            --gradient-purple:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#a855f7);
            --gradient-cyan:linear-gradient(135deg,#06b6d4,#22d3ee);
            --radius:14px;--radius-sm:8px;--radius-lg:20px;
            --shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);--shadow-lg:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --sb-width:260px;--topbar-h:56px;
            --transition:all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
        }
        html{font-size:16px;}
        body{font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text-primary);overflow:hidden;height:100vh;height:100dvh;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* ── SPLASH ── */
        .splash{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;transition:opacity 0.8s,visibility 0.8s;}
        .splash.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
        .splash-logo{width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:28px;background:var(--gradient-main);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5rem;box-shadow:0 0 60px var(--accent-glow);animation:splashPop 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;}
        @keyframes splashPop{from{transform:scale(0.5);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
        .splash h1{margin-top:24px;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-1px;background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;}
        .splash-v{font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;}
        .splash-bar{margin-top:40px;width:200px;height:2px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;}
        .splash-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient-main);border-radius:2px;animation:splashLoad 2.8s ease forwards;}
        @keyframes splashLoad{0%{width:0%;}60%{width:70%;}100%{width:100%;}}
        .splash-feat{margin-top:16px;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);min-height:1.2em;animation:fadeSlide 0.3s ease;}
        @keyframes fadeSlide{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(4px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}

        /* ── APP SHELL ── */
        .app{display:flex;height:100vh;height:100dvh;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.5s;}
        .app.show{opacity:1;}

        /* ── SIDEBAR ── */
        .sidebar{width:var(--sb-width);min-width:var(--sb-width);background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);z-index:200;overflow:hidden;}
        .sidebar.mini{width:64px;min-width:64px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-text,.sidebar.mini .sb-badge,.sidebar.mini .sb-sep-label{display:none;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-logo-wrap{justify-content:center;padding:0 14px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-item{justify-content:center;padding:11px;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-item-icon{margin:0;}
        .sidebar.mini .sb-section{display:none;}
        .sb-logo-wrap{height:var(--topbar-h);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-logo{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;white-space:nowrap;}
        .sb-toggle-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .sb-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding:8px 6px 20px;}
        .sb-section{font-size:0.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:14px 10px 4px;}
        .sb-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:1px;font-size:0.85rem;position:relative;}
        .sb-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .sb-item.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
        .sb-item.active .sb-item-icon{color:#fff;}
        .sb-item-icon{font-size:1.1rem;width:26px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-badge{margin-left:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-item.active .sb-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}
        .sb-badge.new{background:var(--accent3);}
        .sb-badge.hot{background:var(--danger);}

        /* ── MAIN ── */
        .main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-width:0;}

        /* ── TOPBAR ── */
        .topbar{height:var(--topbar-h);padding:0 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .mob-menu-btn{display:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;padding:7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .mob-menu-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .search-wrap{flex:1;max-width:380px;position:relative;}
        .search-wrap input{width:100%;padding:8px 14px 8px 36px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}
        .search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .search-wrap input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
        .search-wrap .si{position:absolute;left:11px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.88rem;pointer-events:none;}
        .search-clear{position:absolute;right:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;display:none;padding:2px;}
        .search-wrap input:not(:placeholder-shown) ~ .search-clear{display:block;}
        .tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-left:auto;}
        .tb-icon-btn{position:relative;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.95rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}
        .tb-icon-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tb-icon-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tb-icon-btn .dot{position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;width:7px;height:7px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;border:1px solid var(--bg-secondary);}
        .tb-badge{position:absolute;top:-4px;right:-4px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;font-size:0.55rem;font-weight:700;padding:1px 4px;border-radius:8px;min-width:16px;text-align:center;border:1px solid var(--bg-secondary);}
        .tb-clock{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;}

        /* Network quality */
        .netq{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:18px;padding:2px 0;cursor:pointer;}
        .netq-b{width:4px;border-radius:1px;transition:height 0.4s,background 0.4s;}
        .netq-b.on{background:var(--success);}
        .netq-b.warn{background:var(--warning);}
        .netq-b.bad{background:var(--danger);}
        .netq-b.off{background:var(--text-muted);opacity:0.3;}

        /* ── CONTENT ── */
        .content{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
        .page{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}
        .page.active{display:flex;}

        /* ── CHANNEL PANEL ── */
        .ch-panel{width:295px;min-width:295px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);}
        .ch-panel-head{padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;flex:1;}
        .ch-count-badge{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;}
        .ch-collapse-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:6px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .ch-collapse-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .cat-bar{display:flex;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px;overflow-x:auto;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .cat-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
        .cat-pill{padding:4px 11px;border-radius:16px;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}
        .cat-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .cat-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .cat-cnt{font-size:0.6rem;opacity:0.7;margin-left:3px;}
        .ch-toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-toolbar select{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:7px;font-size:0.75rem;outline:none;cursor:pointer;flex:1;}
        .view-btns{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
        .view-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);padding:5px 8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .view-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
        .ch-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;margin-bottom:2px;position:relative;}
        .ch-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
        .ch-item.playing{background:rgba(229,9,20,0.08);border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.3);}
        .ch-item.playing .ch-name{color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-logo{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--bg-card);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:700;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border);}
        .ch-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .ch-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
        .ch-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
        .ch-meta{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
        .ch-actions{display:flex;gap:2px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-act{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.82rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .ch-act:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--bg-card);}
        .ch-act.faved{color:var(--warning);}
        .live-dot{width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;flex-shrink:0;}
        @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.3;}}
        .note-dot{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--warning);border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;margin-left:2px;}
        .wl-dot{width:6px;height:6px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-list.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(110px,1fr));gap:6px;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-item{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-logo{width:44px;height:44px;margin:0 auto;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-meta{justify-content:center;}
        .ch-list.grid .ch-actions{display:none;}

        /* ── PLAYER ── */
        .player-area{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;min-width:0;}
        .video-wrap{flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;background:#000;min-height:0;}
        .video-wrap video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;transition:filter 0.3s,transform 0.2s;}
        .ph{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:30px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,#0d0d20 0%,#06060e 100%);}
        .ph-icon{font-size:5rem;opacity:0.15;margin-bottom:16px;}
        .ph h2{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:8px;color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .ph p{font-size:0.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:24px;}

        /* ── SUBTITLE OVERLAY ── */
        .sub-overlay{position:absolute;bottom:72px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:25;text-align:center;pointer-events:none;width:90%;max-width:800px;}
        .sub-text{display:inline-block;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.82);color:#fff;font-size:1.05rem;font-weight:500;padding:5px 16px;border-radius:7px;text-shadow:1px 1px 3px #000;line-height:1.6;white-space:pre-wrap;min-height:1em;}

        /* ── ZOOM CONTROLS ── */
        .zoom-ctrl{position:absolute;top:60px;right:14px;z-index:20;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;align-items:center;}
        .zoom-ctrl.show{display:flex;}
        .zoom-btn-s{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(12px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.12);color:#fff;width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}
        .zoom-btn-s:hover{background:var(--accent);}
        .zoom-level-d{font-size:0.68rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.7);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55);padding:2px 6px;border-radius:5px;font-weight:700;}

        /* ── OSD ── */
        .osd{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;right:14px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;}
        .video-wrap:hover .osd,.video-wrap.osd-on .osd{opacity:1;}
        .osd-chip{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);padding:7px 14px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);}
        .osd-live{font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
        .osd-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;}
        .osd-btns{display:flex;gap:5px;pointer-events:all;}
        .osd-btn{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#fff;padding:7px 9px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .osd-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* ── PLAYER CONTROLS ── */
        .p-controls{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.97));padding:40px 16px 14px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;}
        .video-wrap:hover .p-controls,.video-wrap.osd-on .p-controls{opacity:1;}
        .p-progress{width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px;transition:height 0.2s;}
        .p-progress:hover{height:5px;}
        .p-prog-buf{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-radius:3px;}
        .p-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width 0.1s linear;}
        .p-prog-dot{position:absolute;top:50%;right:0;transform:translate(50%,-50%);width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .p-progress:hover .p-prog-dot{opacity:1;}
        .p-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
        .p-left,.p-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
        .p-btn{background:none;border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:5px 7px;border-radius:7px;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;}
        .p-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
        .p-btn .lbl{font-size:0.73rem;}
        .vol-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .vol-slider{width:65px;height:3px;-webkit-appearance:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
        .vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;}
        .p-time{font-size:0.73rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

        /* ── BOTTOM PANELS ── */
        .panels-area{flex-shrink:0;max-height:45%;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
        .vf-panel,.eq-panel{background:var(--bg-card);padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:none;}
        .vf-panel.show,.eq-panel.show{display:block;}
        .panel-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
        .panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.85rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .panel-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:5px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .panel-close:hover{color:var(--danger);}
        .vf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;}
        .vf-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
        .vf-row label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
        .vf-slider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
        .vf-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:13px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;}
        .chip-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
        .chip{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);}
        .chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .chip.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
        .eq-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;justify-content:center;height:100px;margin-bottom:10px;}
        .eq-band{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .eq-vslider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:3px;height:90px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;writing-mode:vertical-lr;direction:rtl;cursor:pointer;}
        .eq-vslider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:14px;height:7px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;}
        .eq-lbl{font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .eq-viz{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:30px;margin-left:auto;}
        .eq-viz-bar{width:3px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:1px;animation:eqAnim var(--d,0.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
        @keyframes eqAnim{from{height:4px;}to{height:var(--h,20px);}}

        /* ── FLOATING WIDGETS ── */
        .sleep-badge{position:fixed;top:68px;right:16px;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);font-size:0.8rem;}
        .sleep-badge.show{display:flex;}
        .sleep-t{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .sleep-x{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px;}
        .sleep-x:hover{color:var(--danger);}
        .rec-badge{position:fixed;top:68px;right:16px;z-index:501;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--danger);border-radius:12px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);animation:recBlink 1s infinite;}
        .rec-badge.show{display:flex;}
        .rec-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;}
        .rec-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);font-size:0.8rem;}
        .rec-t{font-size:0.8rem;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .rec-stop{background:var(--danger);border:none;color:#fff;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.73rem;}
        @keyframes recBlink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.75;}}
        .bw-widget{position:fixed;bottom:70px;left:16px;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;display:none;gap:14px;align-items:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .bw-widget.show{display:flex;}
        .bw-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;}
        .bw-val{font-weight:700;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .bw-lbl{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .perf-widget{position:fixed;top:68px;left:16px;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);font-size:0.7rem;min-width:160px;}
        .perf-widget.show{display:flex;}
        .perf-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}
        .perf-k{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .perf-v{font-weight:600;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .perf-v.g{color:var(--success);}.perf-v.w{color:var(--warning);}.perf-v.b{color:var(--danger);}

        /* ── WATCH LATER QUEUE WIDGET ── */
        .wl-widget{position:fixed;bottom:80px;right:16px;z-index:599;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:12px;width:290px;display:none;max-height:340px;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
        .wl-widget.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn 0.2s ease-out;}
        .wl-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px;flex-shrink:0;}
        .wl-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
        .wl-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 9px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:4px;cursor:default;transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;}
        .wl-item:hover{border-color:var(--border);}
        .wl-play{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;width:26px;height:26px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.7rem;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
        .wl-name{flex:1;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
        .wl-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:2px;font-size:0.72rem;}
        .wl-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

        /* ── MINI PLAYER ── */
        .mini-player{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 16px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
        .mini-player.show{display:flex;}
        .mini-thumb{width:56px;height:38px;background:#000;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;}
        .mini-thumb video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .mini-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
        .mini-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
        .mini-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .mini-ctrl{display:flex;gap:6px;}
        .mini-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}
        .mini-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

        /* ── PIP ── */
        .pip-win{position:fixed;z-index:800;border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 15px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);display:none;cursor:move;width:360px;height:210px;bottom:80px;right:16px;resize:both;}
        .pip-win.show{display:block;animation:pipIn 0.3s ease-out;}
        @keyframes pipIn{from{transform:scale(0.6);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
        .pip-win video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;pointer-events:none;}
        .pip-bar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.8),transparent);padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .pip-win:hover .pip-bar{opacity:1;}
        .pip-name{font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;}
        .pip-close{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.62rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}

        /* ── CONTEXT MENU ── */
        .ctx-menu{position:fixed;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:5px;min-width:210px;z-index:3000;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);display:none;}
        .ctx-menu.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.15s ease-out;}
        .ctx-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-secondary);transition:var(--transition);}
        .ctx-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .ctx-item.danger:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:var(--danger);}
        .ctx-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 10px;}

        /* ── CHANNEL PREVIEW ── */
        .ch-preview{position:fixed;z-index:900;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px;width:220px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:none;}
        .ch-preview.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.15s ease-out;}
        @keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.96);}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}}
        .ch-prev-video{width:100%;height:120px;background:#000;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .ch-prev-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .ch-prev-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.82rem;}
        .ch-prev-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── PIN OVERLAY ── */
        .pin-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.92);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);}
        .pin-overlay.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
        .pin-box{background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:36px;text-align:center;width:320px;}
        .pin-inputs{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
        .pin-input{width:48px;height:52px;text-align:center;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;background:var(--bg-card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}
        .pin-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}

        /* ── MULTI-VIEW ── */
        .mv-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
        .mv-toolbar{padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .mv-grid{flex:1;display:grid;gap:3px;padding:3px;background:var(--bg-primary);overflow:hidden;}
        .mv-grid.g2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
        .mv-grid.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
        .mv-grid.g6{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
        .mv-grid.g9{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:repeat(3,1fr);}
        .mv-cell{background:#111;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:2px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);cursor:pointer;}
        .mv-cell:hover{border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.5);}
        .mv-cell.active-cell{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent-glow);}
        .mv-cell video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
        .mv-lbl{position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:6px;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;}
        .mv-rm{position:absolute;top:5px;right:5px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);border:none;color:#fff;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.62rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .mv-cell:hover .mv-rm{opacity:1;}
        .mv-add{background:var(--bg-card);border:2px dashed var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.82rem;gap:6px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
        .mv-add:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
        .mv-add-icon{font-size:2rem;}

        /* ── VOD PAGE ── */
        .vod-page{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
        .vod-toolbar{padding:10px 14px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0;flex-wrap:wrap;}
        .vod-grid{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:12px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:10px;align-content:start;}
        .vod-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);position:relative;}
        .vod-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);border-color:var(--accent);}
        .vod-poster{width:100%;aspect-ratio:16/9;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:2.5rem;overflow:hidden;position:relative;}
        .vod-poster-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:linear-gradient(transparent 40%,rgba(0,0,0,0.8));display:flex;align-items:flex-end;padding:6px;}
        .vod-play-btn{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);width:40px;height:40px;background:rgba(229,9,20,0.9);border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:1.1rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .vod-card:hover .vod-play-btn{opacity:1;}
        .vod-info{padding:8px;}
        .vod-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.8rem;margin-bottom:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
        .vod-cat{font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── GALLERY PAGE ── */
        .gallery-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:12px;}
        .gallery-header{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
        .gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:10px;}
        .gallery-item{border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:var(--transition);background:var(--bg-card);}
        .gallery-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
        .gallery-item canvas,.gallery-item img{width:100%;height:120px;object-fit:cover;display:block;}
        .gallery-item-info{padding:7px;}
        .gallery-item-name{font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;}
        .gallery-item-time{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .gallery-del{position:absolute;top:5px;right:5px;background:rgba(239,68,68,0.9);border:none;color:#fff;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.7rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
        .gallery-item:hover .gallery-del{opacity:1;}
        .gallery-dl{position:absolute;top:5px;left:5px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);border:none;color:#fff;width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.7rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
        .gallery-item:hover .gallery-dl{opacity:1;}

        /* ── SPEED DIAL PAGE ── */
        .sd-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:24px;}
        .sd-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;max-width:580px;}
        .sd-slot{background:var(--bg-card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;padding:16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);position:relative;min-height:100px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:6px;}
        .sd-slot:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .sd-slot.empty{border-style:dashed;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .sd-slot.empty:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
        .sd-icon{font-size:2rem;}
        .sd-name{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:100%;}
        .sd-cat{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .sd-num{position:absolute;top:6px;left:8px;font-size:0.65rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-muted);background:var(--bg-hover);padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;}
        .sd-del{position:absolute;top:5px;right:5px;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.7rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .sd-slot:hover .sd-del{opacity:1;}
        .sd-slot.active-play{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 16px var(--accent-glow);}

        /* ── XTREAM CODES PAGE ── */
        .xt-page{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
        .xt-login{flex:1;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:30px;}
        .xt-login-box{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:28px;width:100%;max-width:440px;}
        .xt-browser{flex:1;display:none;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
        .xt-browser.show{display:flex;}
        .xt-tabs{display:flex;gap:3px;padding:10px 14px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .xt-tab{padding:7px 16px;border-radius:9px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);transition:var(--transition);}
        .xt-tab.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
        .xt-content{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:10px;align-content:start;}
        .xt-cat-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
        .xt-cat-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
        .xt-cat-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .xt-cat-name{font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;}
        .xt-cat-cnt{font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .xt-account{background:rgba(16,185,129,0.08);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3);border-radius:12px;padding:12px 16px;margin-bottom:14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}

        /* ── EPG TIMELINE ── */
        .epg-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;max-width:none;}
        .epg-timeline-wrap{overflow-x:auto;margin-top:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;}
        .epg-tl{display:grid;min-width:900px;}
        .epg-tl-header{display:flex;margin-left:110px;background:var(--bg-card);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
        .epg-tl-time-slot{flex:1;text-align:center;font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--accent4);font-weight:700;padding:6px 4px;border-right:1px solid var(--border);}
        .epg-tl-row{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
        .epg-tl-row:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
        .epg-tl-ch-name{width:110px;min-width:110px;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;padding:8px;text-align:right;border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:flex-end;background:var(--bg-secondary);}
        .epg-tl-progs{display:flex;flex:1;}
        .epg-prog{flex:1;background:var(--bg-card);border-right:1px solid var(--border);padding:6px 8px;font-size:0.72rem;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);overflow:hidden;white-space:nowrap;text-overflow:ellipsis;display:flex;align-items:center;}
        .epg-prog:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
        .epg-prog.live-prog{background:rgba(16,185,129,0.12);color:var(--success);}
        .epg-prog.past-prog{opacity:0.4;}
        .epg-now-indicator{position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;width:2px;background:var(--accent);z-index:5;pointer-events:none;}

        /* ── GRID PAGES ── */
        .grid-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;align-content:start;}
        .g-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
        .g-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .g-card-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .g-card-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
        .g-card-sub{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── CAST ── */
        .cast-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
        .cast-devices{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
        .cast-device{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px 22px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);min-width:150px;}
        .cast-device:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .cast-device.connected{border-color:var(--success);background:rgba(16,185,129,0.08);}
        .cast-device-icon{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .cast-device-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;margin-bottom:3px;}
        .cast-device-status{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .cast-device.connected .cast-device-status{color:var(--success);}

        /* ── STATS ── */
        .stats-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
        .stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:12px;padding:16px;}
        .stat-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px;}
        .stat-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
        .stat-val{font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:2px;}
        .stat-lbl{font-size:0.77rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* ── SETTINGS ── */
        .settings-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
        .settings-inner{padding:20px;max-width:680px;}
        .set-section{margin-bottom:22px;}
        .set-sec-title{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
        .set-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 0;}
        .set-info h4{font-size:0.86rem;margin-bottom:2px;}
        .set-info p{font-size:0.73rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .tgl{position:relative;width:42px;height:22px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}
        .tgl input{display:none;}
        .tgl-track{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .tgl-thumb{position:absolute;width:16px;height:16px;background:var(--text-muted);border-radius:50%;top:2px;left:3px;transition:var(--transition);}
        .tgl input:checked ~ .tgl-track{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tgl input:checked ~ .tgl-thumb{transform:translateX(19px);background:#fff;}
        .theme-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:10px;}
        .theme-card{padding:10px;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition);}
        .theme-card:hover{border-color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .theme-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent-glow);}
        .theme-preview{width:100%;height:28px;border-radius:5px;margin-bottom:5px;}
        .theme-name{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;}

        /* ── WORLD CLOCK ── */
        .wc-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;max-width:800px;}
        .wc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(100px,1fr));gap:10px;margin:16px 0;}
        .wc-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center;}
        .wc-flag{font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:5px;}
        .wc-time{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .wc-city{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px;}

        /* ── WATCH PARTY ── */
        .wp-page{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
        .wp-video{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;position:relative;}
        .wp-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
        .wp-sidebar{width:280px;min-width:280px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
        .wp-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px;}
        .wp-msg{margin-bottom:6px;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;}
        .wp-msg-user{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
        .wp-msg-text{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}
        .wp-reactions{padding:7px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;flex-shrink:0;}
        .wp-react-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;padding:4px 9px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;transition:var(--transition);}
        .wp-react-btn:hover{transform:scale(1.25);border-color:var(--accent);}
        .react-float{position:absolute;font-size:1.8rem;pointer-events:none;animation:floatUp 2.2s ease-out forwards;z-index:50;text-shadow:0 2px 8px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
        @keyframes floatUp{0%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(0) scale(0.8);}60%{opacity:1;transform:translateY(-80px) scale(1.2);}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-160px) scale(1);}}
        .wp-input-row{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
        .wp-input{flex:1;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.8rem;outline:none;}
        .wp-send{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.88rem;}

        /* ── ABOUT ── */
        .about-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;}

        /* ── MODALS ── */
        .modal-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.75);backdrop-filter:blur(5px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(5px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:5000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);}
        .modal-bg.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
        .modal{background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:24px;width:92%;max-width:520px;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:scale(0.94);transition:transform 0.25s;}
        .modal-bg.show .modal{transform:scale(1);}
        .modal-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:18px;}
        .modal-title{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;}
        .modal-x{background:var(--bg-card);border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}
        .modal-x:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
        .fg{margin-bottom:14px;}
        .fl{display:block;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:5px;}
        .fi,.ft,.fs{width:100%;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}
        .fi:focus,.ft:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
        .ft{resize:vertical;min-height:85px;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;}
        .btn{padding:8px 16px;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .btn-p{background:var(--gradient-main);color:#fff;}
        .btn-p:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 5px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
        .btn-s{background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);}
        .btn-s:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .btn-danger{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.1);color:var(--danger);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);}
        .btn-danger:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
        .btn-row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:16px;}

        /* ── TOASTS ── */
        .toast-stack{position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:99998;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
        .toast{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:11px;padding:10px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;min-width:260px;max-width:340px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);animation:toastIn 0.3s ease-out;}
        .toast.out{animation:toastOut 0.3s forwards;}
        .t-ok{border-left:3px solid var(--success);}
        .t-err{border-left:3px solid var(--danger);}
        .t-warn{border-left:3px solid var(--warning);}
        .t-info{border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);}
        .toast-icon{font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;}
        .toast-msg{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:500;flex:1;}
        @keyframes toastIn{from{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
        @keyframes toastOut{to{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}}

        /* ── MISC OVERLAYS ── */
        .gesture-hint{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;pointer-events:none;z-index:20;}
        .gesture-bubble{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:12px;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}
        .gesture-bubble.show{opacity:1;}
        .ch-num-overlay{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);color:#fff;font-size:4rem;font-weight:900;padding:20px 30px;border-radius:16px;display:none;z-index:30;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
        .ch-num-overlay.show{display:block;}
        .snap-flash{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#fff;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;transition:opacity 0.1s;}
        .snap-flash.flash{opacity:0.8;}
        .buf-spinner{position:absolute;z-index:15;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
        .buf-spinner.show{display:flex;}
        .spinner{width:40px;height:40px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;}
        @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
        .buf-text{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);}
        .suggest-row{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:4px;max-width:580px;}
        .suggest-row::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
        .suggest-chip{flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);text-align:center;min-width:96px;}
        .suggest-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
        .suggest-chip-icon{font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
        .suggest-chip-name{font-size:0.75rem;font

## Prompt 2

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#06060e">
    <title>Modül TV v6.2 Ultra Pro</title>
    <style>
        *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
        :root{
            --bg-primary:#06060e;--bg-secondary:#0d0d18;--bg-card:#151528;--bg-hover:#1e1e3a;
            --bg-glass:rgba(15,15,30,0.88);--accent:#e50914;--accent-glow:rgba(229,9,20,0.35);
            --accent2:#ff6b35;--accent3:#7c3aed;--accent4:#06b6d4;--accent5:#10b981;
            --text-primary:#ffffff;--text-secondary:#a0a0be;--text-muted:#555570;
            --border:#1e1e38;--success:#10b981;--warning:#f59e0b;--danger:#ef4444;
            --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#e50914,#ff6b35);
            --radius:14px;--radius-sm:8px;--radius-lg:20px;
            --shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);--shadow-lg:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --sb-width:260px;--topbar-h:56px;
            --transition:all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
        }
        html{font-size:16px;}
        body{font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text-primary);overflow:hidden;height:100vh;height:100dvh;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px;}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* ── SPLASH ── */
        .splash{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;transition:opacity 0.8s,visibility 0.8s;overflow:hidden;}
        .splash.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
        .splash-particles{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;}
        .splash-p{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);opacity:0;animation:spFloat var(--dur) var(--delay) ease-in-out infinite;}
        @keyframes spFloat{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(100vh) scale(0);}20%{opacity:0.6;}80%{opacity:0.3;}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10vh) scale(1);}}
        .splash-logo{width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:28px;background:var(--gradient-main);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5rem;box-shadow:0 0 60px var(--accent-glow);animation:splashPop 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;z-index:1;}
        @keyframes splashPop{from{transform:scale(0.5);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
        .splash h1{margin-top:24px;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;z-index:1;}
        .splash-v{font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;z-index:1;}
        .splash-bar{margin-top:40px;width:200px;height:2px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;z-index:1;}
        .splash-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient-main);border-radius:2px;animation:splashLoad 2.6s ease forwards;}
        @keyframes splashLoad{0%{width:0%;}60%{width:70%;}100%{width:100%;}}
        .splash-feat{margin-top:16px;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);z-index:1;}

        /* ── APP SHELL ── */
        .app{display:flex;height:100vh;height:100dvh;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.5s;}.app.show{opacity:1;}
        .sidebar{width:var(--sb-width);min-width:var(--sb-width);background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);z-index:200;overflow:hidden;}
        .sidebar.mini{width:64px;min-width:64px;}.sidebar.mini .sb-text,.sidebar.mini .sb-badge,.sidebar.mini .sb-section{display:none;}.sidebar.mini .sb-logo-wrap{justify-content:center;padding:0 14px;}.sidebar.mini .sb-item{justify-content:center;padding:11px;}.sidebar.mini .sb-item-icon{margin:0;}
        .sb-logo-wrap{height:var(--topbar-h);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-logo{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;white-space:nowrap;}
        .sb-toggle-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}.sb-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .sb-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding:8px 6px 20px;}
        .sb-section{font-size:0.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:14px 10px 4px;}
        .sb-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:1px;font-size:0.85rem;position:relative;}
        .sb-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}.sb-item.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 14px var(--accent-glow);}.sb-item.active .sb-item-icon{color:#fff;}
        .sb-item-icon{font-size:1.1rem;width:26px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-badge{margin-left:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}.sb-item.active .sb-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}.sb-badge.new{background:var(--accent3);}.sb-badge.hot{background:var(--danger);}

        .main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-width:0;}
        .topbar{height:var(--topbar-h);padding:0 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .mob-menu-btn{display:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;padding:7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;transition:var(--transition);}.mob-menu-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .search-wrap{flex:1;max-width:420px;position:relative;}
        .search-wrap input{width:100%;padding:8px 14px 8px 36px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}.search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}.search-wrap input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
        .search-wrap .si{position:absolute;left:11px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.88rem;pointer-events:none;}
        .search-clear{position:absolute;right:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;display:none;padding:2px;}.search-wrap input:not(:placeholder-shown)+.si+.search-clear{display:block;}
        .tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-left:auto;}
        .tb-icon-btn{position:relative;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}.tb-icon-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);border-color:var(--accent);}.tb-icon-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tb-clock{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;}

        .content{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}.page{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}.page.active{display:flex;}

        /* ── CHANNEL PANEL ── */
        .ch-panel{width:300px;min-width:300px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);}
        .ch-panel-head{padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;flex:1;}
        .ch-count-badge{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;}
        .ch-collapse-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:6px;transition:var(--transition);}.ch-collapse-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .cat-bar{display:flex;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px;overflow-x:auto;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}.cat-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
        .cat-pill{padding:4px 11px;border-radius:16px;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}.cat-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}.cat-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-toolbar select{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:7px;font-size:0.75rem;outline:none;cursor:pointer;flex:1;}
        .view-btns{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;}.view-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);padding:5px 8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;transition:var(--transition);}.view-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
        .ch-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;margin-bottom:2px;position:relative;}.ch-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}.ch-item.playing{background:rgba(229,9,20,0.08);border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.3);}.ch-item.playing .ch-name{color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-logo{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--bg-card);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border);}.ch-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .ch-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}.ch-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}.ch-meta{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
        .ch-actions{display:flex;gap:2px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}.ch-act{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.82rem;transition:var(--transition);}.ch-act:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--bg-card);}.ch-act.faved{color:var(--warning);}
        .live-dot{width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;flex-shrink:0;}
        @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.3;}}
        .ch-note-badge{position:absolute;top:2px;right:2px;background:var(--accent3);color:#fff;font-size:0.5rem;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;}
        .ch-list.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(120px,1fr));gap:6px;}.ch-list.grid .ch-item{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;}.ch-list.grid .ch-logo{width:48px;height:48px;margin:0 auto;}.ch-list.grid .ch-meta{justify-content:center;}.ch-list.grid .ch-actions{display:none;}

        /* ── PLAYER ── */
        .player-area{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;min-width:0;}
        .video-wrap{flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;background:#000;min-height:0;}
        .video-wrap video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;transition:filter 0.3s;}

        /* AMBIENT MODE */
        .ambient-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;filter:blur(60px) brightness(0.4);opacity:0;transition:opacity 1s;pointer-events:none;}.ambient-bg.on{opacity:1;}
        .ambient-bg canvas{width:100%;height:100%;}

        .ph{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:30px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,#0d0d20 0%,#06060e 100%);z-index:2;}

        /* IDLE CLOCK */
        .idle-clock{text-align:center;z-index:2;position:absolute;inset:0;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
        .idle-clock.show{display:flex;}
        .idle-time{font-size:5rem;font-weight:900;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1;}
        .idle-date{font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:8px;}
        .idle-weather{margin-top:16px;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
        .idle-ch-count{margin-top:8px;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        .buf-spinner{position:absolute;z-index:15;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;}.buf-spinner.show{display:flex;}
        .spinner{width:40px;height:40px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;}
        @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}.buf-text{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);}
        .snap-flash{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#fff;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;transition:opacity 0.1s;}.snap-flash.flash{opacity:0.8;}
        .ch-num-overlay{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);color:#fff;font-size:4rem;font-weight:900;padding:20px 30px;border-radius:16px;display:none;z-index:30;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.ch-num-overlay.show{display:block;}
        .gesture-hint{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;pointer-events:none;z-index:20;}.gesture-bubble{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:12px;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}.gesture-bubble.show{opacity:1;}

        /* OSD */
        .osd{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;right:14px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;}.video-wrap:hover .osd,.video-wrap.osd-on .osd{opacity:1;}
        .osd-chip{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);padding:7px 14px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);}
        .osd-live{font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}.osd-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;}
        .osd-btns{display:flex;gap:5px;pointer-events:all;}.osd-btn{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#fff;padding:7px 9px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;transition:var(--transition);}.osd-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* CONTROLS */
        .p-controls{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.97));padding:40px 16px 14px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;}.video-wrap:hover .p-controls,.video-wrap.osd-on .p-controls{opacity:1;}
        .p-progress{width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px;transition:height 0.2s;}.p-progress:hover{height:5px;}
        .p-prog-buf{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:3px;}.p-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width 0.1s linear;}.p-prog-dot{position:absolute;top:50%;right:0;transform:translate(50%,-50%);width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}.p-progress:hover .p-prog-dot{opacity:1;}
        .p-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}.p-left,.p-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
        .p-btn{background:none;border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:5px 7px;border-radius:7px;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;}.p-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}.p-btn .lbl{font-size:0.73rem;}
        .vol-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}.vol-slider{width:70px;height:3px;-webkit-appearance:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}.vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;}
        .p-time{font-size:0.73rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

        .panels-area{flex-shrink:0;max-height:45%;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
        .vf-panel,.eq-panel,.notes-panel,.bitrate-panel{background:var(--bg-card);padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:none;}
        .vf-panel.show,.eq-panel.show,.notes-panel.show,.bitrate-panel.show{display:block;}
        .panel-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
        .panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.85rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}.panel-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:5px;transition:var(--transition);}.panel-close:hover{color:var(--danger);}
        .vf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;}.vf-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}.vf-row label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
        .vf-slider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}.vf-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:13px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;}
        .chip-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}.chip{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);}.chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}.chip.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
        .eq-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;justify-content:center;height:100px;margin-bottom:10px;}.eq-band{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .eq-vslider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:3px;height:90px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;writing-mode:vertical-lr;direction:rtl;cursor:pointer;}.eq-vslider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:14px;height:7px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;}
        .eq-lbl{font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}.eq-viz{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:30px;margin-left:auto;}.eq-viz-bar{width:3px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:1px;animation:eqAnim var(--d,0.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}@keyframes eqAnim{from{height:4px;}to{height:var(--h,20px);}}

        /* BITRATE GRAPH */
        .bitrate-canvas{width:100%;height:80px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:8px;margin-top:8px;}

        /* FLOATING WIDGETS */
        .sleep-badge,.rec-badge,.bw-widget,.perf-widget,.notif-badge,.timer-badge,.weather-widget{position:fixed;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .sleep-badge{top:68px;right:16px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:0.8rem;}.sleep-badge.show{display:flex;}.sleep-t{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.sleep-x{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px;}.sleep-x:hover{color:var(--danger);}
        .rec-badge{top:68px;right:16px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-color:var(--danger);animation:recBlink 1s infinite;z-index:501;}.rec-badge.show{display:flex;}.rec-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;}.rec-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);font-size:0.8rem;}.rec-t{font-size:0.8rem;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.rec-stop{background:var(--danger);border:none;color:#fff;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.73rem;}
        @keyframes recBlink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.75;}}
        .timer-badge{top:68px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:6px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:0.8rem;border-color:var(--warning);}.timer-badge.show{display:flex;}.timer-val{font-weight:700;color:var(--warning);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.timer-lbl{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .bw-widget{bottom:70px;left:16px;padding:10px 14px;display:none;gap:14px;align-items:center;}.bw-widget.show{display:flex;}.bw-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;}.bw-val{font-weight:700;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.bw-lbl{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .perf-widget{top:68px;left:16px;padding:10px 12px;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;font-size:0.7rem;min-width:160px;}.perf-widget.show{display:flex;}.perf-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}.perf-k{color:var(--text-muted);}.perf-v{font-weight:600;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.perf-v.g{color:var(--success);}.perf-v.w{color:var(--warning);}.perf-v.b{color:var(--danger);}

        /* NOTIFICATION CENTER */
        .notif-center{position:fixed;top:var(--topbar-h);right:0;width:340px;max-height:70vh;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:0 0 0 14px;z-index:3000;display:none;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);animation:slideR 0.25s ease-out;}
        .notif-center.show{display:flex;}
        @keyframes slideR{from{transform:translateX(100%);}to{transform:none;}}
        .notif-head{padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;}
        .notif-clear{background:none;border:none;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.78rem;}.notif-clear:hover{text-decoration:underline;}
        .notif-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
        .notif-item{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;}.notif-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}.notif-item.unread{border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
        .notif-icon{font-size:1.3rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;}.notif-body{flex:1;}.notif-title{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}.notif-desc{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}.notif-time{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;}
        .notif-empty{padding:40px 20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* QUICK ACTION BAR */
        .quick-bar{position:fixed;bottom:16px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:500;display:none;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:8px 14px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
        .quick-bar.show{display:flex;}
        .qb-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}.qb-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}.qb-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
        .qb-sep{width:1px;height:24px;background:var(--border);}

        /* MINI PLAYER */
        .mini-player{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 16px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;}.mini-player.show{display:flex;}
        .mini-thumb{width:56px;height:38px;background:#000;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;}.mini-thumb video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .mini-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}.mini-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}.mini-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .mini-ctrl{display:flex;gap:6px;}.mini-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}.mini-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

        /* PIP */
