.osd-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

/* Player controls */
.p-controls{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,.97));padding:40px 16px 14px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;z-index:10;}
.video-wrap:hover .p-controls,.video-wrap.osd-on .p-controls{opacity:1;}
.p-progress{width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px;transition:height .2s;}
.p-progress:hover{height:5px;}
.p-prog-buf{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:3px;}
.p-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width .1s linear;}
.p-prog-dot{position:absolute;top:50%;right:0;transform:translate(50%,-50%);width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;}
.p-progress:hover .p-prog-dot{opacity:1;}
.p-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.p-left,.p-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.p-btn{background:none;border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:5px 7px;border-radius:7px;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;}
.p-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.p-btn .lbl{font-size:.73rem;}
.vol-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.vol-slider{width:70px;height:3px;-webkit-appearance:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
.vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;}
.p-time{font-size:.73rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

/* ─── PANELS AREA ─── */
.panels-area{flex-shrink:0;max-height:45%;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.vf-panel,.eq-panel,.bitrate-panel{background:var(--bg-card);padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:none;}
.vf-panel.show,.eq-panel.show,.bitrate-panel.show{display:block;}
.panel-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:.85rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.panel-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:.9rem;border-radius:5px;transition:var(--transition);}
.panel-close:hover{color:var(--danger);}
.vf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;}
.vf-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
.vf-row label{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
.vf-slider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
.vf-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:13px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;}
.chip-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
.chip{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);}
.chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
.chip.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
.eq-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;justify-content:center;height:100px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.eq-band{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.eq-vslider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:3px;height:90px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;writing-mode:vertical-lr;direction:rtl;cursor:pointer;}
.eq-vslider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:14px;height:7px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;}
.eq-lbl{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.eq-viz{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:30px;margin-left:auto;}
.eq-viz-bar{width:3px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:1px;animation:eqAnim var(--d,.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
@keyframes eqAnim{from{height:4px;}to{height:var(--h,20px);}}

/* ─── FLOATING WIDGETS ─── */
.flt-badge{position:fixed;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 14px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.flt-badge.show{display:flex;}
.sleep-badge{top:68px;right:16px;}
.rec-badge{top:68px;right:16px;border-color:var(--danger);z-index:501;animation:recBlink 1s infinite;}
.timer-badge{top:68px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);border-color:var(--warning);}
.queue-next-badge{bottom:70px;right:16px;z-index:502;flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;min-width:200px;}
.retry-badge{top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);z-index:503;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;text-align:center;}
@keyframes recBlink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.75;}}
.sleep-t,.rec-t,.timer-val{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.rec-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);font-size:.8rem;}
.rec-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;}
.rec-stop,.sleep-x,.timer-x{background:none;border:none;cursor:pointer;padding:2px;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.rec-stop{background:var(--danger);border:none;color:#fff;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.73rem;}
.sleep-x:hover,.timer-x:hover{color:var(--danger);}
.bw-widget{position:fixed;bottom:70px;left:16px;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;display:none;gap:14px;align-items:center;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.bw-widget.show{display:flex;}
.bw-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;}
.bw-val{font-weight:700;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.bw-lbl{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.perf-widget{position:fixed;top:68px;left:16px;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 12px;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);font-size:.7rem;min-width:160px;}
.perf-widget.show{display:flex;}
.perf-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}
.perf-k{color:var(--text-muted);}
.perf-v{font-weight:600;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.perf-v.g{color:var(--success);}.perf-v.w{color:var(--warning);}.perf-v.b{color:var(--danger);}

/* ─── MINI PLAYER ─── */
.mini-player{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 16px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;}
.mini-player.show{display:flex;}
.mini-thumb{width:56px;height:38px;background:#000;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;}
.mini-thumb video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.mini-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.mini-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.mini-cat{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.mini-ctrl{display:flex;gap:6px;}
.mini-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}
.mini-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

/* ─── PIP ─── */
.pip-win{position:fixed;z-index:800;border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 15px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.7);display:none;cursor:move;width:360px;height:210px;bottom:80px;right:16px;resize:both;}
.pip-win.show{display:block;animation:pipIn .3s ease-out;}
@keyframes pipIn{from{transform:scale(.6);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
.pip-win video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;pointer-events:none;}
.pip-bar{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,.8),transparent);padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;}
.pip-win:hover .pip-bar{opacity:1;}
.pip-name{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;}
.pip-close{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:.62rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}

/* ─── STREAM HEALTH ─── */
.stream-health{position:absolute;top:50px;right:14px;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 12px;display:none;z-index:11;font-size:.72rem;min-width:140px;}
.video-wrap:hover .stream-health{display:block;}
.sh-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:3px;}
.sh-k{color:var(--text-muted);}.sh-v{font-weight:600;}
.health-bar{width:100%;height:6px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:3px;overflow:hidden;margin:4px 0;}
.health-fill{height:100%;border-radius:3px;transition:width .5s,background .5s;}

/* ─── MISC VIDEO WIDGETS ─── */
.gesture-hint{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;pointer-events:none;z-index:20;}
.gesture-bubble{background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:12px;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;}
.gesture-bubble.show{opacity:1;}
.ch-num-overlay{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);color:#fff;font-size:4rem;font-weight:900;padding:20px 30px;border-radius:16px;display:none;z-index:30;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.ch-num-overlay.show{display:block;}
.snap-flash{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#fff;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;transition:opacity .1s;}
.snap-flash.flash{opacity:.8;}
.buf-spinner{position:absolute;z-index:15;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.buf-spinner.show{display:flex;}
.spinner{width:40px;height:40px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .8s linear infinite;}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
.buf-text{font-size:.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.6);}
.audio-only-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:25;}
.audio-only-overlay.show{display:flex;}
.ao-icon{font-size:4rem;margin-bottom:16px;animation:aoFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes aoFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}}
.ao-name{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;}
.ao-cat{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.9rem;}
.ao-bars{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:20px;align-items:flex-end;height:40px;}
.ao-bar{width:4px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--accent);animation:aoBar var(--d,.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
@keyframes aoBar{from{height:6px;}to{height:var(--h,35px);}}
.audio-viz{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;height:60px;pointer-events:none;z-index:5;opacity:.6;}
.stream-timeline{position:absolute;bottom:60px;left:14px;right:14px;z-index:11;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;}
.video-wrap:hover .stream-timeline{opacity:1;}
.st-channels{display:flex;gap:4px;overflow-x:auto;padding:4px 0;}
.st-ch{flex-shrink:0;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.68rem;background:var(--bg-glass);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);white-space:nowrap;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);}
.st-ch:hover,.st-ch.now{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}

/* ─── PAGES ─── */
.grid-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;align-content:start;}
.g-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
.g-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.g-card:active{transform:translateY(-1px);}
.g-card-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
.g-card-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
.g-card-sub{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ─── MULTI-VIEW ─── */
.mv-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.mv-toolbar{padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
.mv-grid{flex:1;display:grid;gap:3px;padding:3px;background:var(--bg-primary);overflow:hidden;}
.mv-grid.g2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.mv-grid.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
.mv-grid.g6{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}.mv-grid.g9{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:repeat(3,1fr);}
.mv-cell{background:#111;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;border:2px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);cursor:pointer;}
.mv-cell:hover{border-color:rgba(229,9,20,.5);}.mv-cell.active-cell{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent-glow);}
.mv-cell video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
.mv-lbl{position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:6px;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;}
.mv-rm{position:absolute;top:5px;right:5px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);border:none;color:#fff;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:.62rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;}
.mv-cell:hover .mv-rm{opacity:1;}
.mv-add{background:var(--bg-card);border:2px dashed var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.82rem;gap:6px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
.mv-add:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}.mv-add-icon{font-size:2rem;}

/* ─── STATS ─── */
.stats-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(180px,1fr));gap:12px;padding:16px;}
.stat-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px;}
.stat-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:8px;}.stat-val{font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:2px;}.stat-lbl{font-size:.77rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ─── SETTINGS ─── */
.settings-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.settings-inner{padding:20px;max-width:680px;}
.set-section{margin-bottom:22px;}
.set-sec-title{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.set-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 0;}
.set-info h4{font-size:.86rem;margin-bottom:2px;}.set-info p{font-size:.73rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.tgl{position:relative;width:42px;height:22px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}
.tgl input{display:none;}
.tgl-track{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;transition:var(--transition);}
.tgl-thumb{position:absolute;width:16px;height:16px;background:var(--text-muted);border-radius:50%;top:2px;left:3px;transition:var(--transition);}
.tgl input:checked~.tgl-track{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);}
.tgl input:checked~.tgl-thumb{transform:translateX(19px);background:#fff;}
.theme-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:10px;}
.theme-card{padding:10px;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition);}
.theme-card:hover{border-color:var(--text-secondary);}.theme-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent-glow);}
.theme-preview{width:100%;height:28px;border-radius:5px;margin-bottom:5px;}.theme-name{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;}

/* ─── CAST ─── */
.cast-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
.cast-devices{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
.cast-device{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px 22px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);min-width:150px;}
.cast-device:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.cast-device.connected{border-color:var(--success);background:rgba(16,185,129,.08);}
.cast-device-icon{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}.cast-device-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:3px;}.cast-device-status{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.cast-device.connected .cast-device-status{color:var(--success);}

/* ─── EPG / WORLDCLOCK ─── */
.epg-page,.wc-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;}
.epg-page{max-width:700px;}.wc-page{max-width:800px;}
.wc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(100px,1fr));gap:10px;margin:16px 0;}
.wc-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center;}
.wc-flag{font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:5px;}.wc-time{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.wc-city{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px;}

/* ─── WATCH PARTY ─── */
.wp-page{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
.wp-video{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;position:relative;}
.wp-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
.wp-sidebar{width:280px;min-width:280px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.wp-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px;}
.wp-msg{margin-bottom:6px;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;}
.wp-msg-user{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}.wp-msg-text{font-size:.8rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.wp-input-row{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.wp-input{flex:1;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:.8rem;outline:none;}
.wp-send{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.88rem;}

/* ─── MODALS ─── */
.modal-bg{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);backdrop-filter:blur(5px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:5000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);}
.modal-bg.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
.modal{background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:24px;width:92%;max-width:520px;max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:scale(.94);transition:transform .25s;}
.modal-bg.show .modal{transform:scale(1);}
.modal-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:18px;}
.modal-title{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;}
.modal-x{background:var(--bg-card);border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}
.modal-x:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
.fg{margin-bottom:14px;}
.fl{display:block;font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:5px;}
.fi,.ft,.fs{width:100%;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}
.fi:focus,.ft:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
.ft{resize:vertical;min-height:85px;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;}
.btn{padding:8px 16px;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-size:.85rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.btn-p{background:var(--gradient-main);color:#fff;}.btn-p:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 5px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
.btn-s{background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);}.btn-s:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.btn-danger{background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);color:var(--danger);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);}.btn-danger:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
.btn-sm{padding:5px 10px;font-size:.78rem;}
.btn-row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:16px;}
.btn-row-l{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-start;margin-top:16px;}

/* ─── TOASTS ─── */
.toast-stack{position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:99998;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;}
.toast{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:11px;padding:10px 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;min-width:260px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);animation:toastIn .3s ease-out;}
.toast.out{animation:toastOut .3s forwards;}
.t-ok{border-left:3px solid var(--success);}.t-err{border-left:3px solid var(--danger);}
.t-warn{border-left:3px solid var(--warning);}.t-info{border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);}
.toast-icon{font-size:1rem;}.toast-msg{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:500;flex:1;}
@keyframes toastIn{from{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
@keyframes toastOut{to{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}}

/* ─── VOICE ─── */
.voice-btn.listening{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);animation:voicePulse 1s infinite;}
@keyframes voicePulse{0%,100%{box-shadow:0 0 0 0 var(--accent-glow);}50%{box-shadow:0 0 0 8px transparent;}}
.voice-transcript{position:fixed;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 30px;z-index:9500;display:none;text-align:center;min-width:300px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
.voice-transcript.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn .2s ease-out;}
.voice-wave{display:flex;gap:3px;justify-content:center;margin:12px 0;height:30px;align-items:center;}
.voice-wave span{width:3px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;animation:vWave var(--d,.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
@keyframes vWave{from{height:6px;}to{height:var(--h,22px);}}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translate(-50%,-48%);}to{opacity:1;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);}}

/* ─── GALLERY ─── */
.gallery-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:8px;max-height:600px;overflow-y:auto;}
.gallery-item{position:relative;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;aspect-ratio:16/9;border:1px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition);}
.gallery-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:scale(1.03);}
.gallery-item img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.gallery-item .gi-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.6);opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:8px;}
.gallery-item:hover .gi-overlay{opacity:1;}
.gi-btn{background:var(--bg-glass);border:none;color:#fff;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.gi-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

/* ─── RSS ─── */
.rss-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
.rss-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.rss-item-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.rss-item-title{font-size:.82rem;font-weight:600;flex:1;}
.rss-item-time{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ─── QCS ─── */
.qcs-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:8000;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-top:60px;}
.qcs-overlay.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .15s;}
.qcs-search{width:90%;max-width:500px;padding:14px 20px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--accent);border-radius:14px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:1.1rem;outline:none;margin-bottom:16px;box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--accent-glow);}
.qcs-search::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
.qcs-results{width:90%;max-width:500px;max-height:60vh;overflow-y:auto;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;}
.qcs-result{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px 16px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.qcs-result:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.qcs-result:hover,.qcs-result.selected{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.qcs-result.selected{border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
.qcs-num{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);min-width:28px;}
.qcs-name{font-weight:600;flex:1;}.qcs-cat{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ─── ADV SEARCH ─── */
.adv-search{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9000;background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);display:none;flex-direction:column;padding:60px 20px 20px;}
.adv-search.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .15s;}
.adv-top{display:flex;gap:10px;max-width:700px;margin:0 auto;width:100%;}
.adv-input{flex:1;padding:14px 20px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:14px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:1.1rem;outline:none;box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--accent-glow);}
.adv-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
.adv-filters{display:flex;gap:8px;max-width:700px;margin:12px auto 0;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.adv-filter{padding:5px 12px;border-radius:12px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
.adv-filter:hover,.adv-filter.active{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
.adv-results{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;max-width:700px;margin:16px auto 0;width:100%;}
.adv-result{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:12px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border-radius:8px;}
.adv-result:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.adv-result-logo{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:8px;background:var(--bg-card);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);font-size:.8rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.adv-result-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.adv-result-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.9rem;}
.adv-result-meta{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:2px;}
.adv-close{position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;z-index:9001;}

/* ─── EDITOR ─── */
.editor-list{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;}
.editor-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.editor-item input{flex:1;padding:5px 8px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:.8rem;outline:none;}
.editor-item input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
.editor-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:.85rem;border-radius:4px;transition:var(--transition);}
.editor-btn:hover{color:var(--accent);}.editor-btn.del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

/* ─── PIN ─── */
.pin-overlay{position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);}
.pin-overlay.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
.pin-box{background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:36px;text-align:center;width:320px;}
.pin-inputs{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
.pin-input{width:48px;height:52px;text-align:center;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;background:var(--bg-card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}
.pin-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}

/* ─── SUGGEST ─── */
.suggest-row{display:flex;gap:8px;overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:4px;max-width:580px;}
.suggest-row::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
.suggest-chip{flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);text-align:center;min-width:100px;}
.suggest-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.suggest-chip-icon{font-size:1.4rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
.suggest-chip-name{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:90px;}
.suggest-chip-cat{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.reminder-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:9px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:5px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.rem-time{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);min-width:45px;font-size:.8rem;}.rem-ch{flex:1;font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;}
.rem-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:3px;}.rem-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   ═══ NEW v6.2 STYLES ═══
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ─── WATCH QUEUE ─── */
.queue-page{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.queue-header{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg-secondary);flex-shrink:0;}
.queue-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:10px;}
.queue-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:6px;background:var(--bg-card);transition:var(--transition);}
.queue-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent);background:var(--bg-hover);}
.queue-item.queue-now{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(229,9,20,.08);}
.queue-num{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--text-muted);min-width:28px;text-align:center;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.queue-item.queue-now .queue-num{color:var(--accent);}
.queue-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.queue-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.88rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.queue-cat{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;}
.queue-acts{display:flex;gap:4px;}
.queue-act{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:5px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.85rem;transition:var(--transition);}
.queue-act:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--accent);}
.queue-act.del:hover{color:var(--danger);}
.queue-empty{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:200px;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;}
.queue-next-badge .qnb-title{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.queue-next-badge .qnb-name{font-weight:700;font-size:.85rem;}
.queue-next-badge .qnb-play{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;padding:4px 10px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.75rem;margin-top:4px;}

/* ─── NOTIFICATION CENTER ─── */
.notif-page{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.notif-header{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg-secondary);flex-shrink:0;}
.notif-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:10px;}
.notif-item{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;gap:12px;padding:11px 14px;border-radius:11px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:6px;background:var(--bg-card);transition:var(--transition);}
.notif-item.unread{border-left:3px solid var(--accent);background:rgba(229,9,20,.04);}
.notif-type{font-size:1.1rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;}
.notif-body{flex:1;}
.notif-msg{font-size:.83rem;font-weight:500;margin-bottom:3px;}
.notif-time{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.notif-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:3px;font-size:.8rem;transition:var(--transition);}
.notif-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}
.notif-filter{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:0 20px 10px;flex-wrap:wrap;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);background:var(--bg-secondary);}
.nf-pill{padding:4px 12px;border-radius:12px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);}
.nf-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
.nf-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}

/* ─── CHANNEL NOTES ─── */
.notes-page{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.notes-header{padding:16px 20px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg-secondary);flex-shrink:0;}
.notes-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:12px;}
.note-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;margin-bottom:10px;transition:var(--transition);}
.note-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
.note-card-head{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.note-ch-name{font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;flex:1;}
.note-time{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.note-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:3px;font-size:.8rem;transition:var(--transition);}
.note-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}
.note-text{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.5;white-space:pre-wrap;}
.note-play-btn{margin-top:8px;font-size:.73rem;padding:4px 10px;}

/* ─── STREAM VALIDATOR ─── */
.validator-list{max-height:360px;overflow-y:auto;margin-top:12px;}
.val-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:5px;background:var(--bg-card);transition:var(--transition);}
.val-url{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-secondary);flex:1;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;font-family:monospace;}
.val-status{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:700;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:7px;flex-shrink:0;min-width:60px;text-align:center;}
.val-ok{background:rgba(16,185,129,.12);color:var(--success);}
.val-fail{background:rgba(239,68,68,.12);color:var(--danger);}
.val-testing{background:rgba(6,182,212,.12);color:var(--accent4);}
.val-slow{background:rgba(245,158,11,.12);color:var(--warning);}
.val-latency{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);min-width:50px;text-align:right;}
.val-import-btn{font-size:.72rem;padding:3px 8px;}

/* ─── QR SHARE ─── */
.qr-box{background:#fff;padding:16px;border-radius:14px;display:inline-flex;margin:16px auto;display:flex;justify-content:center;}
.qr-box img{width:200px;height:200px;border-radius:8px;}
.qr-url{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;word-break:break-all;margin-top:8px;font-family:monospace;}

/* ─── VIRTUAL REMOTE ─── */
.remote-wrap{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 0;}
.remote-screen{background:#111;border-radius:10px;padding:8px 16px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:6px;min-width:220px;}
.remote-screen-ch{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--accent);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.remote-screen-name{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.remote-row{display:flex;gap:8px;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
.r-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:48px;height:48px;border-radius:12px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1.1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);user-select:none;}
.r-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);border-color:var(--accent);}
.r-btn:active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);transform:scale(.95);}
.r-btn.r-red{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.r-btn.r-big{width:60px;height:60px;font-size:1.3rem;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gradient-main);color:#fff;border:none;box-shadow:0 4px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
.r-btn.r-small{width:36px;height:36px;font-size:.85rem;border-radius:9px;}
.r-dpad{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,48px);grid-template-rows:repeat(3,48px);gap:4px;place-items:center;}
.r-dpad-ok{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.r-numpad{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,48px);gap:6px;place-items:center;}
.r-sep{width:100%;height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 0;}

/* ─── BITRATE GRAPH ─── */
.bitrate-canvas-wrap{position:relative;height:120px;background:var(--bg-primary);border-radius:10px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:8px;}
#bitrateCanvas{width:100%;height:120px;}
.bitrate-legend{display:flex;gap:14px;font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.bl-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.bl-dot{width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;}

/* ─── PLAYLIST MANAGER ─── */
.plm-list{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;}
.plm-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 12px;border-radius:9px;border:1px solid var(--border);margin-bottom:5px;background:var(--bg-card);transition:var(--transition);}
.plm-item:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
.plm-icon{font-size:1.4rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.plm-info{flex:1;}
.plm-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.85rem;}
.plm-meta{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;}
.plm-acts{display:flex;gap:4px;}
.plm-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px 7px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.78rem;transition:var(--transition);}
.plm-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--accent);}
.plm-btn.del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

/* ─── TAGS ─── */
.tag-manager-grid{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:6px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.tag-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:4px 11px;border-radius:12px;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);}
.tag-badge:hover{opacity:.85;transform:scale(1.05);}
.tag-badge .tb-x{font-size:.65rem;cursor:pointer;opacity:.7;}
.tag-badge .tb-x:hover{opacity:1;}
.tag-ch-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.tag-ch-name{flex:1;font-size:.83rem;font-weight:500;}
.tag-ch-tags{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.tag-mini{padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;}

/* ─── AUTO RETRY OVERLAY ─── */
.retry-overlay{position:absolute;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.8);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:40;}
.retry-overlay.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .2s;}
.retry-spinner{width:50px;height:50px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .8s linear infinite;margin-bottom:16px;}
.retry-msg{font-weight:700;font-size:1rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
.retry-sub{font-size:.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);margin-bottom:16px;}
.retry-countdown{font-size:2.5rem;font-weight:900;color:var(--accent);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.retry-cancel{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);color:#fff;padding:7px 16px;border-radius:9px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.82rem;margin-top:12px;}
.retry-cancel:hover{background:var(--danger);border-color:var(--danger);}

/* ─── CLIP MAKER ─── */
.clip-timeline{width:100%;height:40px;background:var(--bg-primary);border-radius:8px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;margin:12px 0;}
.clip-played{height:100%;background:rgba(229,9,20,.2);position:absolute;top:0;left:0;}
.clip-range{height:100%;background:rgba(229,9,20,.5);position:absolute;top:0;border:2px solid var(--accent);}
.clip-marker{position:absolute;top:0;height:100%;width:2px;background:var(--accent);}
.clip-in{left:25%;background:var(--success);}
.clip-out{right:25%;background:var(--danger);}
.clip-time{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;}
.clip-actions{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}

/* ─── FULLSCREEN ─── */
.fs-mode .sidebar,.fs-mode .ch-panel,.fs-mode .topbar,.fs-mode .mini-player{display:none!important;}
.fs-mode .player-area{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9990;}

/* ─── ABOUT ─── */
.about-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;}

/* ─── RESPONSIVE ─── */
@media(max-width:1100px){.sidebar{position:fixed;left:-270px;height:100%;z-index:600;box-shadow:none;}.sidebar.open{left:0;box-shadow:5px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,.5);}.mob-menu-btn{display:flex;}:root{--sb-width:250px;}}
@media(max-width:820px){.ch-panel{position:fixed;left:0;top:0;height:100%;width:100%;z-index:550;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .3s;}.ch-panel.open{transform:translateX(0);}.stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.theme-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}.vf-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}.wp-sidebar{width:240px;min-width:240px;}}
@media(max-width:580px){.grid-page{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));}.modal{padding:18px;}.pip-win{width:280px;height:165px;}.tb-clock{display:none;}.vol-slider{width:55px;}.wp-sidebar{display:none;}.gallery-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}}
@media(max-width:420px){.p-right .p-btn:not(:last-child){display:none;}.suggest-chip{min-width:85px;}}
@media(hover:none){.osd,.p-controls{opacity:1!important;}}
</style>
</head>
<body>

<!-- SPLASH -->
<div class="splash" id="splash">
  <div class="splash-logo">📺</div>
  <h1>MODÜL TV</h1>
  <div class="splash-v">v6.2 ULTRA PRO</div>
  <div class="splash-bar"><div class="splash-fill"></div></div>
  <div class="splash-feat" id="splashFeat">Başlatılıyor…</div>
</div>

<!-- TOASTS -->
<div class="toast-stack" id="toasts"></div>

<!-- FLOATING BADGES -->
<div class="flt-badge sleep-badge" id="sleepBadge">😴 <span class="sleep-t" id="sleepT">00:00</span><button class="sleep-x" onclick="cancelSleep()">✕</button></div>
<div class="flt-badge rec-badge" id="recBadge"><div class="rec-dot"></div><span class="rec-lbl">REC</span><span class="rec-t" id="recT">00:00</span><button class="rec-stop" onclick="stopRec()">⏹</button></div>
<div class="flt-badge timer-badge" id="timerBadge">⏱ Kalan: <span class="timer-val" id="timerVal">00:00</span><button class="timer-x" onclick="stopMediaTimer()">✕</button></div>
<div class="flt-badge queue-next-badge" id="queueNextBadge" style="flex-direction:column;align-items:flex-start;">
  <div class="qnb-title">📋 Sıradaki</div>
  <div class="qnb-name" id="qnbName">—</div>
  <button class="qnb-play" onclick="playQueueNext()">▶ Oynat</button>
</div>
<div class="bw-widget" id="bwWidget">
  <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwDown">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">↓ KB/s</div></div>
  <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwBuf">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">Buffer</div></div>
  <div class="bw-col"><div class="bw-val" id="bwBit">—</div><div class="bw-lbl">Kbps</div></div>
</div>
<div class="perf-widget" id="perfWidget">
  <div style="font-weight:700;font-size:.73rem;color:var(--accent4);margin-bottom:4px;">📊 Performans</div>
  <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">FPS</span><span class="perf-v g" id="pFps">60</span></div>
  <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Çözünürlük</span><span class="perf-v" id="pRes">—</span></div>
  <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Bitrate</span><span class="perf-v" id="pBit">—</span></div>
  <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Buffer</span><span class="perf-v" id="pBuf">—</span></div>
  <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Codec</span><span class="perf-v" id="pCodec">—</span></div>
  <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Dropped</span><span class="perf-v" id="pDrop">0</span></div>
  <div class="perf-row"><span class="perf-k">Retry</span><span class="perf-v" id="pRetry">0</span></div>
</div>

<!-- VOICE TRANSCRIPT -->
<div class="voice-transcript" id="voiceTranscript">
  <div style="font-size:.85rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px;">🎤 Sesli Komut Aktif</div>
  <div class="vt-text" id="vtText" style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:600;min-height:1.4em;">Dinleniyor…</div>
  <div class="vt-status" id="vtStatus" style="font-size:.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:6px;">Bir komut söyleyin</div>
  <div class="voice-wave" id="voiceWave"></div>
</div>

<!-- CONTEXT MENU -->
<div class="ctx-menu" id="ctxMenu">
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxPlay()">▶️ Oynat</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxAddQueue()">📋 Kuyruğa Ekle</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxFav()">⭐ Favoriye Ekle/Çıkar</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxAddMV()">🖥️ Çoklu Ekrana Ekle</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxRate()">⭐ Puanla</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxNote()">📝 Not Ekle</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxTag()">🏷️ Etiketle</div>
  <div class="ctx-sep"></div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxCopy()">🔗 URL Kopyala</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxQR()">📡 QR Paylaş</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxInfo()">ℹ️ Kanal Bilgisi</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxReminder()">⏰ Hatırlatıcı</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxTimer()">⏱ Zamanlayıcı</div>
  <div class="ctx-sep"></div>
  <div class="ctx-item" onclick="ctxLock()">🔒 Ebeveyn Kilidi</div>
  <div class="ctx-item danger" onclick="ctxHide()">🚫 Gizle</div>
</div>
<style>.ctx-menu{position:fixed;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:5px;min-width:200px;z-index:3000;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);display:none;}.ctx-menu.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn .15s;}.ctx-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:8px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text-secondary);transition:var(--transition);}.ctx-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}.ctx-item.danger:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,.12);color:var(--danger);}.ctx-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 10px;}</style>

<!-- CH PREVIEW -->
<div class="ch-preview" id="chPreview" style="position:fixed;z-index:900;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px;width:220px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:none;">
  <div style="width:100%;height:120px;background:#000;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:8px;"><video id="previewVid" muted playsinline style="width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;"></video></div>
  <div id="previewName" style="font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;"></div>
  <div id="previewCat" style="font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);"></div>
</div>

<!-- PIN OVERLAY -->
<div class="pin-overlay" id="pinOverlay">
  <div class="pin-box">
    <div style="font-size:2.5rem;margin-bottom:12px;">🔒</div>
    <div style="font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;">Ebeveyn Kontrolü</div>
    <div style="font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:4px;">PIN kodunuzu girin</div>
    <div class="pin-inputs">
      <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin0" oninput="pinNext(0)">
      <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin1" oninput="pinNext(1)">
      <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin2" oninput="pinNext(2)">
      <input type="password" class="pin-input" maxlength="1" id="pin3" oninput="pinNext(3)">
    </div>
    <div class="btn-row" style="justify-content:center;">
      <button class="btn btn-s" onclick="closePin()">İptal</button>
      <button class="btn btn-p" onclick="checkPin()">Doğrula</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PIP -->
<div class="pip-win" id="pipWin">
  <video id="pipVid" muted playsinline></video>
  <div class="pip-bar"><span class="pip-name" id="pipName">—</span><button class="pip-close" onclick="closePip()">✕</button></div>
</div>

<!-- QCS -->
<div class="qcs-overlay" id="qcsOverlay">
  <input class="qcs-search" id="qcsSearch" placeholder="/ Hızlı kanal geçişi… ESC ile kapat" oninput="filterQCS(this.value)">
  <div class="qcs-results" id="qcsResults"></div>
</div>

<!-- ADV SEARCH -->
<div class="adv-search" id="advSearch">
  <button class="adv-close" onclick="closeAdvSearch()">✕</button>
  <div class="adv-top"><input class="adv-input" id="advInput" placeholder="🔍 Gelişmiş arama…" oninput="doAdvSearch()"></div>
  <div class="adv-filters" id="advFilters"></div>
  <div class="adv-results" id="advResults"></div>
</div>

<!-- RETRY OVERLAY (inside video) -->
<!-- (rendered dynamically) -->

<!-- APP -->
<div class="app" id="app">

  <!-- SIDEBAR -->
  <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sb-logo-wrap">
      <span class="sb-logo sb-text">📺 MODÜL TV</span>
      <button class="sb-toggle-btn" onclick="toggleSB()">☰</button>
    </div>
    <nav class="sb-scroll">
      <div class="sb-section">ANA MENÜ</div>
      <div class="sb-item active" data-p="tv" onclick="goPage('tv')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📺</span><span class="sb-text">Canlı TV</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="multiview" onclick="goPage('multiview')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🖥️</span><span class="sb-text">Çoklu Ekran</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="favorites" onclick="goPage('favorites')"><span class="sb-item-icon">⭐</span><span class="sb-text">Favoriler</span><span class="sb-badge" id="favCnt">0</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="history" onclick="goPage('history')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🕐</span><span class="sb-text">Geçmiş</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="queue" onclick="goPage('queue')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📋</span><span class="sb-text">İzleme Kuyruğu</span><span class="sb-badge" id="queueCnt" style="display:none;">0</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="gallery" onclick="goPage('gallery')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📷</span><span class="sb-text">Galeri</span><span class="sb-badge" id="galCnt" style="display:none;">0</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="notifications" onclick="goPage('notifications')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🔔</span><span class="sb-text">Bildirim Merkezi</span><span class="sb-badge hot" id="notifCnt" style="display:none;">0</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="notes" onclick="goPage('notes')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📝</span><span class="sb-text">Kanal Notları</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="watchparty" onclick="goPage('watchparty')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🎉</span><span class="sb-text">Watch Party</span><span class="sb-badge new">YENİ</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="rss" onclick="goPage('rss')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📰</span><span class="sb-text">Canlı Haberler</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="cast" onclick="goPage('cast')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📡</span><span class="sb-text">Ekran Yansıtma</span></div>
      <div class="sb-section">ARAÇLAR</div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('plModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📋</span><span class="sb-text">Playlist Yükle</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('playlistsModal');renderPlaylists()"><span class="sb-item-icon">📁</span><span class="sb-text">Playlist Yöneticisi</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('validatorModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🔗</span><span class="sb-text">Stream Doğrulayıcı</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('tagsModal');renderTagManager()"><span class="sb-item-icon">🏷️</span><span class="sb-text">Etiket Yöneticisi</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('clipModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">✂️</span><span class="sb-text">Klip Oluşturucu</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('sleepModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">😴</span><span class="sb-text">Uyku Zamanlayıcı</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('reminderModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">⏰</span><span class="sb-text">Hatırlatıcılar</span><span class="sb-badge hot" id="remCnt" style="display:none;">0</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('timerModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">⏱️</span><span class="sb-text">Oto. Durdurma</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="openModal('acsModal')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🔄</span><span class="sb-text">Oto. Kanal Geçişi</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="toggleAudioOnly()"><span class="sb-item-icon">🎧</span><span class="sb-text">Ses Modu</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" onclick="toggleVoiceCmd()"><span class="sb-item-icon">🎤</span><span class="sb-text">Sesli Komut</span></div>
      <div class="sb-section">BİLGİ & İSTATİSTİK</div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="stats" onclick="goPage('stats')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📊</span><span class="sb-text">İstatistikler</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="epg" onclick="goPage('epg')"><span class="sb-item-icon">📅</span><span class="sb-text">Program Rehberi</span></div>
      <div class="sb-item" data-p="worldclock" onclick="goPage('worldclock')"><span class="sb-item-icon">🌍</span><span class="sb-text">Dünya Saati</span></div>
      <div class="sb-section">Sİ

## Prompt 3

### You
*2026-03-22 00:33:20 +03*

<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
    <meta name="theme-color" content="#06060e">
    <title>Modül TV v6.2 Ultra Pro</title>
    <style>
        *{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
        :root{
            --bg-primary:#06060e;--bg-secondary:#0d0d18;--bg-card:#151528;--bg-hover:#1e1e3a;
            --bg-glass:rgba(15,15,30,0.88);--accent:#e50914;--accent-glow:rgba(229,9,20,0.35);
            --accent2:#ff6b35;--accent3:#7c3aed;--accent4:#06b6d4;--accent5:#10b981;
            --text-primary:#ffffff;--text-secondary:#a0a0be;--text-muted:#555570;
            --border:#1e1e38;--success:#10b981;--warning:#f59e0b;--danger:#ef4444;
            --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#e50914,#ff6b35);
            --radius:14px;--radius-sm:8px;--radius-lg:20px;
            --shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);--shadow-lg:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
            --sb-width:260px;--topbar-h:56px;
            --transition:all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
        }
        html{font-size:16px;}
        body{font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text-primary);overflow:hidden;height:100vh;height:100dvh;user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;}
        ::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px;}::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* ── SPLASH ── */
        .splash{position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:99999;transition:opacity 0.8s,visibility 0.8s;overflow:hidden;}
        .splash.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
        .splash-particles{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;}
        .splash-p{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);opacity:0;animation:spFloat var(--dur) var(--delay) ease-in-out infinite;}
        @keyframes spFloat{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(100vh) scale(0);}20%{opacity:0.6;}80%{opacity:0.3;}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10vh) scale(1);}}
        .splash-logo{width:110px;height:110px;border-radius:28px;background:var(--gradient-main);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:3.5rem;box-shadow:0 0 60px var(--accent-glow);animation:splashPop 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;z-index:1;}
        @keyframes splashPop{from{transform:scale(0.5);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
        .splash h1{margin-top:24px;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;z-index:1;}
        .splash-v{font-size:0.75rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;z-index:1;}
        .splash-bar{margin-top:40px;width:200px;height:2px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;z-index:1;}
        .splash-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient-main);border-radius:2px;animation:splashLoad 2.6s ease forwards;}
        @keyframes splashLoad{0%{width:0%;}60%{width:70%;}100%{width:100%;}}
        .splash-feat{margin-top:16px;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);z-index:1;}

        /* ── APP SHELL ── */
        .app{display:flex;height:100vh;height:100dvh;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.5s;}.app.show{opacity:1;}
        .sidebar{width:var(--sb-width);min-width:var(--sb-width);background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);z-index:200;overflow:hidden;}
        .sidebar.mini{width:64px;min-width:64px;}.sidebar.mini .sb-text,.sidebar.mini .sb-badge,.sidebar.mini .sb-section{display:none;}.sidebar.mini .sb-logo-wrap{justify-content:center;padding:0 14px;}.sidebar.mini .sb-item{justify-content:center;padding:11px;}.sidebar.mini .sb-item-icon{margin:0;}
        .sb-logo-wrap{height:var(--topbar-h);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:0 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-logo{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;white-space:nowrap;}
        .sb-toggle-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}.sb-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .sb-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding:8px 6px 20px;}
        .sb-section{font-size:0.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;color:var(--text-muted);padding:14px 10px 4px;}
        .sb-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:1px;font-size:0.85rem;position:relative;}
        .sb-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}.sb-item.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 4px 14px var(--accent-glow);}.sb-item.active .sb-item-icon{color:#fff;}
        .sb-item-icon{font-size:1.1rem;width:26px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
        .sb-badge{margin-left:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}.sb-item.active .sb-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}.sb-badge.new{background:var(--accent3);}.sb-badge.hot{background:var(--danger);}

        .main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-width:0;}
        .topbar{height:var(--topbar-h);padding:0 16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .mob-menu-btn{display:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;padding:7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;transition:var(--transition);}.mob-menu-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .search-wrap{flex:1;max-width:420px;position:relative;}
        .search-wrap input{width:100%;padding:8px 14px 8px 36px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;transition:var(--transition);}.search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}.search-wrap input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
        .search-wrap .si{position:absolute;left:11px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.88rem;pointer-events:none;}
        .search-clear{position:absolute;right:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;display:none;padding:2px;}.search-wrap input:not(:placeholder-shown)+.si+.search-clear{display:block;}
        .tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-left:auto;}
        .tb-icon-btn{position:relative;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}.tb-icon-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);border-color:var(--accent);}.tb-icon-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .tb-clock{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;}

        .content{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}.page{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}.page.active{display:flex;}

        /* ── CHANNEL PANEL ── */
        .ch-panel{width:300px;min-width:300px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);}
        .ch-panel-head{padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;flex:1;}
        .ch-count-badge{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;}
        .ch-collapse-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:6px;transition:var(--transition);}.ch-collapse-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
        .cat-bar{display:flex;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px;overflow-x:auto;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}.cat-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
        .cat-pill{padding:4px 11px;border-radius:16px;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;}.cat-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}.cat-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-toolbar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;}
        .ch-toolbar select{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:7px;font-size:0.75rem;outline:none;cursor:pointer;flex:1;}
        .view-btns{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;}.view-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-muted);padding:5px 8px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;transition:var(--transition);}.view-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
        .ch-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;margin-bottom:2px;position:relative;}.ch-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}.ch-item.playing{background:rgba(229,9,20,0.08);border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.3);}.ch-item.playing .ch-name{color:var(--accent);}
        .ch-logo{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;background:var(--bg-card);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border);}.ch-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .ch-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}.ch-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}.ch-meta{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
        .ch-actions{display:flex;gap:2px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}.ch-act{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.82rem;transition:var(--transition);}.ch-act:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--bg-card);}.ch-act.faved{color:var(--warning);}
        .live-dot{width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;flex-shrink:0;}
        @keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.3;}}
        .ch-note-badge{position:absolute;top:2px;right:2px;background:var(--accent3);color:#fff;font-size:0.5rem;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;}
        .ch-list.grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(120px,1fr));gap:6px;}.ch-list.grid .ch-item{flex-direction:column;text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;}.ch-list.grid .ch-logo{width:48px;height:48px;margin:0 auto;}.ch-list.grid .ch-meta{justify-content:center;}.ch-list.grid .ch-actions{display:none;}

        /* ── PLAYER ── */
        .player-area{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;min-width:0;}
        .video-wrap{flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;overflow:hidden;background:#000;min-height:0;}
        .video-wrap video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;transition:filter 0.3s;}

        /* AMBIENT MODE */
        .ambient-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;filter:blur(60px) brightness(0.4);opacity:0;transition:opacity 1s;pointer-events:none;}.ambient-bg.on{opacity:1;}
        .ambient-bg canvas{width:100%;height:100%;}

        .ph{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:30px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,#0d0d20 0%,#06060e 100%);z-index:2;}

        /* IDLE CLOCK */
        .idle-clock{text-align:center;z-index:2;position:absolute;inset:0;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;}
        .idle-clock.show{display:flex;}
        .idle-time{font-size:5rem;font-weight:900;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1;}
        .idle-date{font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:8px;}
        .idle-weather{margin-top:16px;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
        .idle-ch-count{margin-top:8px;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

        .buf-spinner{position:absolute;z-index:15;display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;}.buf-spinner.show{display:flex;}
        .spinner{width:40px;height:40px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;}
        @keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}.buf-text{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);}
        .snap-flash{position:absolute;inset:0;background:#fff;opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;transition:opacity 0.1s;}.snap-flash.flash{opacity:0.8;}
        .ch-num-overlay{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);color:#fff;font-size:4rem;font-weight:900;padding:20px 30px;border-radius:16px;display:none;z-index:30;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.ch-num-overlay.show{display:block;}
        .gesture-hint{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;pointer-events:none;z-index:20;}.gesture-bubble{background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;border-radius:12px;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}.gesture-bubble.show{opacity:1;}

        /* OSD */
        .osd{position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;right:14px;display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;}.video-wrap:hover .osd,.video-wrap.osd-on .osd{opacity:1;}
        .osd-chip{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);padding:7px 14px;border-radius:10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);}
        .osd-live{font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}.osd-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;}
        .osd-btns{display:flex;gap:5px;pointer-events:all;}.osd-btn{background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#fff;padding:7px 9px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;transition:var(--transition);}.osd-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

        /* CONTROLS */
        .p-controls{position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.97));padding:40px 16px 14px;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;}.video-wrap:hover .p-controls,.video-wrap.osd-on .p-controls{opacity:1;}
        .p-progress{width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px;transition:height 0.2s;}.p-progress:hover{height:5px;}
        .p-prog-buf{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:3px;}.p-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width 0.1s linear;}.p-prog-dot{position:absolute;top:50%;right:0;transform:translate(50%,-50%);width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;}.p-progress:hover .p-prog-dot{opacity:1;}
        .p-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}.p-left,.p-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
        .p-btn{background:none;border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;padding:5px 7px;border-radius:7px;transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;}.p-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}.p-btn .lbl{font-size:0.73rem;}
        .vol-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}.vol-slider{width:70px;height:3px;-webkit-appearance:none;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}.vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;}
        .p-time{font-size:0.73rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

        .panels-area{flex-shrink:0;max-height:45%;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
        .vf-panel,.eq-panel,.notes-panel,.bitrate-panel{background:var(--bg-card);padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:none;}
        .vf-panel.show,.eq-panel.show,.notes-panel.show,.bitrate-panel.show{display:block;}
        .panel-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
        .panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.85rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}.panel-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:5px;transition:var(--transition);}.panel-close:hover{color:var(--danger);}
        .vf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;}.vf-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}.vf-row label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
        .vf-slider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}.vf-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:13px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;}
        .chip-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}.chip{padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);}.chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}.chip.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
        .eq-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;justify-content:center;height:100px;margin-bottom:10px;}.eq-band{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
        .eq-vslider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:3px;height:90px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;writing-mode:vertical-lr;direction:rtl;cursor:pointer;}.eq-vslider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:14px;height:7px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;}
        .eq-lbl{font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}.eq-viz{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:30px;margin-left:auto;}.eq-viz-bar{width:3px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:1px;animation:eqAnim var(--d,0.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}@keyframes eqAnim{from{height:4px;}to{height:var(--h,20px);}}

        /* BITRATE GRAPH */
        .bitrate-canvas{width:100%;height:80px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:8px;margin-top:8px;}

        /* FLOATING WIDGETS */
        .sleep-badge,.rec-badge,.bw-widget,.perf-widget,.notif-badge,.timer-badge,.weather-widget{position:fixed;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
        .sleep-badge{top:68px;right:16px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:0.8rem;}.sleep-badge.show{display:flex;}.sleep-t{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.sleep-x{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px;}.sleep-x:hover{color:var(--danger);}
        .rec-badge{top:68px;right:16px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;border-color:var(--danger);animation:recBlink 1s infinite;z-index:501;}.rec-badge.show{display:flex;}.rec-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;}.rec-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);font-size:0.8rem;}.rec-t{font-size:0.8rem;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.rec-stop{background:var(--danger);border:none;color:#fff;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.73rem;}
        @keyframes recBlink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.75;}}
        .timer-badge{top:68px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:6px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:0.8rem;border-color:var(--warning);}.timer-badge.show{display:flex;}.timer-val{font-weight:700;color:var(--warning);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.timer-lbl{color:var(--text-muted);}
        .bw-widget{bottom:70px;left:16px;padding:10px 14px;display:none;gap:14px;align-items:center;}.bw-widget.show{display:flex;}.bw-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;}.bw-val{font-weight:700;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.bw-lbl{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .perf-widget{top:68px;left:16px;padding:10px 12px;display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;font-size:0.7rem;min-width:160px;}.perf-widget.show{display:flex;}.perf-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}.perf-k{color:var(--text-muted);}.perf-v{font-weight:600;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}.perf-v.g{color:var(--success);}.perf-v.w{color:var(--warning);}.perf-v.b{color:var(--danger);}

        /* NOTIFICATION CENTER */
        .notif-center{position:fixed;top:var(--topbar-h);right:0;width:340px;max-height:70vh;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:0 0 0 14px;z-index:3000;display:none;flex-direction:column;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);animation:slideR 0.25s ease-out;}
        .notif-center.show{display:flex;}
        @keyframes slideR{from{transform:translateX(100%);}to{transform:none;}}
        .notif-head{padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;}
        .notif-clear{background:none;border:none;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.78rem;}.notif-clear:hover{text-decoration:underline;}
        .notif-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
        .notif-item{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;}.notif-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}.notif-item.unread{border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
        .notif-icon{font-size:1.3rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;}.notif-body{flex:1;}.notif-title{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}.notif-desc{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}.notif-time{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;}
        .notif-empty{padding:40px 20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);}

        /* QUICK ACTION BAR */
        .quick-bar{position:fixed;bottom:16px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:500;display:none;align-items:center;gap:6px;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:8px 14px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);}
        .quick-bar.show{display:flex;}
        .qb-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}.qb-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}.qb-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
        .qb-sep{width:1px;height:24px;background:var(--border);}

        /* MINI PLAYER */
        .mini-player{position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 16px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;}.mini-player.show{display:flex;}
        .mini-thumb{width:56px;height:38px;background:#000;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;}.mini-thumb video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
        .mini-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}.mini-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}.mini-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
        .mini-ctrl{display:flex;gap:6px;}.mini-btn{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);}.mini-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

        /* PIP */
        .pip-win{position:fixed;z-index:800;border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 15px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);display:none;cursor:move;width:360px;height:210px;bottom:80px;right:16px;resize:both;}.pip-win.show{display:block;animation:pipIn 0.3s ease-out;}
        @keyframes pipIn{from{transform:scale(0.6);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
