function playCh(c,i){if(curCh)trackEnd();curCh=c;curIdx=i;addHistory(c);trackStart();playStream(c.url,c.name);renderChList();document.getElementById('osdName').textContent=c.name;document.getElementById('miniName').textContent=c.name;document.getElementById('miniCat').textContent=c.group||'';document.getElementById('aoName').textContent=c.name;document.getElementById('aoCat').textContent=c.group||'Sadece Ses Modu';document.getElementById('notesChName').textContent='📝 '+c.name;document.getElementById('notesInput').value=channelNotes[c.name]||'';addAudit(`▶️ ${c.name} oynatılıyor`);if(miniOn){const mv=document.getElementById('miniVid');attachStream(mv,c.url,null);}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PLAYER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function playStream(url,name){
    const vid=document.getElementById('vid');document.getElementById('ph').style.display='none';document.getElementById('idleClock').classList.remove('show');vid.style.display='block';document.getElementById('bufSpinner').classList.add('show');
    if(hls){hls.destroy();hls=null;}
    if(url.includes('.m3u8')&&Hls.isSupported()){
        hls=new Hls({enableWorker:true,lowLatencyMode:document.getElementById('sLowLat')?.checked||false,maxBufferLength:30,startLevel:-1});
        hls.loadSource(url);hls.attachMedia(vid);
        hls.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED,()=>{if(document.getElementById('sAutoPlay')?.checked!==false)vid.play().catch(()=>{});toast(`▶️ ${name}`,'ok');updateQualityBtn();startBitrateTracking();});
        hls.on(Hls.Events.ERROR,(e,d)=>{if(d.fatal){toast(`❌ Hata: ${name}`,'err');if(d.type===Hls.ErrorTypes.NETWORK_ERROR)hls.startLoad();else if(d.type===Hls.ErrorTypes.MEDIA_ERROR)hls.recoverMediaError();}});
        hls.on(Hls.Events.LEVEL_SWITCHED,()=>updateQualityBtn());
    }else{vid.src=url;vid.play().catch(()=>{});toast(`▶️ ${name}`,'ok');}
    setPlayBtn(false);applyCurrentVF();
    if(ambientMode)startAmbientLoop();
}
function attachStream(vid,url,cb){if(url.includes('.m3u8')&&Hls.isSupported()){const h=new Hls({enableWorker:false,maxBufferLength:10});h.loadSource(url);h.attachMedia(vid);h.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED,()=>{vid.play().catch(()=>{});if(cb)cb(h);});return h;}else{vid.src=url;vid.play().catch(()=>{});return null;}}
function updateQualityBtn(){if(!hls||!hls.levels.length)return;const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];const txt=l?`${l.height}p`:'Auto';document.getElementById('qualBtn').textContent='🎯 '+txt;const oq=document.getElementById('osdQuality');if(oq){oq.textContent=txt;oq.style.display='';}}
function setPlayBtn(paused){const icon=paused?'▶':'⏸';document.getElementById('playBtn').textContent=icon;document.getElementById('miniPlayBtn').textContent=paused?'▶':'⏸';document.getElementById('qbPlay').textContent=icon;}
function togglePlay(){const v=document.getElementById('vid');if(v.paused){v.play();setPlayBtn(false);}else{v.pause();setPlayBtn(true);}}
function stopPlay(){const v=document.getElementById('vid');v.pause();v.src='';v.style.display='none';document.getElementById('ph').style.display='';document.getElementById('idleClock').classList.add('show');document.getElementById('bufSpinner').classList.remove('show');setPlayBtn(true);trackEnd();curCh=null;curIdx=-1;renderChList();if(isRec)stopRec();stopBitrateTracking();if(ambientMode)stopAmbientLoop();}
function toggleMute(){const v=document.getElementById('vid');v.muted=!v.muted;document.getElementById('muteBtn').textContent=v.muted?'🔇':'🔊';document.getElementById('qbMute').textContent=v.muted?'🔇':'🔊';}
function setVol(val){document.getElementById('vid').volume=val/100;document.getElementById('muteBtn').textContent=val==0?'🔇':'🔊';document.getElementById('qbMute').textContent=val==0?'🔇':'🔊';}
function nextCh(){if(!filtered.length)return;selectCh((curIdx+1)%filtered.length);}
function prevCh(){if(!filtered.length)return;selectCh(curIdx<=0?filtered.length-1:curIdx-1);}
function randomChannel(){if(!filtered.length){toast('Kanal yok','warn');return;}const btn=document.getElementById('qbRandom');if(btn)btn.classList.add('random-shuffle');setTimeout(()=>{if(btn)btn.classList.remove('random-shuffle');},600);let ri;do{ri=Math.floor(Math.random()*filtered.length);}while(ri===curIdx&&filtered.length>1);addAudit(`🎲 Rastgele: ${filtered[ri].name}`);selectCh(ri);}
function cycleSpeed(){speedIdx=(speedIdx+1)%speeds.length;document.getElementById('vid').playbackRate=speeds[speedIdx];document.getElementById('speedLbl').textContent=speeds[speedIdx]+'×';showGesture(`⚡ ${speeds[speedIdx]}×`);}
function cycleAspect(){aspectIdx=(aspectIdx+1)%aspects.length;document.getElementById('vid').style.objectFit=aspects[aspectIdx];toast(`📐 ${aspects[aspectIdx]}`,'info');}
function cycleQ(){if(!hls||!hls.levels.length){toast('Kalite yok','warn');return;}const total=hls.levels.length;const ni=hls.currentLevel===-1?0:(hls.currentLevel+1)%total;hls.currentLevel=ni;const l=hls.levels[ni];document.getElementById('qualBtn').textContent=`🎯 ${l.height}p`;toast(`Kalite: ${l.height}p`,'info');}
function toggleFS(){if(!document.fullscreenElement){document.body.requestFullscreen().catch(()=>{});document.body.classList.add('fs-mode');isFS=true;}else{document.exitFullscreen();document.body.classList.remove('fs-mode');isFS=false;}}
document.addEventListener('fullscreenchange',()=>{if(!document.fullscreenElement){document.body.classList.remove('fs-mode');isFS=false;}});
function seekVid(e){const v=document.getElementById('vid');if(!v.duration||!isFinite(v.duration))return;const r=e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();v.currentTime=((e.clientX-r.left)/r.width)*v.duration;}

function takeSnap(){
    const v=document.getElementById('vid');if(v.style.display==='none')return;
    const fl=document.getElementById('snapFlash');fl.classList.add('flash');setTimeout(()=>fl.classList.remove('flash'),150);
    const c=document.createElement('canvas');c.width=v.videoWidth||1280;c.height=v.videoHeight||720;c.getContext('2d').drawImage(v,0,0);
    const dataUrl=c.toDataURL('image/jpeg',0.92);
    screenshots.unshift({data:dataUrl,channel:curCh?.name||'Unknown',group:curCh?.group||'',time:Date.now(),id:Date.now()});
    if(screenshots.length>50)screenshots=screenshots.slice(0,50);
    localStorage.setItem('mtv_snaps',JSON.stringify(screenshots));updateGalCnt();renderGallery();addAudit(`📸 ${curCh?.name} ekran görüntüsü`);toast('📸 Kaydedildi','ok');
}

function showGesture(txt,dur=1200){const el=document.getElementById('gestureBubble');el.textContent=txt;el.classList.add('show');clearTimeout(el._tmr);el._tmr=setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('show'),dur);}
function showChNum(n){const el=document.getElementById('chNumOverlay');el.textContent=n;el.classList.add('show');clearTimeout(el._t);el._t=setTimeout(()=>el.classList.remove('show'),1500);}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// AMBIENT MODE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initAmbient(){const c=document.getElementById('ambientCanvas');if(c){c.width=200;c.height=120;}}
function toggleAmbient(){
    ambientMode=!ambientMode;
    const bg=document.getElementById('ambientBg');
    const btn=document.getElementById('ambientBtn');
    const qb=document.getElementById('qbAmbient');
    bg.classList.toggle('on',ambientMode);
    if(btn)btn.classList.toggle('active',ambientMode);
    if(qb)qb.classList.toggle('active',ambientMode);
    document.getElementById('sAmbient').checked=ambientMode;
    if(ambientMode&&curCh){startAmbientLoop();addAudit('🌈 Ambient mod açıldı');toast('🌈 Ambient mod','ok');}
    else{stopAmbientLoop();addAudit('🌈 Ambient mod kapandı');}
}
function startAmbientLoop(){
    if(ambientAnimId)return;
    const canvas=document.getElementById('ambientCanvas');const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');const vid=document.getElementById('vid');
    function loop(){ambientAnimId=requestAnimationFrame(loop);if(vid.readyState>=2){ctx.drawImage(vid,0,0,canvas.width,canvas.height);}}
    loop();
}
function stopAmbientLoop(){if(ambientAnimId){cancelAnimationFrame(ambientAnimId);ambientAnimId=null;}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// AUDIO ONLY MODE
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleAudioOnly(){
    audioOnlyMode=!audioOnlyMode;const overlay=document.getElementById('aoOverlay');const qb=document.getElementById('qbAudio');
    if(audioOnlyMode){overlay.classList.add('show');if(curCh){document.getElementById('aoName').textContent=curCh.name;document.getElementById('aoCat').textContent=curCh.group||'Sadece Ses Modu';}initAoBars();if(qb)qb.classList.add('active');addAudit('🎧 Ses modu açıldı');toast('🎧 Ses modu','ok');}
    else{overlay.classList.remove('show');if(qb)qb.classList.remove('active');addAudit('🎧 Ses modu kapandı');toast('📺 Video modu','info');}
}
function initAoBars(){const el=document.getElementById('aoBars');if(!el)return;el.innerHTML=Array.from({length:16},(_,i)=>`<div class="ao-bar" style="--d:${0.3+Math.random()*0.6}s;--h:${10+Math.random()*28}px;animation:eqAnim var(--d) ease-in-out infinite alternate;"></div>`).join('');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BITRATE TRACKER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleBitratePanel(){const p=document.getElementById('bitratePanel');p.classList.toggle('show');if(p.classList.contains('show'))startBitrateTracking();else stopBitrateTracking();}
function startBitrateTracking(){if(brInterval)return;bitrateHistory=[];brInterval=setInterval(()=>{let br=0;if(hls&&hls.levels&&hls.currentLevel>=0){const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];if(l&&l.bitrate)br=Math.round(l.bitrate/1000);}bitrateHistory.push(br);if(bitrateHistory.length>60)bitrateHistory.shift();drawBitrateGraph();},1000);}
function stopBitrateTracking(){if(brInterval){clearInterval(brInterval);brInterval=null;}}
function drawBitrateGraph(){
    const canvas=document.getElementById('bitrateCanvas');if(!canvas||!bitrateHistory.length)return;
    const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');const W=canvas.offsetWidth||600,H=80;canvas.width=W*2;canvas.height=H*2;ctx.scale(2,2);ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);
    const max=Math.max(...bitrateHistory,1);const accent=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--accent').trim()||'#e50914';
    // Grid
    ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(255,255,255,0.05)';ctx.lineWidth=0.5;
    for(let y=0;y<H;y+=20){ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(0,y);ctx.lineTo(W,y);ctx.stroke();}
    // Line
    ctx.beginPath();ctx.strokeStyle=accent;ctx.lineWidth=1.5;
    bitrateHistory.forEach((v,i)=>{const x=(i/bitrateHistory.length)*W;const y=H-(v/max)*(H-10);if(i===0)ctx.moveTo(x,y);else ctx.lineTo(x,y);});
    ctx.stroke();
    // Fill
    const lastX=(bitrateHistory.length-1)/bitrateHistory.length*W;ctx.lineTo(lastX,H);ctx.lineTo(0,H);ctx.closePath();
    const grad=ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);grad.addColorStop(0,accent+'44');grad.addColorStop(1,accent+'05');ctx.fillStyle=grad;ctx.fill();
    // Stats
    const avg=Math.round(bitrateHistory.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/bitrateHistory.length);
    const mx=Math.max(...bitrateHistory);const mn=Math.min(...bitrateHistory);
    document.getElementById('brAvg').textContent=avg+' Kbps';document.getElementById('brMax').textContent=mx+' Kbps';document.getElementById('brMin').textContent=mn+' Kbps';
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NOTES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleNotesPanel(){document.getElementById('notesPanel').classList.toggle('show');}
function saveNoteLive(){if(!curCh)return;channelNotes[curCh.name]=document.getElementById('notesInput').value;localStorage.setItem('mtv_notes',JSON.stringify(channelNotes));renderChList();}
function renderAllNotes(){
    const el=document.getElementById('notesList');if(!el)return;
    const entries=Object.entries(channelNotes).filter(([,v])=>v.trim());
    if(!entries.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="padding:30px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);">📝 Henüz not yok<br><span style="font-size:0.78rem;">Kanal sağ tık menüsünden not ekleyebilirsiniz</span></div>';return;}
    el.innerHTML=entries.map(([ch,txt])=>`<div class="note-item"><span class="note-ch">${ch}</span><span class="note-txt">${txt}</span><button class="note-del" onclick="deleteNote('${ch}')">🗑️</button></div>`).join('');
}
function deleteNote(ch){delete channelNotes[ch];localStorage.setItem('mtv_notes',JSON.stringify(channelNotes));renderAllNotes();renderChList();toast('Not silindi','info');}
function ctxNote(){
    if(!ctxCh)return;const note=prompt(`${ctxCh.name} için not:`,channelNotes[ctxCh.name]||'');
    if(note!==null){if(note.trim()){channelNotes[ctxCh.name]=note;toast(`📝 Not eklendi: ${ctxCh.name}`,'ok');}else{delete channelNotes[ctxCh.name];toast('Not silindi','info');}localStorage.setItem('mtv_notes',JSON.stringify(channelNotes));renderChList();renderAllNotes();}
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// QUICK ACTION BAR
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleQuickBar(){quickBarOn=!quickBarOn;document.getElementById('quickBar').classList.toggle('show',quickBarOn);document.getElementById('sQuickBar').checked=quickBarOn;}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// GESTURE HELP
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function openGestureHelp(){document.getElementById('gestureHelp').classList.add('show');}
function closeGestureHelp(){document.getElementById('gestureHelp').classList.remove('show');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// TOUCH GESTURES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initTouchGestures(){
    const wrap=document.getElementById('videoWrap');
    wrap.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{if(!document.getElementById('sGestures')?.checked)return;touchStartX=e.touches[0].clientX;touchStartY=e.touches[0].clientY;touchStartVol=document.getElementById('vid').volume;},{passive:true});
    wrap.addEventListener('touchmove',e=>{if(!document.getElementById('sGestures')?.checked)return;const dx=e.touches[0].clientX-touchStartX;const dy=e.touches[0].clientY-touchStartY;if(Math.abs(dy)>Math.abs(dx)&&Math.abs(dy)>20){const vid=document.getElementById('vid');vid.volume=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,touchStartVol+-(dy/200)));document.getElementById('volSlider').value=vid.volume*100;showGesture(vid.volume>0?`🔊 ${Math.round(vid.volume*100)}%`:'🔇');}},{passive:true});
    wrap.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{if(!document.getElementById('sGestures')?.checked)return;const dx=e.changedTouches[0].clientX-touchStartX;if(Math.abs(dx)>60){if(dx>0)prevCh();else nextCh();}});
    let lastTap=0;wrap.addEventListener('touchend',()=>{const now=Date.now();if(now-lastTap<300)toggleFS();lastTap=now;});
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// VIDEO FILTERS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleVF(){document.getElementById('vfPanel').classList.toggle('show');}
function applyVF(prop,val,lblId,unit){vfState[prop]=parseFloat(val);const l=document.getElementById(lblId);if(l)l.textContent=Math.round(val)+unit;applyCurrentVF();}
function applyCurrentVF(){const f=vfState;document.getElementById('vid').style.filter=`brightness(${f.brightness}%) contrast(${f.contrast}%) saturate(${f.saturate}%) hue-rotate(${f['hue-rotate']}deg) blur(${f.blur}px) sepia(${f.sepia}%)`;}
function resetVF(){applyVFPreset('Normal',document.querySelector('.vf-panel .chip'));}
function initVFPresets(){document.getElementById('vfPresets').innerHTML=Object.keys(VF_PRESETS).map(n=>`<div class="chip ${n==='Normal'?'active':''}" onclick="applyVFPreset('${n}',this)">${n}</div>`).join('');}
function applyVFPreset(name,el){document.querySelectorAll('#vfPresets .chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));if(el)el.classList.add('active');const p=VF_PRESETS[name];if(!p)return;Object.assign(vfState,p);const sliders=document.querySelectorAll('#vfPanel .vf-slider');const keys=['brightness','contrast','saturate','hue-rotate','blur','sepia'];const lbls=['vfBr','vfCo','vfSa','vfHu','vfBl','vfSe'];const units=['%','%','%','°','px','%'];sliders.forEach((s,i)=>{s.value=vfState[keys[i]];const l=document.getElementById(lbls[i]);if(l)l.textContent=Math.round(vfState[keys[i]])+units[i];});applyCurrentVF();toast(`🎨 ${name}`,'info');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// EQUALIZER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initEQ(){
    document.getElementById('eqBars').innerHTML=EQ_FREQS.map((f,i)=>`<div class="eq-band"><input type="range" class="eq-vslider" min="-12" max="12" value="0" orient="vertical" id="eq${i}" oninput="setEQBand(${i},this.value)"><div class="eq-lbl">${f>=1000?(f/1000)+'k':f}</div></div>`).join('');
    document.getElementById('eqPresets').innerHTML=Object.keys(EQ_PRESETS).map(n=>`<div class="chip ${n==='Düz'?'active':''}" onclick="applyEQPreset('${n}',this)">${n}</div>`).join('');
    const viz=document.getElementById('eqViz');if(viz)viz.innerHTML=Array.from({length:8},(_,i)=>`<div class="eq-viz-bar" style="--d:${0.3+i*0.07}s;--h:${8+i*3}px;"></div>`).join('');
}
function toggleEQ(){document.getElementById('eqPanel').classList.toggle('show');}
function setEQBand(idx,val){if(!audioCtx){try{audioCtx=new(window.AudioContext||window.webkitAudioContext)();eqFilters=EQ_FREQS.map((freq,i)=>{const f=audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();f.type=i===0?'lowshelf':i===EQ_FREQS.length-1?'highshelf':'peaking';f.frequency.value=freq;f.gain.value=0;f.Q.value=1.4;return f;});}catch(e){toast('Audio API desteklenmiyor','warn');return;}}if(eqFilters[idx])eqFilters[idx].gain.value=parseFloat(val);}
function applyEQPreset(name,el){document.querySelectorAll('#eqPresets .chip').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));if(el)el.classList.add('active');EQ_PRESETS[name]?.forEach((v,i)=>{const s=document.getElementById(`eq${i}`);if(s){s.value=v;setEQBand(i,v);}});toast(`🎛️ ${name}`,'info');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// RECORDING
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleRec(){if(isRec)stopRec();else startRec();}
function startRec(){const vid=document.getElementById('vid');if(vid.style.display==='none'||!curCh){toast('Kanal seçin','warn');return;}try{const stream=vid.captureStream?vid.captureStream():vid.mozCaptureStream();recMR=new MediaRecorder(stream,{mimeType:'video/webm;codecs=vp9,opus'});recChunks=[];recMR.ondataavailable=e=>{if(e.data.size>0)recChunks.push(e.data);};recMR.onstop=()=>{const blob=new Blob(recChunks,{type:'video/webm'});const a=document.createElement('a');a.download=`modulTV_${curCh?.name||'rec'}_${Date.now()}.webm`;a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.click();toast('💾 Kayıt indirildi','ok');};recMR.start(1000);isRec=true;recStart=Date.now();document.getElementById('recBadge').classList.add('show');document.getElementById('recBtn').classList.add('active');recTmr=setInterval(()=>{const e=Math.floor((Date.now()-recStart)/1000);document.getElementById('recT').textContent=`${String(Math.floor(e/60)).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(e%60).padStart(2,'0')}`;},1000);addAudit(`⏺️ Kayıt: ${curCh.name}`);toast(`⏺️ Kayıt: ${curCh.name}`,'ok');}catch(e){toast('Kayıt başlatılamadı','err');}}
function stopRec(){if(!isRec||!recMR)return;recMR.stop();isRec=false;clearInterval(recTmr);document.getElementById('recBadge').classList.remove('show');document.getElementById('recBtn').classList.remove('active');addAudit('⏹ Kayıt durduruldu');toast('⏹ Durduruldu','info');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SEARCH & SORT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function doSearch(q){q=q.toLowerCase().trim();if(!q){filterCat(activeCat);return;}filtered=channels.filter(c=>(c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(c.group||'').toLowerCase().includes(q))&&!hidden.includes(c.name));renderChList();}
function clearSearch(){document.getElementById('searchIn').value='';filterCat(activeCat);}
function doSort(mode){if(!mode)return;switch(mode){case'az':filtered.sort((a,b)=>a.name.localeCompare(b.name));break;case'za':filtered.sort((a,b)=>b.name.localeCompare(a.name));break;case'group':filtered.sort((a,b)=>(a.group||'').localeCompare(b.group||''));break;case'recent':filtered.sort((a,b)=>{const ai=history.findIndex(h=>h.name===a.name);const bi=history.findIndex(h=>h.name===b.name);return(ai===-1?999:ai)-(bi===-1?999:bi);});break;case'rated':filtered.sort((a,b)=>(ratings[b.name]||0)-(ratings[a.name]||0));break;case'mostwatch':filtered.sort((a,b)=>{let at=0,bt=0;Object.values(stats).forEach(d=>{if(d.channels[a.name])at+=d.channels[a.name];if(d.channels[b.name])bt+=d.channels[b.name];});return bt-at;});break;}renderChList();}
function setView(m){viewMode=m;document.getElementById('chList').classList.toggle('grid',m==='grid');document.getElementById('lvBtn').classList.toggle('active',m==='list');document.getElementById('gvBtn').classList.toggle('active',m==='grid');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FAVORITES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleFav(name){const i=favorites.indexOf(name);if(i>-1){favorites.splice(i,1);addAudit(`☆ ${name} favorilerden çıkarıldı`);toast(`☆ ${name}`,'info');}else{favorites.push(name);addAudit(`⭐ ${name} favorilere eklendi`);toast(`⭐ ${name}`,'ok');}localStorage.setItem('mtv_fav',JSON.stringify(favorites));updateFavCnt();renderChList();renderFavs();}
function updateFavCnt(){document.getElementById('favCnt').textContent=favorites.length;}
function renderFavs(){const el=document.getElementById('favGrid');const fvs=channels.filter(c=>favorites.includes(c.name));if(!fvs.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="grid-column:1/-1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:200px;color:var(--text-muted);"><div style="font-size:3rem;opacity:0.2;margin-bottom:10px;">⭐</div><h3 style="color:var(--text-secondary);">Favori yok</h3></div>';return;}el.innerHTML=fvs.map(c=>`<div class="g-card" onclick="playFromAnywhere('${c.name}')"><div class="g-card-icon">📺</div><div class="g-card-name">${c.name}</div><div class="g-card-sub">${c.group||''}</div></div>`).join('');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// HISTORY & STATS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function addHistory(c){history=history.filter(h=>h.name!==c.name);history.unshift({name:c.name,group:c.group,time:Date.now()});if(history.length>100)history=history.slice(0,100);localStorage.setItem('mtv_hist',JSON.stringify(history));}
function renderHist(){const el=document.getElementById('histGrid');if(!history.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="grid-column:1/-1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:200px;color:var(--text-muted);"><div style="font-size:3rem;opacity:0.2;margin-bottom:10px;">🕐</div><h3 style="color:var(--text-secondary);">Geçmiş boş</h3></div>';return;}el.innerHTML=history.map(h=>{const d=new Date(h.time);return`<div class="g-card" onclick="playFromAnywhere('${h.name}')"><div class="g-card-icon">📺</div><div class="g-card-name">${h.name}</div><div class="g-card-sub">${d.toLocaleTimeString('tr-TR',{hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit'})} · ${h.group||''}</div></div>`;}).join('');}
function trackStart(){watchStart=Date.now();}
function trackEnd(){if(!watchStart||!curCh)return;const dur=(Date.now()-watchStart)/1000;const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];if(!stats[today])stats[today]={totalSeconds:0,channels:{}};stats[today].totalSeconds+=dur;if(!stats[today].channels[curCh.name])stats[today].channels[curCh.name]=0;stats[today].channels[curCh.name]+=dur;localStorage.setItem('mtv_stats',JSON.stringify(stats));watchStart=Date.now();}
function playFromAnywhere(name){goPage('tv');const c=channels.find(ch=>ch.name===name);if(c){filterCat('all');const i=filtered.findIndex(ch=>ch.name===name);if(i>-1)selectCh(i);}}

function renderStats(){
    const today=new Date().toISOString().split('T')[0];const ts=stats[today]||{totalSeconds:0,channels:{}};let totalAll=0;Object.values(stats).forEach(d=>totalAll+=d.totalSeconds);const topCh=Object.entries(ts.channels).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1])[0];const days=Object.keys(stats).length||1;
    document.getElementById('statsGrid').innerHTML=[{icon:'📺',val:channels.length,lbl:'Kanal'},{icon:'⭐',val:favorites.length,lbl:'Favori'},{icon:'🕐',val:Math.round(ts.totalSeconds/60),lbl:'Bugün dk'},{icon:'📊',val:Math.round(totalAll/60),lbl:'Toplam dk'},{icon:'🏆',val:topCh?topCh[0]:'—',lbl:'En Çok İzlenen',small:true},{icon:'📝',val:Object.keys(channelNotes).filter(k=>channelNotes[k]).length,lbl:'Not'},{icon:'📷',val:screenshots.length,lbl:'Ekran Gör.'},{icon:'📋',val:auditLog.length,lbl:'Aktivite'},{icon:'🎲',val:'Keşfet',lbl:'Rastgele',click:true}].map(s=>`<div class="stat-card" ${s.click?'onclick="randomChannel()" style="cursor:pointer;"':''}><div class="stat-icon">${s.icon}</div><div class="stat-val" style="${s.small?'font-size:1.1rem;':''}">${s.val}</div><div class="stat-lbl">${s.lbl}</div></div>`).join('');drawChart();renderAudit();
}
function drawChart(){const canvas=document.getElementById('statsCanvas');if(!canvas)return;const ctx=canvas.getContext('2d');const W=canvas.offsetWidth||600,H=180;canvas.width=W*2;canvas.height=H*2;ctx.scale(2,2);ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);const days=[];for(let i=6;i>=0;i--){const d=new Date();d.setDate(d.getDate()-i);days.push(d.toISOString().split('T')[0]);}const vals=days.map(d=>Math.round((stats[d]?.totalSeconds||0)/60));const max=Math.max(...vals,1);const bw=(W-50)/7;const accent=getComputedStyle(document.documentElement).getPropertyValue('--accent').trim()||'#e50914';days.forEach((d,i)=>{const bh=((vals[i]/max)*(H-40));const x=25+i*bw+bw*0.2,bwx=bw*0.6;if(bh>0){const gr=ctx.createLinearGradient(x,H-30-bh,x,H-30);gr.addColorStop(0,accent);gr.addColorStop(1,accent+'55');ctx.fillStyle=gr;ctx.beginPath();ctx.roundRect?ctx.roundRect(x,H-30-bh,bwx,bh,3):ctx.rect(x,H-30-bh,bwx,bh);ctx.fill();}ctx.fillStyle='#555570';ctx.font='9px sans-serif';ctx.textAlign='center';ctx.fillText(d.slice(5),x+bwx/2,H-15);if(vals[i]>0){ctx.fillStyle=accent;ctx.fillText(vals[i]+'dk',x+bwx/2,H-35-bh);}});}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// GALLERY
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function updateGalCnt(){const el=document.getElementById('galCnt');if(screenshots.length>0){el.textContent=screenshots.length;el.style.display='';}else el.style.display='none';}
function renderGallery(){const el=document.getElementById('galleryGrid');if(!el)return;if(!screenshots.length){el.innerHTML='<div style="grid-column:1/-1;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);padding:40px;">📷 Henüz ekran görüntüsü yok<br><span style="font-size:0.72rem;">Oynatıcıda 📸 butonuna basın</span></div>';return;}el.innerHTML=screenshots.map((s,i)=>`<div class="g-card" style="padding:8px;text-align:left;"><img src="${s.data}" style="width:100%;border-radius:6px;margin-bottom:6px;aspect-ratio:16/9;object-fit:cover;"><div style="font-weight:600;font-size:0.8rem;">${s.channel}</div><div style="font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);">${new Date(s.time).toLocaleString('tr-TR')}</div><div style="display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:6px;"><button class="btn btn-s" style="padding:2px 8px;font-size:0.7rem;flex:1;" onclick="downloadSnap(${i})">📥</button><button class="btn btn-danger" style="padding:2px 8px;font-size:0.7rem;flex:1;" onclick="deleteSnap(${i})">🗑️</button></div></div>`).join('');}
function downloadSnap(i){const s=screenshots[i];const a=document.createElement('a');a.download=`modulTV_${s.channel}_${new Date(s.time).toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g,'-')}.jpg`;a.href=s.data;a.click();toast('📥 İndirildi','ok');}
function deleteSnap(i){screenshots.splice(i,1);localStorage.setItem('mtv_snaps',JSON.stringify(screenshots));updateGalCnt();renderGallery();toast('🗑️ Silindi','info');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// VOICE COMMANDS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleVoiceCmd(){
    if(!('webkitSpeechRecognition'in window)&&!('SpeechRecognition'in window)){toast('🎤 Tarayıcı desteklemiyor','warn');return;}
    if(voiceListening){stopVoiceCmd();return;}
    const SR=window.SpeechRecognition||window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    voiceRec=new SR();voiceRec.lang='tr-TR';voiceRec.continuous=false;voiceRec.interimResults=true;
    voiceRec.onstart=()=>{voiceListening=true;document.getElementById('voiceBtn').classList.add('listening');addAudit('🎤 Sesli komut başladı');};
    voiceRec.onresult=e=>{let txt='';for(let i=e.resultIndex;i<e.results.length;i++)txt+=e.results[i][0].transcript;if(e.results[e.results.length-1].isFinal)processVoiceCmd(txt.toLowerCase().trim());};
    voiceRec.onerror=()=>stopVoiceCmd();voiceRec.onend=()=>stopVoiceCmd();
    voiceRec.start();
}
function stopVoiceCmd(){voiceListening=false;document.getElementById('voiceBtn').classList.remove('listening');if(voiceRec){try{voiceRec.stop();}catch(e){}voiceRec=null;}}
function processVoiceCmd(txt){
    const ch=channels.find(c=>txt.includes(c.name.toLowerCase()));
    if(ch){const i=filtered.findIndex(c=>c.name===ch.name);if(i>-1){selectCh(i);toast(`🎤 ${ch.name}`,'ok');return;}}
    if(txt.includes('durdur')||txt.includes('dur')){const vid=document.getElementById('vid');vid.pause();setPlayBtn(true);toast('🎤 Durduruldu','ok');}
    else if(txt.includes('oynat')||txt.includes('play')){document.getElementById('vid').play();setPlayBtn(false);toast('🎤 Oynatılıyor','ok');}
    else if(txt.includes('sonraki')){nextCh();}
    else if(txt.includes('önceki')){prevCh();}
    else if(txt.includes('rastgele')){randomChannel();}
    else if(txt.includes('foto')||txt.includes('ekran')){takeSnap();}
    else if(txt.includes('kayit')){toggleRec();}
    else if(txt.includes('tam ekran')){toggleFS();}
    else if(txt.includes('ambient')){toggleAmbient();}
    else if(txt.includes('ses modu')){toggleAudioOnly();}
    else{toast(`🎤 Anlaşılmadı: "${txt}"`,'warn');}
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// HOVER PREVIEW
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function chHover(e,i){if(!document.getElementById('sPreview')?.checked)return;clearTimeout(prevTmout);prevTmout=setTimeout(()=>{const c=filtered[i];if(!c||(curCh&&curCh.name===c.name))return;const prev=document.getElementById('chPreview');document.getElementById('previewName').textContent=c.name;document.getElementById('previewCat').textContent=c.group||'';const r=e.currentTarget.getBoundingClientRect();prev.style.left=Math.min(r.right+8,window.innerWidth-230)+'px';prev.style.top=Math.max(0,Math.min(r.top,window.innerHeight-210))+'px';prev.classList.add('show');const pv=document.getElementById('previewVid');if(prevHls){prevHls.destroy();prevHls=null;}if(c.url.includes('.m3u8')&&Hls.isSupported()){prevHls=new Hls({enableWorker:false,maxBufferLength:5});prevHls.loadSource(c.url);prevHls.attachMedia(pv);prevHls.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED,()=>pv.play().catch(()=>{}));}},700);}
function chLeave(){clearTimeout(prevTmout);document.getElementById('chPreview').classList.remove('show');if(prevHls){prevHls.destroy();prevHls=null;}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CONTEXT MENU
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function showCtx(e,i){e.preventDefault();ctxCh=filtered[i];const m=document.getElementById('ctxMenu');m.style.left=Math.min(e.pageX,window.innerWidth-215)+'px';m.style.top=Math.min(e.pageY,window.innerHeight-340)+'px';m.classList.add('show');}
document.addEventListener('click',()=>document.getElementById('ctxMenu').classList.remove('show'));
function ctxPlay(){if(ctxCh){const i=filtered.findIndex(c=>c.name===ctxCh.name);if(i>-1)selectCh(i);}}
function ctxFav(){if(ctxCh)toggleFav(ctxCh.name);}
function ctxAddMV(){if(ctxCh)addToMV(ctxCh);}
function ctxCopy(){if(ctxCh){navigator.clipboard.writeText(ctxCh.url);toast('🔗 Kopyalandı','ok');}}
function ctxCast(){goPage('cast');}
function ctxLock(){if(!ctxCh)return;if(locked.includes(ctxCh.name)){locked=locked.filter(n=>n!==ctxCh.name);toast(`🔓 ${ctxCh.name} kilidi kaldırıldı`,'info');}else{locked.push(ctxCh.name);toast(`🔒 ${ctxCh.name} kilitlendi`,'ok');}localStorage.setItem('mtv_locked',JSON.stringify(locked));renderChList();}
function ctxHide(){if(!ctxCh)return;hidden.push(ctxCh.name);localStorage.setItem('mtv_hidden',JSON.stringify(hidden));toast(`🚫 ${ctxCh.name} gizlendi`,'info');filterCat(activeCat);}
function ctxInfo(){if(!ctxCh)return;let tw=0;Object.values(stats).forEach(d=>{if(d.channels[ctxCh.name])tw+=d.channels[ctxCh.name];});document.getElementById('infoContent').innerHTML=`<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:12px;padding:16px;"><h3 style="margin-bottom:8px;">${ctxCh.name}</h3><p style="font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:4px;">📁 ${ctxCh.group||'Genel'}</p><p style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);word-break:break-all;margin-bottom:4px;">🔗 ${ctxCh.url}</p><p style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);">⭐ Puan: ${ratings[ctxCh.name]||'—'}</p><p style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);">🕐 Toplam: ${Math.round(tw/60)} dk</p><p style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);">${favorites.includes(ctxCh.name)?'⭐ Favorilerde':'☆ Favoride değil'}</p></div>`;openModal('infoModal');}
function ctxReminder(){if(!ctxCh)return;openModal('reminderModal');setTimeout(()=>{document.getElementById('remCh').value=ctxCh.name;},80);}
function ctxRate(){if(!ctxCh)return;document.getElementById('ratingName').textContent=ctxCh.name;renderRatingStars(ctxCh.name,ratings[ctxCh.name]||0);openModal('ratingModal');}
function renderRatingStars(name,cur){const c=document.getElementById('ratingStars');c.innerHTML='';for(let i=1;i<=5;i++){const s=document.createElement('span');s.textContent=i<=cur?'⭐':'☆';s.style.cursor='pointer';s.onclick=()=>{ratings[name]=i;localStorage.setItem('mtv_ratings',JSON.stringify(ratings));renderRatingStars(name,i);document.getElementById('ratingInfo').textContent=`Puan: ${i}/5`;renderChList();toast(`⭐ ${name}: ${i}/5`,'ok');};c.appendChild(s);}document.getElementById('ratingInfo').textContent=cur?`Mevcut: ${cur}/5`:'—';}
function ctxTimer(){if(!ctxCh)return;const mins=prompt(`${ctxCh.name} için süre (dk):`);if(mins){const i=filtered.findIndex(c=>c.name===ctxCh.name);if(i>-1)selectCh(i);setTimeout(()=>setMediaTimer(+mins),500);}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PIN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function pinNext(i){const el=document.getElementById(`pin${i}`);if(el.value.length===1&&i<3)document.getElementById(`pin${i+1}`).focus();}
function checkPin(){const entered=[0,1,2,3].map(i=>document.getElementById(`pin${i}`).value).join('');if(entered===pin){closePin();if(pendingCh){playCh(pendingCh.c,pendingCh.i);pendingCh=null;}toast('🔓 Doğrulandı','ok');}else{toast('❌ Yanlış PIN','err');[0,1,2,3].forEach(i=>{const p=document.getElementById(`pin${i}`);p.value='';p.style.borderColor='var(--danger)';});document.getElementById('pin0').focus();setTimeout(()=>[0,1,2,3].forEach(i=>document.getElementById(`pin${i}`).style.borderColor=''),1500);}}
function closePin(){document.getElementById('pinOverlay').classList.remove('show');[0,1,2,3].forEach(i=>document.getElementById(`pin${i}`).value='');pendingCh=null;}
function changePin(){const p1=document.getElementById('newPin').value;const p2=document.getElementById('newPin2').value;if(p1.length!==4||!/^\d{4}$/.test(p1)){toast('PIN 4 rakam olmalı','warn');return;}if(p1!==p2){toast('PIN eşleşmiyor','err');return;}pin=p1;localStorage.setItem('mtv_pin',pin);toast('🔑 PIN değiştirildi','ok');closeModal('pinModal');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// REMINDERS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function addReminder(){const ch=document.getElementById('remCh').value;const t=document.getElementById('remTime').value;const n=document.getElementById('remNote').value;if(!ch||!t){toast('Kanal ve saat seçin','warn');return;}reminders.push({channel:ch,time:t,note:n,id:Date.now(),active:true});localStorage.setItem('mtv_reminders',JSON.stringify(reminders));renderReminders();updateRemCnt();addAudit(`⏰ Hatırlatıcı: ${ch} ${t}`);toast(`⏰ ${ch} - ${t}`,'ok');}
function delReminder(id){reminders=reminders.filter(r=>r.id!==id);localStorage.setItem('mtv_reminders',JSON.stringify(reminders));renderReminders();updateRemCnt();}
function renderReminders(){const sel=document.getElementById('remCh');if(sel)sel.innerHTML='<option value="">Kanal seçin</option>'+channels.map(c=>`<option value="${c.name}">${c.name}</option>`).join('');const list=document.getElementById('remList');if(!list)return;if(!reminders.length){list.innerHTML='<div style="text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);padding:12px;font-size:0.8rem;">Hatırlatıcı yok</div>';return;}list.innerHTML=reminders.map(r=>`<div class="reminder-item"><span class="rem-time">${r.time}</span><span class="rem-ch">${r.channel}</span><button class="rem-del" onclick="delReminder(${r.id})">🗑️</button></div>`).join('');}
function updateRemCnt(){const el=document.getElementById('remCnt');if(reminders.length>0){el.textContent=reminders.length;el.style.display='';}else el.style.display='none';}
function startReminderCheck(){setInterval(()=>{const now=new Date();const ct=`${String(now.getHours()).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(now.getMinutes()).padStart(2,'0')}`;reminders.forEach(r=>{if(r.active&&r.time===ct){r.active=false;localStorage.setItem('mtv_reminders',JSON.stringify(reminders));addAudit(`⏰ ${r.channel} yayını başlıyor`);toast(`⏰ ${r.channel} ${r.note||''}`,'warn');if(document.getElementById('sNotify')?.checked&&Notification.permission==='granted')new Notification('Modül TV',{body:`${r.channel} yayını başlıyor!`});}});},30000);}
function reqNotif(){if(document.getElementById('sNotify')?.checked&&'Notification'in window)Notification.requestPermission().then(p=>{if(p==='granted')toast('🔔 Bildirimler aktif','ok');else{toast('İzin reddedildi','warn');document.getElementById('sNotify').checked=false;}});}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// AUTO CHANNEL SWITCH / SLEEP / MEDIA TIMER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function startACS(){const int=parseInt(document.getElementById('acsInterval').value)||30;const chs=document.getElementById('acsChannels').value.trim();let list=filtered;if(chs){const names=chs.split(',').map(n=>n.trim().toLowerCase());list=channels.filter(c=>names.some(n=>c.name.toLowerCase().includes(n)));}if(!list.length){toast('Kanal yok','warn');return;}stopACS();acsIdx=0;const sw=()=>{const ch=list[acsIdx%list.length];const i=filtered.findIndex(c=>c.name===ch.name);if(i>-1)selectCh(i);acsIdx++;};sw();acsTimer=setInterval(sw,int*1000);closeModal('acsModal');addAudit(`🔄 Oto. geçiş (${int}sn, ${list.length} kanal)`);toast(`🔄 (${int}sn, ${list.length} kanal)`,'ok');}
function stopACS(){if(acsTimer){clearInterval(acsTimer);acsTimer=null;}addAudit('⏹ Oto. geçiş durduruldu');toast('⏹ Durduruldu','info');}
function setSleep(mins){if(!mins||mins<=0){toast('Geçerli süre girin','warn');return;}cancelSleep();sleepLeft=mins*60;document.getElementById('sleepBadge').classList.add('show');updSleep();sleepTimer=setInterval(()=>{sleepLeft--;updSleep();if(sleepLeft<=0){cancelSleep();document.getElementById('vid').pause();setPlayBtn(true);addAudit('😴 Uyku zamanlayıcısı tetiklendi');toast('😴 Durduruldu','info');}},1000);addAudit(`😴 Uyku: ${mins} dk`);toast(`😴 ${mins} dk`,'ok');}
function updSleep(){const m=Math.floor(sleepLeft/60),s=sleepLeft%60;document.getElementById('sleepT').textContent=`${String(m).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')}`;}
function cancelSleep(){if(sleepTimer){clearInterval(sleepTimer);sleepTimer=null;}sleepLeft=0;document.getElementById('sleepBadge').classList.remove('show');}
function setMediaTimer(mins){if(!mins||mins<=0){toast('Geçerli süre girin','warn');return;}stopMediaTimer();mediaTimerLeft=mins*60;document.getElementById('timerBadge').classList.add('show');updateTimerUI();mediaTimer=setInterval(()=>{mediaTimerLeft--;updateTimerUI();if(mediaTimerLeft<=0){stopMediaTimer();document.getElementById('vid').pause();setPlayBtn(true);addAudit('⏱ Zamanlayıcı doldu');toast('⏱ Süre doldu','info');}},1000);addAudit(`⏱ Zamanlayıcı: ${mins} dk`);toast(`⏱ ${mins} dk`,'ok');}
function updateTimerUI(){const m=Math.floor(mediaTimerLeft/60),s=mediaTimerLeft%60;document.getElementById('timerVal').textContent=`${String(m).padStart(2,'0')}:${String(s).padStart(2,'0')}`;}
function stopMediaTimer(){if(mediaTimer){clearInterval(mediaTimer);mediaTimer=null;}mediaTimerLeft=0;document.getElementById('timerBadge').classList.remove('show');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// MULTI-VIEW
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initMV(){mvSlots=[null,null,null,null];renderMV();}
function renderMV(){const grid=document.getElementById('mvGrid');const layout=document.getElementById('mvLayout').value;grid.className='mv-grid '+layout;const cnt=parseInt(layout.replace('g',''));while(mvSlots.length<cnt)mvSlots.push(null);let html='';for(let i=0;i<cnt;i++){if(mvSlots[i])html+=`<div class="mv-cell" onclick="mvSelect(${i})"><video id="mvVid${i}" muted autoplay playsinline></video><div class="mv-lbl">${mvSlots[i].name}</div><button class="mv-rm" onclick="event.stopPropagation();removeMV(${i})">✕</button></div>`;else html+=`<div class="mv-add" onclick="mvPick(${i})"><div class="mv-add-icon">+</div><div>Kanal Ekle</div></div>`;}grid.innerHTML=html;for(let i=0;i<cnt;i++){if(mvSlots[i]){const vid=document.getElementById(`mvVid${i}`);if(vid){if(mvHls[i])mvHls[i].destroy();if(mvSlots[i].url.includes('.m3u8')&&Hls.isSupported()){const h=new Hls({enableWorker:true,maxBufferLength:10});h.loadSource(mvSlots[i].url);h.attachMedia(vid);h.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED,()=>vid.play().catch(()=>{}));mvHls[i]=h;}else{vid.src=mvSlots[i].url;vid.play().catch(()=>{});}}}}}
function addToMV(ch){const empty=mvSlots.findIndex(s=>s===null);if(empty===-1){toast('Slotlar dolu','warn');return;}mvSlots[empty]=ch;toast(`🖥️ ${ch.name} eklendi`,'ok');if(document.getElementById('pg-multiview').classList.contains('active'))renderMV();}
function removeMV(idx){if(mvHls[idx])mvHls[idx].destroy();mvHls[idx]=null;mvSlots[idx]=null;renderMV();}
function clearMV(){mvHls.forEach(h=>{if(h)h.destroy();});mvHls=[];mvSlots=mvSlots.map(()=>null);renderMV();}
function setMVLayout(v){renderMV();}
function mvSelect(idx){document.querySelectorAll('.mv-cell').forEach((c,i)=>{c.classList.toggle('active-cell',i===idx);const v=document.getElementById(`mvVid${i}`);if(v)v.muted=(i!==idx);});}
function mvPick(slot){const names=channels.map(c=>c.name);let pick=prompt('Kanal:\n\n'+names.slice(0,15).join(', ')+(names.length>15?'...':''));if(!pick)return;const ch=channels.find(c=>c.name.toLowerCase().includes(pick.toLowerCase()));if(ch){mvSlots[slot]=ch;renderMV();toast(`✅ ${ch.name}`,'ok');}else toast('Bulunamadı','warn');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CAST
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function connectDevice(el){document.querySelectorAll('.cast-device').forEach(d=>d.classList.remove('connected'));el.classList.add('connected');el.querySelector('.cast-device-status').textContent='✅ Bağlandı';toast('📡 Bağlandı','ok');}
function scanDevices(){toast('🔄 Taranıyor...','info');setTimeout(()=>toast('Cihaz bulunamadı','info'),2000);}
async function startScreenShare(){try{const stream=await navigator.mediaDevices.getDisplayMedia({video:{cursor:'always'},audio:true});toast('🖥️ Paylaşım başladı','ok');stream.getVideoTracks()[0].onended=()=>toast('Paylaşım sonlandı','info');}catch(e){toast('İptal','warn');}}
function startSecondScreen(){if(!curCh){toast('Kanal seçin','warn');return;}const w=window.open('','ss','width=800,height=500');w.document.write(`<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title>${curCh.name}</title><style>*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;}body{background:#000;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;height:100vh;overflow:hidden;}video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}.info{position:fixed;top:10px;left:10px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);color:#fff;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:8px;font-family:sans-serif;font-size:13px;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);}</style></head><body><div class="info"><span style="color:#e50914;font-weight:bold;">● CANLI</span> ${curCh.name}</div><video id="v" autoplay playsinline></video><script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/hls.js@latest"><\/script><script>const v=document.getElementById('v');const url='${curCh.url}';if(url.includes('.m3u8')&&Hls.isSupported()){const h=new Hls();h.loadSource(url);h.attachMedia(v);h.on(Hls.Events.MANIFEST_PARSED,()=>v.play());}else{v.src=url;v.play();}<\/script></body></html>`);toast('📱 İkinci ekran açıldı','ok');}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PIP & MINI
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function togglePiP(){const pip=document.getElementById('pipWin');if(pip.classList.contains('show')){closePip();return;}if(!curCh){toast('Kanal seçin','warn');return;}pip.classList.add('show');document.getElementById('pipName').textContent=curCh.name;const pv=document.getElementById('pipVid');if(pipHls)pipHls.destroy();pipHls=attachStream(pv,curCh.url,null);makeDraggable(pip);toast('🖼️ PiP açıldı','info');}
function closePip(){document.getElementById('pipWin').classList.remove('show');if(pipHls){pipHls.destroy();pipHls=null;}document.getElementById('pipVid').src='';}
function makeDraggable(el){let isDrag=false,sX,sY,oX,oY;const bar=el.querySelector('.pip-bar');if(!bar)return;bar.onmousedown=e=>{isDrag=true;sX=e.clientX;sY=e.clientY;const r=el.getBoundingClientRect();oX=r.left;oY=r.top;e.preventDefault();};document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{if(!isDrag)return;el.style.left=(oX+e.clientX-sX)+'px';el.style.top=(oY+e.clientY-sY)+'px';el.style.right='auto';el.style.bottom='auto';});document.addEventListener('mouseup',()=>isDrag=false);}
function toggleMini(){miniOn=!miniOn;document.getElementById('miniPlayer').classList.toggle('show',miniOn);if(miniOn&&curCh){document.getElementById('miniName').textContent=curCh.name;document.getElementById('miniCat').textContent=curCh.group||'';const mv=document.getElementById('miniVid');attachStream(mv,curCh.url,null);}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WORLD CLOCK
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderWorldClock(){const grid=document.getElementById('wcGrid');if(!grid)return;grid.innerHTML=WORLD_CITIES.map(c=>{const now=new Date();const ts=now.toLocaleTimeString('tr-TR',{timeZone:c.tz,hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'});const h=parseInt(now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{timeZone:c.tz,hour:'numeric',hour12:false}));const day=h>=6&&h<20;return`<div class="wc-card"><div class="wc-flag">${c.flag}</div><div class="wc-time" style="color:${day?'var(--warning)':'var(--accent4)'};">${ts}</div><div class="wc-city">${c.city} ${day?'☀️':'🌙'}</div></div>`;}).join('');const bc=document.getElementById('wcBroadcasts');if(bc){const h=new Date().getHours();let recs=[];if(h>=6&&h<12)recs=[{n:'Sabah Haberleri',g:'Haber'},{n:'Çocuk Kuşağı',g:'Çocuk  kodu kalan  yerden devamını yaz

```javascript
else if(h>=12&&h<18)recs=[{n:'Öğle Haberleri',g:'Haber'},{n:'Spor',g:'Spor'},{n:'Magazin',g:'Magazin'}];
else if(h>=18&&h<23)recs=[{n:'Ana Haber',g:'Haber'},{n:'Prime Time',g:'Dizi/Film'},{n:'Yarışma',g:'Eğlence'}];
else recs=[{n:'Gece Sineması',g:'Film'},{n:'Belgesel',g:'Belgesel'},{n:'Müzik Kuşağı',g:'Müzik'}];
bc.innerHTML=recs.map(r=>`<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;"><div style="font-weight:600;">📺 ${r.n}</div><div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);">${r.g}</div></div>`).join('');
}}
setInterval(renderWorldClock,1000);

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SUGGESTIONS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function renderSuggestions(){const el=document.getElementById('phSuggest');if(!el||!channels.length)return;let sg=[];const grpCnt={};history.slice(0,20).forEach(h=>{const c=channels.find(ch=>ch.name===h.name);if(c&&c.group)grpCnt[c.group]=(grpCnt[c.group]||0)+1;});const topGrps=Object.entries(grpCnt).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,3).map(e=>e[0]);if(topGrps.length>0)sg=channels.filter(c=>topGrps.includes(c.group)&&!history.slice(0,5).some(h=>h.name===c.name));if(sg.length<5)sg=[...sg,...channels.filter(c=>(ratings[c.name]||0)>=4&&!sg.find(s=>s.name===c.name))];if(sg.length<3)sg=channels.slice(0,6);sg=sg.slice(0,6);el.innerHTML=`<div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px;">💡 Önerilen</div><div class="suggest-row">${sg.map(c=>`<div class="suggest-chip" onclick="playFromAnywhere('${c.name}')"><div class="suggest-chip-icon">📺</div><div class="suggest-chip-name">${c.name}</div><div class="suggest-chip-cat">${c.group||''}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// WATCH PARTY
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
let wpRoom=null;
function createWPRoom(){wpRoom={id:'WP-'+Math.random().toString(36).substr(2,6).toUpperCase(),host:'Sen',users:['Sen'],created:Date.now()};document.getElementById('wpRoomInfo').innerHTML=`<strong style="color:var(--accent);">Oda: ${wpRoom.id}</strong>`;document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent='1 kişi';addWPSys('Oda oluşturuldu: '+wpRoom.id);toast('🎉 Oda oluşturuldu','ok');setTimeout(()=>{wpRoom.users.push('Kullanıcı_42');document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent=wpRoom.users.length+' kişi';addWPSys('Kullanıcı_42 katıldı');},3000);setTimeout(()=>{wpRoom.users.push('Viewer_88');document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent=wpRoom.users.length+' kişi';addWPSys('Viewer_88 katıldı');},7000);if(curCh){document.getElementById('wpPh').style.display='none';const wv=document.getElementById('wpVid');if(wpHls)wpHls.destroy();wpHls=attachStream(wv,curCh.url,null);}}
function joinWPRoom(){const code=prompt('Oda kodu:');if(!code)return;toast(`🚪 Katılınıyor...`,'info');setTimeout(()=>{wpRoom={id:code,host:'Başkası',users:['Başkası','Sen'],created:Date.now()};document.getElementById('wpRoomInfo').innerHTML=`<strong style="color:var(--accent);">Oda: ${code}</strong>`;document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent='2 kişi';addWPSys('Katıldınız: '+code);toast('🎉 Katıldınız','ok');},1500);}
function addWPSys(txt){const el=document.getElementById('wpMsgs');el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg" style="border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);"><div class="wp-msg-text" style="color:var(--accent4);font-size:0.73rem;">📌 ${txt}</div></div>`;el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;}
function sendWP(){const inp=document.getElementById('wpInput');const txt=inp.value.trim();if(!txt)return;const el=document.getElementById('wpMsgs');el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg"><div class="wp-msg-user">Sen</div><div class="wp-msg-text">${txt}</div></div>`;inp.value='';el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;if(wpRoom&&wpRoom.users.length>1){const ru=wpRoom.users.filter(u=>u!=='Sen');const rn=ru[Math.floor(Math.random()*ru.length)];const resps=['👍','Harika!','😂','Katılıyorum','🔥','👏','😄'];setTimeout(()=>{el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg"><div class="wp-msg-user" style="color:var(--accent3);">${rn}</div><div class="wp-msg-text">${resps[Math.floor(Math.random()*resps.length)]}</div></div>`;el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;},1000+Math.random()*2500);}}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// THEMES
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initThemes(){const cur=localStorage.getItem('mtv_theme')||'Default';document.getElementById('themeGrid').innerHTML=Object.entries(THEMES).map(([n,t])=>`<div class="theme-card ${n===cur?'active':''}" onclick="applyTheme('${n}')" id="thm-${n}"><div class="theme-preview" style="background:${t.grad};"></div><div class="theme-name">${n}</div></div>`).join('');}
function applyTheme(name){const t=THEMES[name];if(!t)return;document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-primary',t.bg1);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-secondary',t.bg2);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-card',t.bg3);changeAccent(t.accent);document.querySelectorAll('.theme-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));const el=document.getElementById(`thm-${name}`);if(el)el.classList.add('active');localStorage.setItem('mtv_theme',name);addAudit(`🎨 Tema: ${name}`);toast(`🎨 ${name}`,'ok');}
function changeAccent(c){document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent',c);const r=parseInt(c.substr(1,2),16),g=parseInt(c.substr(3,2),16),b=parseInt(c.substr(5,2),16);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent-glow',`rgba(${r},${g},${b},0.35)`);document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--gradient-main',`linear-gradient(135deg,${c},#ff6b35)`);localStorage.setItem('mtv_accent',c);}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BW & PERF WIDGETS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleBW(){const el=document.getElementById('bwWidget');if(el.classList.contains('show')){el.classList.remove('show');if(bwInterval){clearInterval(bwInterval);bwInterval=null;}return;}el.classList.add('show');bwInterval=setInterval(()=>{const vid=document.getElementById('vid');let bit=0;if(hls&&hls.levels&&hls.currentLevel>=0){const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];if(l)bit=Math.round((l.bitrate||0)/1000);}let buf=0;if(vid.buffered.length){buf=Math.min(100,Math.round((vid.buffered.end(vid.buffered.length-1)-vid.currentTime)/30*100));}document.getElementById('bwDown').textContent=Math.round(Math.random()*400+100)+' KB/s';document.getElementById('bwBuf').textContent=buf+'%';document.getElementById('bwBit').textContent=bit>0?bit+'':'-';},1000);}
function togglePerf(){const el=document.getElementById('perfWidget');if(el.classList.contains('show')){el.classList.remove('show');if(perfInterval){clearInterval(perfInterval);perfInterval=null;}return;}el.classList.add('show');perfInterval=setInterval(()=>{const vid=document.getElementById('vid');document.getElementById('pRes').textContent=vid.videoWidth&&vid.videoHeight?`${vid.videoWidth}x${vid.videoHeight}`:'—';let bit='—';if(hls&&hls.levels&&hls.currentLevel>=0){const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];if(l&&l.bitrate)bit=Math.round(l.bitrate/1000)+' Kbps';}document.getElementById('pBit').textContent=bit;if(vid.buffered.length){const ahead=(vid.buffered.end(vid.buffered.length-1)-vid.currentTime).toFixed(1);const el2=document.getElementById('pBuf');el2.textContent=ahead+'s';el2.className='perf-v '+(ahead>5?'g':ahead>2?'w':'b');}if(vid.getVideoPlaybackQuality){const d=vid.getVideoPlaybackQuality().droppedVideoFrames||0;const del=document.getElementById('pDrop');del.textContent=d;del.className='perf-v '+(d<10?'g':d<50?'w':'b');}if(hls&&hls.latency!==undefined)document.getElementById('pLat').textContent=hls.latency.toFixed(1)+'s';},500);}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DATA EXPORT / IMPORT / RESET
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function exportAll(){
    const data={
        channels,favorites,history,stats,locked,hidden,pin,ratings,
        reminders,screenshots,channelNotes,accent:localStorage.getItem('mtv_accent'),
        theme:localStorage.getItem('mtv_theme'),version:'6.2'
    };
    const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});
    const a=document.createElement('a');a.download=`modulTV_backup_${Date.now()}.json`;
    a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.click();
    addAudit('📤 Yedek oluşturuldu');toast('📤 Oluşturuldu','ok');
}
function importAll(){
    const inp=document.createElement('input');inp.type='file';inp.accept='.json';
    inp.onchange=e=>{const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;
    const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{
        try{
            const d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
            const keys=['channels','favorites','history','stats','locked','hidden','ratings','reminders','screenshots','channelNotes'];
            keys.forEach(k=>{if(d[k]){window[k]=d[k];
                const lsMap={channels:'channels',favorites:'fav',history:'hist',stats:'stats',locked:'locked',hidden:'hidden',ratings:'ratings',reminders:'reminders',screenshots:'snaps',channelNotes:'notes'};
                localStorage.setItem('mtv_'+lsMap[k],JSON.stringify(d[k]));
            }});
            if(d.pin){pin=d.pin;localStorage.setItem('mtv_pin',pin);}
            if(d.theme)applyTheme(d.theme);else if(d.accent)changeAccent(d.accent);
            processChannels();updateFavCnt();renderReminders();updateRemCnt();
            renderSuggestions();updateGalCnt();renderGallery();renderAllNotes();
            addAudit('📥 Yedek geri yüklendi');toast('📥 Geri yüklendi','ok');
        }catch(e2){toast('Geçersiz dosya','err');}
    };r.readAsText(f);};inp.click();
}
function factoryReset(){
    if(!confirm('⚠️ TÜM VERİLER SİLİNECEK?'))return;
    if(!confirm('Son kez: Emin misiniz?'))return;
    ['mtv_channels','mtv_fav','mtv_hist','mtv_stats','mtv_locked','mtv_hidden',
     'mtv_pin','mtv_accent','mtv_theme','mtv_ratings','mtv_reminders',
     'mtv_snaps','mtv_notes','mtv_audit'].forEach(k=>localStorage.removeItem(k));
    addAudit('⚠️ Fabrika sıfırlaması');toast('⚠️ Sıfırlanıyor...','warn');
    setTimeout(()=>location.reload(),2000);
}
function speedTest(){
    toast('🚀 Test başlatılıyor...','info');const start=Date.now();
    const img=new Image();
    img.onload=()=>{const dur=(Date.now()-start)/1000;
    const speed=((6000000*8)/dur/1024/1024).toFixed(2);
    addAudit(`🚀 Hız testi: ~${speed} Mbps`);toast(`🚀 ~${speed} Mbps`,'ok');};
    img.onerror=()=>toast('Test başarısız','err');
    img.src='https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/3f/Fronalpstock_big.jpg?t='+Date.now();
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// PLAYLIST LOADER
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function loadPL(){
    const url=document.getElementById('plUrl').value.trim();
    const content=document.getElementById('plContent').value.trim();
    if(url)fetchPL(url);else if(content)parseM3U(content);
    else{toast('URL veya içerik girin','warn');return;}
    closeModal('plModal');
}
async function fetchPL(url){
    toast('Yükleniyor...','info');
    try{let res=await fetch(url);parseM3U(await res.text());}
    catch{
        try{let res=await fetch(`https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=${encodeURIComponent(url)}`);parseM3U(await res.text());}
        catch{toast('Yüklenemedi','err');}
    }
}
function parseM3U(txt){
    const lines=txt.split('\n').map(l=>l.trim()).filter(l=>l);
    const chs=[];let info=null,id=channels.length+1;
    for(const line of lines){
        if(line.startsWith('#EXTINF:')){
            const nm=line.match(/,(.+)$/),gr=line.match(/group-title="([^"]*)"/),lg=line.match(/tvg-logo="([^"]*)"/);
            info={name:nm?nm[1].trim():`Ch ${id}`,group:gr?gr[1]:'Genel',logo:lg?lg[1]:'',id:id++};
        }else if(line.startsWith('http')&&info){
            info.url=line;chs.push(info);info=null;
        }
    }
    if(chs.length){
        channels=chs;localStorage.setItem('mtv_channels',JSON.stringify(channels));
        processChannels();renderSuggestions();renderReminders();
        addAudit(`✅ ${chs.length} kanal yüklendi`);toast(`✅ ${chs.length} kanal`,'ok');
    }else toast('Kanal bulunamadı','warn');
}
function handleFile(e){
    const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;
    const r=new FileReader();r.onload=ev=>{
        document.getElementById('plContent').value=ev.target.result;toast(`📄 ${f.name}`,'info');
    };r.readAsText(f);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// SHORTCUTS MODAL INIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function initShortcutsModal(){
    document.getElementById('shortcutList').innerHTML=SHORTCUTS.map(([k,d])=>
        `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><kbd style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--accent);font-family:monospace;">${k}</kbd><span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-secondary);">${d}</span></div>`
    ).join('');
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// NAVIGATION
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function goPage(p){
    document.querySelectorAll('.sb-item').forEach(el=>el.classList.toggle('active',el.dataset.p===p));
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
    const pg=document.getElementById(`pg-${p}`);if(pg)pg.classList.add('active');
    currentPage=p;
    if(p==='favorites')renderFavs();
    if(p==='history')renderHist();
    if(p==='stats')renderStats();
    if(p==='multiview')renderMV();
    if(p==='worldclock')renderWorldClock();
    if(p==='gallery')renderGallery();
    if(p==='notes')renderAllNotes();
    document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
    if(p!=='tv'&&curCh)trackEnd();
}
function toggleSB(){document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('mini');}
function toggleSBMobile(){document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open');}
function toggleChPanel(){
    chPanelOpen=!chPanelOpen;
    const cp=document.getElementById('chPanel');
    if(window.innerWidth>820)cp.style.display=chPanelOpen?'':'none';
    else cp.classList.toggle('open',chPanelOpen);
    document.getElementById('chPanelBtn').textContent=chPanelOpen?'◀':'▶';
}
function openModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('show');}
function closeModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('show');}
document.querySelectorAll('.modal-bg').forEach(m=>{m.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===m)m.classList.remove('show');});});
function toast(msg,type='info'){
    const c=document.getElementById('toasts');
    const icons={ok:'✅',err:'❌',warn:'⚠️',info:'ℹ️'};
    const t=document.createElement('div');t.className=`toast t-${type}`;
    t.innerHTML=`<span class="toast-icon">${icons[type]||'ℹ️'}</span><span class="toast-msg">${msg}</span>`;
    c.appendChild(t);
    setTimeout(()=>{t.classList.add('out');setTimeout(()=>t.remove(),300);},3500);
}

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
    if(['INPUT','TEXTAREA','SELECT'].includes(e.target.tagName)){
        if(e.key==='Escape')e.target.blur();return;
    }
    if(e.key==='Escape'){
        document.querySelectorAll('.modal-bg.show').forEach(m=>m.classList.remove('show'));
        closePin();closePip();closeCmdPalette();
        if(isFS)toggleFS();closeGestureHelp();return;
    }
    switch(e.key.toLowerCase()){
        case' ':e.preventDefault();togglePlay();break;
        case'f':toggleFS();break;
        case'm':toggleMute();break;
        case'g':toggleAudioOnly();break;
        case'w':toggleAmbient();break;
        case't':openModal('timerModal');break;
        case'b':toggleBitratePanel();break;
        case'n':if(!e.ctrlKey)toggleNotesPanel();break;
        case'd':randomChannel();break;
        case'h':openGestureHelp();break;
        case'/':
            e.preventDefault();
            {const qcs=document.getElementById('qcsOverlay');
            if(qcs.classList.contains('show'))qcs.classList.remove('show');
            else{qcs.classList.add('show');
            document.getElementById('qcsSearch').value='';
            filterQCS('');setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('qcsSearch').focus(),50);}}
            break;
        case'arrowup':
            e.preventDefault();
            {const v=document.getElementById('vid');
            v.volume=Math.min(1,v.volume+0.05);
            document.getElementById('volSlider').value=v.volume*100;
            showGesture(`🔊 ${Math.round(v.volume*100)}%`);}
            break;
        case'arrowdown':
            e.preventDefault();
            {const v=document.getElementById('vid');
            v.volume=Math.max(0,v.volume-0.05);
            document.getElementById('volSlider').value=v.volume*100;
            showGesture(`🔊 ${Math.round(v.volume*100)}%`);}
            break;
        case'arrowleft':e.preventDefault();prevCh();break;
        case'arrowright':e.preventDefault();nextCh();break;
        case'p':if(!e.ctrlKey)togglePiP();break;
        case'e':toggleEQ();break;
        case's':takeSnap();break;
        case'r':toggleRec();break;
        case'v':toggleVF();break;
        default:
            if(e.key>='1'&&e.key<='9'){
                chNumBuf+=e.key;showChNum(chNumBuf);clearTimeout(chNumTmr);
                chNumTmr=setTimeout(()=>{const idx=parseInt(chNumBuf)-1;
                if(idx>=0&&idx<filtered.length)selectCh(idx);chNumBuf='';},1000);
            }
    }
    if(e.ctrlKey&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='k'){e.preventDefault();document.getElementById('searchIn').focus();}
    if(e.ctrlKey&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='p'){e.preventDefault();openCmdPalette();}
});

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// QUICK CHANNEL SWITCHER (Slash Key)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function filterQCS(q){
    q=q.toLowerCase().trim();
    let results=q?channels.filter(c=>(c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(c.group||'').toLowerCase().includes(q))).slice(0,20):channels.slice(0,20);
    document.getElementById('qcsResults').innerHTML=results.map((c,i)=>{
        return`<div class="qcs-result" onclick="qcsPlay('${c.name}')"><span class="qcs-num">${i+1}</span><span class="qcs-name">${c.name}</span><span class="qcs-cat">${c.group||''}</span></div>`;
    }).join('');
}
function qcsPlay(name){
    document.getElementById('qcsOverlay').classList.remove('show');
    goPage('tv');const c=channels.find(ch=>ch.name===name);
    if(c){filterCat('all');const i=filtered.findIndex(ch=>ch.name===name);if(i>-1)selectCh(i);}
}
document.getElementById('qcsSearch')?.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
    if(e.key==='Escape')document.getElementById('qcsOverlay').classList.remove('show');
    if(e.key==='Enter'){const first=document.querySelector('.qcs-result');if(first)first.click();}
});

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// DOUBLE CLICK FULLSCREEN
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
document.getElementById('videoWrap').addEventListener('dblclick',()=>toggleFS());

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// BEFORE UNLOAD - SAVE STATS
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
window.addEventListener('beforeunload',()=>{trackEnd();});

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// CLOSE SIDEBAR ON OUTSIDE CLICK (MOBILE)
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const sb=document.getElementById('sidebar');
    if(window.innerWidth<=1100&&sb.classList.contains('open')&&!sb.contains(e.target))
        sb.classList.remove('open');
});

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// RESPONSIVE CHECK
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
function checkResp(){
    const mb=document.querySelector('.mob-menu-btn');
    if(mb)mb.style.display=window.innerWidth<=1100?'flex':'none';
    if(window.innerWidth<=820)document.getElementById('chPanel').classList.remove('open');
}
checkResp();window.addEventListener('resize',checkResp);

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// IDLE CLOCK - AUTO SHOW
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
setTimeout(()=>{
    if(!curCh){
        document.getElementById('idleClock').classList.add('show');
        document.getElementById('ph').style.display='none';
    }
},3000);

// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
// FINAL AUDIT
// ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════
addAudit('🚀 Modül TV v6.2 başlatıldı');
```

Bu eksik parçalar ayrıca HTML'e eklenmesi gereken öğeler:

```html
<!-- QUICK CHANNEL SWITCHER (Slash Key) -->
<div class="qcs-overlay" id="qcsOverlay" style="position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9200;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);backdrop-filter:blur(12px);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-top:60px;">
    <div style="width:90%;max-width:500px;">
        <input class="cmd-input" id="qcsSearch" placeholder="Kanal ara… (/ kapatır)" style="border-radius:12px;">
        <div class="cmd-results" id="qcsResults" style="border-radius:12px;max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);"></div>
    </div>
</div>
```

```css
/* Quick Channel Switcher */
.qcs-result{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}.qcs-result:last-child{border-bottom:none;}.qcs-result:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.qcs-num{width:26px;height:26px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;}
.qcs-name{flex:1;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;}
.qcs-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* Suggestion chips in placeholder */
.suggest-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:16px;}
.suggest-chip{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);min-width:100px;}
.suggest-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.suggest-chip-icon{font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
.suggest-chip-name{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;}
.suggest-chip-cat{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* World Clock */
.wc-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;}
.wc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:10px;}
.wc-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;text-align:center;}
.wc-flag{font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
.wc-time{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;margin-bottom:4px;}
.wc-city{font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* Reminder item */
.reminder-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:0.78rem;}
.rem-time{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);min-width:42px;}
.rem-ch{flex:1;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.rem-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.82rem;}.rem-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

/* Voice listening indicator */
.tb-icon-btn.listening{background:var(--accent)!important;color:#fff!important;border-color:var(--accent)!important;animation:pulse 1s infinite;}

/* Audio only floating bars */
@keyframes aoFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}}

/* Suggested channels in placeholder */
#phSuggest{margin-top:20px;}
```

## 1️⃣ CSS — `</style>` kapanmadan önce ekleyin

```css
/* WORLD CLOCK */
.wc-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;}
.wc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(150px,1fr));gap:10px;margin-bottom:16px;}
.wc-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px;text-align:center;transition:var(--transition);}
.wc-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.wc-flag{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
.wc-time{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:800;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;margin-bottom:3px;}
.wc-city{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
/* SUGGESTIONS */
.suggest-row{display:flex;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;margin-top:10px;}
.suggest-chip{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:8px 12px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);text-align:center;min-width:90px;}
.suggest-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.suggest-chip-icon{font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:3px;}
.suggest-chip-name{font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;max-width:80px;}
.suggest-chip-cat{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
/* REMINDERS */
.reminder-item{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.rem-time{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-size:0.82rem;min-width:45px;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.rem-ch{flex:1;font-size:0.78rem;}
.rem-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.88rem;transition:var(--transition);}
.rem-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}
/* QCS OVERLAY */
#qcsOverlay{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:8000;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-top:60px;}
#qcsOverlay.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn 0.15s;}
.qcs-input{width:90%;max-width:480px;padding:14px 20px;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:14px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:1rem;outline:none;margin-bottom:10px;box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--accent-glow);}
.qcs-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
.qcs-results{width:90%;max-width:480px;max-height:55vh;overflow-y:auto;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;}
.qcs-result{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;cursor:pointer;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition);}
.qcs-result:last-child{border-bottom:none;}.qcs-result:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.qcs-num{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);width:18px;text-align:right;}
.qcs-name{flex:1;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;}
.qcs-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
/* EXTRAS */
@keyframes aoFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}}
#voiceBtn.listening{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;border-color:var(--danger);animation:recBlink 1s infinite;}
.audio-only-overlay.show{display:flex!important;}
```

```html
    <input class="qcs-input" id="qcsSearch"
        placeholder="/ Kanal adı yaz… (Enter seç · Esc kapat)"
        oninput="filterQCS(this.value)">
```
