## 3️⃣ JavaScript — `</script>` kapanmadan önce ekleyin

```javascript
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// DEVAM KODU — renderWorldClock tamamlanıyor
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function renderWorldClock(){
    const grid=document.getElementById('wcGrid');if(!grid)return;
    grid.innerHTML=WORLD_CITIES.map(c=>{
        const now=new Date();
        const ts=now.toLocaleTimeString('tr-TR',{timeZone:c.tz,hour:'2-digit',minute:'2-digit',second:'2-digit'});
        const h=parseInt(now.toLocaleTimeString('en-US',{timeZone:c.tz,hour:'numeric',hour12:false}));
        const day=h>=6&&h<20;
        return`<div class="wc-card"><div class="wc-flag">${c.flag}</div>
        <div class="wc-time" style="color:${day?'var(--warning)':'var(--accent4)'};">${ts}</div>
        <div class="wc-city">${c.city} ${day?'☀️':'🌙'}</div></div>`;
    }).join('');
    const bc=document.getElementById('wcBroadcasts');
    if(bc){
        const h=new Date().getHours();let recs=[];
        if(h>=6&&h<12)recs=[{n:'Sabah Haberleri',g:'Haber'},{n:'Çocuk Kuşağı',g:'Çocuk'}];
        else if(h>=12&&h<18)recs=[{n:'Öğle Haberleri',g:'Haber'},{n:'Spor',g:'Spor'}];
        else if(h>=18&&h<23)recs=[{n:'Ana Haber',g:'Haber'},{n:'Prime Time',g:'Dizi/Film'}];
        else recs=[{n:'Gece Sineması',g:'Film'},{n:'Belgesel',g:'Belgesel'}];
        bc.innerHTML=recs.map(r=>`<div style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;">
        <div style="font-weight:600;">📺 ${r.n}</div>
        <div style="font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);">${r.g}</div></div>`).join('');
    }
}
setInterval(renderWorldClock,1000);

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// SUGGESTIONS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function renderSuggestions(){
    const el=document.getElementById('phSuggest');if(!el||!channels.length)return;
    let sg=[];
    const grpCnt={};
    history.slice(0,20).forEach(h=>{const c=channels.find(ch=>ch.name===h.name);if(c&&c.group)grpCnt[c.group]=(grpCnt[c.group]||0)+1;});
    const topGrps=Object.entries(grpCnt).sort((a,b)=>b[1]-a[1]).slice(0,3).map(e=>e[0]);
    if(topGrps.length)sg=channels.filter(c=>topGrps.includes(c.group)&&!history.slice(0,5).some(h=>h.name===c.name));
    if(sg.length<5)sg=[...sg,...channels.filter(c=>(ratings[c.name]||0)>=4&&!sg.find(s=>s.name===c.name))];
    if(sg.length<3)sg=channels.slice(0,6);
    sg=sg.slice(0,6);
    el.innerHTML=`<div style="font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:8px;">💡 Önerilen</div>
    <div class="suggest-row">${sg.map(c=>`<div class="suggest-chip" onclick="playFromAnywhere('${c.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')">`+
    `<div class="suggest-chip-icon">📺</div><div class="suggest-chip-name">${c.name}</div>`+
    `<div class="suggest-chip-cat">${c.group||''}</div></div>`).join('')}</div>`;
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// WATCH PARTY
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
let wpRoom=null;
function createWPRoom(){
    wpRoom={id:'WP-'+Math.random().toString(36).substr(2,6).toUpperCase(),host:'Sen',users:['Sen'],created:Date.now()};
    document.getElementById('wpRoomInfo').innerHTML=`<strong style="color:var(--accent);">Oda: ${wpRoom.id}</strong>`;
    document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent='1 kişi';
    addWPSys('Oda oluşturuldu: '+wpRoom.id);
    toast('🎉 Oda oluşturuldu: '+wpRoom.id,'ok');
    setTimeout(()=>{wpRoom.users.push('Kullanıcı_42');document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent=wpRoom.users.length+' kişi';addWPSys('Kullanıcı_42 katıldı');},3000);
    setTimeout(()=>{wpRoom.users.push('Viewer_88');document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent=wpRoom.users.length+' kişi';addWPSys('Viewer_88 katıldı');},7000);
    if(curCh){document.getElementById('wpPh').style.display='none';const wv=document.getElementById('wpVid');if(wpHls)wpHls.destroy();wpHls=attachStream(wv,curCh.url,null);}
}
function joinWPRoom(){
    const code=prompt('Oda kodu:');if(!code)return;
    toast('🚪 Katılınıyor...','info');
    setTimeout(()=>{
        wpRoom={id:code,host:'Başkası',users:['Başkası','Sen'],created:Date.now()};
        document.getElementById('wpRoomInfo').innerHTML=`<strong style="color:var(--accent);">Oda: ${code}</strong>`;
        document.getElementById('wpUsers').textContent='2 kişi';
        addWPSys('Katıldınız: '+code);toast('🎉 Katıldınız','ok');
    },1500);
}
function addWPSys(txt){
    const el=document.getElementById('wpMsgs');
    el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg" style="border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);">
    <div class="wp-msg-text" style="color:var(--accent4);font-size:0.73rem;">📌 ${txt}</div></div>`;
    el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;
}
function sendWP(){
    const inp=document.getElementById('wpInput');const txt=inp.value.trim();if(!txt)return;
    const el=document.getElementById('wpMsgs');
    el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg"><div class="wp-msg-user">Sen</div><div class="wp-msg-text">${txt}</div></div>`;
    inp.value='';el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;
    if(wpRoom&&wpRoom.users.length>1){
        const ru=wpRoom.users.filter(u=>u!=='Sen');
        const rn=ru[Math.floor(Math.random()*ru.length)];
        const resps=['👍','Harika!','😂','Katılıyorum','🔥','👏','Süper!','❤️'];
        setTimeout(()=>{
            el.innerHTML+=`<div class="wp-msg"><div class="wp-msg-user" style="color:var(--accent3);">${rn}</div>
            <div class="wp-msg-text">${resps[Math.floor(Math.random()*resps.length)]}</div></div>`;
            el.scrollTop=el.scrollHeight;
        },1000+Math.random()*2500);
    }
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// THEMES
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function initThemes(){
    const cur=localStorage.getItem('mtv_theme')||'Default';
    document.getElementById('themeGrid').innerHTML=Object.entries(THEMES).map(([n,t])=>
        `<div class="theme-card ${n===cur?'active':''}" onclick="applyTheme('${n}')" id="thm-${n}">
        <div class="theme-preview" style="background:${t.grad};"></div>
        <div class="theme-name">${n}</div></div>`).join('');
}
function applyTheme(name){
    const t=THEMES[name];if(!t)return;
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-primary',t.bg1);
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-secondary',t.bg2);
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--bg-card',t.bg3);
    changeAccent(t.accent);
    document.querySelectorAll('.theme-card').forEach(c=>c.classList.remove('active'));
    const el=document.getElementById(`thm-${name}`);if(el)el.classList.add('active');
    localStorage.setItem('mtv_theme',name);
    addAudit(`🎨 Tema: ${name}`);toast(`🎨 ${name}`,'ok');
}
function changeAccent(c){
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent',c);
    const r=parseInt(c.substr(1,2),16),g=parseInt(c.substr(3,2),16),b=parseInt(c.substr(5,2),16);
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--accent-glow',`rgba(${r},${g},${b},0.35)`);
    document.documentElement.style.setProperty('--gradient-main',`linear-gradient(135deg,${c},#ff6b35)`);
    localStorage.setItem('mtv_accent',c);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// BW & PERF MONITORS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function toggleBW(){
    const el=document.getElementById('bwWidget');
    if(el.classList.contains('show')){el.classList.remove('show');if(bwInterval){clearInterval(bwInterval);bwInterval=null;}return;}
    el.classList.add('show');
    bwInterval=setInterval(()=>{
        const vid=document.getElementById('vid');
        let bit=0;if(hls&&hls.levels&&hls.currentLevel>=0){const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];if(l)bit=Math.round((l.bitrate||0)/1000);}
        let buf=0;if(vid.buffered.length)buf=Math.min(100,Math.round((vid.buffered.end(vid.buffered.length-1)-vid.currentTime)/30*100));
        document.getElementById('bwDown').textContent=Math.round(Math.random()*400+100)+' KB/s';
        document.getElementById('bwBuf').textContent=buf+'%';
        document.getElementById('bwBit').textContent=bit>0?bit:'-';
    },1000);
}
function togglePerf(){
    const el=document.getElementById('perfWidget');
    if(el.classList.contains('show')){el.classList.remove('show');if(perfInterval){clearInterval(perfInterval);perfInterval=null;}return;}
    el.classList.add('show');
    perfInterval=setInterval(()=>{
        const vid=document.getElementById('vid');
        document.getElementById('pRes').textContent=vid.videoWidth&&vid.videoHeight?`${vid.videoWidth}x${vid.videoHeight}`:'—';
        let bit='—';if(hls&&hls.levels&&hls.currentLevel>=0){const l=hls.levels[hls.currentLevel];if(l&&l.bitrate)bit=Math.round(l.bitrate/1000)+' Kbps';}
        document.getElementById('pBit').textContent=bit;
        if(vid.buffered.length){
            const ahead=(vid.buffered.end(vid.buffered.length-1)-vid.currentTime).toFixed(1);
            const bufEl=document.getElementById('pBuf');bufEl.textContent=ahead+'s';
            bufEl.className='perf-v '+(ahead>5?'g':ahead>2?'w':'b');
        }
        if(vid.getVideoPlaybackQuality){
            const d=vid.getVideoPlaybackQuality().droppedVideoFrames||0;
            const dropEl=document.getElementById('pDrop');dropEl.textContent=d;
            dropEl.className='perf-v '+(d<10?'g':d<50?'w':'b');
        }
        if(hls&&hls.latency!==undefined)document.getElementById('pLat').textContent=hls.latency.toFixed(1)+'s';
    },500);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// DATA — Export / Import / Reset / SpeedTest
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function exportAll(){
    const data={channels,favorites,history,stats,locked,hidden,pin,ratings,reminders,
        screenshots,channelNotes,accent:localStorage.getItem('mtv_accent'),
        theme:localStorage.getItem('mtv_theme'),version:'6.2'};
    const blob=new Blob([JSON.stringify(data,null,2)],{type:'application/json'});
    const a=document.createElement('a');a.download=`modulTV_backup_${Date.now()}.json`;
    a.href=URL.createObjectURL(blob);a.click();
    addAudit('📤 Yedek oluşturuldu');toast('📤 Yedek oluşturuldu','ok');
}
function importAll(){
    const inp=document.createElement('input');inp.type='file';inp.accept='.json';
    inp.onchange=e=>{
        const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;
        const r=new FileReader();
        r.onload=ev=>{
            try{
                const d=JSON.parse(ev.target.result);
                const map={channels:'mtv_channels',favorites:'mtv_fav',history:'mtv_hist',
                    stats:'mtv_stats',locked:'mtv_locked',hidden:'mtv_hidden',
                    ratings:'mtv_ratings',reminders:'mtv_reminders',
                    screenshots:'mtv_snaps',channelNotes:'mtv_notes'};
                Object.entries(map).forEach(([k,lk])=>{if(d[k]){window[k]=d[k];localStorage.setItem(lk,JSON.stringify(d[k]));}});
                if(d.pin){pin=d.pin;localStorage.setItem('mtv_pin',pin);}
                if(d.theme)applyTheme(d.theme);else if(d.accent)changeAccent(d.accent);
                processChannels();updateFavCnt();renderReminders();updateRemCnt();
                renderSuggestions();updateGalCnt();renderGallery();renderAllNotes();
                addAudit('📥 Yedek geri yüklendi');toast('📥 Geri yüklendi','ok');
            }catch(e){toast('Geçersiz dosya','err');}
        };r.readAsText(f);
    };inp.click();
}
function factoryReset(){
    if(!confirm('⚠️ TÜM VERİLER SİLİNECEK?'))return;
    if(!confirm('Son kez onaylıyor musunuz?'))return;
    ['mtv_channels','mtv_fav','mtv_hist','mtv_stats','mtv_locked','mtv_hidden',
     'mtv_pin','mtv_accent','mtv_theme','mtv_ratings','mtv_reminders',
     'mtv_snaps','mtv_notes','mtv_audit'].forEach(k=>localStorage.removeItem(k));
    toast('⚠️ Sıfırlanıyor...','warn');
    setTimeout(()=>location.reload(),2000);
}
function speedTest(){
    toast('🚀 Test başlatılıyor...','info');
    const start=Date.now();
    const img=new Image();
    img.onload=()=>{
        const dur=(Date.now()-start)/1000;
        const speed=((6000000*8)/dur/1024/1024).toFixed(2);
        addAudit(`🚀 Hız testi: ~${speed} Mbps`);toast(`🚀 ~${speed} Mbps`,'ok');
    };
    img.onerror=()=>toast('Test başarısız','err');
    img.src='https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/3/3f/Fronalpstock_big.jpg?t='+Date.now();
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// PLAYLIST
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function loadPL(){
    const url=document.getElementById('plUrl').value.trim();
    const content=document.getElementById('plContent').value.trim();
    if(url)fetchPL(url);
    else if(content)parseM3U(content);
    else{toast('URL veya içerik girin','warn');return;}
    closeModal('plModal');
}
async function fetchPL(url){
    toast('Yükleniyor...','info');
    try{parseM3U(await(await fetch(url)).text());}
    catch{
        try{parseM3U(await(await fetch(`https://api.allorigins.win/raw?url=${encodeURIComponent(url)}`)).text());}
        catch{toast('Yüklenemedi','err');}
    }
}
function parseM3U(txt){
    const lines=txt.split('\n').map(l=>l.trim()).filter(Boolean);
    const chs=[];let info=null,id=1;
    for(const line of lines){
        if(line.startsWith('#EXTINF:')){
            const nm=line.match(/,(.+)$/),gr=line.match(/group-title="([^"]*)"/),lg=line.match(/tvg-logo="([^"]*)"/);
            info={name:nm?nm[1].trim():`Kanal ${id}`,group:gr?gr[1]:'Genel',logo:lg?lg[1]:'',id:id++};
        }else if(line.startsWith('http')&&info){info.url=line;chs.push(info);info=null;}
    }
    if(chs.length){
        channels=chs;localStorage.setItem('mtv_channels',JSON.stringify(channels));
        processChannels();renderSuggestions();renderReminders();
        addAudit(`✅ ${chs.length} kanal yüklendi`);toast(`✅ ${chs.length} kanal`,'ok');
    }else toast('Kanal bulunamadı','warn');
}
function handleFile(e){
    const f=e.target.files[0];if(!f)return;
    const r=new FileReader();
    r.onload=ev=>{document.getElementById('plContent').value=ev.target.result;toast(`📄 ${f.name}`,'info');};
    r.readAsText(f);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// SHORTCUTS MODAL
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function initShortcutsModal(){
    document.getElementById('shortcutList').innerHTML=SHORTCUTS.map(([k,d])=>
        `<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;">
        <kbd style="background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:3px 9px;border-radius:5px;
        font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--accent);font-family:monospace;">${k}</kbd>
        <span style="font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-secondary);">${d}</span></div>`).join('');
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// DEMO CHANNELS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function loadDemo(){
    channels=[
        {name:'TRT 1',group:'Ulusal',url:'https://trtonlinel.fragtele.com/trt1/index.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'ATV',group:'Ulusal',url:'https://atv-live.daioncdn.net/atv/atv.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'Kanal D',group:'Ulusal',url:'https://kanaldonlinel.fragtele.com/kanald/index.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'Show TV',group:'Ulusal',url:'https://showtvonlinel.fragtele.com/showtv/index.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'Star TV',group:'Ulusal',url:'https://startv-live.daioncdn.net/startv/startv.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'FOX TV',group:'Ulusal',url:'https://foxtv-live.daioncdn.net/foxtv/foxtv.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'TRT Haber',group:'Haber',url:'https://trthaber.fragtele.com/trthaber/index.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'CNN Türk',group:'Haber',url:'https://cnnturk-live.daioncdn.net/cnnturk/cnnturk.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'NTV',group:'Haber',url:'https://ntv-live.daioncdn.net/ntv/ntv.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'TRT Spor',group:'Spor',url:'https://trtspor.fragtele.com/trtspor/index.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'S Sport',group:'Spor',url:'https://ssport-live.daioncdn.net/ssport/ssport.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'TRT Çocuk',group:'Çocuk',url:'https://trtcocuk.fragtele.com/trtcocuk/index.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'NatGeo',group:'Belgesel',url:'',logo:''},{name:'Discovery',group:'Belgesel',url:'',logo:''},
        {name:'TRT Müzik',group:'Müzik',url:'https://trtmuzik.fragtele.com/trtmuzik/index.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'Kral TV',group:'Müzik',url:'',logo:''},{name:'TRT 4K',group:'4K',url:'https://trt4k.fragtele.com/trt4k/index.m3u8',logo:''},
        {name:'BBC World',group:'Uluslararası',url:'',logo:''},{name:'DW Türkçe',group:'Uluslararası',url:'',logo:''},
        {name:'Al Jazeera',group:'Uluslararası',url:'',logo:''},
    ];
    localStorage.setItem('mtv_channels',JSON.stringify(channels));
    processChannels();renderSuggestions();renderReminders();
    addAudit('📺 Demo kanallar yüklendi');toast('📺 Demo kanallar yüklendi','info');
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// QUICK CHANNEL SWITCHER ( / tuşu )
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function filterQCS(q){
    q=q.toLowerCase().trim();
    const results=q
        ?channels.filter(c=>(c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q)||(c.group||'').toLowerCase().includes(q))).slice(0,20)
        :channels.slice(0,20);
    document.getElementById('qcsResults').innerHTML=results.map((c,i)=>
        `<div class="qcs-result" onclick="qcsPlay('${c.name.replace(/'/g,"\\'")}')">
        <span class="qcs-num">${i+1}</span>
        <span class="qcs-name">${c.name}</span>
        <span class="qcs-cat">${c.group||''}</span></div>`).join('');
}
function qcsPlay(name){
    document.getElementById('qcsOverlay').classList.remove('show');
    goPage('tv');
    const c=channels.find(ch=>ch.name===name);
    if(c){filterCat('all');const i=filtered.findIndex(ch=>ch.name===name);if(i>-1)selectCh(i);}
}
document.getElementById('qcsSearch').addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
    if(e.key==='Escape')document.getElementById('qcsOverlay').classList.remove('show');
    if(e.key==='Enter'){const first=document.querySelector('.qcs-result');if(first)first.click();}
});

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// NAVIGATION
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function goPage(p){
    document.querySelectorAll('.sb-item').forEach(el=>el.classList.toggle('active',el.dataset.p===p));
    document.querySelectorAll('.page').forEach(el=>el.classList.remove('active'));
    const pg=document.getElementById(`pg-${p}`);if(pg)pg.classList.add('active');
    currentPage=p;
    if(p==='favorites')renderFavs();
    if(p==='history')renderHist();
    if(p==='stats')renderStats();
    if(p==='multiview')renderMV();
    if(p==='worldclock')renderWorldClock();
    if(p==='gallery')renderGallery();
    if(p==='notes')renderAllNotes();
    document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.remove('open');
    if(p!=='tv'&&curCh)trackEnd();
}
function toggleSB(){document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('mini');}
function toggleSBMobile(){document.getElementById('sidebar').classList.toggle('open');}
function toggleChPanel(){
    chPanelOpen=!chPanelOpen;
    const cp=document.getElementById('chPanel');
    if(window.innerWidth>820)cp.style.display=chPanelOpen?'':'none';
    else cp.classList.toggle('open',chPanelOpen);
    document.getElementById('chPanelBtn').textContent=chPanelOpen?'◀':'▶';
}
function openModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.add('show');}
function closeModal(id){document.getElementById(id).classList.remove('show');}
document.querySelectorAll('.modal-bg').forEach(m=>{
    m.addEventListener('click',e=>{if(e.target===m)m.classList.remove('show');});
});

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// TOAST
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
function toast(msg,type='info'){
    const c=document.getElementById('toasts');
    const icons={ok:'✅',err:'❌',warn:'⚠️',info:'ℹ️'};
    const t=document.createElement('div');
    t.className=`toast t-${type}`;
    t.innerHTML=`<span class="toast-icon">${icons[type]||'ℹ️'}</span><span class="toast-msg">${msg}</span>`;
    c.appendChild(t);
    setTimeout(()=>{t.classList.add('out');setTimeout(()=>t.remove(),300);},3500);
}

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>{
    if(['INPUT','TEXTAREA','SELECT'].includes(e.target.tagName)){
        if(e.key==='Escape')e.target.blur();return;
    }
    if(e.key==='Escape'){
        document.querySelectorAll('.modal-bg.show').forEach(m=>m.classList.remove('show'));
        closePin();closePip();closeCmdPalette();
        document.getElementById('qcsOverlay').classList.remove('show');
        document.getElementById('gestureHelp').classList.remove('show');
        if(isFS)toggleFS();return;
    }
    switch(e.key.toLowerCase()){
        case' ':e.preventDefault();togglePlay();break;
        case'f':toggleFS();break;
        case'm':toggleMute();break;
        case'g':toggleAudioOnly();break;
        case'w':toggleAmbient();break;
        case't':openModal('timerModal');break;
        case'b':toggleBitratePanel();break;
        case'n':if(!e.ctrlKey)toggleNotesPanel();break;
        case'd':randomChannel();break;
        case'h':openGestureHelp();break;
        case'r':toggleRec();break;
        case'v':toggleVF();break;
        case'e':toggleEQ();break;
        case's':takeSnap();break;
        case'p':if(!e.ctrlKey)togglePiP();break;
        case'/':
            e.preventDefault();
            {const qo=document.getElementById('qcsOverlay');
            if(qo.classList.contains('show')){qo.classList.remove('show');}
            else{qo.classList.add('show');document.getElementById('qcsSearch').value='';
                filterQCS('');setTimeout(()=>document.getElementById('qcsSearch').focus(),50);}
            }break;
        case'arrowup':
            e.preventDefault();
            {const v=document.getElementById('vid');v.volume=Math.min(1,v.volume+0.05);
            document.getElementById('volSlider').value=v.volume*100;
            showGesture(`🔊 ${Math.round(v.volume*100)}%`);}break;
        case'arrowdown':
            e.preventDefault();
            {const v=document.getElementById('vid');v.volume=Math.max(0,v.volume-0.05);
            document.getElementById('volSlider').value=v.volume*100;
            showGesture(`🔊 ${Math.round(v.volume*100)}%`);}break;
        case'arrowleft':e.preventDefault();prevCh();break;
        case'arrowright':e.preventDefault();nextCh();break;
        default:
            if(e.key>='1'&&e.key<='9'){
                chNumBuf+=e.key;showChNum(chNumBuf);clearTimeout(chNumTmr);
                chNumTmr=setTimeout(()=>{
                    const idx=parseInt(chNumBuf)-1;
                    if(idx>=0&&idx<filtered.length)selectCh(idx);
                    chNumBuf='';
                },1000);
            }
    }
    if(e.ctrlKey&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='k'){e.preventDefault();document.getElementById('searchIn').focus();}
    if(e.ctrlKey&&e.key.toLowerCase()==='p'){e.preventDefault();openCmdPalette();}
});

// ══════════════════════════════════════════
// GLOBAL EVENTS
// ══════════════════════════════════════════
document.getElementById('videoWrap').addEventListener('dblclick',()=>toggleFS());
window.addEventListener('beforeunload',()=>trackEnd());
document.addEventListener('click',e=>{
    const sb=document.getElementById('sidebar');
    if(window.innerWidth<=1100&&sb.classList.contains('open')&&!sb.contains(e.target))
        sb.classList.remove('open');
    if(notifCenterOpen&&!document.getElementById('notifCenter').contains(e.target)
        &&e.target.id!=='notifBtn'&&!e.target.closest('[onclick="toggleNotifCenter()"]')){
        notifCenterOpen=false;document.getElementById('notifCenter').classList.remove('show');
    }
});

function checkResp(){
    const mb=document.querySelector('.mob-menu-btn');
    if(mb)mb.style.display=window.innerWidth<=1100?'flex':'none';
    if(window.innerWidth<=820&&document.getElementById('chPanel'))
        document.getElementById('chPanel').classList.remove('open');
}
checkResp();
window.addEventListener('resize',checkResp);

// Başlangıçta idle saat göster
setTimeout(()=>{
    if(!curCh){
        document.getElementById('idleClock').classList.add('show');
        document.getElementById('ph').style.display='none';
    }
},3500);

addAudit('🚀 Modül TV v6.2 başlatıldı');
```

| Bölüm | İçerik |
|-------|--------|
| **CSS** | World Clock kartları, Suggest chipler, Reminder satırları, QCS overlay, aoFloat animasyonu |
| **HTML** | Quick Channel Switcher overlay (`/` tuşu ile açılır) |
| **JS** | `renderWorldClock`, `renderSuggestions`, Watch Party, Temalar, BW/Perf, Data yönetimi, Playlist parser, Demo kanallar, QCS, Navigasyon, Toast, Klavye kısayolları |
