## 📋 Bölüm Planı

| Bölüm | İçerik | Yaklaşık Boyut |
|-------|--------|-----------------|
| **1/8** | CSS Stil Sayfası | Tüm stiller + yeni animasyonlar |
| **2/8** | HTML Ana Yapı | Header, sidebar, tüm sayfalar, modallar |
| **3/8** | JS Çekirdek & Veri Modeli | Durum, depolama, kanal sistemi |
| **4/8** | JS Oyuncu & Medya Motoru | HLS, oynatıcı, kontroller, efektler |
| **5/8** | JS EPG & Zaman Çizelgesi | Elektronik Program Rehberi |
| **6/8** | JS Araçlar & Widgetlar | Kayıt, notlar, hatırlatıcı, veri monitörü |
| **7/8** | JS Topluluk & Sistem | Watch Party, tema, veri yönetimi, sesli |
| **8/8** | JS Başlatma & Olaylar | Demo kanallar, klavye, dokunma, başlatma |

---

## ✅ Bölüm 1/8 — CSS Stil Sayfası

Tamamen yeniden yazılan, yeni animasyonlar ve yeni özelliklerin tüm stillerini içeren CSS bölümünü yazıyorum. **Onay verdiğinde Bölüm 2'ye geçeceğim.**

```css
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   MODÜL TV v7.0 — COMPLETE CSS
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ── RESET & BASE ── */
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
:root{
    --bg-primary:#06060e;
    --bg-secondary:#0d0d18;
    --bg-card:#151528;
    --bg-hover:#1e1e3a;
    --bg-glass:rgba(15,15,30,0.88);
    --accent:#e50914;
    --accent-glow:rgba(229,9,20,0.35);
    --accent2:#ff6b35;
    --accent3:#7c3aed;
    --accent4:#06b6d4;
    --accent5:#10b981;
    --text-primary:#ffffff;
    --text-secondary:#a0a0be;
    --text-muted:#555570;
    --border:#1e1e38;
    --success:#10b981;
    --warning:#f59e0b;
    --danger:#ef4444;
    --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#e50914,#ff6b35);
    --radius:14px;
    --radius-sm:8px;
    --radius-lg:20px;
    --shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
    --shadow-lg:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
    --sb-width:260px;
    --topbar-h:56px;
    --transition:all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
    --transition-fast:all 0.15s ease;
}
html{font-size:16px;scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{
    font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;
    background:var(--bg-primary);
    color:var(--text-primary);
    overflow:hidden;
    height:100vh;
    height:100dvh;
    user-select:none;
    -webkit-user-select:none;
}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--accent);}

/* ── SPLASH SCREEN ── */
.splash{
    position:fixed;inset:0;
    background:var(--bg-primary);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    z-index:99999;
    transition:opacity 0.8s,visibility 0.8s;
    overflow:hidden;
}
.splash.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
.splash-particles{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;}
.splash-p{
    position:absolute;border-radius:50%;
    background:var(--accent);opacity:0;
    animation:spFloat var(--dur) var(--delay) ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes spFloat{
    0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(100vh) scale(0);}
    20%{opacity:0.6;}
    80%{opacity:0.3;}
    100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10vh) scale(1);}
}
.splash-logo{
    width:120px;height:120px;
    border-radius:30px;
    background:var(--gradient-main);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:3.8rem;
    box-shadow:0 0 80px var(--accent-glow);
    animation:splashPop 0.6s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;
    z-index:1;
    position:relative;
}
.splash-logo::after{
    content:'';position:absolute;inset:-4px;
    border-radius:32px;
    background:conic-gradient(var(--accent),var(--accent2),var(--accent3),var(--accent4),var(--accent));
    z-index:-1;
    animation:splashRing 3s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes splashRing{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
@keyframes splashPop{from{transform:scale(0.5) rotate(-10deg);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1) rotate(0);opacity:1;}}
.splash h1{
    margin-top:24px;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:900;
    background:var(--gradient-main);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    z-index:1;animation:splashFadeIn 0.8s 0.3s both;
}
.splash-v{
    font-size:0.72rem;letter-spacing:6px;color:var(--text-muted);
    margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;z-index:1;
    animation:splashFadeIn 0.8s 0.5s both;
}
.splash-bar{
    margin-top:40px;width:220px;height:2px;
    background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;z-index:1;
    animation:splashFadeIn 0.8s 0.7s both;
}
.splash-fill{
    height:100%;background:var(--gradient-main);border-radius:2px;
    animation:splashLoad 2.6s ease forwards;
}
@keyframes splashLoad{0%{width:0%;}60%{width:70%;}100%{width:100%;}}
@keyframes splashFadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(10px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}
.splash-feat{
    margin-top:16px;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);z-index:1;
    animation:splashFadeIn 0.8s 0.9s both;
}
.splash-ver{margin-top:20px;z-index:1;display:flex;gap:8px;animation:splashFadeIn 0.8s 1.1s both;}
.splash-chip{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    padding:4px 10px;border-radius:16px;
    font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);
}

/* ── TOAST SYSTEM ── */
.toast-stack{position:fixed;top:16px;right:16px;z-index:99998;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:7px;pointer-events:none;}
.toast{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:11px;padding:10px 16px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;
    min-width:260px;max-width:360px;
    box-shadow:var(--shadow);
    animation:toastIn 0.3s ease-out;
    pointer-events:all;
}
.toast.out{animation:toastOut 0.3s forwards;}
.t-ok{border-left:3px solid var(--success);}
.t-err{border-left:3px solid var(--danger);}
.t-warn{border-left:3px solid var(--warning);}
.t-info{border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);}
.toast-icon{font-size:1rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.toast-msg{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:500;}
.toast-actions{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-left:auto;}
.toast-btn{
    background:var(--bg-hover);border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);
    padding:3px 8px;border-radius:6px;font-size:0.7rem;cursor:pointer;
    transition:var(--transition-fast);
}
.toast-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
@keyframes toastIn{from{transform:translateX(120%);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
@keyframes toastOut{to{transform:translateX(120%);opacity:0;}}

/* ── APP SHELL ── */
.app{display:flex;height:100vh;height:100dvh;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.5s;}
.app.show{opacity:1;}

/* ── SIDEBAR ── */
.sidebar{
    width:var(--sb-width);min-width:var(--sb-width);
    background:var(--bg-secondary);
    border-right:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;
    transition:var(--transition);z-index:200;overflow:hidden;
}
.sidebar.mini{width:64px;min-width:64px;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-text,
.sidebar.mini .sb-badge,
.sidebar.mini .sb-section{display:none;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-logo-wrap{justify-content:center;padding:0 14px;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-item{justify-content:center;padding:11px;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-item-icon{margin:0;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-tooltip{
    display:block;position:absolute;left:100%;
    margin-left:8px;background:var(--bg-glass);
    backdrop-filter:blur(12px);
    padding:6px 12px;border-radius:8px;
    font-size:0.78rem;white-space:nowrap;
    pointer-events:none;opacity:0;
    transition:opacity 0.15s;z-index:300;
    border:1px solid var(--border);
}
.sidebar.mini .sb-item:hover .sb-tooltip{opacity:1;}
.sb-logo-wrap{
    height:var(--topbar-h);display:flex;align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;padding:0 16px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.sb-logo{
    font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:900;
    background:var(--gradient-main);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
    white-space:nowrap;
}
.sb-toggle-btn{
    background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
    cursor:pointer;padding:6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;
    transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;
}
.sb-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.sb-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding:8px 6px 20px;}
.sb-section{
    font-size:0.58rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;
    color:var(--text-muted);padding:14px 10px 4px;
}
.sb-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    padding:9px 12px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;
    transition:var(--transition);color:var(--text-secondary);
    margin-bottom:1px;font-size:0.85rem;position:relative;
}
.sb-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.sb-item.active{
    background:var(--accent);color:#fff;
    box-shadow:0 4px 14px var(--accent-glow);
}
.sb-item.active .sb-item-icon{color:#fff;}
.sb-item-icon{font-size:1.1rem;width:26px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.sb-badge{
    margin-left:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.15);color:#fff;
    font-size:0.62rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:8px;
    font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;
}
.sb-item.active .sb-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}
.sb-badge.new{background:var(--accent3);}
.sb-badge.hot{background:var(--danger);}

/* ── MAIN AREA ── */
.main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-width:0;}

/* ── TOPBAR ── */
.topbar{
    height:var(--topbar-h);padding:0 16px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    background:var(--bg-secondary);
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.mob-menu-btn{
    display:none;background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);
    cursor:pointer;padding:7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1.1rem;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.mob-menu-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.search-wrap{flex:1;max-width:420px;position:relative;}
.search-wrap input{
    width:100%;padding:8px 14px 8px 36px;
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;
    outline:none;transition:var(--transition);
}
.search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
.search-wrap input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
.search-wrap .si{
    position:absolute;left:11px;top:50%;
    transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--text-muted);
    font-size:0.88rem;pointer-events:none;
}
.search-clear{
    position:absolute;right:10px;top:50%;
    transform:translateY(-50%);background:none;border:none;
    color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.85rem;
    display:none;padding:2px;
}
.search-wrap input:not(:placeholder-shown)+.si+.search-clear{display:block;}
.tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;margin-left:auto;}
.tb-icon-btn{
    position:relative;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    color:var(--text-secondary);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:10px;
    cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;
}
.tb-icon-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);border-color:var(--accent);}
.tb-icon-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.tb-icon-btn .dot{
    position:absolute;top:3px;right:3px;width:7px;height:7px;
    background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;
    display:none;
}
.tb-icon-btn .dot.show{display:block;}
.tb-clock{
    font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-muted);
    font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;
}

/* ── CONTENT ── */
.content{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
.page{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}
.page.active{display:flex;}

/* ── CHANNEL PANEL ── */
.ch-panel{
    width:300px;min-width:300px;
    background:var(--bg-secondary);
    border-right:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--transition);
}
.ch-panel-head{
    padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.ch-panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;flex:1;}
.ch-count-badge{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);
    padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;
}
.ch-collapse-btn{
    background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
    cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:6px;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.ch-collapse-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.cat-bar{
    display:flex;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px;overflow-x:auto;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.cat-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
.cat-pill{
    padding:4px 11px;border-radius:16px;font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;
    cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;background:var(--bg-card);
    color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;
    transition:var(--transition);flex-shrink:0;
}
.cat-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
.cat-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.ch-toolbar{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
    padding:6px 10px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.ch-toolbar select{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px 8px;border-radius:7px;
    font-size:0.75rem;outline:none;cursor:pointer;flex:1;
}
.view-btns{display:flex;gap:3px;flex-shrink:0;}
.view-btn{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    color:var(--text-muted);padding:5px 8px;border-radius:6px;
    cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;transition:var(--transition);
}
.view-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

.ch-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
.ch-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
    padding:8px 10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;
    transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;
    margin-bottom:2px;position:relative;
}
.ch-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.ch-item.playing{
    background:rgba(229,9,20,0.08);
    border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.3);
}
.ch-item.playing .ch-name{color:var(--accent);}
.ch-logo{
    width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:10px;
    background:var(--bg-card);display:flex;align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:700;
    color:var(--accent);overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;
    border:1px solid var(--border);
}
.ch-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.ch-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.ch-name{
    font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;
    white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
}
.ch-meta{
    font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;
}
.ch-actions{display:flex;gap:2px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.ch-act{
    background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
    cursor:pointer;padding:4px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.82rem;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.ch-act:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--bg-card);}
.ch-act.faved{color:var(--warning);}
.live-dot{
    width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);
    border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;
    animation:pulse 1.5s infinite;flex-shrink:0;
}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.3;}}
.ch-note-badge{
    position:absolute;top:2px;right:2px;background:var(--accent3);
    color:#fff;font-size:0.5rem;width:14px;height:14px;border-radius:50%;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-weight:700;
}
.ch-note-indicator{
    position:absolute;top:3px;right:3px;width:6px;height:6px;
    background:var(--accent3);border-radius:50%;
}
.ch-rating{font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--warning);letter-spacing:-1px;}

/* ── CH LIST GRID VIEW ── */
.ch-list.grid{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(120px,1fr));gap:6px;
}
.ch-list.grid .ch-item{
    flex-direction:column;text-align:center;padding:12px 8px;
}
.ch-list.grid .ch-logo{width:48px;height:48px;margin:0 auto;}
.ch-list.grid .ch-meta{justify-content:center;}
.ch-list.grid .ch-actions{display:none;}

/* ── PLAYER AREA ── */
.player-area{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;min-width:0;}
.video-wrap{
    flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    overflow:hidden;background:#000;min-height:0;
}
.video-wrap video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;transition:filter 0.3s;}

/* AMBIENT MODE */
.ambient-bg{
    position:absolute;inset:0;z-index:0;
    filter:blur(60px) brightness(0.4);
    opacity:0;transition:opacity 1s;pointer-events:none;
}
.ambient-bg.on{opacity:1;}
.ambient-bg canvas{width:100%;height:100%;}

/* PLACEHOLDER */
.ph{
    position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;
    padding:30px;background:radial-gradient(ellipse at center,#0d0d20 0%,#06060e 100%);
    z-index:2;
}
.ph-icon{font-size:5rem;margin-bottom:16px;animation:phFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes phFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}}

/* IDLE CLOCK */
.idle-clock{
    text-align:center;z-index:2;position:absolute;inset:0;
    display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}
.idle-clock.show{display:flex;}
.idle-time{
    font-size:5rem;font-weight:900;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
    letter-spacing:-2px;line-height:1;
    background:var(--gradient-main);
    -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.idle-date{font-size:1.1rem;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:8px;}
.idle-weather{
    margin-top:16px;font-size:0.9rem;color:var(--text-muted);
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.idle-ch-count{margin-top:8px;font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.idle-rss{
    margin-top:12px;font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);
    max-width:400px;text-align:center;
}

/* BUFFER SPINNER */
.buf-spinner{
    position:absolute;z-index:15;display:none;
    flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;
}
.buf-spinner.show{display:flex;}
.spinner{
    width:40px;height:40px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1);
    border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;
    animation:spin 0.8s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
.buf-text{font-size:0.78rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.6);}

/* SNAP FLASH */
.snap-flash{
    position:absolute;inset:0;background:#fff;opacity:0;
    pointer-events:none;z-index:50;transition:opacity 0.1s;
}
.snap-flash.flash{opacity:0.8;}

/* CHANNEL NUMBER OVERLAY */
.ch-num-overlay{
    position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;
    transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
    background:rgba(0,0,0,0.8);color:#fff;
    font-size:4rem;font-weight:900;
    padding:20px 30px;border-radius:16px;
    display:none;z-index:30;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
}
.ch-num-overlay.show{display:block;}

/* GESTURE HINT */
.gesture-hint{
    position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;pointer-events:none;z-index:20;
}
.gesture-bubble{
    background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);color:#fff;padding:12px 20px;
    border-radius:12px;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:700;
    opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;
}
.gesture-bubble.show{opacity:1;}

/* AUDIO ONLY OVERLAY */
.ao-overlay{
    position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);
    display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
    justify-content:center;z-index:25;
}
.ao-overlay.show{display:flex;}
.ao-icon{font-size:4rem;margin-bottom:16px;animation:aoFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes aoFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-10px);}}
.ao-name{font-size:1.3rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:6px;}
.ao-cat{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.9rem;}
.ao-bars{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-top:20px;align-items:flex-end;height:40px;}
.ao-bar{
    width:4px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:2px;
    animation:eqAnim var(--d) ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}

/* ── OSD (ON-SCREEN DISPLAY) ── */
.osd{
    position:absolute;top:14px;left:14px;right:14px;
    display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;
    pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;
}
.video-wrap:hover .osd,
.video-wrap.osd-on .osd{opacity:1;}
.osd-chip{
    background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    padding:7px 14px;border-radius:10px;
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
}
.osd-live{font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.osd-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;}
.osd-btns{display:flex;gap:5px;pointer-events:all;}
.osd-btn{
    background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);color:#fff;
    padding:7px 9px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.osd-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

/* EPG MINI BAR */
.osd-epg{
    position:absolute;top:56px;left:14px;
    background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    padding:8px 14px;border-radius:10px;
    border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
    pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;
    font-size:0.75rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;
}
.video-wrap:hover .osd-epg,
.video-wrap.osd-on .osd-epg{opacity:1;}
.osd-epg-now{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.osd-epg-next{color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ── PLAYER CONTROLS ── */
.p-controls{
    position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
    background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,0.97));
    padding:40px 16px 14px;
    opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.3s;z-index:10;
}
.video-wrap:hover .p-controls,
.video-wrap.osd-on .p-controls{opacity:1;}
.p-progress{
    width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
    border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;margin-bottom:10px;
    transition:height 0.2s;
}
.p-progress:hover{height:5px;}
.p-prog-buf{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.08);border-radius:3px;}
.p-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width 0.1s linear;}
.p-prog-dot{
    position:absolute;top:50%;right:0;transform:translate(50%,-50%);
    width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;
    opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;
}
.p-progress:hover .p-prog-dot{opacity:1;}
.p-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.p-left,.p-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.p-btn{
    background:none;border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;
    font-size:1rem;padding:5px 7px;border-radius:7px;
    transition:var(--transition);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;
}
.p-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.1);}
.p-btn .lbl{font-size:0.73rem;}
.vol-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.vol-slider{
    width:70px;height:3px;-webkit-appearance:none;
    background:rgba(255,255,255,0.2);border-radius:3px;
    outline:none;cursor:pointer;
}
.vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;}
.p-time{font-size:0.73rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,0.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

/* ── BOTTOM PANELS ── */
.panels-area{flex-shrink:0;max-height:45%;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.vf-panel,.eq-panel,.notes-panel,.bitrate-panel,.epg-panel,.group-panel{
    background:var(--bg-card);padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:none;
}
.vf-panel.show,.eq-panel.show,.notes-panel.show,.bitrate-panel.show,.epg-panel.show,.group-panel.show{
    display:block;
}
.panel-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:12px;}
.panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.85rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.panel-close{
    background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
    cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.9rem;border-radius:5px;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.panel-close:hover{color:var(--danger);}
.vf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));gap:10px;}
.vf-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
.vf-row label{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
.vf-slider{
    -webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:var(--border);
    border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;
}
.vf-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{
    -webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:13px;
    background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;
}
.chip-row{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:10px;}
.chip{
    padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;
    background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;
    border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);
}
.chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
.chip.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}

/* ── EQUALIZER ── */
.eq-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:8px;justify-content:center;height:100px;margin-bottom:10px;}
.eq-band{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.eq-vslider{
    -webkit-appearance:none;width:3px;height:90px;background:var(--border);
    border-radius:3px;outline:none;writing-mode:vertical-lr;direction:rtl;cursor:pointer;
}
.eq-vslider::-webkit-slider-thumb{
    -webkit-appearance:none;width:14px;height:7px;
    background:var(--accent4);border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;
}
.eq-lbl{font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.eq-viz{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:30px;margin-left:auto;}
.eq-viz-bar{
    width:3px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:1px;
    animation:eqAnim var(--d,0.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}
@keyframes eqAnim{from{height:4px;}to{height:var(--h,20px);}}

/* ── BITRATE CANVAS ── */
.bitrate-canvas{width:100%;height:80px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:8px;margin-top:8px;}

/* ── EPG TIMELINE ── */
.epg-container{overflow-x:auto;padding-bottom:8px;}
.epg-timeline{display:flex;gap:0;min-width:max-content;}
.epg-hour-col{
    min-width:120px;flex:1;border-left:1px solid var(--border);
}
.epg-hour-label{
    font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);padding:4px 8px;
    background:var(--bg-hover);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    position:sticky;top:0;z-index:1;
}
.epg-program{
    padding:6px 8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);min-height:40px;
    font-size:0.75rem;
}
.epg-program:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.epg-program.now-playing{background:rgba(229,9,20,0.12);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
.epg-program-time{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.epg-program-name{font-weight:600;margin-top:2px;}

/* ── FLOATING WIDGETS ── */
.sleep-badge,.rec-badge,.bw-widget,.perf-widget,.timer-badge,.weather-widget{
    position:fixed;z-index:500;
    background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
    box-shadow:var(--shadow);
}
.sleep-badge{
    top:68px;right:16px;padding:8px 14px;
    display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;font-size:0.8rem;
}
.sleep-badge.show{display:flex;}
.sleep-t{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.sleep-x{
    background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
    cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px;
}
.sleep-x:hover{color:var(--danger);}
.rec-badge{
    top:68px;right:16px;padding:8px 14px;display:none;
    align-items:center;gap:8px;border-color:var(--danger);
    animation:recBlink 1s infinite;z-index:501;
}
.rec-badge.show{display:flex;}
.rec-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;}
.rec-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);font-size:0.8rem;}
.rec-t{font-size:0.8rem;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.rec-stop{background:var(--danger);border:none;color:#fff;padding:3px 9px;border-radius:6px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.73rem;}
@keyframes recBlink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:0.75;}}
.timer-badge{
    top:68px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
    padding:6px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:8px;
    font-size:0.8rem;border-color:var(--warning);
}
.timer-badge.show{display:flex;}
.timer-val{font-weight:700;color:var(--warning);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.timer-lbl{color:var(--text-muted);}
.bw-widget{
    bottom:70px;left:16px;padding:10px 14px;
    display:none;gap:14px;align-items:center;
}
.bw-widget.show{display:flex;}
.bw-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;}
.bw-val{font-weight:700;font-size:0.82rem;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.bw-lbl{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.perf-widget{
    top:68px;left:16px;padding:10px 12px;
    display:none;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;font-size:0.7rem;min-width:160px;
}
.perf-widget.show{display:flex;}
.perf-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:10px;}
.perf-k{color:var(--text-muted);}
.perf-v{font-weight:600;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.perf-v.g{color:var(--success);}
.perf-v.w{color:var(--warning);}
.perf-v.b{color:var(--danger);}

/* ── NOTIFICATION CENTER ── */
.notif-center{
    position:fixed;top:var(--topbar-h);right:0;
    width:340px;max-height:70vh;
    background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:0 0 0 14px;z-index:3000;
    display:none;flex-direction:column;
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);animation:slideR 0.25s ease-out;
}
.notif-center.show{display:flex;}
@keyframes slideR{from{transform:translateX(100%);}to{transform:none;}}
.notif-head{
    padding:14px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
    font-weight:700;font-size:0.9rem;
}
.notif-clear{background:none;border:none;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.78rem;}
.notif-clear:hover{text-decoration:underline;}
.notif-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:6px;}
.notif-item{
    display:flex;gap:10px;padding:10px;border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;
    transition:var(--transition);border:1px solid transparent;
}
.notif-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.notif-item.unread{border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
.notif-icon{font-size:1.3rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:2px;}
.notif-body{flex:1;}
.notif-title{font-size:0.82rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
.notif-desc{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.notif-time{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;}
.notif-empty{padding:40px 20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ── QUICK ACTION BAR ── */
.quick-bar{
    position:fixed;bottom:16px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
    z-index:500;display:none;align-items:center;gap:6px;
    background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;
    padding:8px 14px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);
}
.quick-bar.show{display:flex;}
.qb-btn{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    color:var(--text-secondary);width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:10px;
    cursor:pointer;font-size:1rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.qb-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.qb-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
.qb-sep{width:1px;height:24px;background:var(--border);}

/* ── MINI PLAYER ── */
.mini-player{
    position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;
    background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    -webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
    border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:10px 16px;
    display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;
}
.mini-player.show{display:flex;}
.mini-thumb{width:56px;height:38px;background:#000;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;}
.mini-thumb video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.mini-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.mini-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.83rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.mini-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.mini-ctrl{display:flex;gap:6px;}
.mini-btn{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:8px;
    cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.mini-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

/* ── PiP WINDOW ── */
.pip-win{
    position:fixed;z-index:800;border:2px solid var(--accent);
    border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;
    box-shadow:0 15px 50px rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
    display:none;cursor:move;width:360px;height:210px;
    bottom:80px;right:16px;resize:both;
}
.pip-win.show{display:block;animation:pipIn 0.3s ease-out;}
@keyframes pipIn{from{transform:scale(0.6);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
.pip-win video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;pointer-events:none;}
.pip-bar{
    position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;
    background:linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,0.8),transparent);
    padding:6px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;
    justify-content:space-between;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;
}
.pip-win:hover .pip-bar{opacity:1;}
.pip-name{font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:600;}
.pip-close{
    background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;
    width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;
    font-size:0.62rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}

/* ── CHANNEL PREVIEW ── */
.ch-preview{
    position:fixed;z-index:900;background:var(--bg-secondary);
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:10px;
    width:240px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:none;
}
.ch-preview.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.15s ease-out;}
.ch-prev-video{width:100%;height:130px;background:#000;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:8px;}
.ch-prev-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.ch-prev-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.82rem;}
.ch-prev-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.ch-prev-epg{font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(0.96);}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}}

/* ── CONTEXT MENU ── */
.ctx-menu{
    position:fixed;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:12px;padding:5px;min-width:220px;z-index:3000;
    box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);display:none;
}
.ctx-menu.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn 0.15s ease-out;}
.ctx-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:8px 12px;
    border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.82rem;
    color:var(--text-secondary);transition:var(--transition);
}
.ctx-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.ctx-item.danger:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.12);color:var(--danger);}
.ctx-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 10px;}

/* ── PIN OVERLAY ── */
.pin-overlay{
    position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.92);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    z-index:9000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);
}
.pin-overlay.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
.pin-box{background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:20px;padding:36px;text-align:center;width:320px;}
.pin-inputs{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
.pin-input{
    width:48px;height:52px;text-align:center;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;
    background:var(--bg-card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
    color:var(--text-primary);outline:none;transition:var(--transition);
}
.pin-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}

/* ── MULTI-VIEW ── */
.mv-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.mv-toolbar{
    padding:12px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;
    background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.mv-grid{flex:1;display:grid;gap:3px;padding:3px;background:var(--bg-primary);overflow:hidden;}
.mv-grid.g2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
.mv-grid.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
.mv-grid.g6{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
.mv-grid.g9{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:repeat(3,1fr);}
.mv-cell{
    background:#111;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;position:relative;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    border:2px solid transparent;transition:var(--transition);cursor:pointer;
}
.mv-cell:hover{border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.5);}
.mv-cell.active-cell{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent-glow);}
.mv-cell video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
.mv-lbl{
    position:absolute;bottom:6px;left:6px;
    background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
    padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;font-size:0.68rem;font-weight:600;
}
.mv-rm{
    position:absolute;top:5px;right:5px;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
    border:none;color:#fff;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;
    cursor:pointer;font-size:0.62rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.2s;
}
.mv-cell:hover .mv-rm{opacity:1;}
.mv-add{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:2px dashed var(--border);
    display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.82rem;gap:6px;
    border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);
}
.mv-add:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
.mv-add-icon{font-size:2rem;}

/* ── GRID PAGES ── */
.grid-page{
    flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(160px,1fr));
    gap:10px;align-content:start;
}
.g-card{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;text-align:center;
    cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);position:relative;
}
.g-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.g-card:active{transform:translateY(-1px);}
.g-card-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
.g-card-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.85rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
.g-card-sub{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ── CAST PAGE ── */
.cast-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
.cast-devices{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
.cast-device{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px 22px;text-align:center;
    cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);min-width:150px;
}
.cast-device:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.cast-device.connected{border-color:var(--success);background:rgba(16,185,129,0.08);}
.cast-device-icon{font-size:2.2rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
.cast-device-name{font-weight:600;font-size:0.88rem;margin-bottom:3px;}
.cast-device-status{font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.cast-device.connected .cast-device-status{color:var(--success);}

/* ── STATS PAGE ── */
.stats-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.stats-grid{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(180px,1fr));
    gap:12px;padding:16px;
}
.stat-card{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);padding:18px;
    transition:var(--transition);cursor:default;
}
.stat-card.clickable{cursor:pointer;}
.stat-card.clickable:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.stat-icon{font-size:1.8rem;margin-bottom:8px;}
.stat-val{font-size:1.7rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:2px;}
.stat-lbl{font-size:0.77rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ── SETTINGS PAGE ── */
.settings-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.settings-inner{padding:20px;max-width:680px;}
.set-section{margin-bottom:22px;}
.set-sec-title{font-size:0.9rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:12px;padding-bottom:8px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);}
.set-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;padding:10px 0;}
.set-info h4{font-size:0.86rem;margin-bottom:2px;}
.set-info p{font-size:0.73rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* Toggle Switch */
.tgl{position:relative;width:42px;height:22px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}
.tgl input{display:none;}
.tgl-track{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:22px;transition:var(--transition);}
.tgl-thumb{position:absolute;width:16px;height:16px;background:var(--text-muted);border-radius:50%;top:2px;left:3px;transition:var(--transition);}
.tgl input:checked~.tgl-track{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);}
.tgl input:checked~.tgl-thumb{transform:translateX(19px);background:#fff;}

/* Theme Grid */
.theme-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:8px;margin-top:10px;}
.theme-card{
    padding:10px;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;
    border:2px solid var(--border);transition:var(--transition);
}
.theme-card:hover{border-color:var(--text-secondary);}
.theme-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 12px var(--accent-glow);}
.theme-preview{width:100%;height:28px;border-radius:5px;margin-bottom:5px;}
.theme-name{font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;}

/* ── WATCH PARTY ── */
.wp-page{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
.wp-video{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;position:relative;}
.wp-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
.wp-sidebar{
    width:300px;min-width:300px;background:var(--bg-secondary);
    border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;
}
.wp-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px;}
.wp-msg{margin-bottom:6px;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:9px;}
.wp-msg-user{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
.wp-msg-text{font-size:0.8rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.wp-input-row{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.wp-input{
    flex:1;padding:7px 10px;background:var(--bg-card);
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;
    color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.8rem;outline:none;
}
.wp-send{background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.88rem;}

/* ── MODALS ── */
.modal-bg{
    position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.75);
    backdrop-filter:blur(5px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(5px);
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    z-index:5000;opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--transition);
}
.modal-bg.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
.modal{
    background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:20px;padding:24px;width:92%;max-width:520px;
    max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;transform:scale(0.94);
    transition:transform 0.25s;
}
.modal-bg.show .modal{transform:scale(1);}
.modal-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:18px;}
.modal-title{font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;}
.modal-x{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);
    width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.9rem;
    display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--transition);
}
.modal-x:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}

/* ── FORM ELEMENTS ── */
.fg{margin-bottom:14px;}
.fl{display:block;font-size:0.8rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:5px;}
.fi,.ft{
    width:100%;padding:9px 12px;background:var(--bg-card);
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;
    color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.85rem;outline:none;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.fi:focus,.ft:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
.ft{resize:vertical;min-height:85px;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;}

/* ── BUTTONS ── */
.btn{
    padding:8px 16px;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-size:0.85rem;
    font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);
    display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
}
.btn-p{background:var(--gradient-main);color:#fff;}
.btn-p:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 5px 14px var(--accent-glow);}
.btn-p:active{transform:translateY(0);}
.btn-s{background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);}
.btn-s:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.btn-danger{background:rgba(239,68,68,0.1);color:var(--danger);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,0.3);}
.btn-danger:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
.btn-row{display:flex;gap:8px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:16px;}

/* ── NOTES ── */
.notes-textarea{
    width:100%;height:80px;padding:10px;background:var(--bg-card);
    border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;
    color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.82rem;resize:vertical;
    outline:none;font-family:inherit;
}
.notes-textarea:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
.note-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px;
    background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:0.78rem;
}
.note-ch{font-weight:600;color:var(--accent);min-width:80px;}
.note-txt{flex:1;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.note-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;}
.note-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

/* ── WORLD CLOCK ── */
.wc-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:20px;}
.wc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:10px;}
.wc-card{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;padding:14px;text-align:center;transition:var(--transition);}
.wc-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
.wc-flag{font-size:1.5rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
.wc-time{font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:800;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;margin-bottom:4px;}
.wc-city{font-size:0.75rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ── QUICK CHANNEL SWITCHER ── */
.qcs-overlay{
    position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9200;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.85);
    backdrop-filter:blur(12px);display:none;flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;padding-top:60px;
}
.qcs-overlay.show{display:flex;}
.qcs-result{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;
    cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.qcs-result:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.qcs-result:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.qcs-num{
    width:26px;height:26px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;
    border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    font-size:0.72rem;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;
}
.qcs-name{flex:1;font-size:0.85rem;font-weight:600;}
.qcs-cat{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ── GESTURE HELP ── */
.gesture-help{
    position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9500;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.9);
    display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
    padding:30px;text-align:center;
}
.gesture-help.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn 0.2s;}
.gesture-help h2{margin-bottom:20px;font-size:1.3rem;}
.gesture-grid{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr));
    gap:12px;max-width:600px;width:100%;
}
.gesture-card{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:12px;padding:16px 12px;text-align:center;
    transition:var(--transition);
}
.gesture-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
.gesture-card-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
.gesture-card-text{font-size:0.78rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}

/* ── COMMAND PALETTE ── */
.cmd-palette{
    position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9000;background:rgba(0,0,0,0.7);
    backdrop-filter:blur(8px);display:none;flex-direction:column;
    align-items:center;padding-top:80px;
}
.cmd-palette.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn 0.15s;}
.cmd-input{
    width:90%;max-width:500px;padding:14px 20px;background:var(--bg-secondary);
    border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:14px;color:var(--text-primary);
    font-size:1rem;outline:none;margin-bottom:12px;
    box-shadow:0 0 40px var(--accent-glow);
}
.cmd-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
.cmd-results{
    width:90%;max-width:500px;max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto;
    background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:14px;
}
.cmd-result{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px;
    cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.cmd-result:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.cmd-result:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.cmd-result-icon{font-size:1.1rem;width:28px;text-align:center;}
.cmd-result-text{flex:1;font-size:0.85rem;}
.cmd-result-hint{font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ── AUDIT LOG ── */
.audit-list{max-height:300px;overflow-y:auto;}
.audit-item{
    display:flex;gap:8px;padding:7px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);font-size:0.75rem;
}
.audit-time{color:var(--text-muted);min-width:50px;}
.audit-msg{color:var(--text-secondary);}

/* ── SUGGESTION CHIPS ── */
#phSuggest{margin-top:20px;}
.suggest-row{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:16px;}
.suggest-chip{
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:12px;padding:10px 14px;text-align:center;
    cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);min-width:100px;
}
.suggest-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.suggest-chip-icon{font-size:1.2rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
.suggest-chip-name{font-size:0.78rem;font-weight:600;}
.suggest-chip-cat{font-size:0.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ── REMINDER ITEMS ── */
.reminder-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px;
    background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:4px;font-size:0.78rem;
}
.rem-time{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);min-width:42px;}
.rem-ch{flex:1;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.rem-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:0.82rem;}
.rem-del:hover{color:var(--danger);}

/* ── ABOUT PAGE ── */
.about-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;text-align:center;max-width:680px;margin:0 auto;}
.about-feats{
    background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:15px;padding:22px;
    text-align:left;line-height:2.2;font-size:0.83rem;color:var(--text-secondary);
}
.about-feats h3{color:var(--text-primary);margin-bottom:8px;}

/* ── FULLSCREEN MODE ── */
.fs-mode .sidebar,
.fs-mode .ch-panel,
.fs-mode .topbar,
.fs-mode .mini-player{display:none!important;}
.fs-mode .player-area{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9990;}

/* ── VOICE LISTENING INDICATOR ── */
.tb-icon-btn.listening{
    background:var(--accent)!important;color:#fff!important;
    border-color:var(--accent)!important;animation:pulse 1s infinite;
}

/* ── RANDOM SHUFFLE ANIMATION ── */
.random-shuffle{animation:rShuf 0.6s ease-in-out;}
@keyframes rShuf{
    0%{transform:rotate(0);}
    25%{transform:rotate(15deg) scale(1.1);}
    50%{transform:rotate(-15deg) scale(1.1);}
    75%{transform:rotate(5deg);}
    100%{transform:rotate(0);}
}

/* ── EPG TIMELINE (DETAILED) ── */
.epg-full-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;}
.epg-grid-header{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:100px 1fr;
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:var(--radius);overflow:hidden;
}
.epg-channel-row{
    display:grid;grid-template-columns:100px 1fr;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.epg-channel-info{
    padding:10px;border-right:1px solid var(--border);
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
    font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;
    background:var(--bg-card);position:sticky;left:0;z-index:2;
}
.epg-channel-info:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.epg-programs{
    display:flex;overflow-x:auto;
    background:var(--bg-secondary);
}
.epg-prog-item{
    min-width:180px;max-width:200px;flex-shrink:0;
    padding:8px 10px;border-right:1px solid var(--border);
    cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);font-size:0.73rem;
}
.epg-prog-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.epg-prog-item.now{background:rgba(229,9,20,0.1);border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
.epg-prog-time{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.65rem;}
.epg-prog-title{font-weight:600;margin-top:2px;}

/* ── GROUP EDITOR ── */
.group-list{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;max-height:200px;overflow-y:auto;}
.group-item{
    display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:8px;
    background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:8px;font-size:0.82rem;
}
.group-color{width:12px;height:12px;border-radius:50%;flex-shrink:0;}
.group-name{flex:1;font-weight:600;}
.group-count{font-size:0.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.group-del{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;}

/* ── EPG SCHEDULE BAR (TOP) ── */
.epg-bar{
    display:flex;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px;overflow-x:auto;
    border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.epg-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
.epg-slot{
    min-width:200px;flex-shrink:0;padding:6px 10px;
    background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
    border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--transition);
    font-size:0.72rem;
}
.epg-slot:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
.epg-slot.now{background:rgba(229,9,20,0.08);border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.3);}
.epg-slot-time{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.epg-slot-title{font-weight:600;margin-top:2px;}

/* ── DATA USAGE ── */
.data-bar{
    width:100%;height:8px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:4px;
    overflow:hidden;margin-top:6px;
}
.data-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient-main);border-radius:4px;transition:width 0.5s;}
.data-label{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;font-size:0.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:4px;}

/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   RESPONSIVE
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@media(max-width:1100px){
    .sidebar{position:fixed;left:-270px;height:100%;z-index:600;box-shadow:none;}
    .sidebar.open{left:0;box-shadow:5px 0 30px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);}
    .mob-menu-btn{display:flex;}
    :root{--sb-width:250px;}
}
@media(max-width:820px){
    .ch-panel{
        position:fixed;left:0;top:0;height:100%;width:100%;
        z-index:550;transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform 0.3s;
    }
    .ch-panel.open{transform:translateX(0);}
    .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
    .theme-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
    .vf-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
    .wp-sidebar{width:240px;min-width:240px;}
    .notif-center{width:100%;border-radius:0;}
}
@media(max-width:580px){
    .grid-page{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));}
    .cast-device{min-width:120px;padding:14px 16px;}
    .modal{padding:18px;}
    .pip-win{width:280px;height:165px;}
    .tb-clock{display:none;}
    .vol-slider{width:55px;}
    .wp-sidebar{display:none;}
    .quick-bar{display:none!important;}
}
@media(max-width:420px){
    .p-right .p-btn:not(:last-child){display:none;}
}
@media(hover:none){
    .osd,.p-controls{opacity:1!important;}
}
```

---

**Bölüm 1/8 tamamlandı** — Tamamen yeniden yazılmış CSS. Yeni eklenen stiller:

| Yeni CSS | Açıklama |
|----------|----------|
| `.osd-epg` | Ekranda mini EPG bilgisi |
| `.ao-overlay` | Ses modu geliştirilmiş |
| `.qcs-overlay` | Slash tuşu kanal seçici |
| `.epg-*` | Tam EPG zaman çizelgesi stilleri |
| `.group-*` | Kanal gruplama editörü |
| `.data-bar` | Veri kullanım göstergesi |
| `.splash-ver` | Splash ekranı iyileştirme |
| `.sb-tooltip` | Mini sidebar tooltip |
| `.toast-actions` | Toast buton eylemleri |
| `.clickable` | Tıklanabilir istatistik kartları |
| `.epg-bar` | EPG üst çubuk |
