# 📦 BÖLÜM 1 — `<head>` + Tüm CSS

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0,maximum-scale=1.0,user-scalable=no">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes">
<meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent">
<meta name="theme-color" content="#06060e">
<meta name="description" content="Modül TV v7.0 — Akıllı IPTV Oynatıcı">
<title>Modül TV v7.0 Ultra Pro</title>
<style>
/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   RESET & CSS VARIABLES
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
*{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box;-webkit-tap-highlight-color:transparent;}
:root{
  /* Backgrounds */
  --bg-primary:#06060e;--bg-secondary:#0d0d18;--bg-card:#151528;
  --bg-hover:#1e1e3a;--bg-glass:rgba(15,15,30,0.9);
  /* Accent */
  --accent:#e50914;--accent-glow:rgba(229,9,20,0.35);
  --accent2:#ff6b35;--accent3:#7c3aed;--accent4:#06b6d4;--accent5:#10b981;
  /* Text */
  --text-primary:#ffffff;--text-secondary:#a0a0be;--text-muted:#555570;
  /* UI */
  --border:#1e1e38;--success:#10b981;--warning:#f59e0b;--danger:#ef4444;
  --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#e50914,#ff6b35);
  --gradient-cool:linear-gradient(135deg,#06b6d4,#7c3aed);
  --gradient-warm:linear-gradient(135deg,#f59e0b,#ef4444);
  /* Radii */
  --radius:14px;--radius-sm:8px;--radius-lg:20px;--radius-xl:28px;
  /* Shadows */
  --shadow:0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.5);
  --shadow-lg:0 20px 60px rgba(0,0,0,0.6);
  --shadow-accent:0 8px 24px var(--accent-glow);
  /* Layout */
  --sb-width:264px;--topbar-h:56px;--ch-panel-w:300px;
  /* Transition */
  --t:all 0.25s cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1);
  --t-fast:all 0.15s ease;--t-slow:all 0.4s ease;
}
html{font-size:16px;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;}
body{
  font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,sans-serif;
  background:var(--bg-primary);color:var(--text-primary);
  overflow:hidden;height:100vh;height:100dvh;
  user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;
}

/* ════ SCROLLBAR ════ */
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:3px;height:3px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--border);border-radius:4px;}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--accent);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   SPLASH SCREEN
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.splash{
  position:fixed;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  z-index:99999;transition:opacity 0.8s,visibility 0.8s;overflow:hidden;
}
.splash.hidden{opacity:0;visibility:hidden;pointer-events:none;}
.splash-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;overflow:hidden;}
.splash-orb{
  position:absolute;border-radius:50%;
  filter:blur(80px);opacity:0.15;animation:orbFloat var(--dur) ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}
@keyframes orbFloat{from{transform:translate(0,0) scale(1);}to{transform:translate(var(--tx),var(--ty)) scale(1.2);}}
.splash-particles{position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;}
.splash-p{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);opacity:0;animation:spFloat var(--dur) var(--delay) ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes spFloat{0%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(100vh) scale(0);}20%{opacity:.6;}80%{opacity:.3;}100%{opacity:0;transform:translateY(-10vh) scale(1.2);}}
.splash-logo-wrap{position:relative;z-index:1;margin-bottom:24px;}
.splash-logo{
  width:120px;height:120px;border-radius:30px;
  background:var(--gradient-main);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:3.8rem;
  box-shadow:0 0 80px var(--accent-glow),0 0 40px rgba(229,9,20,0.2);
  animation:splashPop 0.7s cubic-bezier(0.34,1.56,0.64,1) forwards;
}
.splash-logo-ring{
  position:absolute;inset:-8px;border-radius:38px;
  border:2px solid rgba(229,9,20,0.3);
  animation:ringPulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
}
@keyframes splashPop{from{transform:scale(0.4) rotate(-10deg);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1) rotate(0);opacity:1;}}
@keyframes ringPulse{0%,100%{transform:scale(1);opacity:.3;}50%{transform:scale(1.08);opacity:.6;}}
.splash-title{
  font-size:3rem;font-weight:900;letter-spacing:-1px;
  background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;z-index:1;
}
.splash-ver{
  font-size:0.68rem;letter-spacing:7px;color:var(--text-muted);
  margin-top:4px;text-transform:uppercase;z-index:1;
}
.splash-bar{
  margin-top:44px;width:240px;height:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border-radius:2px;overflow:hidden;z-index:1;
}
.splash-fill{height:100%;background:var(--gradient-main);border-radius:2px;animation:splashLoad 2.8s ease forwards;}
@keyframes splashLoad{0%{width:0;}50%{width:60%;}80%{width:85%;}100%{width:100%;}}
.splash-step{margin-top:14px;font-size:0.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);z-index:1;min-height:1.2em;text-align:center;}
.splash-features{
  position:absolute;bottom:30px;display:flex;gap:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;
  justify-content:center;z-index:1;
}
.splash-feat-chip{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.04);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.06);
  border-radius:20px;padding:5px 12px;
  font-size:0.67rem;color:var(--text-muted);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   APP SHELL
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.app{display:flex;height:100vh;height:100dvh;opacity:0;transition:opacity 0.6s;}
.app.show{opacity:1;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   SIDEBAR
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.sidebar{
  width:var(--sb-width);min-width:var(--sb-width);
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--t);z-index:200;overflow:hidden;
}
.sidebar.mini{width:62px;min-width:62px;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-text,.sidebar.mini .sb-badge,
.sidebar.mini .sb-section,.sidebar.mini .sb-sub{display:none;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-logo-wrap{justify-content:center;padding:0 12px;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-item{justify-content:center;padding:10px;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-item-icon{margin:0;}
.sidebar.mini .sb-item-arrow{display:none;}

.sb-logo-wrap{
  height:var(--topbar-h);display:flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:space-between;padding:0 14px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
  background:var(--bg-secondary);
}
.sb-logo{
  font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:900;
  background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;white-space:nowrap;
}
.sb-logo-ver{font-size:0.55rem;color:var(--text-muted);letter-spacing:2px;margin-top:1px;}
.sb-toggle-btn{
  background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;
  padding:6px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;transition:var(--t);flex-shrink:0;
}
.sb-toggle-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.sb-scroll{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;overflow-x:hidden;padding:6px 6px 24px;}
.sb-section{
  font-size:0.58rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2.5px;
  color:var(--text-muted);padding:14px 10px 5px;font-weight:600;
}
.sb-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:8px 11px;
  border-radius:10px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
  color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:1px;font-size:0.83rem;
  position:relative;
}
.sb-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.sb-item.active{
  background:var(--accent);color:#fff;
  box-shadow:0 4px 16px var(--accent-glow);
}
.sb-item-icon{font-size:1rem;width:24px;text-align:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.sb-text{flex:1;white-space:nowrap;}
.sb-badge{
  margin-left:auto;background:rgba(255,255,255,0.12);
  color:#fff;font-size:0.6rem;padding:2px 6px;
  border-radius:8px;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;
}
.sb-item.active .sb-badge{background:rgba(255,255,255,0.25);}
.sb-badge.new{background:var(--accent3);}
.sb-badge.hot{background:var(--danger);}
.sb-badge.live{background:var(--success);animation:pulse 2s infinite;}
.sb-item-arrow{
  font-size:0.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);transition:var(--t);margin-left:auto;
}
.sb-item.open .sb-item-arrow{transform:rotate(90deg);}
.sb-sub{
  padding-left:36px;overflow:hidden;max-height:0;
  transition:max-height 0.3s ease;
}
.sb-sub.open{max-height:200px;}
.sb-sub-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:6px 10px;
  border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:0.78rem;
  color:var(--text-muted);transition:var(--t);margin-bottom:1px;
}
.sb-sub-item:hover{color:var(--text-primary);background:var(--bg-hover);}
.sb-sub-item.active{color:var(--accent);}

/* Sidebar footer */
.sb-footer{
  padding:10px 8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.sb-footer-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 10px;
  border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.78rem;
  transition:var(--t);
}
.sb-footer-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.sb-user-avatar{
  width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:8px;
  background:var(--gradient-main);display:flex;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:700;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   MAIN + TOPBAR
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.main{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;min-width:0;}
.topbar{
  height:var(--topbar-h);padding:0 14px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.mob-menu-btn{
  display:none;background:none;border:none;
  color:var(--text-secondary);cursor:pointer;
  padding:7px;border-radius:8px;font-size:1rem;transition:var(--t);
}
.mob-menu-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}

/* Search */
.search-wrap{flex:1;max-width:400px;position:relative;}
.search-wrap input{
  width:100%;padding:7px 36px 7px 34px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.83rem;
  outline:none;transition:var(--t);
}
.search-wrap input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
.search-wrap input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
.search-icon{
  position:absolute;left:10px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  color:var(--text-muted);font-size:0.85rem;pointer-events:none;
}
.search-clear{
  position:absolute;right:8px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);
  background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
  cursor:pointer;font-size:0.8rem;padding:2px;
  display:none;
}
.search-wrap input:not(:placeholder-shown)~.search-clear{display:block;}

/* Topbar right */
.tb-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-left:auto;}
.tb-clock{
  font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--text-muted);
  font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;white-space:nowrap;padding:0 4px;
}
.tb-btn{
  position:relative;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--text-secondary);width:34px;height:34px;border-radius:9px;
  cursor:pointer;font-size:0.95rem;display:flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;transition:var(--t);flex-shrink:0;
}
.tb-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);border-color:var(--accent);}
.tb-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.tb-btn-badge{
  position:absolute;top:-4px;right:-4px;width:16px;height:16px;
  background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;font-size:0.55rem;
  font-weight:700;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  border:2px solid var(--bg-secondary);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   CONTENT AREA + PAGES
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.content{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
.page{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}
.page.active{display:flex;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   CHANNEL PANEL
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.ch-panel{
  width:var(--ch-panel-w);min-width:var(--ch-panel-w);
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;transition:var(--t);
}
.ch-panel-head{
  padding:10px 12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.ch-panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:0.88rem;flex:1;}
.ch-count-badge{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  font-size:0.67rem;color:var(--text-muted);padding:2px 8px;border-radius:7px;
}
.ch-collapse-btn{
  background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
  cursor:pointer;padding:4px;font-size:0.85rem;
  border-radius:6px;transition:var(--t);
}
.ch-collapse-btn:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}

/* Category pills */
.cat-bar{
  display:flex;gap:4px;padding:8px 10px;
  overflow-x:auto;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.cat-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
.cat-pill{
  padding:4px 10px;border-radius:14px;font-size:0.7rem;font-weight:600;
  cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;background:var(--bg-card);
  color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--t);flex-shrink:0;
}
.cat-pill:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
.cat-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

/* Channel toolbar */
.ch-toolbar{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;padding:5px 8px;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.ch-toolbar select{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--text-secondary);padding:4px 6px;
  border-radius:6px;font-size:0.72rem;outline:none;cursor:pointer;flex:1;
}
.view-btns{display:flex;gap:2px;flex-shrink:0;}
.view-btn{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--text-muted);padding:4px 7px;border-radius:6px;
  cursor:pointer;font-size:0.78rem;transition:var(--t);
}
.view-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.ch-search-mini{
  flex:1;padding:4px 8px;background:var(--bg-card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:6px;
  color:var(--text-primary);font-size:0.73rem;outline:none;
}
.ch-search-mini:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}

/* Channel list */
.ch-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px;}
.ch-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:7px 9px;
  border-radius:9px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
  border:1px solid transparent;margin-bottom:2px;position:relative;
}
.ch-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.ch-item.playing{
  background:rgba(229,9,20,0.07);
  border-color:rgba(229,9,20,0.25);
}
.ch-item.playing .ch-name{color:var(--accent);}
.ch-item.selected-mv{border-color:var(--accent4);background:rgba(6,182,212,0.06);}
.ch-logo{
  width:38px;height:38px;border-radius:9px;background:var(--bg-card);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:0.75rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);
  overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border);
}
.ch-logo img{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.ch-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.ch-name{
  font-weight:600;font-size:0.81rem;white-space:nowrap;
  overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
}
.ch-meta{
  font-size:0.67rem;color:var(--text-muted);
  margin-top:2px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;
}
.ch-epg-bar{
  height:2px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;
  margin-top:4px;overflow:hidden;
}
.ch-epg-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;transition:width 1s;}
.ch-epg-title{font-size:0.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.ch-actions{display:flex;gap:2px;align-items:center;flex-shrink:0;}
.ch-act{
  background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);
  cursor:pointer;padding:3px;border-radius:4px;font-size:0.8rem;transition:var(--t);
}
.ch-act:hover{color:var(--accent);background:var(--bg-card);}
.ch-act.faved{color:var(--warning);}
.live-dot{
  width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);
  border-radius:50%;display:inline-block;
  animation:pulseDot 1.5s infinite;flex-shrink:0;
}
@keyframes pulseDot{0%,100%{opacity:1;transform:scale(1);}50%{opacity:.4;transform:scale(.7);}}
.ch-note-dot{
  position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;width:6px;height:6px;
  background:var(--accent3);border-radius:50%;
}
.ch-quality-tag{
  font-size:0.55rem;background:rgba(16,185,129,0.15);
  color:var(--success);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,0.3);
  padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;font-weight:700;
}

/* Grid view */
.ch-list.grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(110px,1fr));gap:5px;
}
.ch-list.grid .ch-item{
  flex-direction:column;text-align:center;padding:10px 6px;
}
.ch-list.grid .ch-logo{width:44px;height:44px;margin:0 auto;}
.ch-list.grid .ch-meta{justify-content:center;}
.ch-list.grid .ch-actions{display:none;}
.ch-list.grid .ch-epg-bar,.ch-list.grid .ch-epg-title{display:none;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   PLAYER AREA
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.player-area{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;background:#000;min-width:0;}
.video-wrap{
  flex:1;position:relative;display:flex;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  overflow:hidden;background:#000;min-height:0;
}
.video-wrap video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;transition:filter .3s,opacity .3s;}

/* Ambient background */
.ambient-bg{
  position:absolute;inset:-20px;z-index:0;
  filter:blur(60px) brightness(.35);opacity:0;
  transition:opacity 1.2s;pointer-events:none;
}
.ambient-bg.on{opacity:1;}
.ambient-bg canvas{width:100%;height:100%;}

/* Placeholder */
.ph{
  position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;flex-direction:column;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:30px;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 40%,#0f0f22 0%,var(--bg-primary) 100%);z-index:2;
}
.ph-logo{font-size:4rem;opacity:.2;margin-bottom:16px;}
.ph-title{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:6px;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.ph-sub{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:24px;}

/* Suggestions */
.ph-suggest{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;justify-content:center;margin-top:6px;}
.suggest-chip{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
  padding:8px 12px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);text-align:center;min-width:90px;
}
.suggest-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.suggest-chip-icon{font-size:1.1rem;margin-bottom:3px;}
.suggest-chip-name{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;max-width:90px;}
.suggest-chip-cat{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* Idle clock */
.idle-clock{
  position:absolute;inset:0;display:none;
  flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  text-align:center;z-index:2;
  background:radial-gradient(ellipse at 50% 40%,#0a0a20 0%,var(--bg-primary) 100%);
}
.idle-clock.show{display:flex;}
.idle-time{
  font-size:5.5rem;font-weight:900;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
  letter-spacing:-3px;line-height:1;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ffffff,var(--text-secondary));
  -webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}
.idle-date{font-size:1.05rem;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-top:8px;}
.idle-info{display:flex;gap:20px;margin-top:20px;flex-wrap:wrap;justify-content:center;}
.idle-chip{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,0.05);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08);
  border-radius:10px;padding:8px 14px;text-align:center;
}
.idle-chip-val{font-weight:700;font-size:.9rem;}
.idle-chip-lbl{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.idle-ch-count{margin-top:8px;font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* Buffer spinner */
.buf-spinner{
  position:absolute;z-index:15;display:none;
  flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:10px;
}
.buf-spinner.show{display:flex;}
.spinner{
  width:44px;height:44px;border:3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-top-color:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;animation:spin .8s linear infinite;
}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
.buf-text{font-size:.75rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);}
.buf-retry{
  font-size:.7rem;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;
  text-decoration:underline;margin-top:2px;
}

/* Snap flash */
.snap-flash{
  position:absolute;inset:0;background:#fff;
  opacity:0;pointer-events:none;z-index:50;transition:opacity .08s;
}
.snap-flash.flash{opacity:.9;}

/* Channel number overlay */
.ch-num-overlay{
  position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.85);color:#fff;font-size:4rem;font-weight:900;
  padding:16px 28px;border-radius:14px;display:none;z-index:30;
  font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;
  border:2px solid rgba(255,255,255,.1);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
}
.ch-num-overlay.show{display:block;animation:numPop .15s ease-out;}
@keyframes numPop{from{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(.8);}to{transform:translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1);}}

/* Gesture bubble */
.gesture-hint{
  position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;
  align-items:center;justify-content:center;pointer-events:none;z-index:20;
}
.gesture-bubble{
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);color:#fff;padding:10px 18px;
  border-radius:10px;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:700;
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
}
.gesture-bubble.show{opacity:1;}

/* Audio only overlay */
.ao-overlay{
  position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-primary);
  display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:25;
}
.ao-overlay.show{display:flex;}
.ao-icon-wrap{position:relative;margin-bottom:20px;}
.ao-icon{font-size:5rem;animation:aoFloat 3s ease-in-out infinite;}
.ao-rings{position:absolute;inset:-20px;}
.ao-ring{
  position:absolute;inset:0;border-radius:50%;
  border:2px solid var(--accent);opacity:0;
  animation:aoRing calc(var(--d)*1s) ease-out infinite;
}
@keyframes aoFloat{0%,100%{transform:translateY(0);}50%{transform:translateY(-12px);}}
@keyframes aoRing{0%{transform:scale(.6);opacity:.5;}100%{transform:scale(1.8);opacity:0;}}
.ao-name{font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:4px;}
.ao-cat{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.88rem;margin-bottom:20px;}
.ao-bars{display:flex;gap:3px;align-items:flex-end;height:40px;}
.ao-bar{
  width:4px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;
  animation:aoBar var(--d,.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;
}
@keyframes aoBar{from{height:4px;}to{height:var(--h,24px);}}

/* OSD (On-Screen Display) */
.osd{
  position:absolute;top:12px;left:12px;right:12px;
  display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;
  pointer-events:none;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;z-index:10;
}
.video-wrap:hover .osd,.video-wrap.osd-force .osd{opacity:1;}
.osd-left{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;}
.osd-chip{
  background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  padding:7px 12px;border-radius:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);pointer-events:all;
}
.osd-live{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.osd-ch-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.86rem;}
.osd-ch-grp{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.osd-epg-now{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.osd-quality-badge{
  background:rgba(16,185,129,.15);color:var(--success);
  border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.3);font-size:.65rem;
  padding:2px 7px;border-radius:5px;font-weight:700;
}
.osd-right{display:flex;gap:5px;pointer-events:all;}
.osd-btn{
  background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:#fff;
  padding:6px 8px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.88rem;transition:var(--t);
}
.osd-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);}
.osd-btn.active{background:var(--accent);}

/* Controls */
.p-controls{
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
  background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,.95));
  padding:36px 14px 12px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s;z-index:10;
}
.video-wrap:hover .p-controls,.video-wrap.osd-force .p-controls{opacity:1;}
.p-progress{
  width:100%;height:3px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  border-radius:3px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;
  margin-bottom:10px;transition:height .15s;
}
.p-progress:hover{height:5px;}
.p-prog-buf{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);border-radius:3px;}
.p-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:3px;width:0;transition:width .1s linear;}
.p-prog-dot{
  position:absolute;top:50%;right:0;transform:translate(50%,-50%);
  width:13px;height:13px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;pointer-events:none;
}
.p-progress:hover .p-prog-dot{opacity:1;}
.p-row{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.p-left,.p-right{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;}
.p-btn{
  background:none;border:none;color:#fff;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:.95rem;padding:5px 6px;border-radius:7px;
  transition:var(--t);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;
}
.p-btn:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12);}
.p-btn .lbl{font-size:.7rem;}
.vol-wrap{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;}
.vol-slider{
  width:64px;height:3px;-webkit-appearance:none;
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;
}
.vol-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:11px;height:11px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;}
.p-time{font-size:.7rem;color:rgba(255,255,255,.5);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}

/* Panels area */
.panels-area{flex-shrink:0;max-height:42%;overflow-y:auto;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.panel-box{background:var(--bg-card);padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);display:none;}
.panel-box.show{display:block;}
.panel-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:10px;}
.panel-title{font-weight:700;font-size:.83rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;}
.panel-close{
  background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;
  padding:4px;font-size:.85rem;border-radius:5px;transition:var(--t);
}
.panel-close:hover{color:var(--danger);}

/* Video filters */
.vf-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(155px,1fr));gap:8px;}
.vf-row{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:4px;}
.vf-row label{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);display:flex;justify-content:space-between;}
.vf-slider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:100%;height:3px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;cursor:pointer;}
.vf-slider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:13px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;}
.chip-row{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;}
.chip{
  padding:3px 9px;border-radius:10px;font-size:.67rem;font-weight:600;
  background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-secondary);
  cursor:pointer;border:1px solid transparent;transition:var(--t);
}
.chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--text-primary);}
.chip.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}

/* EQ */
.eq-bars{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:6px;justify-content:center;height:90px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.eq-band{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:4px;}
.eq-vslider{-webkit-appearance:none;width:3px;height:80px;background:var(--border);border-radius:3px;outline:none;writing-mode:vertical-lr;direction:rtl;cursor:pointer;}
.eq-vslider::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:13px;height:6px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:3px;}
.eq-lbl{font-size:.58rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.eq-viz{display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:24px;}
.eq-viz-bar{width:3px;background:var(--accent4);border-radius:1px;animation:eqAnim var(--d,.5s) ease-in-out infinite alternate;}
@keyframes eqAnim{from{height:3px;}to{height:var(--h,18px);}}

/* Notes panel */
.notes-textarea{
  width:100%;height:76px;padding:9px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:8px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:.8rem;
  resize:vertical;outline:none;font-family:inherit;
}
.notes-textarea:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}

/* Bitrate canvas */
.bitrate-canvas{width:100%;height:72px;background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:8px;margin-top:7px;display:block;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ★ NEW: EPG PANEL (v7.0)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.epg-panel{
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:12;
  background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
  border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  transform:translateY(100%);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
  max-height:180px;
}
.epg-panel.show{transform:translateY(0);}
.epg-head{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  padding:8px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.06);
}
.epg-title{font-weight:700;font-size:.82rem;}
.epg-ch-name{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--accent);}
.epg-close{background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;font-size:.85rem;margin-left:auto;padding:3px;}
.epg-scroll{display:flex;gap:6px;padding:10px 14px;overflow-x:auto;}
.epg-scroll::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
.epg-prog{
  flex-shrink:0;min-width:130px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.08);border-radius:9px;padding:9px 11px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.epg-prog:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.1);}
.epg-prog.now{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(229,9,20,.1);}
.epg-prog-time{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-bottom:3px;}
.epg-prog-name{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.epg-prog-cat{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;}
.epg-prog-bar{
  height:2px;background:rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  border-radius:2px;margin-top:6px;overflow:hidden;
}
.epg-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;}
/* EPG Full Page */
.epg-page{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.epg-page-head{
  padding:12px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg-secondary);
}
.epg-time-ruler{
  display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  background:var(--bg-secondary);flex-shrink:0;
  padding-left:160px;
}
.epg-time-cell{
  min-width:160px;padding:6px 10px;font-size:.68rem;
  color:var(--text-muted);border-left:1px solid var(--border);
}
.epg-body{flex:1;overflow:auto;}
.epg-row{display:flex;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);align-items:stretch;min-height:52px;}
.epg-ch-label{
  min-width:160px;max-width:160px;padding:8px 10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border-right:1px solid var(--border);
  position:sticky;left:0;z-index:2;cursor:pointer;
}
.epg-ch-label:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.epg-ch-label .ch-logo{width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:6px;font-size:.6rem;}
.epg-ch-label-name{font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;white-space:nowrap;}
.epg-programs{display:flex;position:relative;}
.epg-prog-cell{
  position:absolute;top:4px;bottom:4px;
  border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:4px 8px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;
}
.epg-prog-cell:hover{border-color:var(--accent);z-index:1;}
.epg-prog-cell.now{background:rgba(229,9,20,.1);border-color:rgba(229,9,20,.4);}
.epg-prog-cell .pn{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.epg-prog-cell .pt{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.epg-now-line{
  position:absolute;top:0;bottom:0;width:2px;
  background:var(--accent);z-index:3;pointer-events:none;
}
.epg-now-line::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;top:-4px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);
  width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--accent);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ★ NEW: VIRTUAL REMOTE (v7.0)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.vr-wrap{
  position:fixed;right:16px;bottom:80px;z-index:700;
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:24px;padding:16px;width:200px;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);display:none;
  animation:slideIn .3s ease-out;
}
.vr-wrap.show{display:block;}
@keyframes slideIn{from{transform:translateX(120%);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
.vr-header{text-align:center;margin-bottom:12px;font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);font-weight:600;}
.vr-screen{
  background:#000;border-radius:8px;height:40px;margin-bottom:10px;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.75rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;border:1px solid var(--border);
}
.vr-dpad{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:3px;
  margin-bottom:10px;
}
.vr-btn{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:8px;padding:8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:.88rem;transition:var(--t);color:var(--text-secondary);
}
.vr-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
.vr-btn:active{transform:scale(.93);}
.vr-btn.center{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.vr-numpad{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:3px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.vr-num{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:7px;padding:7px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:.85rem;font-weight:700;transition:var(--t);
}
.vr-num:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
.vr-num:active{transform:scale(.93);}
.vr-actions{display:flex;gap:4px;}
.vr-act{
  flex:1;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:7px;padding:7px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:.8rem;transition:var(--t);color:var(--text-secondary);
}
.vr-act:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ★ NEW: PLAYLIST EDITOR (v7.0)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.ple-page{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
.ple-sidebar{
  width:280px;min-width:280px;background:var(--bg-secondary);
  border-right:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;
}
.ple-toolbar{
  padding:10px;display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.ple-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:4px;}
.ple-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;padding:7px 9px;
  border-radius:8px;border:1px solid transparent;cursor:pointer;
  transition:var(--t);margin-bottom:2px;font-size:.8rem;
}
.ple-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.ple-item.selected{background:rgba(229,9,20,.08);border-color:rgba(229,9,20,.3);}
.ple-item-drag{cursor:grab;}
.ple-item-drag:active{cursor:grabbing;}
.ple-handle{color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.8rem;cursor:grab;}
.ple-main{flex:1;padding:16px;overflow-y:auto;}
.ple-form{background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;}
.ple-field-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;}
.ple-preview{
  margin-top:14px;background:#000;border-radius:10px;height:130px;
  overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  border:1px solid var(--border);position:relative;
}
.ple-preview video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
.ple-group-chips{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;}
.ple-group-chip{
  padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.68rem;
  background:var(--bg-hover);border:1px solid var(--border);cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.ple-group-chip:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ★ NEW: AUDIO SPECTRUM VISUALIZER (v7.0)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.spectrum-panel{position:relative;}
.spectrum-canvas{
  width:100%;height:80px;background:transparent;
  display:block;margin-top:8px;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;
}
.spectrum-type-btns{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.spec-type{
  padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.67rem;font-weight:600;
  background:var(--bg-hover);border:1px solid var(--border);
  cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.spec-type.active{background:var(--accent4);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent4);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ★ NEW: AI RECOMMENDATIONS (v7.0)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.ai-rec-strip{
  display:flex;gap:6px;padding:8px 10px;overflow-x:auto;
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;background:var(--bg-secondary);
}
.ai-rec-strip::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
.ai-rec-label{
  font-size:.6rem;text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:2px;
  color:var(--text-muted);writing-mode:vertical-lr;
  padding:0 4px;flex-shrink:0;display:flex;align-items:center;
}
.ai-rec-card{
  flex-shrink:0;width:100px;background:var(--bg-card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;padding:9px 7px;
  text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.ai-rec-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent3);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.ai-rec-card-icon{font-size:1.3rem;margin-bottom:4px;}
.ai-rec-card-name{font-size:.67rem;font-weight:600;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.ai-rec-card-reason{font-size:.58rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:2px;}
.ai-rec-card-badge{
  display:inline-block;background:rgba(124,58,237,.15);color:var(--accent3);
  font-size:.55rem;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:3px;font-weight:600;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ★ NEW: STREAM SCHEDULER / DVR (v7.0)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.sch-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.sch-calendar{padding:16px;}
.sch-days{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:4px;margin-bottom:12px;}
.sch-day{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;
  padding:8px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.sch-day:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
.sch-day.today{border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(229,9,20,.08);}
.sch-day-num{font-size:.9rem;font-weight:700;}
.sch-day-name{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.sch-day-dot{width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--accent);border-radius:50%;margin:3px auto 0;}
.sch-items{display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;}
.sch-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:12px;padding:12px 14px;
}
.sch-item-left{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;min-width:48px;}
.sch-item-time{font-size:.78rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--accent);}
.sch-item-dur{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.sch-item-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.sch-item-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.84rem;}
.sch-item-ch{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.sch-item-type{
  font-size:.6rem;padding:2px 7px;border-radius:6px;font-weight:700;
}
.sch-item-type.rec{background:rgba(239,68,68,.12);color:var(--danger);}
.sch-item-type.remind{background:rgba(245,158,11,.12);color:var(--warning);}
.sch-item-type.auto{background:rgba(16,185,129,.12);color:var(--success);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ★ NEW: IPTV DIRECTORY (v7.0)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.dir-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;}
.dir-search{
  display:flex;gap:8px;margin-bottom:16px;
}
.dir-search input{
  flex:1;padding:9px 14px;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:10px;color:var(--text-primary);font-size:.85rem;outline:none;
}
.dir-search input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);}
.dir-cats{display:flex;gap:5px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:14px;}
.dir-cat-pill{
  padding:5px 12px;border-radius:14px;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;
  cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);
  border:1px solid var(--border);transition:var(--t);
}
.dir-cat-pill:hover,.dir-cat-pill.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.dir-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(200px,1fr));gap:10px;}
.dir-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
  padding:14px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.dir-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.dir-card-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.dir-card-flag{font-size:1.6rem;}
.dir-card-name{font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;}
.dir-card-country{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.dir-card-tags{display:flex;gap:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.dir-tag{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.06);color:var(--text-muted);
  font-size:.6rem;padding:2px 6px;border-radius:5px;
}
.dir-card-count{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:6px;}
.dir-card-add{
  margin-top:8px;width:100%;padding:5px;
  background:rgba(229,9,20,.1);color:var(--accent);
  border:1px solid rgba(229,9,20,.3);border-radius:7px;
  cursor:pointer;font-size:.75rem;font-weight:600;transition:var(--t);
}
.dir-card-add:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   MULTI-VIEW
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.mv-wrap{flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;}
.mv-toolbar{
  padding:10px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.mv-grid{flex:1;display:grid;gap:2px;padding:2px;background:var(--bg-primary);overflow:hidden;}
.mv-grid.g1{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
.mv-grid.g2{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
.mv-grid.g4{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
.mv-grid.g6{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:1fr 1fr;}
.mv-grid.g9{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);grid-template-rows:repeat(3,1fr);}
.mv-cell{
  background:#0a0a0a;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;
  position:relative;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  border:2px solid transparent;transition:var(--t);cursor:pointer;
}
.mv-cell:hover{border-color:rgba(229,9,20,.4);}
.mv-cell.active-cell{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--accent-glow);}
.mv-cell video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
.mv-lbl{
  position:absolute;bottom:5px;left:5px;
  background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);
  padding:2px 7px;border-radius:5px;font-size:.65rem;font-weight:600;
}
.mv-rm{
  position:absolute;top:4px;right:4px;background:rgba(0,0,0,.7);
  border:none;color:#fff;width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;
  cursor:pointer;font-size:.6rem;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}
.mv-cell:hover .mv-rm{opacity:1;}
.mv-cell.muted-cell::after{
  content:'🔇';position:absolute;top:4px;left:4px;font-size:.75rem;opacity:.7;
}
.mv-add{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:2px dashed var(--border);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.78rem;gap:5px;
  border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.mv-add:hover{border-color:var(--accent);color:var(--accent);}
.mv-add-icon{font-size:1.8rem;}
.mv-ctrl{
  position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
  background:linear-gradient(transparent,rgba(0,0,0,.9));
  padding:20px 8px 6px;opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;display:flex;gap:4px;justify-content:center;
}
.mv-cell:hover .mv-ctrl{opacity:1;}
.mv-ctrl-btn{
  background:rgba(255,255,255,.15);border:none;color:#fff;
  padding:4px 8px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.75rem;
  backdrop-filter:blur(8px);transition:var(--t);
}
.mv-ctrl-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   GRID PAGES (Favorites, History, etc.)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.grid-page{
  flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:14px;
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(155px,1fr));gap:8px;
  align-content:start;
}
.g-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:14px;text-align:center;
  cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);position:relative;
}
.g-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.g-card:active{transform:translateY(-1px);}
.g-card-icon{font-size:1.9rem;margin-bottom:7px;}
.g-card-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.82rem;margin-bottom:3px;}
.g-card-sub{font-size:.67rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.g-card-actions{
  position:absolute;top:6px;right:6px;display:flex;gap:3px;
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .15s;
}
.g-card:hover .g-card-actions{opacity:1;}
.g-card-act{
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.5);border:none;color:#fff;
  width:20px;height:20px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;
  font-size:.65rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}
.g-card-act:hover{background:var(--danger);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   STATS PAGE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.stats-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(165px,1fr));
  gap:10px;padding:14px;
}
.stat-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:var(--radius);padding:16px;transition:var(--t);
}
.stat-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-2px);}
.stat-icon{font-size:1.7rem;margin-bottom:7px;}
.stat-val{font-size:1.6rem;font-weight:800;margin-bottom:2px;}
.stat-lbl{font-size:.73rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.stat-trend{
  font-size:.65rem;margin-top:4px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:3px;
}
.stat-trend.up{color:var(--success);}
.stat-trend.down{color:var(--danger);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   SETTINGS PAGE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.set-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;}
.set-inner{padding:20px;max-width:700px;}
.set-section{margin-bottom:20px;}
.set-sec-title{
  font-size:.88rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:10px;
  padding-bottom:7px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;
}
.set-row{
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  padding:9px 0;border-bottom:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.03);
}
.set-info h4{font-size:.84rem;margin-bottom:2px;}
.set-info p{font-size:.71rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
/* Toggle */
.tgl{position:relative;width:40px;height:21px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}
.tgl input{display:none;}
.tgl-track{position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--bg-hover);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:21px;transition:var(--t);}
.tgl-thumb{position:absolute;width:15px;height:15px;background:var(--text-muted);border-radius:50%;top:2px;left:3px;transition:var(--t);}
.tgl input:checked~.tgl-track{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);}
.tgl input:checked~.tgl-thumb{transform:translateX(18px);background:#fff;}
/* Themes */
.theme-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(100px,1fr));gap:7px;margin-top:8px;}
.theme-card{padding:8px;border-radius:10px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid var(--border);transition:var(--t);}
.theme-card:hover{border-color:var(--text-secondary);}
.theme-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 14px var(--accent-glow);}
.theme-preview{width:100%;height:26px;border-radius:5px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.theme-name{font-size:.67rem;font-weight:600;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   WORLD CLOCK
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.wc-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:16px;}
.wc-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:8px;margin-bottom:20px;}
.wc-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:12px;padding:14px;text-align:center;transition:var(--t);cursor:pointer;
}
.wc-card:hover{border-color:var(--accent);}
.wc-flag{font-size:1.6rem;margin-bottom:5px;}
.wc-time{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:800;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;margin-bottom:3px;}
.wc-city{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.wc-ampm{font-size:.6rem;padding:1px 5px;border-radius:4px;margin-top:3px;display:inline-block;}
.wc-ampm.day{background:rgba(245,158,11,.15);color:var(--warning);}
.wc-ampm.night{background:rgba(6,182,212,.1);color:var(--accent4);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   CAST PAGE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.cast-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;}
.cast-devices{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:18px 0;}
.cast-device{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:var(--radius);
  padding:16px 20px;text-align:center;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);min-width:140px;
}
.cast-device:hover{border-color:var(--accent);transform:translateY(-3px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.cast-device.connected{border-color:var(--success);background:rgba(16,185,129,.06);}
.cast-device-icon{font-size:2rem;margin-bottom:7px;}
.cast-device-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.85rem;margin-bottom:2px;}
.cast-device-status{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.cast-device.connected .cast-device-status{color:var(--success);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   WATCH PARTY
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.wp-page{flex:1;display:flex;overflow:hidden;}
.wp-video{flex:1;background:#000;position:relative;}
.wp-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;}
.wp-sidebar{
  width:280px;min-width:280px;background:var(--bg-secondary);
  border-left:1px solid var(--border);display:flex;flex-direction:column;
}
.wp-msgs{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:8px;}
.wp-msg{
  margin-bottom:5px;padding:7px 9px;background:var(--bg-card);
  border-radius:8px;border-left:3px solid transparent;
}
.wp-msg.own{border-left-color:var(--accent);}
.wp-msg.sys{border-left-color:var(--accent4);background:rgba(6,182,212,.05);}
.wp-msg-user{font-size:.67rem;color:var(--accent);font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2px;}
.wp-msg-text{font-size:.78rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.wp-reactions{display:flex;gap:3px;margin-top:4px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.wp-react{font-size:.75rem;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);}
.wp-react:hover{transform:scale(1.3);}
.wp-input-row{display:flex;gap:5px;padding:8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
.wp-input{
  flex:1;padding:7px 9px;background:var(--bg-card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:8px;
  color:var(--text-primary);font-size:.78rem;outline:none;
}
.wp-send{
  background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;
  padding:7px 11px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.85rem;
}
.wp-emoji-bar{
  display:flex;gap:4px;padding:5px 8px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);overflow-x:auto;
}
.wp-emoji-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
.wp-emoji{background:none;border:none;font-size:1.1rem;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);padding:2px;}
.wp-emoji:hover{transform:scale(1.3);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   FLOATING WIDGETS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.float-widget{
  position:fixed;z-index:500;background:var(--bg-glass);
  backdrop-filter:blur(16px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);
}
.sleep-badge{top:66px;right:16px;padding:7px 13px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:.78rem;}
.sleep-badge.show{display:flex;}
.sleep-t{font-weight:700;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.rec-badge{
  top:66px;right:16px;padding:7px 13px;display:none;align-items:center;
  gap:7px;border-color:var(--danger);animation:recBlink 1s infinite;z-index:501;
}
.rec-badge.show{display:flex;}
.rec-dot{width:8px;height:8px;background:var(--danger);border-radius:50%;}
.rec-lbl{font-weight:700;color:var(--danger);font-size:.78rem;}
.rec-t{font-size:.78rem;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.rec-stop{background:var(--danger);border:none;color:#fff;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:5px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.7rem;}
@keyframes recBlink{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.7;}}
.timer-badge{
  top:66px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);padding:6px 13px;
  display:none;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:.78rem;border-color:var(--warning);
}
.timer-badge.show{display:flex;}
.timer-val{font-weight:700;color:var(--warning);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.bw-widget{bottom:72px;left:16px;padding:9px 13px;display:none;gap:12px;align-items:center;}
.bw-widget.show{display:flex;}
.bw-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:2px;}
.bw-val{font-weight:700;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--accent4);font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.bw-lbl{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.perf-widget{
  top:66px;left:16px;padding:9px 11px;display:none;
  flex-direction:column;gap:4px;font-size:.68rem;min-width:160px;
}
.perf-widget.show{display:flex;}
.perf-row{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;gap:8px;}
.perf-k{color:var(--text-muted);}
.perf-v{font-weight:600;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;}
.perf-v.g{color:var(--success);}.perf-v.w{color:var(--warning);}.perf-v.b{color:var(--danger);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   NOTIFICATION CENTER
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.notif-center{
  position:fixed;top:var(--topbar-h);right:0;width:340px;
  max-height:72vh;background:var(--bg-secondary);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:0 0 0 16px;
  z-index:3000;display:none;flex-direction:column;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);
}
.notif-center.show{display:flex;animation:slideR .25s ease-out;}
@keyframes slideR{from{transform:translateX(100%);}to{transform:none;}}
.notif-head{
  padding:12px 14px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;
}
.notif-head-title{font-weight:700;font-size:.88rem;flex:1;}
.notif-tabs{display:flex;gap:4px;}
.notif-tab{
  padding:3px 9px;border-radius:8px;font-size:.68rem;font-weight:600;
  cursor:pointer;background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid transparent;
}
.notif-tab.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
.notif-clear{background:none;border:none;color:var(--accent);cursor:pointer;font-size:.75rem;}
.notif-list{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:5px;}
.notif-item{
  display:flex;gap:9px;padding:9px;border-radius:9px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);border:1px solid transparent;margin-bottom:2px;
}
.notif-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.notif-item.unread{border-left:3px solid var(--accent);}
.notif-icon{font-size:1.2rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:1px;}
.notif-body{flex:1;}
.notif-title{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:2px;}
.notif-desc{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.notif-time{font-size:.62rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px;}
.notif-empty{padding:36px 20px;text-align:center;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   QUICK ACTION BAR
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.quick-bar{
  position:fixed;bottom:16px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);z-index:500;
  display:none;align-items:center;gap:4px;
  background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:16px;padding:7px 12px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);
}
.quick-bar.show{display:flex;}
.qb-btn{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  color:var(--text-secondary);width:36px;height:36px;border-radius:9px;
  cursor:pointer;font-size:.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;transition:var(--t);
}
.qb-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}
.qb-btn.active{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;}
.qb-sep{width:1px;height:22px;background:var(--border);}
.qb-label{font-size:.6rem;color:var(--text-muted);text-align:center;margin-top:2px;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   MINI PLAYER
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.mini-player{
  position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:600;
  background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:8px 14px;display:none;align-items:center;gap:10px;
}
.mini-player.show{display:flex;}
.mini-thumb{width:54px;height:36px;background:#000;border-radius:6px;overflow:hidden;flex-shrink:0;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.mini-thumb video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.mini-info{flex:1;min-width:0;}
.mini-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.81rem;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.mini-cat{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.mini-prog{height:2px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;margin-top:4px;}
.mini-prog-fill{height:100%;background:var(--accent);border-radius:2px;width:0;}
.mini-ctrl{display:flex;gap:5px;}
.mini-btn{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);color:var(--text-secondary);
  width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.85rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--t);
}
.mini-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);color:#fff;border-color:var(--accent);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   PIP WINDOW
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.pip-win{
  position:fixed;z-index:800;border:2px solid var(--accent);
  border-radius:12px;overflow:hidden;box-shadow:0 15px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.7);
  display:none;cursor:move;width:360px;height:210px;bottom:80px;right:16px;resize:both;
}
.pip-win.show{display:block;animation:pipIn .3s ease-out;}
@keyframes pipIn{from{transform:scale(.6);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
.pip-win video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;pointer-events:none;}
.pip-bar{
  position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;
  background:linear-gradient(rgba(0,0,0,.85),transparent);
  padding:6px 9px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;
  opacity:0;transition:opacity .2s;
}
.pip-win:hover .pip-bar{opacity:1;}
.pip-name{font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;}
.pip-close{
  background:var(--accent);border:none;color:#fff;
  width:18px;height:18px;border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer;font-size:.6rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   CONTEXT MENU
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.ctx-menu{
  position:fixed;background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:12px;padding:5px;min-width:210px;z-index:5000;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow-lg);display:none;
}
.ctx-menu.show{display:block;animation:fadeUp .12s ease-out;}
@keyframes fadeUp{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.94) translateY(6px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}
.ctx-item{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:7px 11px;
  border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.8rem;
  color:var(--text-secondary);transition:var(--t);
}
.ctx-item:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.ctx-item.danger:hover{background:rgba(239,68,68,.12);color:var(--danger);}
.ctx-item.success:hover{background:rgba(16,185,129,.1);color:var(--success);}
.ctx-sep{height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:4px 8px;}
.ctx-sub-menu{position:relative;}
.ctx-sub-panel{
  position:absolute;left:100%;top:0;
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:10px;padding:4px;min-width:160px;display:none;z-index:1;box-shadow:var(--shadow);
}
.ctx-sub-menu:hover .ctx-sub-panel{display:block;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   COMMAND PALETTE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.cmd-palette{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9000;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.75);backdrop-filter:blur(10px);
  display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-top:80px;
}
.cmd-palette.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .15s;}
@keyframes fadeIn{from{opacity:0;}to{opacity:1;}}
.cmd-box{width:90%;max-width:540px;}
.cmd-input{
  width:100%;padding:14px 18px;background:var(--bg-secondary);
  border:2px solid var(--accent);border-radius:14px;
  color:var(--text-primary);font-size:.95rem;outline:none;
  box-shadow:0 0 40px var(--accent-glow);
}
.cmd-input::placeholder{color:var(--text-muted);}
.cmd-results{
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:12px;margin-top:6px;max-height:50vh;overflow-y:auto;
}
.cmd-result{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:10px 13px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.cmd-result:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.cmd-result:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.cmd-result.focused{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.cmd-result-icon{font-size:1.05rem;width:26px;text-align:center;}
.cmd-result-text{flex:1;font-size:.83rem;}
.cmd-result-hint{font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.cmd-result-kbd{
  font-size:.62rem;background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  padding:2px 6px;border-radius:4px;color:var(--text-muted);font-family:monospace;
}
.cmd-section-header{
  padding:6px 14px;font-size:.62rem;text-transform:uppercase;
  letter-spacing:1.5px;color:var(--text-muted);background:var(--bg-primary);
  position:sticky;top:0;font-weight:600;
}

/* Quick Channel Switcher */
.qcs-overlay{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9200;
  background:rgba(0,0,0,.88);backdrop-filter:blur(14px);
  display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;padding-top:60px;
}
.qcs-overlay.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .15s;}
.qcs-box{width:90%;max-width:520px;}
.qcs-header{
  text-align:center;margin-bottom:10px;
  font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);
}
.qcs-result{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:9px 13px;
  cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
}
.qcs-result:last-child{border-bottom:none;}
.qcs-result:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);}
.qcs-num{
  width:26px;height:26px;background:var(--accent);color:#fff;
  border-radius:6px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  font-size:.7rem;font-weight:700;flex-shrink:0;
}
.qcs-name{flex:1;font-size:.84rem;font-weight:600;}
.qcs-cat{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   PIN OVERLAY
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.pin-overlay{
  position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.95);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:9500;
  opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--t);
}
.pin-overlay.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
.pin-box{
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:22px;padding:36px;text-align:center;width:320px;
}
.pin-inputs{display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin:20px 0;}
.pin-input{
  width:46px;height:52px;text-align:center;font-size:1.4rem;font-weight:700;
  background:var(--bg-card);border:2px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
  color:var(--text-primary);outline:none;transition:var(--t);
}
.pin-input:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
.pin-numpad{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:6px;margin:10px 0;}
.pin-num-btn{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:10px;padding:12px;font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;
  cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.pin-num-btn:hover{background:var(--accent);border-color:var(--accent);color:#fff;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   CHANNEL PREVIEW HOVER
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.ch-preview{
  position:fixed;z-index:900;background:var(--bg-secondary);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:12px;
  padding:9px;width:220px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);display:none;
}
.ch-preview.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn .12s ease-out;}
.ch-prev-video{width:100%;height:118px;background:#000;border-radius:8px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:7px;border:1px solid var(--border);}
.ch-prev-video video{width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:cover;}
.ch-prev-name{font-weight:600;font-size:.8rem;margin-bottom:2px;}
.ch-prev-cat{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.ch-prev-epg{
  margin-top:5px;padding-top:5px;border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  font-size:.65rem;color:var(--text-muted);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   MODALS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.modal-bg{
  position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.78);
  backdrop-filter:blur(6px);-webkit-backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;z-index:5000;
  opacity:0;visibility:hidden;transition:var(--t);
}
.modal-bg.show{opacity:1;visibility:visible;}
.modal{
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:20px;padding:22px;width:92%;max-width:520px;
  max-height:88vh;overflow-y:auto;
  transform:scale(.93) translateY(10px);transition:transform .25s;
}
.modal-bg.show .modal{transform:scale(1) translateY(0);}
.modal-head{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:16px;}
.modal-title{font-size:1rem;font-weight:700;}
.modal-x{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:none;color:var(--text-secondary);
  width:28px;height:28px;border-radius:7px;cursor:pointer;font-size:.85rem;
  display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;transition:var(--t);
}
.modal-x:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}

/* Form elements */
.fg{margin-bottom:12px;}
.fl{display:block;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--text-secondary);margin-bottom:4px;}
.fi,.ft,.fsel{
  width:100%;padding:8px 11px;background:var(--bg-card);
  border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:9px;
  color:var(--text-primary);font-size:.83rem;outline:none;transition:var(--t);
}
.fi:focus,.ft:focus,.fsel:focus{border-color:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px var(--accent-glow);}
.ft{resize:vertical;min-height:80px;font-family:'Courier New',monospace;}
.fsel{cursor:pointer;}
.fi-row{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:8px;}
.fi-hint{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--text-muted);margin-top:3px;}

/* Buttons */
.btn{
  padding:8px 14px;border:none;border-radius:9px;font-size:.83rem;
  font-weight:600;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
  display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;
}
.btn-p{background:var(--gradient-main);color:#fff;}
.btn-p:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:var(--shadow-accent);}
.btn-p:active{transform:translateY(0);}
.btn-s{background:var(--bg-card);color:var(--text-secondary);border:1px solid var(--border);}
.btn-s:hover{background:var(--bg-hover);color:var(--text-primary);}
.btn-danger{background:rgba(239,68,68,.1);color:var(--danger);border:1px solid rgba(239,68,68,.3);}
.btn-danger:hover{background:var(--danger);color:#fff;}
.btn-success{background:rgba(16,185,129,.1);color:var(--success);border:1px solid rgba(16,185,129,.3);}
.btn-success:hover{background:var(--success);color:#fff;}
.btn-full{width:100%;justify-content:center;}
.btn-row{display:flex;gap:7px;justify-content:flex-end;margin-top:14px;}
.btn-sm{padding:5px 10px;font-size:.75rem;}
.btn-xs{padding:3px 7px;font-size:.68rem;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   TOASTS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.toast-stack{
  position:fixed;top:14px;right:14px;z-index:99998;
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:6px;pointer-events:none;
}
.toast{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:10px;
  padding:9px 14px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;min-width:250px;
  max-width:340px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);pointer-events:all;
  animation:toastIn .28s ease-out;
}
.toast.out{animation:toastOut .28s forwards;}
.t-ok{border-left:3px solid var(--success);}
.t-err{border-left:3px solid var(--danger);}
.t-warn{border-left:3px solid var(--warning);}
.t-info{border-left:3px solid var(--accent4);}
.toast-icon{font-size:.95rem;flex-shrink:0;}
.toast-msg{font-size:.8rem;font-weight:500;flex:1;}
.toast-close{
  background:none;border:none;color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;
  font-size:.75rem;padding:2px;flex-shrink:0;
}
@keyframes toastIn{from{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
@keyframes toastOut{to{transform:translateX(110%);opacity:0;}}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ★ NEW: PWA INSTALL BANNER (v7.0)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.pwa-banner{
  position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;z-index:1000;
  background:var(--bg-glass);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);
  border-top:1px solid var(--border);padding:12px 16px;
  display:none;align-items:center;gap:12px;
  animation:slideUp .3s ease-out;
}
.pwa-banner.show{display:flex;}
@keyframes slideUp{from{transform:translateY(100%);}to{transform:none;}}
.pwa-icon{font-size:2rem;}
.pwa-info{flex:1;}
.pwa-info h4{font-size:.86rem;font-weight:700;margin-bottom:2px;}
.pwa-info p{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   GESTURE HELP
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.gesture-help{
  position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9500;background:rgba(0,0,0,.92);
  display:none;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:30px;
}
.gesture-help.show{display:flex;animation:fadeIn .2s;}
.gesture-grid{
  display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(130px,1fr));
  gap:10px;max-width:620px;width:100%;
}
.gesture-card{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:12px;padding:14px 10px;text-align:center;
}
.gesture-card-icon{font-size:1.9rem;margin-bottom:6px;}
.gesture-card-text{font-size:.72rem;color:var(--text-secondary);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ABOUT PAGE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.about-page{flex:1;overflow-y:auto;padding:30px;max-width:700px;}
.about-feats{
  background:var(--bg-card);border-radius:14px;padding:20px;
  line-height:2.1;font-size:.8rem;color:var(--text-secondary);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   TOOLTIPS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
[data-tip]{position:relative;}
[data-tip]:hover::after{
  content:attr(data-tip);position:absolute;bottom:calc(100% + 6px);left:50%;
  transform:translateX(-50%);background:rgba(0,0,0,.9);color:#fff;
  font-size:.65rem;padding:4px 8px;border-radius:6px;white-space:nowrap;
  pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   FULLSCREEN MODE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.fs-mode .sidebar,.fs-mode .ch-panel,.fs-mode .topbar,
.fs-mode .mini-player,.fs-mode .panels-area,
.fs-mode .quick-bar{display:none!important;}
.fs-mode .player-area{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:9990;}
.fs-mode .osd,.fs-mode .p-controls{opacity:0;}
.fs-mode .video-wrap:hover .osd,
.fs-mode .video-wrap:hover .p-controls{opacity:1;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   ANIMATIONS & UTILS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:1;}50%{opacity:.4;}}
@keyframes slideD{from{transform:translateY(-10px);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
@keyframes scaleIn{from{transform:scale(.8);opacity:0;}to{transform:scale(1);opacity:1;}}
@keyframes shimmer{
  from{background-position:-200% 0;}to{background-position:200% 0;}
}
.shimmer{
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--bg-card) 25%,var(--bg-hover) 50%,var(--bg-card) 75%);
  background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.5s infinite;border-radius:6px;
}
.random-shuffle{animation:rShuf .6s ease-in-out;}
@keyframes rShuf{0%{transform:rotate(0);}25%{transform:rotate(15deg) scale(1.1);}50%{transform:rotate(-15deg) scale(1.1);}75%{transform:rotate(5deg);}100%{transform:rotate(0);}}
.pulse-border{animation:pBorder 2s ease-in-out infinite;}
@keyframes pBorder{0%,100%{border-color:var(--accent);}50%{border-color:transparent;}}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   RESPONSIVE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@media(max-width:1200px){
  :root{--sb-width:240px;}
}
@media(max-width:1100px){
  .sidebar{position:fixed;left:-280px;height:100%;z-index:600;box-shadow:none;}
  .sidebar.open{left:0;box-shadow:6px 0 32px rgba(0,0,0,.6);}
  .mob-menu-btn{display:flex;}
}
@media(max-width:820px){
  .ch-panel{
    position:fixed;left:0;top:0;height:100%;width

<!-- ── SPLASH ── -->
<div class="splash" id="splash">
  <div class="splash-particles" id="splashParticles"></div>
  <div class="splash-logo">📺</div>
  <h1>MODÜL TV</h1>
  <div class="splash-v">ULTRA IPTV PLAYER</div>

    <span class="splash-chip">v7.0</span>
    <span class="splash-chip">2026</span>
    <span class="splash-chip">Yeni ✦</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── TOAST STACK ── -->
<div class="toast-stack" id="toastStack"></div>

<!-- ── SIDEBAR ── -->
<div class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
  <div class="sb-logo-wrap">
    <span class="sb-logo">MODÜL TV</span>
    <button class="sb-toggle-btn" id="sidebarToggle" title="Sidebar boyutu">☰</button>
  </div>
  <div class="sb-scroll">
    <div class="sb-section">Ana Menü</div>
    <div class="sb-item active" data-page="home" onclick="showPage('home')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">🏠</span><span class="sb-text">Ana Sayfa</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Ana Sayfa</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="player" onclick="showPage('player')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">📺</span><span class="sb-text">Oynatıcı</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Oynatıcı</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="multiview" onclick="showPage('multiview')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">🔲</span><span class="sb-text">Çoklu Görüntü</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Çoklu Görüntü</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="epg" onclick="showPage('epg')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">📋</span><span class="sb-text">EPG Rehber</span>
      <span class="sb-badge hot">Yeni</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">EPG Rehber</span>
    </div>

    <div class="sb-section">Araçlar</div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="tools" onclick="showPage('tools')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">🛠️</span><span class="sb-text">Araçlar</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Araçlar</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="party" onclick="showPage('party')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">🎉</span><span class="sb-text">Watch Party</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Watch Party</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="cast" onclick="showPage('cast')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">📡</span><span class="sb-text">Yayınla</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Yayınla</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="worldclock" onclick="showPage('worldclock')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">🌍</span><span class="sb-text">Dünya Saati</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Dünya Saati</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="snapshots" onclick="showPage('snapshots')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">🖼️</span><span class="sb-text">Ekran Görüntüleri</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Ekran Görüntüleri</span>
    </div>

    <div class="sb-section">Veri & Rapor</div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="stats" onclick="showPage('stats')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">📊</span><span class="sb-text">İstatistikler</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">İstatistikler</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="audit" onclick="showPage('audit')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">📝</span><span class="sb-text">Kayıt Günlüğü</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Kayıt Günlüğü</span>
    </div>
    <div class="sb-item" data-page="about" onclick="showPage('about')">
      <span class="sb-item-icon">ℹ️</span><span class="sb-text">Hakkında</span>
      <span class="sb-tooltip">Hakkında</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ── MAIN ── -->
<div class="main">

  <!-- TOPBAR -->
  <div class="topbar">
    <button class="mob-menu-btn" id="mobMenuBtn">☰</button>
    <div class="search-wrap">
      <span class="si">🔍</span>
      <input type="text" id="searchInput" placeholder="Kanal ara, komut gir (/ ile)..." oninput="onSearch(this.value)">
      <button class="search-clear" onclick="clearSearch()">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="tb-right">
      <button class="tb-icon-btn" id="voiceBtn" onclick="toggleVoice()" title="Sesli komut">🎤<span class="dot"></span></button>
      <button class="tb-icon-btn" id="notifBtn" onclick="toggleNotif()" title="Bildirimler">🔔<span class="dot" id="notifDot"></span></button>
      <button class="tb-icon-btn" id="cmdBtn" onclick="toggleCmd()" title="Komut paleti (Ctrl+K)">⚡</button>
      <span class="tb-clock" id="tbClock"></span>
    </div>
  </div>

  <!-- CONTENT -->
  <div class="content">

    <!-- ═══════════ PAGE: HOME ═══════════ -->
    <div class="page active" id="page-home">
      <div class="grid-page">
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('player')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">📺</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Oynatıcı</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Kanal izle</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('multiview')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">🔲</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Çoklu Görüntü</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Aynı anda izle</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('epg')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">📋</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">EPG Rehber</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Program çizelgesi</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('tools')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">🛠️</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Araçlar</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Kayıt, ayarlar</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('party')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">🎉</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Watch Party</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Birlikte izle</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('cast')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">📡</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Yayınla</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Chromecast</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('worldclock')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">🌍</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Dünya Saati</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Saat dilimleri</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('snapshots')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">🖼️</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Ekran Görüntüleri</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Galeri</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="showPage('stats')">
          <div class="g-card-icon">📊</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">İstatistikler</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Kullanım verileri</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="randomChannel()">
          <div class="g-card-icon">🎲</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Rastgele</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">Şansına kanal</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="exportData()">
          <div class="g-card-icon">💾</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Veri Dışa Aktar</div>
          <div class="g-card-sub">JSON</div>
        </div>
        <div class="g-card" onclick="importData()">
          <div class="g-card-icon">📥</div>
          <div class="g-card-name">Veri İç
