```css
/* ════ RESPONSIVE (devam) ════ */
@media(max-width:820px){
  .ch-panel{
    position:fixed;left:-320px;top:0;height:100%;
    width:var(--ch-panel-w)!important;min-width:var(--ch-panel-w)!important;
    z-index:550;transition:left .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);
    box-shadow:none;
  }
  .ch-panel.open{left:0;box-shadow:8px 0 40px rgba(0,0,0,.7);}
  .mob-overlay{
    position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);z-index:540;
    display:none;backdrop-filter:blur(3px);
  }
  .mob-overlay.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn .2s;}
  .ai-rec-strip{display:none;}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(2,1fr);}
  .ple-sidebar{width:220px;min-width:220px;}
  .wp-sidebar{width:220px;min-width:220px;}
}
@media(max-width:600px){
  :root{--topbar-h:50px;}
  .tb-clock{display:none;}
  .search-wrap{max-width:none;}
  .grid-page{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(130px,1fr));}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}
  .ple-page{flex-direction:column;}
  .ple-sidebar{width:100%;min-width:100%;max-height:200px;}
  .wp-page{flex-direction:column;}
  .wp-sidebar{width:100%;min-width:100%;height:200px;border-left:none;border-top:1px solid var(--border);}
  .vr-wrap{right:8px;bottom:70px;width:180px;}
  .pip-win{width:260px;height:150px;}
  .notif-center{width:100%;border-radius:0;}
  .cmd-box{width:97%;}
  .cast-page{padding:16px;}
  .dir-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(155px,1fr));}
  .modal{padding:16px;}
  .epg-ch-label{min-width:110px;max-width:110px;}
  .epg-time-ruler{padding-left:110px;}
  .wc-grid{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(115px,1fr));}
  .vf-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
}
@media(max-width:420px){
  .tb-right .tb-btn:nth-child(n+5){display:none;}
  .grid-page{grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(110px,1fr));}
  .stats-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}
  .epg-head .epg-ch-name{display:none;}
  .ph-suggest{gap:5px;}
  .suggest-chip{min-width:80px;}
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   THEME VARIANTS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
/* Amoled */
[data-theme="amoled"]{
  --bg-primary:#000000;--bg-secondary:#080808;
  --bg-card:#0f0f0f;--bg-hover:#161616;--border:#1a1a1a;
}
/* Blue */
[data-theme="blue"]{
  --accent:#2563eb;--accent-glow:rgba(37,99,235,.35);
  --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#1d4ed8,#06b6d4);
}
/* Purple */
[data-theme="purple"]{
  --accent:#7c3aed;--accent-glow:rgba(124,58,237,.35);
  --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#7c3aed,#db2777);
}
/* Green */
[data-theme="green"]{
  --accent:#059669;--accent-glow:rgba(5,150,105,.35);
  --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#059669,#06b6d4);
}
/* Gold */
[data-theme="gold"]{
  --accent:#d97706;--accent-glow:rgba(217,119,6,.35);
  --gradient-main:linear-gradient(135deg,#d97706,#ef4444);
}
/* Navy */
[data-theme="navy"]{
  --bg-primary:#070b18;--bg-secondary:#0d1325;
  --bg-card:#141d36;--bg-hover:#1c2848;--border:#1e2d4a;
}
/* Light */
[data-theme="light"]{
  --bg-primary:#f0f0f8;--bg-secondary:#ffffff;
  --bg-card:#f8f8ff;--bg-hover:#eeeef8;--border:#e0e0ef;
  --text-primary:#1a1a2e;--text-secondary:#4a4a6a;--text-muted:#9090b0;
  --bg-glass:rgba(255,255,255,.92);
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   CINEMATIC MODE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.cinema-mode .sidebar,.cinema-mode .topbar,
.cinema-mode .ch-panel,.cinema-mode .panels-area,
.cinema-mode .ai-rec-strip{display:none!important;}
.cinema-mode .app{background:#000;}
.cinema-mode .player-area{flex:1;}
.cinema-mode .video-wrap video{object-fit:cover;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   GRID LAYOUT PREVIEW CARDS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.layout-grid{display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-top:8px;}
.layout-card{
  width:72px;height:52px;border:2px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:8px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:2px;padding:4px;
}
.layout-card:hover{border-color:var(--text-secondary);}
.layout-card.active{border-color:var(--accent);}
.layout-cell-p{background:var(--bg-hover);border-radius:3px;flex:1;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   STREAM URL BADGE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.url-badge{
  background:var(--bg-card);border:1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius:8px;padding:7px 10px;font-size:.67rem;
  font-family:'Courier New',monospace;color:var(--text-muted);
  white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;
  cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
}
.url-badge:hover{border-color:var(--accent4);color:var(--text-primary);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   CHART / BITRATE AREA
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.chart-wrap{position:relative;height:100px;margin-top:7px;}
.chart-canvas{width:100%;height:100%;display:block;border-radius:8px;}
.chart-overlay{
  position:absolute;top:6px;right:8px;font-size:.65rem;
  font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums;color:var(--accent4);font-weight:700;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   LOADING SKELETON
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.skel{
  background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--bg-card) 25%,var(--bg-hover) 50%,var(--bg-card) 75%);
  background-size:200% 100%;animation:shimmer 1.4s infinite;
  border-radius:6px;
}
.skel-ch{height:52px;border-radius:9px;margin-bottom:3px;}
.skel-title{height:12px;width:65%;margin-bottom:5px;}
.skel-sub{height:9px;width:42%;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   SECTION BANNER
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec-banner{
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;
  padding:14px 16px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(229,9,20,.06),rgba(229,9,20,.01));
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);flex-shrink:0;
}
.sec-banner-icon{font-size:1.5rem;}
.sec-banner-title{font-weight:800;font-size:1rem;}
.sec-banner-sub{font-size:.74rem;color:var(--text-muted);}
.sec-banner-actions{margin-left:auto;display:flex;gap:5px;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   EMPTY STATE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.empty{
  display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;padding:50px 20px;text-align:center;
  color:var(--text-muted);height:100%;
}
.empty-icon{font-size:3.5rem;opacity:.3;margin-bottom:14px;}
.empty-title{font-size:.95rem;font-weight:600;margin-bottom:6px;color:var(--text-secondary);}
.empty-sub{font-size:.78rem;margin-bottom:18px;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   PROGRESS RINGS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.prog-ring{position:relative;width:52px;height:52px;flex-shrink:0;}
.prog-ring svg{transform:rotate(-90deg);}
.prog-ring-val{
  position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   STEP INDICATOR
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.step-bar{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:4px;margin-bottom:14px;}
.step-dot{
  width:8px;height:8px;border-radius:50%;
  background:var(--border);transition:var(--t);
}
.step-dot.done{background:var(--success);}
.step-dot.active{background:var(--accent);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--accent-glow);}
.step-line{flex:1;height:2px;background:var(--border);border-radius:2px;}
.step-line.done{background:var(--success);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   MISC HELPERS
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.hidden{display:none!important;}
.invisible{visibility:hidden!important;}
.flex{display:flex;}
.flex-col{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.flex-1{flex:1;}
.items-center{align-items:center;}
.gap-2{gap:8px;}
.gap-1{gap:4px;}
.mt-1{margin-top:4px;}.mt-2{margin-top:8px;}.mt-3{margin-top:12px;}
.mb-1{margin-bottom:4px;}.mb-2{margin-bottom:8px;}
.text-muted{color:var(--text-muted);}
.text-accent{color:var(--accent);}
.text-success{color:var(--success);}
.text-danger{color:var(--danger);}
.text-warn{color:var(--warning);}
.fw-7{font-weight:700;}.fw-8{font-weight:800;}
.fs-sm{font-size:.78rem;}.fs-xs{font-size:.68rem;}
.rounded{border-radius:var(--radius);}
.w-full{width:100%;}
.center{text-align:center;}
.no-select{user-select:none;-webkit-user-select:none;}
.truncate{white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis;}
.grad-text{
  background:var(--gradient-main);-webkit-background-clip:text;
  -webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   MOBILE OVERLAY
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.mob-overlay{
  position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.55);
  z-index:540;display:none;backdrop-filter:blur(3px);
}
.mob-overlay.show{display:block;animation:fadeIn .2s;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   DRAG & DROP ZONE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.drop-zone{
  border:2px dashed var(--border);border-radius:12px;
  padding:30px;text-align:center;transition:var(--t);cursor:pointer;
}
.drop-zone:hover,.drop-zone.drag-over{
  border-color:var(--accent);background:rgba(229,9,20,.05);
}
.drop-zone-icon{font-size:2.5rem;opacity:.4;margin-bottom:8px;}
.drop-zone-text{font-size:.82rem;color:var(--text-muted);}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   SCROLL HINT FADE
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.scroll-fade{
  position:relative;overflow:hidden;
}
.scroll-fade::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
  height:40px;pointer-events:none;
  background:linear-gradient(transparent,var(--bg-secondary));
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   SECTION TAB BAR (EPG / Stats sayfaları)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.tab-bar{
  display:flex;gap:2px;padding:0 14px;
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);
  flex-shrink:0;overflow-x:auto;
}
.tab-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{height:0;}
.tab-item{
  padding:9px 14px;font-size:.78rem;font-weight:600;
  color:var(--text-muted);cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;
  border-bottom:2px solid transparent;transition:var(--t);
}
.tab-item:hover{color:var(--text-primary);}
.tab-item.active{color:var(--accent);border-bottom-color:var(--accent);}
.tab-panel{display:none;flex:1;overflow:hidden;}
.tab-panel.active{display:flex;flex-direction:column;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   STREAM QUALITY INDICATOR
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.quality-row{
  display:flex;align-items:flex-end;gap:2px;height:18px;
}
.quality-bar{
  width:4px;border-radius:2px;background:var(--border);transition:var(--t);
}
.quality-bar.on{background:var(--accent);}
.quality-bar:nth-child(1){height:6px;}
.quality-bar:nth-child(2){height:10px;}
.quality-bar:nth-child(3){height:14px;}
.quality-bar:nth-child(4){height:18px;}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   CHANNEL SORT HANDLE ANIMATION
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.ch-item.dragging{
  opacity:.5;transform:scale(0.97);
  border:1px dashed var(--accent)!important;background:rgba(229,9,20,.05)!important;
}
.ch-item.drag-over{
  border-top:2px solid var(--accent)!important;
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   BOTTOM NAV (Mobile)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
.bottom-nav{
  display:none;position:fixed;bottom:0;left:0;right:0;
  background:var(--bg-secondary);border-top:1px solid var(--border);
  z-index:700;padding:5px 0 env(safe-area-inset-bottom);
}
.bottom-nav.show{display:flex;}
.bn-items{display:flex;width:100%;}
.bn-item{
  flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;
  justify-content:center;gap:3px;padding:6px 4px;cursor:pointer;transition:var(--t);
  color:var(--text-muted);font-size:.6rem;border:none;background:none;
}
.bn-item.active{color:var(--accent);}
.bn-item-icon{font-size:1.15rem;transition:var(--t);}
.bn-item.active .bn-item-icon{transform:translateY(-2px);}

@media(max-width:600px){
  .bottom-nav{display:flex;}
  .topbar{display:none;}
  .sidebar{display:none!important;}
  .content{padding-bottom:52px;}
  .mini-player{bottom:52px;}
  .vr-wrap{bottom:70px;}
  .bw-widget{bottom:66px;}
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════
   PRINT (Playlist export preview)
════════════════════════════════════════════ */
@media print{
  .sidebar,.topbar,.ch-panel,.p-controls,
  .mini-player,.toast-stack,.ctx-menu{display:none!important;}
  body{background:#fff;color:#000;}
}

/* ════ END CSS ════ */
</style>
</head>
```

```html
<body data-theme="dark">

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     SPLASH SCREEN
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="splash" id="splash">
  <canvas class="splash-particles" id="splashCanvas"></canvas>
  <div class="splash-inner">
    <div class="splash-logo">
      <span class="splash-logo-icon">📺</span>
      <span class="splash-logo-text">StreamVault<span class="grad-text">Pro</span></span>
    </div>
    <div class="splash-tagline">Next-Gen IPTV Experience</div>
    <div class="splash-bar-wrap">
      <div class="splash-bar" id="splashBar"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="splash-status" id="splashStatus">Başlatılıyor…</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     TOAST STACK
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="toast-stack" id="toastStack"></div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     CONTEXT MENU
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="ctx-menu" id="ctxMenu">
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="play">
    <span class="ctx-icon">▶️</span> Oynat
  </div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="fav">
    <span class="ctx-icon">⭐</span> Favorilere Ekle
  </div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="addlist">
    <span class="ctx-icon">📋</span> Listeye Ekle
  </div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="timer">
    <span class="ctx-icon">⏺️</span> Kayıt Zamanlayıcı
  </div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="info">
    <span class="ctx-icon">ℹ️</span> Kanal Bilgisi
  </div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="copy">
    <span class="ctx-icon">🔗</span> URL Kopyala
  </div>
  <div class="ctx-sep"></div>
  <div class="ctx-item ctx-danger" data-action="remove">
    <span class="ctx-icon">🗑️</span> Kaldır
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     COMMAND PALETTE
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="cmd-overlay" id="cmdOverlay">
  <div class="cmd-box">
    <div class="cmd-search-row">
      <span class="cmd-search-icon">⌨️</span>
      <input class="cmd-input" id="cmdInput"
             placeholder="Kanal ara, komut çalıştır…" autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false"/>
      <kbd class="cmd-esc">ESC</kbd>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-results" id="cmdResults">
      <div class="cmd-section-label">📺 Son Kanallar</div>
      <div id="cmdRecentList"></div>
      <div class="cmd-section-label" style="margin-top:8px">⚡ Hızlı Komutlar</div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="epg">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">📅</span>
        <div><div class="cmd-item-name">EPG Aç</div>
        <div class="cmd-item-sub">Yayın akışı takvimi</div></div>
        <kbd>E</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="stats">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">📊</span>
        <div><div class="cmd-item-name">İstatistikler</div>
        <div class="cmd-item-sub">Ağ & oynatıcı metrikleri</div></div>
        <kbd>S</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="screenshot">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">📸</span>
        <div><div class="cmd-item-name">Ekran Görüntüsü</div>
        <div class="cmd-item-sub">Mevcut kareyi kaydet</div></div>
        <kbd>P</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="fullscreen">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">⛶</span>
        <div><div class="cmd-item-name">Tam Ekran</div>
        <div class="cmd-item-sub">Tam ekrana geç / çık</div></div>
        <kbd>F</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="theme">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">🎨</span>
        <div><div class="cmd-item-name">Tema Değiştir</div>
        <div class="cmd-item-sub">Renk temasını döngüle</div></div>
        <kbd>T</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="pip">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">🖼️</span>
        <div><div class="cmd-item-name">Picture-in-Picture</div>
        <div class="cmd-item-sub">Kayan pencere modunu aç</div></div>
        <kbd>I</kbd>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     MOBILE OVERLAY
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="mob-overlay" id="mobOverlay"></div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     NOTIFICATION CENTER
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="notif-center" id="notifCenter">
  <div class="notif-header">
    <span class="notif-title">🔔 Bildirimler</span>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="clearAllNotif" title="Tümünü Temizle">🗑️</button>
  </div>
  <div class="notif-list" id="notifList">
    <div class="empty">
      <div class="empty-icon">🔕</div>
      <div class="empty-title">Bildirim yok</div>
      <div class="empty-sub">Yeni bildirimler burada görünür</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     MINI PLAYER
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="mini-player hidden" id="miniPlayer">
  <div class="mp-thumb-wrap">
    <video class="mp-thumb" id="mpThumbVideo" muted></video>
    <div class="mp-thumb-overlay">
      <button class="mp-btn" id="mpPlayBtn" title="Oynat/Durdur">⏸</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="mp-info">
    <div class="mp-ch-name truncate" id="mpChName">—</div>
    <div class="mp-prog truncate" id="mpProg">—</div>
    <div class="mp-prog-bar">
      <div class="mp-prog-fill" id="mpProgFill" style="width:0%"></div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="mp-actions">
    <button class="mp-btn" id="mpExpand" title="Genişlet">⬆️</button>
    <button class="mp-btn" id="mpClose" title="Kapat">✕</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     PIP WINDOW
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="pip-win hidden" id="pipWin">
  <div class="pip-title-bar" id="pipTitleBar">
    <span class="pip-ch-name" id="pipChName">—</span>
    <div class="pip-btns">
      <button class="pip-btn" id="pipFullBtn" title="Ana ekrana taşı">⬆️</button>
      <button class="pip-btn" id="pipCloseBtn" title="Kapat">✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <video class="pip-video" id="pipVideo" autoplay muted playsinline></video>
  <div class="pip-controls">
    <button class="pip-ctrl-btn" id="pipPlayBtn">⏸</button>
    <button class="pip-ctrl-btn" id="pipMuteBtn">🔊</button>
    <input class="pip-vol" id="pipVol" type="range" min="0" max="1" step=".05" value="1"/>
  </div>
  <div class="pip-resize-handle" id="pipResize">↔</div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     VIRTUAL REMOTE
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="vr-wrap hidden" id="vrWrap">
  <div class="vr-remote">
    <div class="vr-header">
      <span class="vr-title">📱 Kumanda</span>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="vrClose">✕</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Power + Source -->
    <div class="vr-row">
      <button class="vr-btn vr-red" data-vk="power" title="Güç">⏻</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="source" title="Kaynak">🔄</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="menu" title="Menü">☰</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="info" title="Bilgi">ℹ️</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Volume + Channel -->
    <div class="vr-row">
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="vol_up" title="Ses +">🔊+</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="mute" title="Sessiz">🔇</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="ch_up" title="Kanal +">📺+</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="prev_ch" title="Önceki">↩</button>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-row">
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="vol_dn" title="Ses -">🔈-</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="epg" title="EPG">📅</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="ch_dn" title="Kanal -">📺-</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="fav" title="Favori">⭐</button>
    </div>

    <!-- D-Pad -->
    <div class="vr-dpad-wrap">
      <div class="vr-dpad">
        <button class="vr-dp-btn vr-up" data-vk="up">▲</button>
        <button class="vr-dp-btn vr-left" data-vk="left">◀</button>
        <button class="vr-dp-btn vr-ok" data-vk="ok">OK</button>
        <button class="vr-dp-btn vr-right" data-vk="right">▶</button>
        <button class="vr-dp-btn vr-dn" data-vk="down">▼</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Playback -->
    <div class="vr-row">
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="rew" title="Geri sar">⏮</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="play" title="Oynat/Durdur">⏯</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="fwd" title="İleri sar">⏭</button>
      <button class="vr-btn" data-vk="rec" title="Kayıt">⏺</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Color Buttons -->
    <div class="vr-row vr-color-row">
      <button class="vr-btn vr-c-red" data-vk="col_red">■</button>
      <button class="vr-btn vr-c-green" data-vk="col_green">■</button>
      <button class="vr-btn vr-c-yellow" data-vk="col_yellow">■</button>
      <button class="vr-btn vr-c-blue" data-vk="col_blue">■</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Numpad -->
    <div class="vr-numpad" id="vrNumpad">
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="1">1</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="2">2</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="3">3</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="4">4</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="5">5</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="6">6</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="7">7</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="8">8</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="9">9</button>
      <button class="vr-num vr-num-wide" data-vk="0">0</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="backspace">⌫</button>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-ch-display" id="vrChDisplay">—</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     BANDWIDTH WIDGET
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="bw-widget" id="bwWidget">
  <div class="bw-row">
    <span class="bw-icon">⬇️</span>
    <span class="bw-val" id="bwDown">0 Mbps</span>
  </div>
  <div class="bw-row">
    <span class="bw-icon">📶</span>
    <span class="bw-val" id="bwBuf">—</span>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     PWA INSTALL BANNER
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="pwa-banner hidden" id="pwaBanner">
  <div class="pwa-icon">📲</div>
  <div class="pwa-text">
    <div class="pwa-title">Uygulamayı Yükle</div>
    <div class="pwa-sub">Ana ekrana ekleyerek daha iyi deneyim yaşa</div>
  </div>
  <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pwaInstallBtn">Yükle</button>
  <button class="icon-btn" id="pwaDismiss">✕</button>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     MAIN APP WRAPPER
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div class="app" id="app">

  <!-- ══ SIDEBAR ══ -->
  <aside class="sidebar" id="sidebar">
    <div class="sb-logo" id="sbLogoWrap">
      <span class="sb-logo-icon">📺</span>
      <span class="sb-logo-text">Stream<b>Vault</b></span>
    </div>

    <nav class="sb-nav" id="sbNav">
      <a class="sb-item active" data-page="live" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📡</span>
        <span class="sb-label">Canlı TV</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="movies" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">🎬</span>
        <span class="sb-label">Filmler</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="series" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📺</span>
        <span class="sb-label">Diziler</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="epg" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📅</span>
        <span class="sb-label">EPG</span>
        <span class="sb-badge" id="epgBadge">CANLI</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="favorites" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⭐</span>
        <span class="sb-label">Favoriler</span>
        <span class="sb-count" id="favCount">0</span>
      </a>
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="dvr" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⏺️</span>
        <span class="sb-label">DVR / Kayıtlar</span>
        <span class="sb-dot rec-dot hidden" id="recDot"></span>
      </a>

      <!-- Sub-menu: Araçlar -->
      <div class="sb-group" id="sbGroupTools">
        <div class="sb-group-hdr" data-group="tools">
          <span class="sb-icon">🛠️</span>
          <span class="sb-label">Araçlar</span>
          <span class="sb-chevron">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sb-sub" id="sbSubTools">
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="playlist" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">📋</span>
            <span class="sb-label">Playlist Editör</span>
          </a>
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="catchup" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">📼</span>
            <span class="sb-label">Catch-Up TV</span>
          </a>
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="stats" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">📊</span>
            <span class="sb-label">İstatistikler</span>
          </a>
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="directory" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">🗂️</span>
            <span class="sb-label">IPTV Dizin</span>
          </a>
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="cast" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">📡</span>
            <span class="sb-label">Yayın Yap</span>
          </a>
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="watchparty" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">🎉</span>
            <span class="sb-label">Watch Party</span>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Sub-menu: AI -->
      <div class="sb-group" id="sbGroupAI">
        <div class="sb-group-hdr" data-group="ai">
          <span class="sb-icon">🤖</span>
          <span class="sb-label">AI Asistan</span>
          <span class="sb-badge" style="background:#7c3aed">YENİ</span>
          <span class="sb-chevron">›</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sb-sub" id="sbSubAI">
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_rec" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">💡</span>
            <span class="sb-label">Öneriler</span>
          </a>
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_search" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">🔍</span>
            <span class="sb-label">Akıllı Arama</span>
          </a>
          <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_sum" href="#">
            <span class="sb-icon">📝</span>
            <span class="sb-label">İçerik Özeti</span>
          </a>
        </div>
      </div>

      <a class="sb-item" data-page="settings" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⚙️</span>
        <span class="sb-label">Ayarlar</span>
      </a>
    </nav>

    <div class="sb-bottom">
      <div class="sb-storage">
        <div class="sb-storage-row">
          <span class="fs-xs text-muted">DVR Depolama</span>
          <span class="fs-xs" id="dvrStorageText">0 / 50 GB</span>
        </div>
        <div class="sb-storage-bar">
          <div class="sb-storage-fill" id="dvrStorageFill" style="width:0%"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="sb-version">v4.2.0 • StreamVault Pro</div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- ══ TOPBAR ══ -->
  <header class="topbar" id="topbar">
    <div class="tb-left">
      <button class="tb-btn" id="sidebarToggle" title="Kenar Çubuğu (Alt+S)">☰</button>
      <button class="tb-btn mob-only" id="mobMenuBtn" title="Menü">📺</button>
      <div class="tb-breadcrumb" id="tbBreadcrumb">
        <span class="tb-bc-home">Ana Sayfa</span>
        <span class="tb-bc-sep">›</span>
        <span class="tb-bc-current" id="tbBcCurrent">Canlı TV</span>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="tb-center">
      <div class="search-wrap" id="searchWrap">
        <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
        <input class="search-input" id="globalSearch"
               placeholder="Kanal, film veya program ara…"
               autocomplete="off" spellcheck="false"/>
        <button class="search-voice-btn" id="voiceSearchBtn" title="Sesli Arama">🎤</button>
        <kbd class="search-kbd" id="searchKbd">Ctrl+K</kbd>
        <div class="search-dropdown" id="searchDropdown"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <div class="tb-right">
      <span class="tb-clock" id="tbClock">00:00:00</span>
      <button class="tb-btn" id="tbVrBtn" title="Sanal Kumanda">📱</button>
      <button class="tb-btn" id="tbCmdBtn" title="Komut Paleti (Ctrl+K)">⌨️</button>
      <button class="tb-btn" id="tbNotifBtn" title="Bildirimler">
        🔔<span class="tb-notif-dot hidden" id="tbNotifDot"></span>
      </button>
      <button class="tb-btn" id="tbScreenshotBtn" title="Ekran Görüntüsü">📸</button>
      <button class="tb-btn" id="tbFullBtn" title="Tam Ekran (F11)">⛶</button>
      <div class="tb-avatar" id="tbAvatar" title="Profil">
        <span id="tbAvatarText">U</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </header>

  <!-- ══ AI RECOMMENDATION STRIP ══ -->
  <div class="ai-rec-strip" id="aiRecStrip">
    <div class="ai-rec-label">
      <span>🤖</span> AI Önerileri
    </div>
    <div class="ai-rec-scroll" id="aiRecScroll">
      <!-- JS tarafından doldurulur -->
    </div>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="aiRecRefresh" title="Yenile">🔄</button>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="aiRecDismiss" title="Gizle">✕</button>
  </div>

  <!-- ══ CONTENT AREA ══ -->
  <main class="content" id="content">

    <!-- ── PAGE: LIVE TV ── -->
    <div class="page active" id="page-live">
      <div class="live-layout" id="liveLayout">

        <!-- Channel Panel -->
        <div class="ch-panel" id="chPanel">
          <div class="ch-panel-header">
            <div class="ch-search-wrap">
              <span class="ch-search-icon">🔍</span>
              <input class="ch-search" id="chSearch" placeholder="Kanal ara…" autocomplete="off"/>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="chSearchClear" title="Temizle">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="ch-filter-row">
              <button class="ch-filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Tümü</button>
              <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="fav">⭐ Favori</button>
              <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="hd">HD</button>
              <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="4k">4K</button>
              <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="online">🟢 Çevrimiçi</button>
            </div>
            <div class="ch-sort-row">
              <select class="ch-sort-sel" id="chSort">
                <option value="default">Varsayılan Sıra</option>
                <option value="alpha">A–Z</option>
                <option value="alpha_rev">Z–A</option>
                <option value="quality">Kalite</option>
                <option value="status">Durum</option>
              </select>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="chCollapseBtn" title="Grupları Daralt">⬆️</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Category Tabs -->
          <div class="cat-tabs" id="catTabs">
            <!-- JS ile doldurulur -->
          </div>

          <!-- Channel List -->
          <div class="ch-list" id="chList">
            <div class="empty">
              <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
              <div class="empty-title">Playlist Yükle</div>
              <div class="empty-sub">M3U veya Xtream bağlantısı ekle</div>
              <button class="btn" id="chEmptyAddBtn">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <div class="ch-panel-footer">
            <span class="fs-xs text-muted" id="chCountLabel">0 kanal</span>
            <button class="icon-btn" id="chPanelSort" title="Sürükle & Bırak Sırala">↕️</button>
            <button class="icon-btn" id="chAddBtn" title="Kaynak Ekle">➕</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Player Area -->
        <div class="player-area" id="playerArea">
          <!-- Video Wrap -->
          <div class="video-wrap" id="videoWrap">
            <video id="mainVideo" class="main-video"
                   playsinline autoplay
                   poster="data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'/%3E">
            </video>

            <!-- Loader -->
            <div class="vid-loader" id="vidLoader">
              <div class="vid-spinner"></div>
              <div class="vid-loader-text" id="vidLoaderText">Bağlanıyor…</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Error -->
            <div class="vid-error hidden" id="vidError">
              <div class="vid-err-icon">📡❌</div>
              <div class="vid-err-msg" id="vidErrMsg">Akış yüklenemedi</div>
              <div class="vid-err-sub" id="vidErrSub">Lütfen bağlantınızı kontrol edin</div>
              <div class="vid-err-btns">
                <button class="btn btn-sm" id="retryBtn">🔄 Tekrar Dene</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="altStreamBtn">🔀 Alternatif</button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Idle Screen -->
            <div class="vid-idle" id="vidIdle">
              <div class="idle-logo">📺</div>
              <div class="idle-text">StreamVault <span class="grad-text">Pro</span></div>
              <div class="idle-sub">Oynatmak için bir kanal seçin</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Seek / Volume OSD -->
            <div class="osd-overlay hidden" id="osdOverlay">
              <div class="osd-icon" id="osdIcon">⏸</div>
              <div class="osd-text" id="osdText"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Channel Switch OSD -->
            <div class="ch-osd hidden" id="chOsd">
              <div class="ch-osd-logo" id="chOsdLogo">📺</div>
              <div class="ch-osd-info">
                <div class="ch-osd-num" id="chOsdNum">—</div>
                <div class="ch-osd-name" id="chOsdName">—</div>
                <div class="ch-osd-prog" id="chOsdProg">—</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Spectrum Visualizer -->
            <canvas class="spectrum" id="spectrumCanvas"></canvas>

            <!-- Player Controls -->
            <div class="p-controls" id="pControls">
              <div class="pc-progress" id="pcProgressWrap">
                <div class="pc-prog-bar" id="pcProgBar">
                  <div class="pc-prog-fill" id="pcProgFill" style="width:0%"></div>
                  <div class="pc-prog-thumb" id="pcProgThumb"></div>
                  <div class="pc-prog-tooltip hidden" id="pcProgTooltip">00:00</div>
                </div>
                <div class="pc-prog-labels">
                  <span class="pc-time" id="pcTimeCur">CANLI</span>
                  <span class="pc-prog-name" id="pcProgName">—</span>
                  <span class="pc-time" id="pcTimeEnd">—</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="pc-main-row">
                <div class="pc-left">
                  <button class="pc-btn pc-play" id="pcPlay" title="Oynat/Durdur (Space)">▶</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPrev" title="Önceki Kanal">⏮</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcNext" title="Sonraki Kanal">⏭</button>
                  <div class="pc-vol-group">
                    <button class="pc-btn" id="pcMute" title="Sessiz (M)">🔊</button>
                    <input class="pc-vol" id="pcVol" type="range"
                           min="0" max="1" step=".02" value="1"
                           title="Ses Seviyesi"/>
                  </div>
                  <div class="pc-ch-info">
                    <span class="pc-ch-name" id="pcChName">—</span>
                    <span class="pc-live-badge">● CANLI</span>
                  </div>
                </div>

                <div class="pc-right">
                  <div class="quality-row" id="pcQuality" title="Sinyal Kalitesi">
                    <div class="quality-bar" id="qb1"></div>
                    <div class="quality-bar" id="qb2"></div>
                    <div class="quality-bar" id="qb3"></div>
                    <div class="quality-bar" id="qb4"></div>
                  </div>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSubBtn" title="Altyazı">CC</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcAudioBtn" title="Ses Kanalı">🎵</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSpeedBtn" title="Oynatma Hızı">1×</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcZoomBtn" title="Zoom">🔎</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPipBtn" title="Picture-in-Picture">🖼️</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcMiniBtn" title="Mini Player">📌</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcRecBtn" title="Kayıt">⏺</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSettingsBtn" title="Player Ayarları">⚙️</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn" id="pcCinemaBtn" title="Sinema Modu">🎬</button>
                  <button class="pc-btn pc-fs" id="pcFullscreen" title="Tam Ekran (F)">⛶</button>
                </div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- EPG Now/Next Strip -->
          <div class="epg-strip" id="epgStrip">
            <div class="epg-strip-inner">
              <div class="epg-strip-section">
                <div class="epg-strip-label">ŞİMDİ</div>
                <div class="epg-strip-prog" id="epgNow">
                  <div class="skel skel-title"></div>
                  <div class="skel skel-sub"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="epg-strip-bar">
                  <div class="epg-strip-fill" id="epgNowFill" style="width:0%"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="epg-strip-divider">›</div>
              <div class="epg-strip-section">
                <div class="epg-strip-label">SIRA</div>
                <div class="epg-strip-prog" id="epgNext">
                  <div class="skel skel-title"></div>
                  <div class="skel skel-sub"></div>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="epg-strip-actions">
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="epgStripMore">Tümü ›</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Player Settings Panel -->
          <div class="player-settings hidden" id="playerSettings">
            <div class="ps-header">
              <span class="fw-7">⚙️ Oynatıcı Ayarları</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="psClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="ps-body">
              <div class="settings-section">
                <div class="settings-label">Video</div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Parlaklık</span>
                  <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="psBrightness"
                         min="0.5" max="2" step="0.05" value="1"/>
                  <span class="settings-val" id="psBrightnessVal">100%</span>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Kontrast</span>
                  <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="psContrast"
                         min="0.5" max="2" step="0.05" value="1"/>
                  <span class="settings-val" id="psContrastVal">100%</span>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Doygunluk</span>
                  <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="psSaturation"
                         min="0" max="2" step="0.05" value="1"/>
                  <span class="settings-val" id="psSaturationVal">100%</span>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Keskinlik</span>
                  <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="psSharpness"
                         min="0" max="3" step="0.1" value="0"/>
                  <span class="settings-val" id="psSharpnessVal">0</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="settings-section">
                <div class="settings-label">Ses</div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Ses Yükseltici</span>
                  <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="psBoost"
                         min="1" max="4" step="0.1" value="1"/>
                  <span class="settings-val" id="psBoostVal">1×</span>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Equalizer</span>
                  <select class="settings-select" id="psEQ">
                    <option value="flat">Düz</option>
                    <option value="bass">Bass Boost</option>
                    <option value="treble">Tiz Boost</option>
                    <option value="vocal">Vokal</option>
                    <option value="cinema">Sinema</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Ses Gecikmesi</span>
                  <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="psAudioDelay"
                         min="-3000" max="3000" step="50" value="0"/>
                  <span class="settings-val" id="psAudioDelayVal">0ms</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="settings-section">
                <div class="settings-label">Altyazı</div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Boyut</span>
                  <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="psSubSize"
                         min="12" max="40" step="1" value="18"/>
                  <span class="settings-val" id="psSubSizeVal">18px</span>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Gecikme</span>
                  <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="psSubDelay"
                         min="-5000" max="5000" step="100" value="0"/>
                  <span class="settings-val" id="psSubDelayVal">0ms</span>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Renk</span>
                  <input type="color" id="psSubColor" value="#ffffff"/>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="settings-section">
                <div class="settings-label">Ağ</div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Buffer Boyutu</span>
                  <select class="settings-select" id="psBuffer">
                    <option value="30">30 sn</option>
                    <option value="60" selected>60 sn</option>
                    <option value="120">120 sn</option>
                    <option value="300">5 dk</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
                <div class="settings-row">
                  <span>Max Bant Genişliği</span>
                  <select class="settings-select" id="psBandwidth">
                    <option value="0">Otomatik</option>
                    <option value="2000000">2 Mbps</option>
                    <option value="5000000">5 Mbps</option>
                    <option value="10000000">10 Mbps</option>
                    <option value="25000000">25 Mbps</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mt-2" id="psReset">🔄 Varsayılana Sıfırla</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Panels Area (EPG, Info, Chat) -->
        <div class="panels-area hidden" id="panelsArea">
          <div class="tab-bar">
            <div class="tab-item active" data-panel="epg-now">📅 EPG</div>
            <div class="tab-item" data-panel="ch-info">ℹ️ Bilgi</div>
            <div class="tab-item" data-panel="chat">💬 Chat</div>
          </div>

          <!-- EPG Now Panel -->
          <div class="tab-panel active" id="panel-epg-now">
            <div class="ep-panel-list" id="epNowList">
              <!-- JS ile doldurulur -->
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Channel Info Panel -->
          <div class="tab-panel" id="panel-ch-info">
            <div class="ch-info-wrap" id="chInfoWrap">
              <div class="empty">
                <div class="empty-icon">ℹ️</div>
                <div class="empty-title">Kanal seçin</div>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Chat Panel -->
          <div class="tab-panel" id="panel-chat">
            <div class="chat-msgs" id="chatMsgs"></div>
            <div class="chat-input-row">
              <input class="chat-input" id="chatInput" placeholder="Mesaj yaz…" maxlength="200"/>
              <button class="btn btn-sm" id="chatSend">Gönder</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: EPG (Full) ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-epg">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">📅</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">Yayın Akışı (EPG)</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub">7 günlük program rehberi</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <select class="settings-select" id="epgDaySelect">
            <!-- JS ile doldurulur -->
          </select>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="epgJumpNow">Şimdi</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="epgExportBtn">📥 Dışa Aktar</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="epg-page" id="epgPage">
        <div class="epg-time-ruler" id="epgRuler"></div>
        <div class="epg-grid-scroll" id="epgGridScroll">
          <div class="epg-grid" id="epgGrid">
            <!-- JS ile doldurulur -->
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: MOVIES ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-movies">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">🎬</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">Filmler</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub" id="moviesCountLabel">0 film</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <select class="settings-select" id="moviesGenre">
            <option value="all">Tüm Türler</option>
          </select>
          <select class="settings-select" id="moviesSort">
            <option value="default">Sıra</option>
            <option value="alpha">A–Z</option>
            <option value="year">Yıl</option>
            <option value="rating">Puan</option>
          </select>
          <button class="tb-btn" id="moviesViewGrid" title="Grid">⊞</button>
          <button class="tb-btn" id="moviesViewList" title="Liste">☰</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ph-suggest" id="moviesSuggest"></div>
      <div class="grid-page" id="moviesGrid"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: SERIES ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-series">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">📺</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">Diziler</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub" id="seriesCountLabel">0 dizi</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <select class="settings-select" id="seriesGenre">
            <option value="all">Tüm Türler</option>
          </select>
          <button class="tb-btn" id="seriesViewGrid" title="Grid">⊞</button>
          <button class="tb-btn" id="seriesViewList" title="Liste">☰</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-page" id="seriesGrid"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: FAVORITES ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-favorites">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">⭐</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">Favoriler</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub" id="favCountLabel">0 öğe</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="favClearBtn">🗑️ Tümünü Temizle</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="favExportBtn">📥 Dışa Aktar</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ch-list-page" id="favList">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">⭐</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Favori Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Kanallara ⭐ tıklayarak favorilere ekle</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: DVR ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-dvr">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">⏺️</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">DVR & Kayıtlar</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub" id="dvrCountLabel">0 kayıt</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="dvrNewTimer">+ Zamanlayıcı</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dvrCleanup">🧹 Temizle</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-bar">
        <div class="tab-item active" data-dvr="recordings">📁 Kayıtlar</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="timers">⏰ Zamanlayıcılar</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="schedule">📅 Takvim</div>
      </div>
      <div class="dvr-content" id="dvrContent">
        <div class="dvr-list" id="dvrList">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">⏺️</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Kayıt Yok</div>
            <div class="empty-sub">DVR zamanlayıcısı ekleyerek program kaydedebilirsin</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: STATS ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-stats">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">📊</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">İstatistikler & Diagnostik</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub">Gerçek zamanlı ağ & oynatıcı metrikleri</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="statsExport">📥 CSV</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="statsReset">🔄 Sıfırla</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="stats-page" id="statsPage">
        <div class="stats-grid" id="statsGrid">
          <!-- JS ile doldurulur -->
        </div>
        <div class="chart-wrap" style="margin:16px">
          <canvas class="chart-canvas" id="bitrateChart"></canvas>
          <div class="chart-overlay" id="chartOverlay">0 Mbps</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: PLAYLIST EDITOR ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-playlist">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">📋</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">Playlist Editör</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub">M3U, Xtream & JSON desteği</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pleImportBtn">📂 İçe Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pleExportBtn">💾 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pleNewBtn">+ Yeni</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ple-page" id="plePage">
        <div class="ple-sidebar" id="pleSidebar">
          <div class="ple-list" id="pleList"></div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mt-2" id="pleAddSource">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
        </div>
        <div class="ple-editor" id="pleEditor">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Playlist Seç</div>
            <div class="empty-sub">Sol taraftan bir playlist seç veya yeni oluştur</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: CATCHUP ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-catchup">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">📼</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">Catch-Up TV</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub">Kaçırılan programları izle</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="catchup-grid" id="catchupGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📼</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Catch-Up Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Kanalınız catch-up desteklemiyor olabilir</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: DIRECTORY ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-directory">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">🗂️</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">IPTV Dizin</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub">Ücretsiz & lisanslı kanal listeleri</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="dirRefresh">🔄 Güncelle</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ph-suggest" id="dirCategories"></div>
      <div class="dir-grid" id="dirGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🗂️</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Yükleniyor…</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: CAST ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-cast">
      <div class="cast-page" id="castPage">
        <div class="cast-header">
          <div class="cast-icon">📡</div>
          <div class="cast-title">Yayın Yap</div>
          <div class="cast-sub">Chromecast, AirPlay veya DLNA cihazına gönder</div>
        </div>
        <div class="cast-devices" id="castDevices">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Cihaz Aranıyor…</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn w-full mt-2" id="castScanBtn">🔄 Cihazları Tara</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: WATCH PARTY ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-watchparty">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">🎉</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">Watch Party</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub">Arkadaşlarınla birlikte izle</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wp-page" id="wpPage">
        <div class="wp-main" id="wpMain">
          <div class="empty" id="wpEmpty">
            <div class="empty-icon">🎉</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Watch Party Başlat</div>
            <div class="empty-sub">Oda oluştur veya mevcut bir odaya katıl</div>
            <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;margin-top:14px">
              <button class="btn" id="wpCreateBtn">+ Oda Oluştur</button>
              <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="wpJoinBtn">🔗 Odaya Katıl</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="wp-sidebar" id="wpSidebar">
          <div class="wp-sidebar-header">
            <span class="fw-7">👥 Katılımcılar</span>
            <span class="fs-xs text-muted" id="wpMemberCount">0</span>
          </div>
          <div class="wp-members" id="wpMembers"></div>
          <div class="wp-chat">
            <div class="chat-msgs" id="wpChatMsgs"></div>
            <div class="chat-input-row">
              <input class="chat-input" id="wpChatInput" placeholder="Mesaj…" maxlength="150"/>
              <button class="btn btn-sm" id="wpChatSend">›</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: AI ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-ai_rec">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">🤖</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">AI Öneriler</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub">İzleme alışkanlıklarına göre kişisel öneriler</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="aiRefreshBtn">🔄 Yenile</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="wc-grid" id="aiRecGrid">
        <!-- JS ile doldurulur -->
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ── PAGE: SETTINGS ── -->
    <div class="page" id="page-settings">
      <div class="sec-banner">
        <span class="sec-banner-icon">⚙️</span>
        <div>
          <div class="sec-banner-title">Ayarlar</div>
          <div class="sec-banner-sub">Uygulama tercihleri ve yapılandırma</div>
        </div>
        <div class="sec-banner-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="settingsReset">↩ Sıfırla</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="settingsSave">💾 Kaydet</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="settings-page" id="settingsPage">

        <!-- General -->
        <div class="settings-block">
          <div class="settings-block-title">🌐 Genel</div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Dil</span>
            <select class="settings-select" id="setLang">
              <option value="tr">Türkçe</option>
              <option value="en">English</option>
              <option value="de">Deutsch</option>
              <option value="fr">Français</option>
              <option value="ar">العربية</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Tema</span>
            <select class="settings-select" id="setTheme">
              <option value="dark">Koyu (Varsayılan)</option>
              <option value="amoled">AMOLED Siyah</option>
              <option value="navy">Gece Mavisi</option>
              <option value="light">Açık</option>
              <option value="blue">Mavi</option>
              <option value="purple">Mor</option>
              <option value="green">Yeşil</option>
              <option value="gold">Altın</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Arayüz Animasyonları</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAnimations" checked/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Kompakt Sidebar</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setSidebarCompact"/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Saat Dilimi</span>
            <select class="settings-select" id="setTZ">
              <option value="auto">Otomatik</option>
              <option value="Europe/Istanbul">Türkiye (UTC+3)</option>
              <option value="UTC">UTC</option>
              <option value="Europe/London">Londra (UTC+0/+1)</option>
              <option value="America/New_York">New York (UTC-5/-4)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Playback -->
        <div class="settings-block">
          <div class="settings-block-title">▶️ Oynatma</div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Otomatik Oynat</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAutoplay" checked/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Otomatik Kalite</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAutoQuality" checked/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Varsayılan Ses</span>
            <input type="range" class="settings-slider" id="setDefVol"
                   min="0" max="1" step=".05" value="1"/>
            <span class="settings-val" id="setDefVolVal">100%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>HLS Motoru</span>
            <select class="settings-select" id="setHlsEngine">
              <option value="hls">hls.js</option>
              <option value="native">Native</option>
              <option value="shaka">Shaka Player</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Low Latency Modu</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setLowLatency"/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Notifications -->
        <div class="settings-block">
          <div class="settings-block-title">🔔 Bildirimler</div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Program Başlangıç Bildirimi</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifProg" checked/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>DVR Bildirimi</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifDvr" checked/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Bildirim Sesi</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifSound" checked/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Privacy -->
        <div class="settings-block">
          <div class="settings-block-title">🔒 Gizlilik</div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>İzleme Geçmişi Kaydet</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setHistory" checked/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Analitik Gönder</span>
            <label class="toggle">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAnalytics"/>
              <span class="toggle-track"><span class="toggle-thumb"></span></span>
            </label>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Tüm Verileri Sil</span>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger)" id="setNukeData">
              🗑️ Sil
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- About -->
        <div class="settings-block">
          <div class="settings-block-title">ℹ️ Hakkında</div>
          <div class="settings-row"><span>Sürüm</span><span class="text-muted">v4.2.0</span></div>
          <div class="settings-row"><span>Build</span><span class="text-muted" id="setBuildDate">—</span></div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Güncelleme Kontrol</span>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="setCheckUpdate">🔄 Kontrol Et</button>
          </div>
          <div class="settings-row">
            <span>Kısayollar</span>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="setShowKeys">⌨️ Göster</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </main><!-- /content -->

  <!-- ══ MOBILE BOTTOM NAV ══ -->
  <nav class="bottom-nav" id="bottomNav">
    <div class="bn-items">
      <button class="bn-item active" data-page="live">
        <span class="bn-item-icon">📡</span>Canlı
      </button>
      <button class="bn-item" data-page="movies">
        <span class="bn-item-icon">🎬</span>Filmler
      </button>
      <button class="bn-item" data-page="epg">
        <span class="bn-item-icon">📅</span>EPG
      </button>
      <button class="bn-item" data-page="favorites">
        <span class="bn-item-icon">⭐</span>Favori
      </button>
      <button class="bn-item" data-page="settings">
        <span class="bn-item-icon">⚙️</span>Ayarlar
      </button>
    </div>
  </nav>

</div><!-- /app -->

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     MODALS
════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<!-- Add Source Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop hidden" id="modal-addSource">
  <div class="modal">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">📡 Kaynak Ekle</span>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="step-bar" id="addSourceSteps">
        <div class="step-dot active" id="step1dot"></div>
        <div class="step-line" id="step1line"></div>
        <div class="step-dot" id="step2dot"></div>
        <div class="step-line" id="step2line"></div>
        <div class="step-dot" id="step3dot"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Step 1: Type -->
      <div id="addStep1">
        <div class="modal-section-label">Kaynak Türü</div>
        <div class="source-type-grid">
          <div class="source-type-card active" data-type="m3u">
            <div class="source-type-icon">📄</div>
            <div class="source-type-name">M3U / M3U8</div>
            <div class="source-type-sub">URL veya dosya</div>
          </div>
          <div class="source-type-card" data-type="xtream">
            <div class="source-type-icon">🌐</div>
            <div class="source-type-name">Xtream Codes</div>
            <div class="source-type-sub">API bağlantısı</div>
          </div>
          <div class="source-type-card" data-type="json">
            <div class="source-type-icon">📊</div>
            <div class="source-type-name">JSON</div>
            <div class="source-type-sub">Özel format</div>
          </div>
          <div class="source-type-card" data-type="file">
            <div class="source-type-icon">📁</div>
            <div class="source-type-name">Dosya Yükle</div>
            <div class="source-type-sub">Yerel M3U</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Step 2: Credentials -->
      <div id="addStep2" class="hidden">
        <!-- M3U -->
        <div id="addM3uForm">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Playlist Adı</label>
            <input class="form-input" id="addM3uName" placeholder="Benim Kanallarım"/>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">M3U URL</label>
            <input class="form-input" id="addM3uUrl"
                   placeholder="http://example.com/playlist.m3u"/>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">EPG URL (opsiyonel)</label>
            <input class="form-input" id="addM3uEpg"
                   placeholder="http://example.com/epg.xml.gz"/>
          </div>
          <div class="form-row">
            <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
              <label class="form-label">Yenileme (saat)</label>
              <input class="form-input" id="addM3uRefresh" type="number"
                     min="0" max="168" value="24"/>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
              <label class="form-label">UserAgent</label>
              <input class="form-input" id="addM3uUA" placeholder="Varsayılan"/>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Xtream -->
        <div id="addXtreamForm" class="hidden">
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Sunucu URL</label>
            <input class="form-input" id="addXtHost" placeholder="http://server.com:8080"/>
          </div>
          <div class="form-row">
            <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
              <label class="form-label">Kullanıcı Adı</label>
              <input class="form-input" id="addXtUser" placeholder="username"/>
            </div>
            <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
              <label class="form-label">Şifre</label>
              <input class="form-input" id="addXtPass" type="password" placeholder="••••••"/>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group">
            <label class="form-label">Çıktı Formatı</label>
            <select class="form-input" id="addXtFormat">
              <option value="ts">TS</option>
              <option value="m3u8">M3U8</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- File Upload -->
        <div id="addFileForm" class="hidden">
          <div class="drop-zone" id="m3uDropZone">
            <div class="drop-zone-icon">📁</div>
            <div class="drop-zone-text">M3U dosyasını buraya sürükle veya tıkla</div>
            <input type="file" id="m3uFileInput" accept=".m3u,.m3u8,.json"
                   style="display:none"/>
          </div>
          <div class="form-group mt-2">
            <label class="form-label">Kaynak Adı</label>
            <input class="form-input" id="addFileName" placeholder="Yüklenen Playlist"/>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Step 3: Preview -->
      <div id="addStep3" class="hidden">
        <div class="add-preview" id="addPreview">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">⏳</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Analiz ediliyor…</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="addSourceBack">‹ Geri</button>
      <button class="btn" id="addSourceNext">İleri ›</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Keyboard Shortcuts Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop hidden" id="modal-keys">
  <div class="modal" style="max-width:520px">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">⌨️ Klavye Kısayolları</span>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="keysModalBody">
      <!-- JS ile doldurulur -->
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EPG Detail Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop hidden" id="modal-epg-detail">
  <div class="modal" style="max-width:560px">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title" id="epgDetailTitle">Program Detayı</span>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="epgDetailBody"></div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">Kapat</button>
      <button class="btn" id="epgDetailRecord">⏺ Kayıt Ekle</button>
      <button class="btn" id="epgDetailPlay">▶ Oynat</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DVR Timer Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop hidden" id="modal-dvr-timer">
  <div class="modal" style="max-width:480px">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">⏰ DVR Zamanlayıcı</span>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Kanal</label>
        <select class="form-input" id="dvrTimerCh"></select>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
          <label class="form-label">Başlangıç</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="datetime-local" id="dvrTimerStart"/>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
          <label class="form-label">Bitiş</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="datetime-local" id="dvrTimerEnd"/>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Kayıt Adı</label>
        <input class="form-input" id="dvrTimerName" placeholder="Otomatik"/>
      </div>
      <div class="form-row">
        <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
          <label class="form-label">Tekrar</label>
          <select class="form-input" id="dvrTimerRepeat">
            <option value="none">Yok</option>
            <option value="daily">Her Gün</option>
            <option value="weekly">Her Hafta</option>
            <option value="weekdays">Haftaiçi</option>
          </select>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
          <label class="form-label">Önce Margin (dk)</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="number" id="dvrTimerMarginPre"
                 min="0" max="60" value="2"/>
        </div>
        <div class="form-group" style="flex:1">
          <label class="form-label">Sonra Margin (dk)</label>
          <input class="form-input" type="number" id="dvrTimerMarginPost"
                 min="0" max="60" value="5"/>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button>
      <button class="btn" id="dvrTimerSave">💾 Kaydet</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Watch Party Join Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop hidden" id="modal-wp-join">
  <div class="modal" style="max-width:400px">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">🔗 Odaya Katıl</span>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Oda Kodu</label>
        <input class="form-input" id="wpRoomCode" placeholder="XXXX-XXXX"
               maxlength="9" style="text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:3px;font-size:1.1rem"/>
      </div>
      <div class="form-group">
        <label class="form-label">Kullanıcı Adı</label>
        <input class="form-input" id="wpJoinUsername" placeholder="Kullanıcı adın"/>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button>
      <button class="btn" id="wpJoinConfirm">Katıl →</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Confirm Modal (generic) -->
<div class="modal-backdrop hidden" id="modal-confirm">
  <div class="modal" style="max-width:380px">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title" id="confirmTitle">Emin misin?</span>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <p id="confirmMsg" style="color:var(--text-secondary);line-height:1.6"></p>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button>
      <button class="btn" id="confirmOk" style="background:var(--danger)">Onayla</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Screenshot Preview Modal -->
<div class="modal-backdrop hidden" id="modal-screenshot">
  <div class="modal" style="max-width:700px">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <span class="modal-title">📸 Ekran Görüntüsü</span>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body center">
      <img id="screenshotImg" style="width:100%;border-radius:8px;max-height:400px;object-fit:contain"/>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">Kapat</button>
      <button class="btn" id="screenshotDownload">💾 İndir</button>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="screenshotCopy">📋 Kopyala</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     HIDDEN CANVAS (Screenshot)
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<canvas id="screenshotCanvas" style="display:none"></canvas>

<!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
     EXTERNAL SCRIPTS
════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/hls.js@1.5.7/dist/hls.min.js"></script>
```

## ✅ BÖLÜM 2 TAMAMLANDI

### 📊 Bölüm 2 Özeti:

| Bileşen | Açıklama |
|---------|---------|
| **Splash Screen** | Canvas parçacıklı + progress |
| **Toast Stack** | Dinamik bildirim kapsayıcısı |
| **Context Menu** | 7 eylemli sağ tık menüsü |
| **Command Palette** | Fuzzy arama + hızlı komutlar |
| **Mini Player** | Yapışık köşe oynatıcı |
| **PIP Window** | Sürüklenebilir pencere |
| **Virtual Remote** | D-Pad + numpad + renk tuşları |
| **Sidebar** | Sub-menü gruplarıyla tam nav |
| **9 Ana Sayfa** | Live, EPG, Movies, Series, DVR, Stats, Playlist, Cast, WatchParty |
| **Player** | Kontroller + OSD + ayar paneli |
| **7 Modal** | AddSource, Keys, EPG, DVR, WatchParty, Confirm, Screenshot |
| **Bottom Nav** | Mobil 5 sekme navigasyon |
