    Bus.on('channelsLoaded', () => {
      const sel = $('dvrTimerCh');
      STATE.channels.forEach(c => {
        const o = document.createElement('option');
        o.value = c.id; o.textContent = c.name;
        sel.appendChild(o);
      });
    });

    /* check timers every minute */
    setInterval(() => this._checkTimers(), 60000);
    this.render('recordings');
    this.updateStorage();
  },

  toggleRecord(){
    if(STATE.isRecording) this.stopRecord();
    else this.startRecord();
  },

  startRecord(){
    if(!STATE.currentChannel){ Toast.show('Önce bir kanal seçin','warning'); return; }
    STATE.isRecording = true;
    $('pcRecBtn').classList.add('recording');
    $('recDot').classList.remove('hidden');
    const rec = {
      id: Utils.uid(),
      channelId: STATE.currentChannel.id,
      channelName: STATE.currentChannel.name,
      title: STATE.currentChannel.name,
      start: new Date().toISOString(),
      end: null,
      size: 0,
      status: 'recording',
    };
    STATE.recordings.unshift(rec);
    STATE._activeRec = rec;

    /* simulate size growth */
    STATE.recInterval = setInterval(() => {
      if(STATE._activeRec){
        STATE._activeRec.size += Utils.randomInt(500000,2000000);
        this.updateStorage();
      }
    }, 1000);

    NotifCenter.push(`⏺ Kayıt başladı: ${STATE.currentChannel.name}`, 'info', '⏺️');
    Toast.show('⏺ Kayıt başladı', 'record');
    this.render('recordings');
    Persist.save();
  },

  stopRecord(){
    STATE.isRecording = false;
    $('pcRecBtn').classList.remove('recording');
    $('recDot').classList.add('hidden');
    clearInterval(STATE.recInterval);
    if(STATE._activeRec){
      STATE._activeRec.end    = new Date().toISOString();
      STATE._activeRec.status = 'done';
      STATE._activeRec = null;
    }
    Toast.show('⏹ Kayıt durduruldu', 'info');
    this.render('recordings');
    Persist.save();
  },

  addTimer(cfg){
    const t = {
      id: Utils.uid(),
      channelId  : cfg.channelId,
      channelName: cfg.channelName,
      title      : cfg.title || cfg.channelName,
      start      : cfg.start,
      end        : cfg.end,
      repeat     : cfg.repeat || 'none',
      marginPre  : cfg.marginPre || 2,
      marginPost : cfg.marginPost || 5,
      status     : 'scheduled',
    };
    STATE.timers.push(t);
    Persist.save();
    NotifCenter.push(`⏰ Zamanlayıcı eklendi: ${t.title}`, 'success','⏰');
    Toast.show('⏰ Zamanlayıcı eklendi', 'success');
    this.render('timers');
  },

  _saveTimer(){
    const ch    = STATE.channels.find(c=>c.id===$('dvrTimerCh').value);
    const start = $('dvrTimerStart').value;
    const end   = $('dvrTimerEnd').value;
    if(!ch || !start || !end){ Toast.show('Lütfen tüm alanları doldurun','warning'); return; }
    this.addTimer({
      channelId   : ch.id,
      channelName : ch.name,
      title       : $('dvrTimerName').value || ch.name,
      start       : new Date(start).toISOString(),
      end         : new Date(end).toISOString(),
      repeat      : $('dvrTimerRepeat').value,
      marginPre   : +$('dvrTimerMarginPre').value,
      marginPost  : +$('dvrTimerMarginPost').value,
    });
    Modal.close();
  },

  _checkTimers(){
    const now = new Date();
    STATE.timers.filter(t=>t.status==='scheduled').forEach(t => {
      const start = new Date(new Date(t.start).getTime() - t.marginPre*60000);
      if(now >= start){
        t.status = 'recording';
        Channels.playById(t.channelId);
        this.startRecord();
        NotifCenter.push(`⏺ Zamanlayıcı başladı: ${t.title}`,'info','⏺️');
      }
    });
    STATE.timers.filter(t=>t.status==='recording').forEach(t => {
      const end = new Date(new Date(t.end).getTime() + t.marginPost*60000);
      if(now >= end){
        t.status = 'done';
        this.stopRecord();
      }
    });
    Persist.save();
  },

  _cleanup(){
    STATE.recordings = STATE.recordings.filter(r=>r.status!=='done' || r.status==='recording');
    this.render('recordings');
    Toast.show('🧹 Kayıtlar temizlendi','info');
    Persist.save();
  },

  render(tab='recordings'){
    const el = $('dvrList');
    if(tab==='recordings'){
      if(!STATE.recordings.length){
        el.innerHTML = `
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">⏺️</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Kayıt Yok</div>
            <div class="empty-sub">DVR zamanlayıcısı ekleyerek program kaydedebilirsin</div>
          </div>`;
        return;
      }
      el.innerHTML = STATE.recordings.map(r => `
        <div class="dvr-item">
          <div class="dvr-item-icon">${r.status==='recording'?'🔴':'📁'}</div>
          <div class="dvr-item-info">
            <div class="dvr-item-title">${Utils.escapeHtml(r.title)}</div>
            <div class="dvr-item-meta">
              ${Utils.formatTime(new Date(r.start))}
              ${r.end ? ` – ${Utils.formatTime(new Date(r.end))}` : ' (devam ediyor)'}
              • ${Utils.formatBytes(r.size)}
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="dvr-item-actions">
            ${r.status==='done'?'<button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost dvr-play-btn">▶</button>':''}
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost dvr-del-btn" data-id="${r.id}">🗑️</button>
          </div>
        </div>`).join('');

      el.querySelectorAll('.dvr-del-btn').forEach(btn =>
        btn.addEventListener('click', () => {
          STATE.recordings = STATE.recordings.filter(r=>r.id!==btn.dataset.id);
          this.render('recordings');
          Persist.save();
        })
      );
    } else if(tab==='timers'){
      el.innerHTML = STATE.timers.length
        ? STATE.timers.map(t => `
          <div class="dvr-item">
            <div class="dvr-item-icon">⏰</div>
            <div class="dvr-item-info">
              <div class="dvr-item-title">${Utils.escapeHtml(t.title)}</div>
              <div class="dvr-item-meta">
                ${Utils.escapeHtml(t.channelName)} •
                ${Utils.formatTime(new Date(t.start))} – ${Utils.formatTime(new Date(t.end))} •
                ${t.status}
              </div>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" data-id="${t.id}">🗑️</button>
          </div>`).join('')
        : '<div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">⏰</div><div class="empty-title">Zamanlayıcı Yok</div></div>';
    }
  },

  updateStorage(){
    const used = STATE.recordings.reduce((s,r)=>s+r.size,0);
    STATE.dvrUsedGB = used / 1e9;
    const pct = (STATE.dvrUsedGB / STATE.dvrTotalGB * 100).toFixed(1);
    $('dvrStorageFill').style.width = pct+'%';
    $('dvrStorageText').textContent =
      `${STATE.dvrUsedGB.toFixed(2)} / ${STATE.dvrTotalGB} GB`;
    $('dvrCountLabel').textContent = `${STATE.recordings.length} kayıt`;
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   18.  FAVORITES
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const Favorites = {
  render(){
    const el = $('favList');
    const favChs = STATE.channels.filter(c=>STATE.favorites.has(c.id));
    $('favCount').textContent      = STATE.favorites.size;
    $('favCountLabel').textContent = `${STATE.favorites.size} öğe`;

    if(!favChs.length){
      el.innerHTML = `
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">⭐</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Favori Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Kanallara ⭐ tıklayarak favorilere ekle</div>
        </div>`;
      return;
    }

    el.innerHTML = favChs.map(ch => `
      <div class="ch-item" data-id="${ch.id}">
        <div class="ch-item-logo">
          ${ch.logo ? `<img src="${Utils.escapeHtml(ch.logo)}" alt="" loading="lazy">` : '<span class="ch-item-logo-ph">📺</span>'}
        </div>
        <div class="ch-item-info">
          <div class="ch-item-name">${Utils.escapeHtml(ch.name)}</div>
          <div class="ch-item-meta"><span class="quality-badge">${ch.quality}</span> ${Utils.escapeHtml(ch.group)}</div>
        </div>
        <div class="ch-item-actions">
          <button class="ch-fav-btn fav-active" data-id="${ch.id}">⭐</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost fav-play-btn" data-id="${ch.id}">▶</button>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');

    el.querySelectorAll('.fav-play-btn').forEach(btn =>
      btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>Channels.playById(btn.dataset.id)));
    el.querySelectorAll('.ch-fav-btn').forEach(btn =>
      btn.addEventListener('click', ()=>Channels.toggleFav(btn.dataset.id)));
  },

  init(){
    $('favClearBtn').addEventListener('click', () => {
      Modal.confirm('Tüm favorileri sil', 'Bu işlem geri alınamaz.', () => {
        STATE.favorites.clear();
        this.render();
        Persist.save();
      });
    });
    $('favExportBtn').addEventListener('click', () => this.export());
    this.render();
  },

  export(){
    const favChs = STATE.channels.filter(c=>STATE.favorites.has(c.id));
    const m3u = '#EXTM3U\n' + favChs.map(ch =>
      `#EXTINF:-1 tvg-logo="${ch.logo}" group-title="${ch.group}",${ch.name}\n${ch.url}`
    ).join('\n');
    this._download(m3u, 'favoriler.m3u', 'audio/x-mpegurl');
    Toast.show('📥 Favoriler dışa aktarıldı', 'success');
  },

  _download(content, filename, mime){
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href  = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([content],{type:mime}));
    a.download = filename;
    a.click();
    URL.revokeObjectURL(a.href);
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   19.  PIP WINDOW
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const PIP = {
  _drag: { active:false, offX:0, offY:0 },
  _resize: { active:false, startX:0, startW:0, startH:0 },

  init(){
    const win   = $('pipWin');
    const video = $('pipVideo');
    const bar   = $('pipTitleBar');

    $('pipCloseBtn').addEventListener('click',  () => this.close());
    $('pipFullBtn').addEventListener('click',   () => this.popOut());
    $('pipPlayBtn').addEventListener('click',   () => this.togglePlay());
    $('pipMuteBtn').addEventListener('click',   () => this.toggleMute());
    $('pipVol').addEventListener('input',       e  => { video.volume = +e.target.value; });

    /* drag */
    bar.addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
      this._drag.active = true;
      this._drag.offX   = e.clientX - win.offsetLeft;
      this._drag.offY   = e.clientY - win.offsetTop;
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', this._onDrag.bind(this));
      document.addEventListener('mouseup',   this._stopDrag.bind(this));
    });

    /* resize */
    $('pipResize').addEventListener('mousedown', e => {
      this._resize.active = true;
      this._resize.startX = e.clientX;
      this._resize.startW = win.offsetWidth;
      this._resize.startH = win.offsetHeight;
      document.addEventListener('mousemove', this._onResize.bind(this));
      document.addEventListener('mouseup',   this._stopResize.bind(this));
    });
  },

  toggle(){
    STATE.pipActive ? this.close() : this.open();
  },

  open(){
    if(!STATE.currentChannel){ Toast.show('Önce bir kanal seçin','warning'); return; }
    STATE.pipActive = true;
    const win   = $('pipWin');
    const video = $('pipVideo');

    /* clone stream */
    const main = $('mainVideo');
    if(main.src) video.src = main.src;
    else if(STATE.hls){
      const h = new Hls();
      h.loadSource(STATE.currentChannel.url);
      h.attachMedia(video);
      win._hls = h;
    }

    $('pipChName').textContent = STATE.currentChannel.name;
    win.classList.remove('hidden');
    video.play().catch(()=>{});

    /* default position */
    win.style.right  = '20px';
    win.style.bottom = '80px';
    win.style.left   = 'auto';
    win.style.top    = 'auto';

    OSD.show('🖼️','Picture-in-Picture Açık');
  },

  close(){
    STATE.pipActive = false;
    const win   = $('pipWin');
    const video = $('pipVideo');
    video.pause(); video.src = '';
    if(win._hls){ win._hls.destroy(); win._hls = null; }
    win.classList.add('hidden');
  },

  popOut(){
    this.close();
    Nav.goto('live');
  },

  togglePlay(){
    const v = $('pipVideo');
    v.paused ? v.play().catch(()=>{}) : v.pause();
    $('pipPlayBtn').textContent = v.paused ? '▶' : '⏸';
  },

  toggleMute(){
    const v = $('pipVideo');
    v.muted = !v.muted;
    $('pipMuteBtn').textContent = v.muted ? '🔇' : '🔊';
  },

  updateChannel(ch){
    if(!STATE.pipActive) return;
    $('pipChName').textContent = ch.name;
  },

  _onDrag(e){
    if(!this._drag.active) return;
    const win = $('pipWin');
    win.style.left = (e.clientX - this._drag.offX)+'px';
    win.style.top  = (e.clientY - this._drag.offY)+'px';
    win.style.right = 'auto'; win.style.bottom = 'auto';
  },
  _stopDrag(){ this._drag.active = false;
    document.removeEventListener('mousemove', this._onDrag.bind(this));
    document.removeEventListener('mouseup',   this._stopDrag.bind(this)); },

  _onResize(e){
    if(!this._resize.active) return;
    const dx  = e.clientX - this._resize.startX;
    const w   = Utils.clamp(this._resize.startW + dx, 240, 640);
    const h   = w * 9/16;
    const win = $('pipWin');
    win.style.width  = w+'px';
    win.style.height = h+'px';
  },
  _stopResize(){ this._resize.active = false;
    document.removeEventListener('mousemove', this._onResize.bind(this));
    document.removeEventListener('mouseup',   this._stopResize.bind(this)); },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   20.  MINI PLAYER
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const MiniPlayer = {
  init(){
    $('mpPlayBtn').addEventListener('click',  () => Player.togglePlay());
    $('mpExpand').addEventListener('click',   () => { Nav.goto('live'); this.hide(); });
    $('mpClose').addEventListener('click',    () => this.hide());
    Bus.on('playing', () => { if(STATE.miniActive) $('mpPlayBtn').textContent='⏸'; });
    Bus.on('pause',   () => { if(STATE.miniActive) $('mpPlayBtn').textContent='▶'; });
  },

  toggle(){
    STATE.miniActive ? this.hide() : this.show();
  },

  show(){
    STATE.miniActive = true;
    $('miniPlayer').classList.remove('hidden');
    this.updateChannel(STATE.currentChannel);
  },

  hide(){
    STATE.miniActive = false;
    $('miniPlayer').classList.add('hidden');
  },

  updateChannel(ch){
    if(!ch || !STATE.miniActive) return;
    $('mpChName').textContent = ch.name;
    const prog = EPG.getNow(ch.id_tvg);
    $('mpProg').textContent    = prog?.title || '—';
    const pct = prog ? Utils.timePercent(prog.start,prog.end) : 0;
    $('mpProgFill').style.width = pct.toFixed(1)+'%';
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   21.  VIRTUAL REMOTE
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const VirtualRemote = {
  _dialBuf: '',
  _dialTimer: null,

  init(){
    $('tbVrBtn').addEventListener('click',  () => this.toggle());
    $('vrClose').addEventListener('click',  () => this.hide());

    $$('.vr-btn, .vr-dp-btn, .vr-num').forEach(btn =>
      btn.addEventListener('click', () => this.handle(btn.dataset.vk))
    );
  },

  toggle(){
    $('vrWrap').classList.toggle('hidden');
  },
  hide(){
    $('vrWrap').classList.add('hidden');
  },

  handle(vk){
    if(!vk) return;
    const btn = document.querySelector(`[data-vk="${vk}"]`);
    btn?.classList.add('vr-pressed');
    setTimeout(()=>btn?.classList.remove('vr-pressed'),150);

    switch(vk){
      case 'power'   : Toast.show('⏻ Güç','info',1000); break;
      case 'play'    : Player.togglePlay(); break;
      case 'mute'    : Player.toggleMute(); break;
      case 'vol_up'  : Player.changeVolume(0.05); break;
      case 'vol_dn'  : Player.changeVolume(-0.05); break;
      case 'ch_up'   : Channels.playRelative(+1); break;
      case 'ch_dn'   : Channels.playRelative(-1); break;
      case 'prev_ch' : Channels.playRelative(-1); break;
      case 'up'      : Nav.goto('live'); break;
      case 'ok'      : Player.togglePlay(); break;
      case 'menu'    : Nav.toggleSidebar(); break;
      case 'epg'     : Nav.goto('epg'); break;
      case 'fav'     : STATE.currentChannel && Channels.toggleFav(STATE.currentChannel.id); break;
      case 'rec'     : DVR.toggleRecord(); break;
      case 'fwd'     : Player.changeVolume(0.1); break;
      case 'rew'     : Player.changeVolume(-0.1); break;
      case 'info'    : Nav.togglePanels(); break;
      case 'backspace': this._dialBuf=this._dialBuf.slice(0,-1); this._updateDial(); break;
      default:
        if(/^\d$/.test(vk)) this._dialNum(vk);
    }
  },

  _dialNum(n){
    this._dialBuf += n;
    this._updateDial();
    clearTimeout(this._dialTimer);
    this._dialTimer = setTimeout(() => this._commitDial(), 2000);
  },

  _updateDial(){
    $('vrChDisplay').textContent = this._dialBuf || '—';
  },

  _commitDial(){
    const num = parseInt(this._dialBuf, 10);
    this._dialBuf = '';
    this._updateDial();
    const ch = STATE.filtered[num-1];
    if(ch) Channels.play(ch, null);
    else Toast.show(`Kanal ${num} bulunamadı`, 'warning');
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   22.  CONTEXT MENU
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const CtxMenu = {
  _ch: null,

  init(){
    document.addEventListener('click', () => this.hide());
    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => { if(e.key==='Escape') this.hide(); });

    $$('.ctx-item').forEach(item =>
      item.addEventListener('click', () => {
        if(!this._ch) return;
        switch(item.dataset.action){
          case 'play'   : Channels.play(this._ch, null); break;
          case 'fav'    : Channels.toggleFav(this._ch.id); break;
          case 'addlist': Toast.show('📋 Listeye eklendi','success'); break;
          case 'timer'  : DVR.addTimer({ channelId:this._ch.id, channelName:this._ch.name,
                            title:this._ch.name, start:new Date().toISOString(),
                            end: new Date(Date.now()+3600000).toISOString() }); break;
          case 'info'   : Toast.show(`ℹ️ ${this._ch.name}`,'info'); break;
          case 'copy'   : Utils.copyToClipboard(this._ch.url); break;
          case 'remove' : Modal.confirm('Kanalı Kaldır', `"${this._ch.name}" kaldırılsın mı?`, () => {
                            STATE.channels = STATE.channels.filter(c=>c.id!==this._ch.id);
                            Channels.applyFilters(); Channels.render(); }); break;
        }
        this.hide();
      })
    );
  },

  show(e, ch){
    this._ch = ch;
    const menu = $('ctxMenu');
    menu.style.left = Math.min(e.clientX, window.innerWidth-180)+'px';
    menu.style.top  = Math.min(e.clientY, window.innerHeight-250)+'px';
    menu.classList.add('open');
  },

  hide(){ $('ctxMenu').classList.remove('open'); },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   23.  COMMAND PALETTE
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const CmdPalette = {
  init(){
    $('tbCmdBtn').addEventListener('click', () => this.open());
    $('cmdOverlay').addEventListener('click', e => {
      if(e.target === $('cmdOverlay')) this.close();
    });
    $('cmdInput').addEventListener('input',
      Utils.debounce(e => this._search(e.target.value), 150));
    $('cmdInput').addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      if(e.key==='Escape') this.close();
      if(e.key==='ArrowDown') this._focusResult(1);
      if(e.key==='ArrowUp')   this._focusResult(-1);
      if(e.key==='Enter')     this._activateFocused();
    });

    $$('[data-cmd]').forEach(item =>
      item.addEventListener('click', () => { this._runCmd(item.dataset.cmd); this.close(); })
    );

    /* recent channels */
    this._renderRecent();
  },

  open(){
    $('cmdOverlay').classList.remove('hidden');
    setTimeout(() => $('cmdInput').focus(), 50);
    this._renderRecent();
  },

  close(){
    $('cmdOverlay').classList.add('hidden');
    $('cmdInput').value = '';
    this._clearSearch();
  },

  _search(q){
    if(!q){ this._clearSearch(); return; }
    const results = STATE.channels
      .filter(c => c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase()))
      .slice(0, 8);

    const el = $('cmdResults');
    el.innerHTML = results.length
      ? `<div class="cmd-section-label">📺 Kanallar</div>` +
        results.map(c => `
          <div class="cmd-item" data-ch="${c.id}">
            <span class="cmd-item-icon">📺</span>
            <div>
              <div class="cmd-item-name">${Utils.escapeHtml(c.name)}</div>
              <div class="cmd-item-sub">${Utils.escapeHtml(c.group)} • ${c.quality}</div>
            </div>
            <span class="quality-badge">${c.quality}</span>
          </div>`).join('')
      : `<div class="empty" style="padding:20px"><div class="empty-icon">🔍</div><div class="empty-title">Sonuç bulunamadı</div></div>`;

    el.querySelectorAll('[data-ch]').forEach(item =>
      item.addEventListener('click', () => {
        Channels.playById(item.dataset.ch);
        this.close();
      })
    );
  },

  _clearSearch(){
    $('cmdResults').innerHTML = '';
    this._renderRecent();
  },

  _renderRecent(){
    const el = $('cmdRecentList');
    el.innerHTML = STATE.history.slice(0,5).map(h => `
      <div class="cmd-item" data-ch="${h.id}">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">🕐</span>
        <div>
          <div class="cmd-item-name">${Utils.escapeHtml(h.name)}</div>
          <div class="cmd-item-sub">${Utils.formatTime(new Date(h.ts))}</div>
        </div>
      </div>`).join('');

    el.querySelectorAll('[data-ch]').forEach(item =>
      item.addEventListener('click', () => {
        Channels.playById(item.dataset.ch);
        this.close();
      })
    );
  },

  _runCmd(cmd){
    switch(cmd){
      case 'epg'       : Nav.goto('epg'); break;
      case 'stats'     : Nav.goto('stats'); break;
      case 'screenshot': Screenshot.take(); break;
      case 'fullscreen': Player.toggleFullscreen(); break;
      case 'theme'     : Theme.cycle(); break;
      case 'pip'       : PIP.toggle(); break;
    }
  },

  _focusResult(dir){
    const items = [...$('cmdResults').querySelectorAll('.cmd-item')];
    if(!items.length) return;
    const cur = items.indexOf(document.activeElement);
    const next= (cur+dir+items.length) % items.length;
    items[next]?.focus();
  },

  _activateFocused(){
    document.activeElement?.click();
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   24.  GLOBAL SEARCH
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const Search = {
  init(){
    const inp = $('globalSearch');
    const dd  = $('searchDropdown');

    inp.addEventListener('focus',  () => dd.classList.add('open'));
    inp.addEventListener('blur',   () => setTimeout(()=>dd.classList.remove('open'),200));
    inp.addEventListener('input',
      Utils.debounce(e => this._search(e.target.value), 200));
    inp.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
      if(e.key==='Escape'){ inp.blur(); dd.classList.remove('open'); }
    });

    $('voiceSearchBtn').addEventListener('click', () => this._voiceSearch());
  },

  _search(q){
    const dd = $('searchDropdown');
    if(!q){ dd.innerHTML=''; return; }

    const channels = STATE.channels.filter(c=>
      c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase())).slice(0,6);
    const movies   = STATE.channels.filter(c=>
      c.group.toLowerCase().includes('film') &&
      c.name.toLowerCase().includes(q.toLowerCase())).slice(0,4);

    let html = '';
    if(channels.length){
      html += `<div class="sd-section">📺 Kanallar</div>` +
        channels.map(c=>`
          <div class="sd-item" data-id="${c.id}">
            ${c.logo?`<img src="${c.logo}" class="sd-logo" onerror="Utils.imgFallback(this)">`:'<span class="sd-logo-ph">📺</span>'}
            <div class="sd-info">
              <div class="sd-name">${Utils.escapeHtml(c.name)}</div>
              <div class="sd-sub">${Utils.escapeHtml(c.group)}</div>
            </div>
            <span class="quality-badge">${c.quality}</span>
          </div>`).join('');
    }
    if(!html) html = '<div class="sd-empty">Sonuç bulunamadı 🔍</div>';
    dd.innerHTML = html;

    dd.querySelectorAll('[data-id]').forEach(item =>
      item.addEventListener('mousedown', ()=>{
        Channels.playById(item.dataset.id);
        $('globalSearch').value = '';
        dd.classList.remove('open');
      })
    );
  },

  _voiceSearch(){
    if(!('SpeechRecognition' in window || 'webkitSpeechRecognition' in window)){
      Toast.show('Tarayıcınız sesli aramayı desteklemiyor','warning');
      return;
    }
    const SR = window.SpeechRecognition || window.webkitSpeechRecognition;
    const rec = new SR();
    rec.lang = 'tr-TR';
    rec.start();
    Toast.show('🎤 Dinleniyor…','info',3000);
    rec.onresult = e => {
      const q = e.results[0][0].transcript;
      $('globalSearch').value = q;
      this._search(q);
    };
    rec.onerror = () => Toast.show('Sesli arama başarısız','error');
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   25.  KEYBOARD SHORTCUTS
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const Keyboard = {
  init(){
    document.addEventListener('keydown', e => this._handle(e));
    $('setShowKeys').addEventListener('click', () => {
      this._renderModal();
      Modal.open('keys');
    });
  },

  _handle(e){
    /* ignore when typing in inputs */
    if(['INPUT','TEXTAREA','SELECT'].includes(e.target.tagName)) return;

    const k = e.key;

    /* Ctrl+K — command palette */
    if((e.ctrlKey||e.metaKey) && k.toLowerCase()==='k'){
      e.preventDefault();
      CmdPalette.open();
      return;
    }

    /* Alt+S — sidebar */
    if(e.altKey && k.toLowerCase()==='s'){
      e.preventDefault();
      Nav.toggleSidebar();
      return;
    }

    switch(k){
      case ' ': e.preventDefault(); Player.togglePlay(); OSD.show(STATE.isPlaying?'⏸':'▶'); break;
      case 'f': case 'F': Player.toggleFullscreen(); break;
      case 'm': case 'M': Player.toggleMute(); OSD.show(STATE.isMuted?'🔇':'🔊'); break;
      case 'i': case 'I': PIP.toggle(); break;
      case 'e': case 'E': Nav.goto('epg'); break;
      case 's': case 'S': Nav.goto('stats'); break;
      case 't': case 'T': Theme.cycle(); break;
      case 'p': case 'P': Screenshot.take(); break;
      case 'r': case 'R': DVR.toggleRecord(); break;
      case 'n': case 'N': Channels.playRelative(+1); break;
      case 'Escape':
        if(STATE.isFullscreen) Player.toggleFullscreen();
        CmdPalette.close();
        PIP.close();
        break;
      case 'ArrowUp':   e.preventDefault(); Player.changeVolume(+0.05); break;
      case 'ArrowDown': e.preventDefault(); Player.changeVolume(-0.05); break;
      case 'ArrowLeft': e.preventDefault(); Channels.playRelative(-1); break;
      case 'ArrowRight':e.preventDefault(); Channels.playRelative(+1); break;
      default:
        if(APP.keys.NUM.includes(k)) this._numDial(k);
    }
  },

  _numBuf: '',
  _numTimer: null,
  _numDial(n){
    this._numBuf += n;
    clearTimeout(this._numTimer);
    $('chOsd').classList.remove('hidden');
    $('chOsdNum').textContent = 'CH '+this._numBuf;
    this._numTimer = setTimeout(() => {
      const idx = parseInt(this._numBuf,10) - 1;
      if(STATE.filtered[idx]) Channels.play(STATE.filtered[idx], null);
      else Toast.show(`Kanal ${this._numBuf} bulunamadı`,'warning');
      this._numBuf = '';
    }, 1500);
  },

  _renderModal(){
    $('keysModalBody').innerHTML = `
      <table class="keys-table">
        <thead><tr><th>Tuş</th><th>Eylem</th></tr></thead>
        <tbody>
          ${APP.shortcuts.map(s=>`
            <tr>
              <td><kbd>${s.key}</kbd></td>
              <td>${s.desc}</td>
            </tr>`).join('')}
        </tbody>
      </table>`;
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   26.  SCREENSHOT
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const Screenshot = {
  take(){
    const v = $('mainVideo');
    if(!v.videoWidth){ Toast.show('Video mevcut değil','warning'); return; }
    const c = $('screenshotCanvas');
    c.width  = v.videoWidth;
    c.height = v.videoHeight;
    c.getContext('2d').drawImage(v,0,0);
    const url = c.toDataURL('image/png');
    $('screenshotImg').src = url;
    Modal.open('screenshot');
    $('screenshotDownload').onclick = () => this._download(url);
    $('screenshotCopy').onclick     = () => this._copyImg(url);
  },

  _download(url){
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = url;
    a.download = `streamvault-${Date.now()}.png`;
    a.click();
    Toast.show('📸 Kaydedildi','success');
  },

  async _copyImg(url){
    try{
      const blob = await (await fetch(url)).blob();
      await navigator.clipboard.write([new ClipboardItem({'image/png':blob})]);
      Toast.show('📋 Panoya kopyalandı','success');
    } catch{ Toast.show('Kopyalama desteklenmiyor','warning'); }
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   27.  STATS PAGE
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const Stats = {
  _chartCtx: null,

  init(){
    $('statsExport').addEventListener('click', () => this._exportCSV());
    $('statsReset').addEventListener('click',  () => { STATE.statsHistory=[]; this.render(); });
    Bus.on('stats', d => this.update(d));
    this._initChart();
    this.render();
  },

  _initChart(){
    const canvas = $('bitrateChart');
    const ctx    = canvas.getContext('2d');
    this._chartCtx = ctx;
    canvas.width  = canvas.parentElement.offsetWidth || 600;
    canvas.height = 120;
  },

  update(data){
    $('chartOverlay').textContent = Utils.formatBitrate(data.bitrate);
    this._drawChart();
    if(STATE.currentPage === 'stats') this.render();
  },

  _drawChart(){
    const canvas = $('bitrateChart');
    const ctx    = this._chartCtx;
    if(!ctx) return;
    const W = canvas.width, H = canvas.height;
    const data = STATE.statsHistory;

    ctx.clearRect(0,0,W,H);

    if(data.length < 2) return;
    const maxBR = Math.max(...data.map(d=>d.bitrate), 1);

    /* grid */
    ctx.strokeStyle = 'rgba(255,255,255,0.07)';
    ctx.lineWidth = 1;
    for(let i=0;i<=4;i++){
      const y = H - (i/4)*H;
      ctx.beginPath(); ctx.moveTo(0,y); ctx.lineTo(W,y); ctx.stroke();
    }

    /* fill */
    const grad = ctx.createLinearGradient(0,0,0,H);
    grad.addColorStop(0,'rgba(99,179,237,0.4)');
    grad.addColorStop(1,'rgba(99,179,237,0.02)');
    ctx.beginPath();
    data.forEach((d,i)=>{
      const x = (i/(data.length-1))*W;
      const y = H - (d.bitrate/maxBR)*H*0.9;
      i===0 ? ctx.moveTo(x,y) : ctx.lineTo(x,y);
    });
    ctx.lineTo(W,H); ctx.lineTo(0,H); ctx.closePath();
    ctx.fillStyle = grad; ctx.fill();

    /* line */
    ctx.beginPath();
    data.forEach((d,i)=>{
      const x = (i/(data.length-1))*W;
      const y = H - (d.bitrate/maxBR)*H*0.9;
      i===0 ? ctx.moveTo(x,y) : ctx.lineTo(x,y);
    });
    ctx.strokeStyle = '#63b3ed'; ctx.lineWidth = 2; ctx.stroke();
  },

  render(){
    const el = $('statsGrid');
    const h  = STATE.hls;
    const v  = $('mainVideo');
    const last = STATE.statsHistory[STATE.statsHistory.length-1] || {};

    const metrics = [
      { icon:'📡', label:'Bitrate',    val: Utils.formatBitrate(last.bitrate||0) },
      { icon:'📶', label:'Sinyal',     val: h ? 'İyi' : '—' },
      { icon:'⏱️', label:'Buffer',    val: `${(last.bufLen||0).toFixed(1)}s` },
      { icon:'🖥️', label:'Çözünürlük',val: v.videoWidth ? `${v.videoWidth}×${v.videoHeight}` : '—' },
      { icon:'🎞️', label:'FPS',       val: '—' },
      { icon:'📦', label:'Paket Kaybı',val:'0%' },
      { icon:'🌐', label:'RTT',        val:'—' },
      { icon:'💾', label:'Cache',      val: Utils.formatBytes(h?.streamController?.fragCurrent?.stats?.loaded||0) },
    ];

    el.innerHTML = metrics.map(m => `
      <div class="stat-card">
        <div class="stat-card-icon">${m.icon}</div>
        <div class="stat-card-val">${m.val}</div>
        <div class="stat-card-label">${m.label}</div>
      </div>`).join('');
  },

  _exportCSV(){
    const rows = ['Timestamp,Bitrate (bps),Buffer (s)',
      ...STATE.statsHistory.map(d=>`${new Date(d.ts).toISOString()},${d.bitrate},${d.bufLen}`)
    ].join('\n');
    const a = document.createElement('a');
    a.href = URL.createObjectURL(new Blob([rows],{type:'text/csv'}));
    a.download = `stats-${Date.now()}.csv`;
    a.click();
    Toast.show('📥 İstatistikler dışa aktarıldı','success');
  },
};

/* ──────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   28.  AI RECOMMENDATIONS
   ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const AI = {
  init(){
    $('aiRefreshBtn').addEventListener('click',  () => this.refresh());
    $('aiRecRefresh').addEventListener('click',  () => this.refresh());
    $('aiRecDismiss').addEventListener('click',  () => $('aiRecStrip').classList.add('hidden'));

    const pool    = STATE.channels.filter(c =>
      !STATE.history.find(h=>h.id===c.id));

    STATE.aiRecs = this._score(pool, history).slice(
