```html
<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════════
     StreamVault Pro v4.2.0 — HTML Body
     Copyright © 2025 StreamVault Pro
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     SPLASH SCREEN
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="splash" class="splash">
  <canvas id="splashCanvas"></canvas>
  <div class="splash-content">
    <div class="splash-logo-wrap">
      <div class="splash-logo">🎬</div>
      <div class="splash-title">StreamVault Pro</div>
      <div class="splash-version">v4.2.0</div>
    </div>
    <div class="splash-progress">
      <div class="splash-bar-track">
        <div class="splash-bar-fill" id="splashBar"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="splash-status" id="splashStatus">Başlatılıyor…</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     MAIN APP SHELL
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="app" class="app">

  <!-- MOBILE OVERLAY -->
  <div id="mobOverlay" class="mob-overlay"></div>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
       SIDEBAR
       ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <aside id="sidebar" class="sidebar">
    <div class="sb-logo-area">
      <div class="sb-logo">🎬</div>
      <div class="sb-logo-text">
        <div class="sb-logo-title">StreamVault</div>
        <div class="sb-logo-sub">Pro v4.2.0</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <nav class="sb-nav">
      <!-- Live TV -->
      <a class="sb-item active" data-page="live" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📡</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Canlı TV</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Movies -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="movies" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">🎬</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Filmler</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Series -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="series" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📺</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Diziler</span>
      </a>

      <!-- EPG -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="epg" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📅</span>
        <span class="sb-text">EPG</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Favorites -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="favorites" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⭐</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Favoriler</span>
        <span class="sb-badge" id="favCount">0</span>
      </a>

      <!-- DVR -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="dvr" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⏺</span>
        <span class="sb-text">DVR</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Catch-Up -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="catchup" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⏪</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Catch-Up</span>
      </a>

      <!-- AI Group -->
      <div class="sb-group-hdr" data-group="ai">
        <span class="sb-icon">🤖</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Yapay Zekâ</span>
        <span class="sb-chevron">›</span>
      </div>
      <div id="sbSubAi" class="sb-sub">
        <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_rec" href="#">
          <span class="sb-icon">💡</span>
          <span class="sb-text">Öneriler</span>
        </a>
        <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_search" href="#">
          <span class="sb-icon">🔍</span>
          <span class="sb-text">Akıllı Arama</span>
        </a>
        <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_sum" href="#">
          <span class="sb-icon">📝</span>
          <span class="sb-text">Program Özet</span>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Playlist Editor -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="playlist" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📋</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Playlist</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Directory -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="directory" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">🗂️</span>
        <span class="sb-text">IPTV Dizin</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Watch Party -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="watchparty" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">👥</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Watch Party</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Cast -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="cast" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📺</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Yayın Yap</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Stats -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="stats" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📊</span>
        <span class="sb-text">İstatistikler</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Settings -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="settings" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⚙️</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Ayarlar</span>
      </a>
    </nav>

    <div class="sb-footer">
      <div class="sb-footer-text">© 2025 StreamVault Pro</div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════
       MAIN CONTENT AREA
       ══════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="main-wrap">

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         TOPBAR
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <header class="topbar">
      <div class="tb-left">
        <button class="icon-btn" id="mobMenuBtn" title="Menü">☰</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="sidebarToggle" title="Sidebar">☰</button>
        <nav class="tb-breadcrumb">
          <span class="tb-bc-icon">🏠</span>
          <span class="tb-bc-sep">›</span>
          <span class="tb-bc-current" id="tbBcCurrent">Canlı TV</span>
        </nav>
      </div>

      <div class="tb-center">
        <div class="search-wrap">
          <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
          <input type="text" id="globalSearch" class="search-input" placeholder="Kanal ara… ( / )" autocomplete="off" />
          <button class="search-btn" id="voiceSearchBtn" title="Sesli Arama">🎤</button>
          <kbd class="search-kbd">/</kbd>
          <!-- Search Dropdown -->
          <div id="searchDropdown" class="search-dd"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tb-right">
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbCmdBtn" title="Komut Paleti (Ctrl+K)">⚡</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbNotifBtn" title="Bildirimler">
          🔔<span id="tbNotifDot" class="notif-dot hidden"></span>
        </button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbVrBtn" title="Sanal Kumanda">🎮</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbScreenshotBtn" title="Ekran Görüntüsü (P)">📸</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbFullBtn" title="Tam Ekran (F)">⛶</button>
        <div class="tb-clock" id="tbClock"></div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <!-- AI RECOMMENDATION STRIP -->
    <div class="ai-rec-strip" id="aiRecStrip">
      <div class="ai-rec-strip-header">
        <span>🤖 AI Öneriler</span>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="aiRecDismiss" title="Kapat">✕</button>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-rec-scroll" id="aiRecScroll">
        <!-- Filled by JS -->
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: LIVE TV
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-live" class="page active">
      <div class="live-layout">

        <!-- Player Area -->
        <div class="player-area">
          <div class="player-wrap" id="playerWrap">
            <!-- Video Element -->
            <video id="mainVideo" playsinline autoplay muted></video>

            <!-- Loader Overlay -->
            <div class="vid-loader" id="vidLoader">
              <div class="loader-spinner"></div>
              <div class="loader-text" id="vidLoaderText">Bağlanıyor…</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Error Overlay -->
            <div class="vid-error hidden" id="vidError">
              <div class="vid-error-icon">⚠️</div>
              <div class="vid-error-msg" id="vidErrMsg">Bağlantı hatası</div>
              <div class="vid-error-sub" id="vidErrSub"></div>
              <div class="vid-error-btns">
                <button class="btn btn-sm" id="retryBtn">🔄 Tekrar Dene</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="altStreamBtn">🔀 Alternatif</button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Idle State -->
            <div class="vid-idle" id="vidIdle">
              <div class="vid-idle-icon">📡</div>
              <div class="vid-idle-text">İzlemek için bir kanal seçin</div>
              <div class="vid-idle-sub">Kanal listesinden veya komut paleti ile (Ctrl+K)</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Channel OSD -->
            <div class="ch-osd hidden" id="chOsd">
              <div class="ch-osd-num" id="chOsdNum">—</div>
              <div class="ch-osd-name" id="chOsdName">—</div>
              <div class="ch-osd-logo" id="chOsdLogo"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Generic OSD -->
            <div class="osd-overlay hidden" id="osdOverlay">
              <div class="osd-text" id="osdText"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- EPG Strip -->
            <div class="epg-strip" id="epgStrip">
              <div class="epg-strip-item" id="epgNow">
                <div class="fw-7 truncate">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="epg-strip-progress">
                <div class="epg-strip-fill" id="epgNowFill"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="epg-strip-item epg-strip-next" id="epgNext">
                <div class="fw-7 truncate">Sonraki: —</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Quality Bars -->
            <div class="quality-bars" id="qualityBars">
              <div class="qb" id="qb1"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb2"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb3"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb4"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Spectrum -->
            <canvas class="spectrum-canvas" id="spectrumCanvas"></canvas>
          </div>

          <!-- Player Controls -->
          <div class="player-controls" id="playerControls">
            <div class="pc-left">
              <div class="pc-ch-name" id="pcChName">—</div>
            </div>
            <div class="pc-center">
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPrev" title="Önceki (←)">⏮</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPlay" title="Oynat (Space)">▶</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcNext" title="Sonraki (→)">⏭</button>
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcMute" title="Sessiz (M)">🔊</button>
              <input type="range" id="pcVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="1" class="pc-vol" title="Ses" />
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <div class="pc-prog-wrap" id="pcProgBar">
                <div class="pc-prog-fill"></div>
                <div class="pc-prog-time">—:—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSpeedBtn" title="Hız">1×</button>
            </div>
            <div class="pc-right">
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSubBtn" title="Altyazı">💬</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcAudioBtn" title="Ses">🎵</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPipBtn" title="PiP">🖼</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcMiniBtn" title="Mini Oynatıcı">⊟</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcZoomBtn" title="Zoom">🔍</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcCinemaBtn" title="Sinema Modu">🎥</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcRecBtn" title="Kaydet">⏺</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSettingsBtn" title="Ayarlar">⚙</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcFullscreen" title="Tam Ekran (F)">⛶</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Player Settings Panel -->
          <div class="player-settings hidden" id="playerSettings">
            <div class="ps-header">
              <span>⚙️ Oynatıcı Ayarları</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="psClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="ps-body">
              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Parlaklık</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psBrightness" min="0.2" max="2" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psBrightnessVal">100%</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Kontrast</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psContrast" min="0.2" max="2" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psContrastVal">100%</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Doygunluk</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psSaturation" min="0" max="3" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psSaturationVal">100%</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Keskinlik</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psSharpness" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="0" />
                  <span id="psSharpnessVal">0</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Ses Boost</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psBoost" min="1" max="3" step="0.1" value="1" />
                  <span id="psBoostVal">1×</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Ses Gecikme</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psAudioDelay" min="-2000" max="2000" step="50" value="0" />
                  <span id="psAudioDelayVal">0ms</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Altyazı Boyutu</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psSubSize" min="12" max="48" step="1" value="24" />
                  <span id="psSubSizeVal">24px</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Altyazı Gecikme</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psSubDelay" min="-5000" max="5000" step="100" value="0" />
                  <span id="psSubDelayVal">0ms</span>
                </div>
              </div>
              <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mt-3" id="psReset">🔄 Sıfırla</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Channel Sidebar -->
        <div class="ch-sidebar">
          <!-- Search & Filters -->
          <div class="ch-search-bar">
            <div class="ch-search-input-wrap">
              <span class="ch-search-icon">🔍</span>
              <input type="text" id="chSearch" class="ch-search" placeholder="Kanal ara…" />
              <button class="icon-btn" id="chSearchClear" title="Temizle">✕</button>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="chAddBtn" title="Kanal Ekle">+</button>
          </div>

          <!-- Category Tabs -->
          <div class="cat-tabs" id="catTabs">
            <div class="cat-tab active" data-cat="all">Tümü</div>
          </div>

          <!-- Filter Buttons -->
          <div class="ch-filters">
            <button class="ch-filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Tümü</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="fav">⭐</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="hd">HD</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="4k">4K</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="online">🟢</button>
            <select id="chSort" class="ch-sort">
              <option value="default">Sıralama: Varsayılan</option>
              <option value="alpha">A → Z</option>
              <option value="alpha_rev">Z → A</option>
              <option value="quality">Kalite</option>
              <option value="status">Durum</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <!-- Channel List -->
          <div class="ch-list" id="chList">
            <div class="empty" id="chListEmpty">
              <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
              <div class="empty-title">Kanal Yok</div>
              <div class="empty-sub">Bir playlist yükleyin veya kaynak ekleyin</div>
              <button class="btn btn-sm mt-3" id="chEmptyAddBtn">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Footer -->
          <div class="ch-footer">
            <span id="chCountLabel">0 kanal</span>
            <button class="icon-btn" id="chCollapseBtn" title="Grupları Daralt">📥</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: MOVIES
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-movies" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🎬 Filmler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="moviesCountLabel">0 film</span>
          <select class="ch-sort">
            <option value="default">Tüm Türler</option>
            <option value="action">Aksiyon</option>
            <option value="comedy">Komedi</option>
            <option value="drama">Drama</option>
            <option value="horror">Korku</option>
            <option value="scifi">Bilim Kurgu</option>
          </select>
          <select class="ch-sort">
            <option value="default">Sıralama</option>
            <option value="new">Yeni Eklenen</option>
            <option value="az">A → Z</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-4" id="moviesGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🎬</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Film Bulunamadı</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Film kaynağı ekleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: SERIES
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-series" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📺 Diziler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="seriesCountLabel">0 dizi</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-4" id="seriesGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📺</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Dizi Bulunamadı</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Dizi kaynağı ekleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: EPG
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-epg" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📅 Elektronik Program Rehberi</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <select id="epgDaySelect" class="ch-sort">
            <option value="0">Bugün</option>
          </select>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="epgJumpNow">⏱ Şu An</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="epg-container">
        <div class="epg-ruler" id="epgRuler"></div>
        <div class="epg-grid-scroll" id="epgGridScroll">
          <div class="epg-grid" id="epgGrid"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: FAVORITES
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-favorites" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⭐ Favoriler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="favCountLabel">0 öğe</span>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="favExportBtn">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger)" id="favClearBtn">🗑️ Tümünü Temizle</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ch-list" id="favList">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">⭐</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Favori Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Kanal listesinde ☆ tıklayarak favorilere ekle</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: DVR
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-dvr" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⏺ DVR / Kayıtlar</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="dvrNewTimer">⏰ Yeni Zamanlayıcı</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tabs-bar">
        <div class="tab-item active" data-dvr="recordings">📁 Kayıtlar</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="timers">⏰ Zamanlayıcılar</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="schedule">📅 Takvim</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-content" id="dvrContent">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📁</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Kayıt Yok</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: CATCH-UP TV
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-catchup" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⏪ Catch-Up TV</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-4" id="catchupGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">⏪</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Catch-Up Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Son 7 gün içindeki programları geri izleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: AI RECOMMENDATIONS
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-ai_rec" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🤖 Yapay Zekâ Önerileri</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="aiRecRefresh">🔄 Yenile</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="text-muted mb-4" style="max-width:600px">
        İzleme alışkanlıklarınıza göre kişiselleştirilmiş kanal ve içerik önerileri.
        Daha iyi öneriler için daha fazla kanal izleyin.
      </p>
      <div class="grid-3" id="aiRecGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🤖</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Analiz Ediliyor…</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Birkaç kanal izledikten sonra öneriler görünecek</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: PLAYLIST EDITOR
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-playlist" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📋 Playlist Editör</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pleImportBtn">📥 İçe Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pleNewBtn">+ Yeni Kaynak</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ple-layout">
        <div class="ple-sidebar" id="pleSidebar">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Kaynak Yok</div>
            <div class="empty-sub">Bir playlist kaynağı ekleyin</div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm mt-3" id="pleAddSource">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ple-editor" id="pleEditor">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Playlist Seç</div>
            <div class="empty-sub">Sol taraftan bir playlist seçin</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: IPTV DIRECTORY
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-directory" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🗂️ IPTV Dizin</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dirRefresh">🔄 Yenile</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-3" id="dirGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🗂️</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Dizin Yükleniyor…</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: WATCH PARTY
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-watchparty" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>👥 Watch Party</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="wp-layout">
        <div class="wp-left">
          <div id="wpEmpty" class="wp-empty">
            <div class="wp-empty-icon">👥</div>
            <div class="wp-empty-title">Arkadaşlarınla İzle</div>
            <div class="wp-empty-sub">Bir oda oluştur veya katıl</div>
            <div class="wp-actions">
              <button class="btn" id="wpCreateBtn">🏠 Oda Oluştur</button>
              <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="wpJoinBtn">🔗 Odaya Katıl</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="wpMain"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="wp-right">
          <div class="wp-members-section">
            <h3>Üyeler <span id="wpMemberCount">0</span></h3>
            <div id="wpMembers"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="wp-chat-section">
            <h3>Sohbet</h3>
            <div class="wp-chat" id="wpChatMsgs"></div>
            <div class="wp-chat-input">
              <input type="text" id="wpChatInput" class="form-input" placeholder="Mesaj yaz…" />
              <button class="btn btn-sm" id="wpChatSend">Gönder</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: CAST
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-cast" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📺 Yayın Yap</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="text-muted mb-4" style="max-width:600px">
        Chromecast, AirPlay veya DLNA cihazlarına yayın yapabilirsiniz.
      </p>
      <div class="cast-controls">
        <button class="btn" id="castScanBtn">📡 Cihaz Tara</button>
      </div>
      <div class="cast-devices" id="castDevices">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Cihaz Aranıyor…</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Cihaz tara butonuna basın</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: STATISTICS
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-stats" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📊 İstatistikler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="statsExport">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="statsReset">🔄 Sıfırla</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="stats-grid" id="statsGrid">
        <!-- Filled by JS -->
      </div>
      <div class="mt-4">
        <h3 class="mb-2">📈 Bitrate Geçmişi</h3>
        <div class="chart-container">
          <canvas id="bitrateChart"></canvas>
          <div class="chart-overlay" id="chartOverlay">0 Mbps</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ──────────────────────────────────────
         PAGE: SETTINGS
         ────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div id="page-settings" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⚙️ Ayarlar</h2>
      </div>

      <div class="settings-grid">
        <!-- GENEL -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🎨 Genel</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Tema</label>
            <select id="setTheme" class="form-select">
              <option value="dark">Koyu (Varsayılan)</option>
              <option value="amoled">AMOLED Siyah</option>
              <option value="navy">Gece Mavisi</option>
              <option value="blue">Okyanus</option>
              <option value="purple">Mor Gece</option>
              <option value="green">Orman</option>
              <option value="gold">Altın</option>
              <option value="light">Açık</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Dil</label>
            <select id="setLang" class="form-select">
              <option value="tr">Türkçe</option>
              <option value="en">English</option>
              <option value="de">Deutsch</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Animasyonlar</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAnimations" checked />
              <label for="setAnimations" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Kenar Çubuğu Kompakt</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setSidebarCompact" />
              <label for="setSidebarCompact" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Zaman Dilimi</label>
            <select id="setTZ" class="form-select">
              <option value="auto">Otomatik</option>
              <option value="Europe/Istanbul">İstanbul</option>
              <option value="Europe/London">Londra</option>
              <option value="America/New_York">New York</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- OYNATICI -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🎬 Oynatıcı</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Otomatik Oynat</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAutoplay" checked />
              <label for="setAutoplay" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Otomatik Kalite</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAutoQuality" checked />
              <label for="setAutoQuality" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Varsayılan Ses</label>
            <div class="set-group-inline">
              <input type="range" id="setDefVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="1" class="flex-1" />
              <span id="setDefVolVal" class="set-inline-label">100%</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>HLS Motoru</label>
            <select id="setHlsEngine" class="form-select">
              <option value="hls">hls.js (Varsayılan)</option>
              <option value="native">Tarayıcı Native</option>
              <option value="shaka">Shaka Player</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Düşük Gecikme Modu</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setLowLatency" />
              <label for="setLowLatency" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- BİLDİRİMLER -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🔔 Bildirimler</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Program Başlangıcı</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifProg" checked />
              <label for="setNotifProg" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>DVR Hatırlatıcı</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifDvr" checked />
              <label for="setNotifDvr" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Ses</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifSound" checked />
              <label for="setNotifSound" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- GİZLİLİK -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🔒 Gizlilik</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>İzleme Geçmişi Kaydet</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setHistory" checked />
              <label for="setHistory" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Anonim Analitik</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAnalytics" />
              <label for="setAnalytics" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- HAKKINDA -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>ℹ️ Hakkında</h3>
          <div class="set-info">
            <div class="set-info-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Sürüm</span>
              <span>4.2.0</span>
            </div>
            <div class="set-info-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Derleme</span>
              <span id="setBuildDate">2025-03-21</span>
            </div>
            <div class="set-info-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Motor</span>
              <span>hls.js 1.5.x</span>
            </div>
            <div class="set-info-row">
              <span class="text-muted">Lisans</span>
              <span>MIT</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-3">
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mb-2" id="setCheckUpdate">🔄 Güncelleme Kontrol Et</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mb-2" id="setShowKeys">⌨️ Klavye Kısayolları</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full" style="background:var(--danger)" id="setNukeData">💣 Tüm Verileri Sil</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

  </div><!-- /main-wrap -->
</div><!-- /app -->

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     MINI PLAYER
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="miniPlayer" class="mini-player hidden">
  <div class="mp-header">
    <div class="mp-title" id="mpChName">—</div>
    <div class="mp-btns">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpExpand" title="Büyüt">⛶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpClose" title="Kapat">✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="mp-body">
    <video id="mpThumbVideo" muted playsinline></video>
    <div class="mp-controls">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpPlayBtn">▶</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     PIP WINDOW (Custom)
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="pipWin" class="pip-win hidden">
  <div class="pip-title-bar" id="pipTitleBar">
    <span class="pip-name" id="pipChName">—</span>
    <div class="pip-btns">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipFullBtn" title="Tam Ekran">⛶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipCloseBtn" title="Kapat">✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pip-body">
    <video id="pipVideo" muted playsinline></video>
    <div class="pip-controls">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipPlayBtn">▶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipMuteBtn">🔊</button>
      <input type="range" id="pipVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="1" class="pip-vol" />
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pip-resize" id="pipResize"></div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     CONTEXT MENU
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="ctxMenu" class="ctx-menu">
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="play">▶ Oynat</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="fav">⭐ Favorilere Ekle</div>
  <div class="ctx-divider"></div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="info">ℹ️ Kanal Bilgisi</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="copy">📋 URL Kopyala</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="timer">⏰ Kayıt Zamanla</div>
  <div class="ctx-divider"></div>
  <div class="ctx-item ctx-danger" data-action="remove">🗑️ Listeden Kaldır</div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     COMMAND PALETTE
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="cmdOverlay" class="cmd-overlay">
  <div class="cmd-palette">
    <div class="cmd-search-wrap">
      <span class="cmd-search-icon">🔍</span>
      <input type="text" id="cmdInput" class="cmd-input" placeholder="Komut yaz veya kanal ara…" autofocus />
      <kbd class="cmd-esc">ESC</kbd>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-section">
      <div class="cmd-section-label">Hızlı Erişim</div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="epg">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">📅</span>
        <div>
          <div class="cmd-item-name">EPG Aç</div>
          <div class="cmd-item-sub">Program Rehberi</div>
        </div>
        <kbd>E</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="stats">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">📊</span>
        <div>
          <div class="cmd-item-name">İstatistikler</div>
          <div class="cmd-item-sub">Akış bilgileri</div>
        </div>
        <kbd>S</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="screenshot">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">📸</span>
        <div>
          <div class="cmd-item-name">Ekran Görüntüsü</div>
          <div class="cmd-item-sub">Anlık yakala</div>
        </div>
        <kbd>P</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="fullscreen">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">⛶</span>
        <div>
          <div class="cmd-item-name">Tam Ekran</div>
          <div class="cmd-item-sub">Geçiş yap</div>
        </div>
        <kbd>F</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="theme">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">🎨</span>
        <div>
          <div class="cmd-item-name">Tema Değiştir</div>
          <div class="cmd-item-sub">Tüm temaları döngüle</div>
        </div>
        <kbd>T</kbd>
      </div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="pip">
        <span class="cmd-item-icon">🖼</span>
        <div>
          <div class="cmd-item-name">Picture-in-Picture</div>
          <div class="cmd-item-sub">Kayan oynatıcı</div>
        </div>
        <kbd>I</kbd>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-section">
      <div class="cmd-section-label">Son İzlenenler</div>
      <div id="cmdRecentList">
        <div class="empty"><div class="empty-title">Henüz kanal seçilmedi</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     NOTIFICATION CENTER
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="notifCenter" class="notif-center">
  <div class="notif-center-header">
    <h3>🔔 Bildirimler</h3>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="clearAllNotif">Tümünü Temizle</button>
  </div>
  <div class="notif-list" id="notifList">
    <div class="empty">
      <div class="empty-icon">🔕</div>
      <div class="empty-title">Bildirim Yok</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     VIRTUAL REMOTE
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="vrWrap" class="vr-wrap hidden">
  <div class="vr-header">
    <span>🎮 Sanal Kumanda</span>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="vrClose">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="vr-body">
    <!-- Color Buttons -->
    <div class="vr-color-row">
      <button class="vr-color-btn vr-red" data-vk="col_red" title="Canlı TV">🔴</button>
      <button class="vr-color-btn vr-green" data-vk="col_green" title="EPG">🟢</button>
      <button class="vr-color-btn vr-yellow" data-vk="col_yellow" title="Favori">🟡</button>
      <button class="vr-color-btn vr-blue" data-vk="col_blue" title="Ayarlar">🔵</button>
    </div>

    <!-- D-Pad -->
    <div class="vr-dpad-area">
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-up" data-vk="up" title="Önceki Kanal">▲</button>
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-left" data-vk="left" title="Geri">◀</button>
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-ok" data-vk="ok" title="Seç">OK</button>
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-right" data-vk="right" title="İleri">▶</button>
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-down" data-vk="down" title="Sonraki Kanal">▼</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Channel Display -->
    <div class="vr-ch-display" id="vrChDisplay">—</div>

    <!-- Numpad -->
    <div class="vr-numpad">
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="1">1</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="2">2</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="3">3</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="4">4</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="5">5</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="6">6</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="7">7</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="8">8</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="9">9</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="backspace">⌫</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="0">0</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="list">📡</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Volume & Channel -->
    <div class="vr-row">
      <div class="vr-col-btns">
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="vol_up" title="Ses +">🔊</button>
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="mute" title="Sessiz">🔇</button>
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="vol_dn" title="Ses -">🔈</button>
      </div>
      <div class="vr-col-btns">
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="ch_up" title="Kanal +">▲CH</button>
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="prev_ch" title="Önceki Kanal">⏮</button>
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="ch_dn" title="Kanal -">▼CH</button>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Transport -->
    <div class="vr-transport">
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="rew" title="Geri Sar">⏪</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="play" title="Oynat">▶</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="rec" title="Kaydet">⏺</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="fwd" title="İleri Sar">⏩</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="power" title="Kapat">⏻</button>
    </div>

    <!-- Extra Buttons -->
    <div class="vr-extra">
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="info" title="Bilgi">ℹ️</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="epg" title="EPG">📅</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="fav" title="Favori">⭐</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="menu" title="Menü">☰</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     PWA INSTALL BANNER
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="pwaBanner" class="pwa-banner hidden">
  <div class="pwa-banner-content">
    <span class="pwa-banner-icon">📲</span>
    <div>
      <div class="fw-7">StreamVault Pro'yu Yükle</div>
      <div class="fs-xs text-muted">Masaüstü uygulaması olarak hızlı erişim</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pwa-banner-actions">
    <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pwaInstallBtn">Yükle</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pwaDismiss">Daha Sonra</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     TOAST STACK
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="toastStack" class="toast-stack"></div>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     BOTTOM NAV (Mobile)
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<nav id="bottomNav" class="bottom-nav">
  <a class="bn-item active" data-page="live" href="#">
    <span>📡</span><span class="bn-label">Canlı</span>
  </a>
  <a class="bn-item" data-page="movies" href="#">
    <span>🎬</span><span class="bn-label">Film</span>
  </a>
  <a class="bn-item" data-page="epg" href="#">
    <span>📅</span><span class="bn-label">EPG</span>
  </a>
  <a class="bn-item" data-page="favorites" href="#">
    <span>⭐</span><span class="bn-label">Favori</span>
  </a>
  <a class="bn-item" data-page="settings" href="#">
    <span>⚙️</span><span class="bn-label">Ayar</span>
  </a>
</nav>

<!-- ══════════════════════════════════════════════
     MODALS
     ══════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<!-- Confirm Modal -->
<div id="modal-confirm" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-sm">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3 id="confirmTitle">Onayla</h3>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <p id="confirmMsg">Emin misin?</p>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button>
      <button class="btn" id="confirmOk">Onayla</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Add Source Modal -->
<div id="modal-addSource" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3>📥 Kaynak Ekle</h3>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <!-- Steps -->
      <div class="steps">
        <div class="step active" id="step1dot"><span>1</span></div>
        <div class="step-line" id="step1line"></div>
        <div class="step" id="step2dot"><span>2</span></div>
        <div class="step-line" id="step2line"></div>
        <div class="step" id="step3dot"><span>3</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="steps-labels">
        <span>Tür Seç</span><span>Bilgi Gir</span><span>Tamamla</span>
      </div>

      <!-- Step 1: Type -->
      <div id="addStep1" class="mt-4">
        <div class="source-type-grid">
          <div class="source-type-card active" data-type="m3u">
            <div class="source-type-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="source-type-title">M3U / M3U8</div>
            <div class="source-type-desc">M3U playlist URL veya dosyası</div>
          </div>
          <div class="source-type-card" data-type="xtream">
            <div class="source-type-icon">⚡</div>
            <div class="source-type-title">Xtream Codes</div>
            <div class="source-type-desc">Xtream API bilgileriyle bağlan</div>
          </div>
          <div class="source-type-card" data-type="file">
            <div class="source-type-icon">📁</div>
            <div class="source-type-title">Dosya Yükle</div>
            <div class="source-type-desc">Bilgisayarından M3U veya JSON dosyası</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Step 2: Info -->
      <div id="addStep2" class="mt-4 hidden">
        <!-- M3U Form -->
        <div id="addM3uForm">
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Ad</label>
            <input type="text" id="addM3uName" class="form-input" placeholder="Playlist adı" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>URL</label>
            <input type="url" id="addM3uUrl" class="form-input" placeholder="https://example.com/playlist.m3u" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Xtream Form -->
        <div id="addXtreamForm" class="hidden">
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Ad</label>
            <input type="text" id="addXtName" class="form-input" placeholder="Hesap adı" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Host</label>
            <input type="url" id="addXtHost" class="form-input" placeholder="http://example.com" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Kullanıcı Adı</label>
            <input type="text" id="addXtUser" class="form-input" placeholder="Kullanıcı adı" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Şifre</label>
            <input type="password" id="addXtPass" class="form-input" placeholder="Şifre" />
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- File Form -->
        <div id="addFileForm" class="hidden">
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Dosya Adı</label>
            <input type="text" id="addFileName" class="form-input" placeholder="— (dosya seçin)" readonly />
          </div>
          <div id="m3uDropZone" class="drop-zone">
            <div class="drop-zone-icon">📂</div>
            <div class="drop-zone-text">Dosya sürükleyin veya tıklayın</div>
            <div class="drop-zone-sub">.m3u, .m3u8, .json desteklenir</div>
          </div>
          <input type="file" id="m3uFileInput" accept=".m3u,.m3u8,.json" hidden />
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Step 3: Preview -->
      <div id="addStep3" class="mt-4 hidden">
        <div id="addPreview">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">⏳</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Analiz Ediliyor…</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="addSourceBack">İptal</button>
      <button class="btn" id="addSourceNext">İleri ›</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EPG Detail Modal -->
<div id="modal-epg-detail" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-sm">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3 id="epgDetailTitle">—</h3>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="epgDetailBody"></div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="epgDetailRecord">⏺ Kaydet</button>
      <button class="btn" id="epgDetailPlay">▶ İzle</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DVR Timer Modal -->
<div id="modal-dvr-timer" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-md">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3>⏰ DVR Zamanlayıcı</h3>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Ad</label>
        <input type="text" id="dvrTimerName" class="form-input" placeholder="Kayıt adı" />
      </div>
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Kanal</label>
        <select id="dvrTimerCh" class="form-select"></select>
      </div>
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Başlangıç</label>
        <input type="datetime-local" id="dvrTimerStart" class="form-input" />
      </div>
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Bitiş</label>
        <input type="datetime-local" id="dvrTimerEnd" class="form-input" />
      </div>
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Tekrar</label>
        <select id="dvrTimerRepeat" class="form-select">
          <option value="none">Tek Seferlik</option>
          <option value="daily">Her Gün</option>
          <option value="weekly">Her Hafta</option>
          <option value="weekdays">Haftaiçi</option>
        </select>
      </div>
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Ön Margin (dk)</label>
        <input type="number" id="dvrTimerMarginPre" class="form-input" value="5" min="0" max="30" />
      </div>
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Son Margin (dk)</label>
        <input type="number" id="dvrTimerMarginPost" class="form-input" value="5" min="0" max="30" />
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button>
      <button class="btn" id="dvrTimerSave">💾 Kaydet</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Screenshot Modal -->
<div id="modal-screenshot" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-md">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3>📸 Ekran Görüntüsü</h3>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body text-center">
      <img id="screenshotImg" style="max-width:100%;border-radius:8px" alt="Screenshot" />
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="screenshotCopy">📋 Panoya Kopyala</button>
      <button class="btn" id="screenshotDownload">💾 İndir</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Keyboard Shortcuts Modal -->
<div id="modal-keys" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-md">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3>⌨️ Klavye Kısayolları</h3>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="keysModalBody"></div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn modal-close">Kapat</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Watch Party Join Modal -->
<div id="modal-wp-join" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-sm">
    <div class="modal-header">
      <h3>🔗 Odaya Katıl</h3>
      <button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Oda Kodu</label>
        <input type="text" id="wpRoomCode" class="form-input" placeholder="XXXX-XXXX" maxlength="9" />
      </div>
      <div class="set-group">
        <label>Kullanıcı Adı</label>
        <input type="text" id="wpJoinUsername" class="form-input" placeholder="Kullanıcı adınız" />
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button>
      <button class="btn" id="wpJoinConfirm">Katıl</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Hidden Screenshot Canvas -->
<canvas id="screenshotCanvas" hidden></canvas>
```

---

### 📊 HTML Yapısı ÖZET

| Bileşen | ID | Açıklama |
|---------|-----|----------|
| **Splash** | `#splash` | Canvas animasyonlu açılış ekranı |
| **Sidebar** | `#sidebar` | 15 menü öğesi + alt gruplar |
| **Topbar** | `.topbar` | Arama, bildirimler, saat, kısayollar |
| **Live TV** | `#page-live` | Player + kanal listesi yan paneli |
| **Movies** | `#page-movies` | Film grid sayfası |
| **Series** | `#page-series` | Dizi grid sayfası |
| **EPG** | `#page-epg` | 24 saatlik zaman çizelgesi |
| **Favorites** | `#page-favorites` | Favori kanal listesi |
| **DVR** | `#page-dvr` | 3 sekmeli kayıt yönetimi |
| **Catch-Up** | `#page-catchup` | Geriye dönük izleme |
| **AI** | `#page-ai_rec` | Yapay zekâ önerileri |
| **Playlist** | `#page-playlist` | Sol panel + editör |
| **Directory** | `#page-directory` | IPTV kaynak dizini |
| **Watch Party** | `#page-watchparty` | Oda oluşturma + sohbet |
| **Cast** | `#page-cast` | Cihaz tarama ve yayın |
| **Stats** | `#page-stats` | 12 metrik kartı + grafik |
| **Settings** | `#page-settings` | 5 grup, 20+ ayar |
| **Mini Player** | `#miniPlayer` | Köşe oynatıcı |
| **PIP Window** | `#pipWin` | Sürüklenebilir oynatıcı |
| **Context Menu** | `#ctxMenu` | Sağ tık menüsü |
| **Command Palette** | `#cmdOverlay` | Ctrl+K arayüzü |
| **Notifications** | `#notifCenter` | Bildirim merkezi |
| **Virtual Remote** | `#vrWrap` | Tam sanal kumanda |
| **PWA Banner** | `#pwaBanner` | Uygulama yükleme |
| **Toast Stack** | `#toastStack` | Bildirim balonları |
| **Bottom Nav** | `#bottomNav` | Mobil alt navigasyon |
| **Modals (7)** | `#modal-*` | Confirm, Add Source, EPG, DVR, Screenshot, Keys, WP Join |
| **Player Settings** | `#playerSettings` | 8 video/filtre ayarı |

**Toplam: ~700+ satır HTML, 40+ benzersiz bileşen**

</think># 🚀 BÖLÜM 1 — TAM HTML (ULTRA GELİŞMİŞ)

> Aşağıda **tam, eksiksiz, ultra gelişmiş HTML** yer alıyor.
> Onay verdikten sonra CSS ve JS yazılacak.

---

```html
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     StreamVault Pro v5.0.0 — Ultra Advanced IPTV Player
     Tam HTML Şablonu
     Copyright © 2025 StreamVault Pro
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr" dir="ltr" data-theme="dark">
<head>
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" />
  <meta name="theme-color" content="#0a0a0f" />
  <meta name="description" content="StreamVault Pro — Ultra Gelişmiş IPTV Oynatıcı. Canlı TV, Filmler, Diziler, AI Öneriler, Watch Party ve daha fazlası." />
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent" />
  <title>StreamVault Pro v5.0.0</title>
  <link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json" />
  <link rel="icon" href="data:image/svg+xml,<svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 100 100'><text y='.9em' font-size='90'>🎬</text></svg>" />
  <!-- CSS -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" />
</head>

<body>
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     1. SPLASH SCREEN (Canvas Partikül Animasyonlu)
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="splash" class="splash" aria-label="Yükleniyor">
  <canvas id="splashCanvas" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>
  <div class="splash-content">
    <div class="splash-logo-wrap">
      <div class="splash-logo">🎬</div>
      <div class="splash-title">StreamVault Pro</div>
      <div class="splash-version">v5.0.0 Ultra</div>
    </div>
    <div class="splash-progress">
      <div class="splash-bar-track">
        <div class="splash-bar-fill" id="splashBar"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="splash-status" id="splashStatus">Başlatılıyor…</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     2. APP SHELL
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="app" class="app hidden" role="application" aria-label="StreamVault Pro">

  <!-- Mobile Overlay -->
  <div id="mobOverlay" class="mob-overlay" aria-hidden="true"></div>

  <!-- ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       3. SIDEBAR
       ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <aside id="sidebar" class="sidebar" role="navigation" aria-label="Ana Menü">

    <!-- Logo -->
    <div class="sb-logo-area">
      <div class="sb-logo">🎬</div>
      <div class="sb-logo-text">
        <div class="sb-logo-title">StreamVault</div>
        <div class="sb-logo-sub">Pro Ultra</div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Main Nav -->
    <nav class="sb-nav" role="menu">

      <!-- Canlı TV -->
      <a class="sb-item active" data-page="live" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">📡</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Canlı TV</span>
        <span class="sb-shortcut" data-ks="1">1</span>
      </a>

      <!-- DUAL CHANNEL (YENİ) -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="dual" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">🖥️</span>
        <span class="sb-text">İki Ekr</span>
        <span class="sb-shortcut" data-ks="2">2</span>
      </a>

      <!-- MOSAIC VIEW (YENİ) -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="mosaic" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">▦</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Mozaik</span>
        <span class="sb-shortcut" data-ks="3">3</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Filmler -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="movies" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">🎬</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Filmler</span>
        <span class="sb-shortcut" data-ks="4">4</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Diziler -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="series" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">📺</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Diziler</span>
        <span class="sb-shortcut" data-ks="5">5</span>
      </a>

      <!-- EPG -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="epg" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">📅</span>
        <span class="sb-text">EPG</span>
        <span class="sb-shortcut" data-ks="E">E</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Favoriler -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="favorites" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">⭐</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Favoriler</span>
        <span class="sb-badge" id="favCount">0</span>
      </a>

      <!-- DVR / Kayıtlar -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="dvr" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">⏺</span>
        <span class="sb-text">DVR Kayıtlar</span>
        <span class="sb-badge dvr-badge" id="dvrActiveBadge" style="display:none">●</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Catch-Up -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="catchup" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">⏪</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Catch-Up TV</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Otomatik Kaydediciler (YENİ) -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="autorec" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">🔄</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Oto Kayıt</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Geçmiş (YENİ) -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="history" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">📜</span>
        <span class="sb-text">İzleme Geçmişi</span>
      </a>

      <!-- ── AI GROUP ── -->
      <div class="sb-group-hdr" data-group="ai" role="button" aria-expanded="false" tabindex="0">
        <span class="sb-icon">🤖</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Yapay Zekâ</span>
        <span class="sb-chevron">▸</span>
      </div>
      <div id="sbSubAi" class="sb-sub" role="group">
        <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_rec" href="#" role="menuitem">
          <span class="sb-icon">💡</span>
          <span class="sb-text">Akıllı Öneriler</span>
        </a>
        <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_search" href="#" role="menuitem">
          <span class="sb-icon">🔍</span>
          <span class="sb-text">Akıllı Arama</span>
        </a>
        <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_sum" href="#" role="menuitem">
          <span class="sb-icon">📝</span>
          <span class="sb-text">Program Özet</span>
        </a>
        <a class="sb-item sb-sub-item" data-page="ai_mood" href="#" role="menuitem">
          <span class="sb-icon">🎭</span>
          <span class="sb-text">Mod Önerileri</span>
        </a>
      </div>

      <!-- Playlist Editör -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="playlist" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">📋</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Playlist Editör</span>
      </a>

      <!-- IPTV Dizin -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="directory" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">🗂️</span>
        <span class="sb-text">IPTV Dizin</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Watch Party -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="watchparty" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">👥</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Watch Party</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Yayın Yap -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="cast" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">📺</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Yayın Yap</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Harita Görünümü (YENİ) -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="map" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">🗺️</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Harita</span>
      </a>

      <!-- İstatistikler -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="stats" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">📊</span>
        <span class="sb-text">İstatistikler</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Küresel Izleyici (YENİ) -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="liveviewers" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">👁️</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Canlı İzleyici</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Aile Kontrolü (YENİ) -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="parental" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">🔒</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Aile Kontrolü</span>
      </a>

      <!-- Ayarlar -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="settings" href="#" role="menuitem">
        <span class="sb-icon">⚙️</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Ayarlar</span>
      </a>

    </nav>

    <!-- Sidebar Footer -->
    <div class="sb-footer">
      <div class="sb-conn-status" id="sbConnStatus">
        <span class="conn-dot online"></span>
        <span class="sb-text text-muted">Bağlı</span>
      </div>
      <div class="sb-footer-text">© 2025 StreamVault Pro</div>
    </div>
  </aside>

  <!-- ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
       4. MAIN CONTENT WRAPPER
       ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
  <div class="main-wrap">

    <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
         5. TOP BAR
         ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <header class="topbar" role="banner">

      <!-- Left -->
      <div class="tb-left">
        <button class="icon-btn" id="mobMenuBtn" title="Menü" aria-label="Menü Aç/Kapat">☰</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="sidebarToggle" title="Kenar Çubuğu" aria-label="Kenar Çubuğu">☰</button>
        <nav class="tb-breadcrumb" aria-label="Sayfa Yolu">
          <span class="tb-bc-icon">🏠</span>
          <span class="tb-bc-sep">›</span>
          <span class="tb-bc-current" id="tbBcCurrent">Canlı TV</span>
        </nav>
      </div>

      <!-- Center: Search -->
      <div class="tb-center">
        <div class="search-wrap">
          <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
          <input
            type="text"
            id="globalSearch"
            class="search-input"
            placeholder="Kanal ara… ( / )"
            autocomplete="off"
            aria-label="Arama"
          />
          <button class="search-btn" id="voiceSearchBtn" title="Sesli Arama">🎤</button>
          <kbd class="search-kbd">/</kbd>
          <!-- Search Dropdown -->
          <div id="searchDropdown" class="search-dd" role="listbox"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Right -->
      <div class="tb-right">
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbCmdBtn" title="Komut Paleti (Ctrl+K)" aria-label="Komut Paleti">⚡</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbNotifBtn" title="Bildirimler" aria-label="Bildirimler">
          🔔<span id="tbNotifDot" class="notif-dot hidden"></span>
        </button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbVrBtn" title="Sanal Kumanda" aria-label="Sanal Kumanda">🎮</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbScreenshotBtn" title="Ekran Görüntüsü (P)" aria-label="Ekran Görüntüsü">📸</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbFullscreen" title="Tam Ekran (F)" aria-label="Tam Ekran">⛶</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbSleepBtn" title="Uyku Zamanlayıcısı" aria-label="Uyku Zamanlayıcısı">😴</button>
        <div class="tb-clock" id="tbClock" aria-live="polite"></div>
        <div class="tb-bandwidth" id="tbBandwidth" title="Ağ Hızı">
          <span>📡</span>
          <span id="tbBandwidthVal">— Mb/s</span>
        </div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────
         6. AI RECOMMENDATION STRIP (YENİ)
         ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── -->
    <div class="ai-rec-strip" id="aiRecStrip">
      <div class="ai-rec-strip-header">
        <span>🤖 AI Öneriler</span>
        <div class="ai-rec-mood-btns">
          <button class="ai-mood-btn" data-mood="relax" title="Rahatla">😌</button>
          <button class="ai-mood-btn" data-mood="action" title="Aksiyon">💥</button>
          <button class="ai-mood-btn" data-mood="learn" title="Öğren">📚</button>
          <button class="ai-mood-btn" data-mood="fun" title="Eğlen">🎉</button>
          <button class="ai-mood-btn" data-mood="news" title="Haberler">📰</button>
          <button class="ai-mood-btn" data-mood="sports" title="Spor">⚽</button>
        </div>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="aiRecDismiss" title="Kapat">✕</button>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-rec-scroll" id="aiRecScroll" role="list"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         7. PAGE: LIVE TV (Tek Ekran)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-live" class="page active">

      <div class="live-layout">

        <!-- ── PLAYER AREA ── -->
        <div class="player-area">

          <!-- Player Wrapper -->
          <div class="player-wrap" id="playerWrap">
            <video id="mainVideo" playsinline autoplay muted aria-label="Ana Oynatıcı"></video>

            <!-- Buffering Spinner -->
            <div class="vid-loader" id="vidLoader">
              <div class="loader-spinner"></div>
              <div class="loader-text" id="vidLoaderText">Bağlanıyor…</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Error Overlay -->
            <div class="vid-error hidden" id="vidError">
              <div class="vid-error-icon">⚠️</div>
              <div class="vid-error-msg" id="vidErrMsg">Bağlantı hatası</div>
              <div class="vid-error-sub" id="vidErrSub"></div>
              <div class="vid-error-btns">
                <button class="btn btn-sm" id="retryBtn">🔄 Tekrar Dene</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="altStreamBtn">🔀 Alternatif</button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Idle / Welcome -->
            <div class="vid-idle" id="vidIdle">
              <div class="vid-idle-icon">📡</div>
              <div class="vid-idle-text">İzlemek için bir kanal seçin</div>
              <div class="vid-idle-sub">Kanal listesinden veya komut paleti ile (Ctrl+K)</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Channel OSD (Kanal Geçiş Overlay) -->
            <div class="ch-osd hidden" id="chOsd">
              <div class="ch-osd-num" id="chOsdNum">—</div>
              <div class="ch-osd-name" id="chOsdName">—</div>
              <div class="ch-osd-logo" id="chOsdLogo"></div>
              <div class="ch-osd-meta" id="chOsdMeta"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Genel OSD Overlay -->
            <div class="osd-overlay hidden" id="osdOverlay">
              <div class="osd-text" id="osdText"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- EPG Alt Çubuk -->
            <div class="epg-strip" id="epgStrip">
              <div class="epg-strip-item" id="epgNow">
                <div class="fw-7 truncate">—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="epg-strip-progress">
                <div class="epg-strip-fill" id="epgNowFill"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="epg-strip-item epg-strip-next" id="epgNext">
                <div class="fw-7 truncate">Sonraki: —</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Bitrate / Sinyal Çubukları -->
            <div class="quality-bars" id="qualityBars" aria-label="Sinyal Kalitesi">
              <div class="qb" id="qb1"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb2"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb3"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb4"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Ses Spectrum (YENİ) -->
            <canvas class="spectrum-canvas" id="spectrumCanvas" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>

            <!-- Kanal Numara Giriş (YENİ) -->
            <div class="ch-num-overlay hidden" id="chNumOverlay">
              <div class="ch-num-display" id="chNumDisplay">_</div>
              <div class="ch-num-label">Kanal No Girin</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Titreşim Efekti (YENİ) -->
            <canvas class="fireworks-canvas hidden" id="fireworksCanvas" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>

            <!-- Video Filtresi Canvas (YENİ) -->
            <canvas class="filter-canvas hidden" id="filterCanvas" aria-hidden="true"></canvas>
          </div>

          <!-- ── PLAYER CONTROLS ── -->
          <div class="player-controls" id="playerControls">
            <div class="pc-left">
              <div class="pc-ch-num" id="pcChNum">—</div>
              <div class="pc-ch-name" id="pcChName">—</div>
              <div class="pc-live-dot" id="pcLiveDot"></div>
            </div>
            <div class="pc-center">
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPrev" title="Önceki (←)">⏮</button>
              <button class="pc-btn pc-play-btn" id="pcPlay" title="Oynat/Duraklat (Space)">▶</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcNext" title="Sonraki (→)">⏭</button>
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcStop" title="Durdur">⏹</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcRew" title="10sn Geri (J)">⏪</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcFwd" title="10sn İleri (L)">⏩</button>
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcMute" title="Sessiz (M)">🔊</button>
              <input type="range" id="pcVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="1" class="pc-vol" title="Ses Seviyesi" aria-label="Ses" />
              <span class="pc-vol-val" id="pcVolVal">100</span>
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <!-- Progress Bar (VOD için) -->
              <div class="pc-prog-wrap hidden" id="pcProgWrap">
                <div class="pc-prog-time-cur">00:00</div>
                <div class="pc-prog-bar" id="pcProgBar">
                  <div class="pc-prog-fill"></div>
                  <div class="pc-prog-thumb"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="pc-prog-time-total">00:00</div>
              </div>
              <!-- EPG Progress (Canlı için) -->
              <div class="pc-live-prog" id="pcLiveProg">
                <div class="pc-live-prog-label" id="pcLiveProgLabel">—:—</div>
              </div>
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSpeedBtn" title="Oynatma Hızı">1×</button>
            </div>
            <div class="pc-right">
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSubBtn" title="Altyazı (C)">💬</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcAudioBtn" title="Ses Parçası">🎵</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcQualityBtn" title="Kalite Seç">HD</button>
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPipBtn" title="Picture-in-Picture (I)">🖼</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcMiniBtn" title="Mini Oynatıcı">⊟</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcZoomBtn" title="Zoom / Yakınlaştır">🔍</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcCinemaBtn" title="Sinema Modu">🎥</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcRecorderBtn" title="Kayıt Başlat/Durdur (R)">⏺</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcFavBtn" title="Favorilere Ekle">☆</button>
              <div class="pc-sep"></div>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcShareBtn" title="Paylaş">📤</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSettingsBtn" title="Gelişmiş Ayarlar">⚙</button>
              <button class="pc-btn" id="pcFullscreen" title="Tam Ekran (F)">⛶</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── PLAYER SETTINGS PANEL ── -->
          <div class="player-settings hidden" id="playerSettings">
            <div class="ps-header">
              <span>⚙️ Oynatıcı Ayarları</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="psClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="ps-body">

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Parlaklık</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psBrightness" min="0.2" max="2" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psBrightnessVal">100%</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Kontrast</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psContrast" min="0.2" max="2" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psContrastVal">100%</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Doygunluk</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psSaturation" min="0" max="3" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psSaturationVal">100%</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Gama</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psGamma" min="0.2" max="2.5" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psGammaVal">1.0</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Hue Rotate</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psHue" min="0" max="360" step="1" value="0" />
                  <span id="psHueVal">0°</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Ses Boost</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psBoost" min="1" max="3" step="0.1" value="1" />
                  <span id="psBoostVal">1×</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Ses Gecikme (ms)</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psAudioDelay" min="-2000" max="2000" step="50" value="0" />
                  <span id="psAudioDelayVal">0ms</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Altyazı Boyutu</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psSubSize" min="12" max="48" step="1" value="24" />
                  <span id="psSubSizeVal">24px</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="ps-group">
                <label>Altyazı Gecikme (ms)</label>
                <div class="ps-row">
                  <input type="range" id="psSubDelay" min="-5000" max="5000" step="100" value="0" />
                  <span id="psSubDelayVal">0ms</span>
                </div>
              </div>

              <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mt-3" id="psReset">🔄 Varsayılanlara Sıfırla</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── QUALITY SELECTOR POPUP (YENİ) ── -->
          <div class="quality-popup hidden" id="qualityPopup">
            <div class="qp-header">
              <span>🎯 Kalite Seç</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="qpClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="qp-list" id="qpList">
              <div class="qp-item active" data-quality="auto">🔄 Otomatik</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── SUBTITLE SELECTOR (YENİ) ── -->
          <div class="sub-popup hidden" id="subPopup">
            <div class="sp-header">
              <span>💬 Altyazı Seç</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="spClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="sp-list" id="subList">
              <div class="sp-item active" data-sub="-1">🔇 Kapalı</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── AUDIO TRACK SELECTOR (YENİ) ── -->
          <div class="audio-popup hidden" id="audioPopup">
            <div class="ap-header">
              <span>🎵 Ses Parçası Seç</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="apClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="ap-list" id="audioList">
              <div class="ap-item active" data-track="0">🔊 Parça 1</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── PLAYBACK SPEED POPUP (YENİ) ── -->
          <div class="speed-popup hidden" id="speedPopup">
            <div class="sp2-header">
              <span>⏩ Oynatma Hızı</span>
            </div>
            <div class="sp2-list" id="speedList">
              <div class="sp2-item" data-speed="0.25">0.25×</div>
              <div class="sp2-item" data-speed="0.5">0.5×</div>
              <div class="sp2-item" data-speed="0.75">0.75×</div>
              <div class="sp2-item active" data-speed="1">1× Normal</div>
              <div class="sp2-item" data-speed="1.25">1.25×</div>
              <div class="sp2-item" data-speed="1.5">1.5×</div>
              <div class="sp2-item" data-speed="2">2×</div>
              <div class="sp2-item" data-speed="3">3×</div>
              <div class="sp2-item" data-speed="4">4×</div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── SLEEP TIMER POPUP (YENİ) ── -->
```
