          <div class="sleep-popup hidden" id="sleepPopup">
            <div class="slp-header">
              <span>😴 Uyku Zamanlayıcısı</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="slpClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="slp-body">
              <div class="slp-options">
                <button class="btn btn-sm" data-sleep="15">15 dk</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm" data-sleep="30">30 dk</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm" data-sleep="45">45 dk</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm" data-sleep="60">1 saat</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm" data-sleep="90">1.5 saat</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm" data-sleep="120">2 saat</button>
              </div>
              <div class="slp-custom">
                <label>Özel Süre (dakika)</label>
                <input type="number" id="sleepCustomMin" class="form-input" min="1" max="480" value="30" />
                <button class="btn btn-sm mt-2" id="sleepCustomStart">Başlat</button>
              </div>
              <div class="slp-active hidden" id="sleepActive">
                <div class="slp-remaining" id="sleepRemaining">00:00</div>
                <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger)" id="sleepCancelBtn">İptal</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- ── SHARE POPUP (YENİ) ── -->
          <div class="share-popup hidden" id="sharePopup">
            <div class="share-header">
              <span>📤 Paylaş</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="shareClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="share-body">
              <div class="share-url">
                <input type="text" id="shareUrl" class="form-input" readonly />
                <button class="btn btn-sm" id="shareCopyBtn">📋</button>
              </div>
              <div class="share-social">
                <button class="share-btn share-whatsapp" title="WhatsApp">💬</button>
                <button class="share-btn share-telegram" title="Telegram">✈️</button>
                <button class="share-btn share-twitter" title="X / Twitter">🐦</button>
                <button class="share-btn share-email" title="E-posta">📧</button>
                <button class="share-btn share-qr" title="QR Kod">📷</button>
              </div>
              <canvas id="shareQrCanvas" class="share-qr-canvas hidden" width="200" height="200"></canvas>
            </div>
          </div>

        </div><!-- /player-area -->

        <!-- ── CHANNEL SIDEBAR ── -->
        <div class="ch-sidebar">

          <!-- Search & Add -->
          <div class="ch-search-bar">
            <div class="ch-search-input-wrap">
              <span class="ch-search-icon">🔍</span>
              <input type="text" id="chSearch" class="ch-search" placeholder="Kanal ara…" aria-label="Kanal Ara" />
              <button class="icon-btn" id="chSearchClear" title="Temizle">✕</button>
            </div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="chAddBtn" title="Kanal Ekle">+</button>
          </div>

          <!-- Category Tabs (scrollable) -->
          <div class="cat-tabs" id="catTabs" role="tablist">
            <div class="cat-tab active" data-cat="all" role="tab" aria-selected="true">Tümü</div>
          </div>

          <!-- Filter Buttons -->
          <div class="ch-filters">
            <button class="ch-filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Tümü</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="fav">⭐</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="hd">HD</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="4k">4K</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="online">🟢</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="recording">⏺</button>
            <select id="chSort" class="ch-sort" aria-label="Sıralama">
              <option value="default">Sıralama: Varsayılan</option>
              <option value="alpha">A → Z</option>
              <option value="alpha_rev">Z → A</option>
              <option value="quality">Kalite ↓</option>
              <option value="status">Durum</option>
              <option value="recent">Son İzlenen</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <!-- Channel List -->
          <div class="ch-list" id="chList" role="listbox" aria-label="Kanal Listesi">
            <div class="empty" id="chListEmpty">
              <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
              <div class="empty-title">Kanal Yok</div>
              <div class="empty-sub">Bir playlist yükleyin veya kaynak ekleyin</div>
              <button class="btn btn-sm mt-3" id="chEmptyAddBtn">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Footer -->
          <div class="ch-footer">
            <span id="chCountLabel">0 kanal</span>
            <button class="icon-btn" id="chCollapseBtn" title="Grupları Daralt" aria-label="Grupları Daralt">📥</button>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div><!-- /live-layout -->
    </div><!-- /page-live -->

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         8. PAGE: DUAL CHANNEL (YENİ)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-dual" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🖥️ İki Ekran — Yan Yana İzle</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="dualSwapBtn">🔄 Değiştir</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dualAudio1Btn">🔊 Sol</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dualAudio2Btn">🔇 Sağ</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dual-layout">
        <div class="dual-pane" id="dualPane1">
          <div class="dual-pane-header">
            <span id="dualCh1Name">Sol Ekran</span>
            <select id="dualCh1Select" class="form-select form-select-sm"></select>
          </div>
          <video id="dualVideo1" playsinline muted class="dual-video"></video>
          <div class="dual-pane-empty" id="dualEmpty1">
            <div>📺</div>
            <div>Kanal Seçin</div>
          </div>
          <div class="dual-pane-controls">
            <button class="pc-btn" data-dual="1-play">▶</button>
            <button class="pc-btn" data-dual="1-vol">🔊</button>
            <button class="pc-btn" data-dual="1-full">⛶</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="dual-separator" id="dualSep">
          <button class="dual-sep-btn" id="dualFullSwap" title="Değiştir">⟷</button>
        </div>
        <div class="dual-pane" id="dualPane2">
          <div class="dual-pane-header">
            <span id="dualCh2Name">Sağ Ekran</span>
            <select id="dualCh2Select" class="form-select form-select-sm"></select>
          </div>
          <video id="dualVideo2" playsinline muted class="dual-video"></video>
          <div class="dual-pane-empty" id="dualEmpty2">
            <div>📺</div>
            <div>Kanal Seçin</div>
          </div>
          <div class="dual-pane-controls">
            <button class="pc-btn" data-dual="2-play">▶</button>
            <button class="pc-btn" data-dual="2-vol">🔊</button>
            <button class="pc-btn" data-dual="2-full">⛶</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         9. PAGE: MOSAIC VIEW (YENİ — 4/9/16 Kanal)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-mosaic" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>▦ Mozaik Görünüm</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <div class="mosaic-layout-btns">
            <button class="btn btn-sm active" data-mosaic="4">2×2</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" data-mosaic="9">3×3</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" data-mosaic="16">4×4</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" data-mosaic="6">2+4</button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="mosaicAddAll">📡 Tümünü Ekle</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="mosaicClear">🗑️ Temizle</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mosaic-grid" id="mosaicGrid" data-cols="2" data-rows="2">
        <!-- Mosaic cells generated by JS -->
      </div>
      <div class="mosaic-ch-select-bar" id="mosaicChBar">
        <input type="text" id="mosaicSearch" class="form-input" placeholder="Kanal ara…" />
        <div class="mosaic-ch-list" id="mosaicChList" role="listbox"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         10. PAGE: MOVIES
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-movies" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🎬 Filmler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="moviesCountLabel">0 film</span>
          <input type="text" id="moviesSearch" class="form-input" placeholder="Film ara…" />
          <select id="moviesGenre" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="all">Tüm Türler</option>
            <option value="action">Aksiyon</option>
            <option value="comedy">Komedi</option>
            <option value="drama">Drama</option>
            <option value="horror">Korku</option>
            <option value="scifi">Bilim Kurgu</option>
            <option value="romance">Romantik</option>
            <option value="thriller">Gerilim</option>
            <option value="animation">Animasyon</option>
            <option value="documentary">Belgesel</option>
          </select>
          <select id="moviesSort" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="new">Yeni Eklenen</option>
            <option value="az">A → Z</option>
            <option value="za">Z → A</option>
            <option value="year">Yıl ↓</option>
            <option value="rating">Puan ↓</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Movie Hero Banner (YENİ) -->
      <div class="movie-hero" id="movieHero" style="display:none">
        <div class="movie-hero-bg" id="movieHeroBg"></div>
        <div class="movie-hero-info">
          <h1 id="movieHeroTitle">—</h1>
          <p id="movieHeroDesc" class="movie-hero-desc">—</p>
          <div class="movie-hero-meta" id="movieHeroMeta"></div>
          <div class="movie-hero-actions">
            <button class="btn" id="movieHeroPlay">▶ İzle</button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="movieHeroFav">☆ Favorilere Ekle</button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="movieHeroInfo">ℹ️ Detay</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-4" id="moviesGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🎬</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Film Bulunamadı</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Film kaynağı ekleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         11. PAGE: SERIES
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-series" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📺 Diziler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="seriesCountLabel">0 dizi</span>
          <input type="text" id="seriesSearch" class="form-input" placeholder="Dizi ara…" />
          <select id="seriesGenre" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="all">Tüm Türler</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-4" id="seriesGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📺</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Dizi Bulunamadı</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Dizi kaynağı ekleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         12. PAGE: EPG (Yatay Timeline Görünümü)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-epg" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📅 Elektronik Program Rehberi</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <input type="text" id="epgSearch" class="form-input" placeholder="Program ara…" />
          <select id="epgCatFilter" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="all">Tüm Kategoriler</option>
          </select>
          <select id="epgDaySelect" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="0">Bugün</option>
          </select>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="epgJumpNow">⏱ Şu An</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="epgExportBtn">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="epg-container">
        <div class="epg-sidebar-ch" id="epgSidebarCh"></div>
        <div class="epg-content">
          <div class="epg-ruler" id="epgRuler"></div>
          <div class="epg-grid-scroll" id="epgGridScroll">
            <div class="epg-grid" id="epgGrid"></div>
            <div class="epg-now-line" id="epgNowLine"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         13. PAGE: FAVORITES (Çoklu Liste Desteği — YENİ)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-favorites" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⭐ Favoriler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="favCountLabel">0 öğe</span>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="favNewListBtn">+ Yeni Liste</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="favExportBtn">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger)" id="favClearBtn">🗑️ Temizle</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="fav-tabs" id="favTabs">
        <div class="fav-tab active" data-favlist="default">⭐ Tümü</div>
      </div>
      <div class="ch-list" id="favList">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">⭐</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Favori Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Kanal listesinde ☆ tıklayarak favorilere ekle</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         14. PAGE: DVR / KAYITLAR
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-dvr" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⏺ DVR / Kayıtlar</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="dvrNewTimer">⏰ Yeni Zamanlayıcı</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dvrBulkDelete" style="display:none">🗑️ Seçileni Sil</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tabs-bar" role="tablist">
        <div class="tab-item active" data-dvr="recordings" role="tab">📁 Kayıtlar (<span id="dvrRecCount">0</span>)</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="timers" role="tab">⏰ Zamanlayıcılar (<span id="dvrTimerCount">0</span>)</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="schedule" role="tab">📅 Takvim</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-content" id="dvrContent">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📁</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Kayıt Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Kayıt zamanlayıcısı oluşturun</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         15. PAGE: CATCH-UP TV
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-catchup" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⏪ Catch-Up TV</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <select id="catchupCh" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="all">Tüm Kanallar</option>
          </select>
          <select id="catchupDay" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="0">Bugün</option>
            <option value="1">Dün</option>
            <option value="2">2 Gün Önce</option>
            <option value="3">3 Gün Önce</option>
            <option value="7">1 Hafta Önce</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-4" id="catchupGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">⏪</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Catch-Up Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Son 7 gün içindeki programları geri izleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         16. PAGE: OTOMATIK KAYIT (YENİ)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-autorec" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🔄 Otomatik Kaydediciler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="autoRecNewBtn">+ Yeni Oto Kayıt</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="text-muted mb-4" style="max-width:600px">
        Belirlediğiniz kurallara göre programları otomatik olarak kaydedin.
        Kanal, kelime, tür veya zaman filtresi tanımlayabilirsiniz.
      </p>
      <div class="autorec-list" id="autoRecList">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🔄</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Oto Kayıt Kuralı Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Otomatik kayıt kuralları oluşturun</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         17. PAGE: WATCH HISTORY (YENİ)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-history" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📜 İzleme Geçmişi</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="historyCountLabel">0 kayıt</span>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="historyExportBtn">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger)" id="historyClearBtn">🗑️ Temizle</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="history-list" id="historyList">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📜</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Geçmiş Boş</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">İzleme geçmişiniz burada görünecek</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         18. PAGE: AI RECOMMENDATIONS
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-ai_rec" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🤖 Akıllı Öneriler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="aiRecRefresh">🔄 Yenile</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-mood-selector" id="aiMoodSelector">
        <div class="ai-mood-card" data-mood="relax"><span>😌</span><span>Rahatla</span></div>
        <div class="ai-mood-card" data-mood="action"><span>💥</span><span>Aksiyon</span></div>
        <div class="ai-mood-card" data-mood="learn"><span>📚</span><span>Öğren</span></div>
        <div class="ai-mood-card" data-mood="fun"><span>🎉</span><span>Eğlen</span></div>
        <div class="ai-mood-card" data-mood="news"><span>📰</span><span>Haberler</span></div>
        <div class="ai-mood-card" data-mood="sports"><span>⚽</span><span>Spor</span></div>
        <div class="ai-mood-card" data-mood="romance"><span>💕</span><span>Aşk</span></div>
        <div class="ai-mood-card" data-mood="documentary"><span>🌍</span><span>Belgesel</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-3 mt-4" id="aiRecGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🤖</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Analiz Ediliyor…</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Birkaç kanal izledikten sonra öneriler görünecek</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         19. PAGE: AI SEARCH
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-ai_search" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🔍 Akıllı Arama</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-search-area">
        <div class="ai-search-big">
          <span class="ai-search-icon">🤖</span>
          <input type="text" id="aiSearchInput" class="ai-search-input" placeholder="Doğal dil ile arayın… (ör: 'Dün akşamki maçı izle', 'Korku filmi öner')" />
          <button class="btn" id="aiSearchBtn">Ara</button>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-search-suggestions">
          <span class="ai-suggestion" data-query="Son izlediğim kanalı aç">⏪ Son izlediğim kanalı aç</span>
          <span class="ai-suggestion" data-query="Bu akşam maçı olan kanallar">⚽ Bu akşam maçı olan kanallar</span>
          <span class="ai-suggestion" data-query="En yüksek kalitedeki kanallar">🎬 En yüksek kalitedeki kanallar</span>
          <span class="ai-suggestion" data-query="Popüler dizileri göster">📺 Popüler dizileri göster</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-search-results" id="aiSearchResults"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         20. PAGE: AI PROGRAM SUMMARY
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-ai_sum" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📝 Program Özet</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="text-muted mb-4" style="max-width:600px">
        Şu an yayında olan programların AI tarafından oluşturulan özetlerini görün.
        Çocuklar için uygun mu, şiddet içeriyor mu, komedi mi gibi bilgiler.
      </p>
      <div class="grid-3" id="aiSumGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📝</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Özet Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Bir kanal izlerken program özetleri görünecek</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         21. PAGE: MOOD RECOMMENDATIONS (YENİ)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-ai_mood" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🎭 Mod Bazlı Öneriler</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="mood-wheel" id="moodWheel">
        <div class="mood-segment" data-mood="happy" style="--hue:50">😊 Mutlu</div>
        <div class="mood-segment" data-mood="excited" style="--hue:0">🤩 Heyecanlı</div>
        <div class="mood-segment" data-mood="calm" style="--hue:200">🧘 Sakin</div>
        <div class="mood-segment" data-mood="sad" style="--hue:240">😢 Üzgün</div>
        <div class="mood-segment" data-mood="energetic" style="--hue:120">💃 Enerjik</div>
        <div class="mood-segment" data-mood="curious" style="--hue:280">🔍 Meraklı</div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-3 mt-4" id="moodResults">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🎭</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Mod Seçin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         22. PAGE: PLAYLIST EDITOR
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-playlist" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📋 Playlist Editör</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pleImportBtn">📥 İçe Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pleNewBtn">+ Yeni Kaynak</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pleValidateBtn">✅ Doğrula</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ple-layout">
        <div class="ple-sidebar" id="pleSidebar">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Kaynak Yok</div>
            <div class="empty-sub">Bir playlist kaynağı ekleyin</div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm mt-3" id="pleAddSource">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ple-editor" id="pleEditor">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Playlist Seç</div>
            <div class="empty-sub">Sol taraftan bir playlist seçin</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         23. PAGE: IPTV DIRECTORY
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-directory" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🗂️ IPTV Dizin</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <input type="text" id="dirSearch" class="form-input" placeholder="Dizinde ara…" />
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dirRefresh">🔄 Yenile</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-3" id="dirGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🗂️</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Dizin Yükleniyor…</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         24. PAGE: WATCH PARTY
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-watchparty" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>👥 Watch Party</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="wp-layout">
        <div class="wp-left">
          <div id="wpEmpty" class="wp-empty">
            <div class="wp-empty-icon">👥</div>
            <div class="wp-empty-title">Arkadaşlarınla İzle</div>
            <div class="wp-empty-sub">Bir oda oluştur veya katıl</div>
            <div class="wp-actions">
              <button class="btn" id="wpCreateBtn">🏠 Oda Oluştur</button>
              <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="wpJoinBtn">🔗 Odaya Katıl</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="wpMain"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="wp-right">
          <div class="wp-members-section">
            <h3>Üyeler <span id="wpMemberCount">0</span></h3>
            <div id="wpMembers"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="wp-chat-section">
            <h3>Sohbet</h3>
            <div class="wp-reactions" id="wpReactions">
              <button class="reaction-btn" data-reaction="👍">👍</button>
              <button class="reaction-btn" data-reaction="😂">😂</button>
              <button class="reaction-btn" data-reaction="❤️">❤️</button>
              <button class="reaction-btn" data-reaction="🎉">🎉</button>
              <button class="reaction-btn" data-reaction="😮">😮</button>
              <button class="reaction-btn" data-reaction="😢">😢</button>
            </div>
            <div class="wp-chat" id="wpChatMsgs"></div>
            <div class="wp-chat-input">
              <input type="text" id="wpChatInput" class="form-input" placeholder="Mesaj yaz…" />
              <button class="btn btn-sm" id="wpChatSend">Gönder</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         25. PAGE: CAST / YAYIN YAP
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-cast" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📺 Yayın Yap</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="castScanBtn">📡 Cihaz Tara</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cast-protocols">
        <div class="cast-proto" data-proto="chromecast">
          <span class="cast-proto-icon">📺</span>
          <span>Chromecast</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cast-proto" data-proto="airplay">
          <span class="cast-proto-icon">🍎</span>
          <span>AirPlay</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cast-proto" data-proto="dlna">
          <span class="cast-proto-icon">📡</span>
          <span>DLNA</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cast-proto" data-proto="webos">
          <span class="cast-proto-icon">📺</span>
          <span>WebOS</span>
        </div>
        <div class="cast-proto" data-proto="tizen">
          <span class="cast-proto-icon">📺</span>
          <span>Tizen</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="cast-devices" id="castDevices">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Cihaz Aranıyor…</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Cihaz tara butonuna basın</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         26. PAGE: MAP VIEW (YENİ — Dünya Haritasında Yayınlar)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-map" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🗺️ Harita Görünümü</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="mapLocateBtn">📍 Konumum</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="map-container" id="mapContainer">
        <canvas id="worldMapCanvas"></canvas>
        <div class="map-overlay-info" id="mapInfo">
          <div class="map-info-title" id="mapInfoTitle">—</div>
          <div class="map-info-ch" id="mapInfoCh">—</div>
          <div class="map-info-viewers" id="mapInfoViewers">—</div>
        </div>
        <div class="map-legend">
          <div class="map-legend-item"><span class="map-dot high"></span> Yoğun</div>
          <div class="map-legend-item"><span class="map-dot mid"></span> Orta</div>
          <div class="map-legend-item"><span class="map-dot low"></span> Az</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         27. PAGE: STATISTICS
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-stats" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📊 İstatistikler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <select id="statsPeriod" class="form-select form-select-sm">
            <option value="today">Bugün</option>
            <option value="week">Bu Hafta</option>
            <option value="month" selected>Bu Ay</option>
            <option value="all">Tüm Zamanlar</option>
          </select>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="statsExport">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="statsReset">🔄 Sıfırla</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Summary Cards -->
      <div class="stats-grid" id="statsGrid"></div>
      <!-- Charts Row -->
      <div class="charts-row mt-4">
        <div class="chart-card">
          <h3>📈 Bitrate Geçmişi</h3>
          <div class="chart-container">
            <canvas id="bitrateChart"></canvas>
            <div class="chart-overlay" id="chartOverlay">0 Mbps</div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="chart-card">
          <h3>📊 Saatlik İzlenme</h3>
          <div class="chart-container">
            <canvas id="hourlyChart"></canvas>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Top Channels -->
      <div class="mt-4">
        <h3 class="mb-2">🏆 En Çok İzlenen Kanallar</h3>
        <div class="top-ch-list" id="topChList"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         28. PAGE: LIVE VIEWERS (YENİ)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-liveviewers" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>👁️ Canlı İzleyici Sayacı</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="lvRefresh">🔄 Yenile</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="lv-grid" id="lvGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">👁️</div>
          <div class="empty-title">İzleyici Verisi Yok</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         29. PAGE: PARENTAL CONTROLS (YENİ)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-parental" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🔒 Aile Kontrolü</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="parental-container">
        <div class="parental-pin-area">
          <div class="parental-lock-icon" id="parentalLockIcon">🔓</div>
          <h3 id="parentalStatus">Aile Kontrolü Kapalı</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>PIN Kodu</label>
            <div class="pin-input-group">
              <input type="password" id="parentalPin" class="form-input" maxlength="4" placeholder="4 haneli PIN" />
              <button class="btn btn-sm" id="parentalSetPin">Kaydet</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="parental-rules mt-4">
          <h3>Kurallar</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Çocuk Modu</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="parentalKidsMode" />
              <label for="parentalKidsMode" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Yaş Sınırı</label>
            <select id="parentalAgeLimit" class="form-select">
              <option value="all">Sınırsız</option>
              <option value="7">7+</option>
              <option value="13">13+</option>
              <option value="16">16+</option>
              <option value="18">18+</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Zaman Sınırı (saat/gün)</label>
            <input type="number" id="parentalTimeLimit" class="form-input" min="0" max="24" value="0" placeholder="0 = Sınırsız" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Yasaklı Kanallar</label>
            <div class="parental-blocked-list" id="parentalBlockedList">
              <div class="empty"><div class="empty-sub">Yasaklı kanal yok</div></div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
         30. PAGE: SETTINGS (YENİ — Genişletilmiş)
         ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
    <div id="page-settings" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⚙️ Ayarlar</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="settings-grid">

        <!-- GENEL -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🎨 Görünüm</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Tema</label>
            <select id="setTheme" class="form-select">
              <option value="dark">🌙 Koyu (Varsayılan)</option>
              <option value="amoled">⬛ AMOLED Siyah</option>
              <option value="navy">🔵 Gece Mavisi</option>
              <option value="blue">🌊 Okyanus</option>
              <option value="purple">🔮 Mor Gece</option>
              <option value="green">🌲 Orman</option>
              <option value="gold">✨ Altın</option>
              <option value="rose">🌸 Gül</option>
              <option value="light">☀️ Açık</option>
              <option value="auto">🔄 Sistem Teması</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Dil</label>
            <select id="setLang" class="form-select">
              <option value="tr">🇹🇷 Türkçe</option>
              <option value="en">🇬🇧 English</option>
              <option value="de">🇩🇪 Deutsch</option>
              <option value="fr">🇫🇷 Français</option>
              <option value="ar">🇸🇦 العربية</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Animasyonlar</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAnimations" checked />
              <label for="setAnimations" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Kompakt Mod</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setCompactMode" />
              <label for="setCompactMode" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Kart Stili</label>
            <select id="setCardStyle" class="form-select">
              <option value="default">Varsayılan</option>
              <option value="rounded">Yuvarlak</option>
              <option value="sharp">Köşeli</option>
              <option value="glass">Cam (Glass)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Arka Plan Partikülleri</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setParticles" checked />
              <label for="setParticles" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Zaman Dilimi</label>
            <select id="setTZ" class="form-select">
              <option value="auto">Otomatik</option>
              <option value="Europe/Istanbul">İstanbul</option>
              <option value="Europe/London">Londra</option>
              <option value="America/New_York">New York</option>
              <option value="Asia/Tokyo">Tokyo</option>
              <option value="Asia/Dubai">Dubai</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- OYNATICI -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🎬 Oynatıcı</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Otomatik Oynat</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAutoplay" checked />
              <label for="setAutoplay" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Otomatik Kalite</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAutoQuality" checked />
              <label for="setAutoQuality" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Varsayılan Ses</label>
            <div class="set-group-inline">
              <input type="range" id="setDefVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="1" class="flex-1" />
              <span id="setDefVolVal" class="set-inline-label">100%</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>HLS Motoru</label>
            <select id="setHlsEngine" class="form-select">
              <option value="hls">hls.js (Varsayılan)</option>
              <option value="native">Tarayıcı Native</option>
              <option value="shaka">Shaka Player</option>
              <option value="dash">dash.js (DASH)</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Düşük Gecikme Modu</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setLowLatency" />
              <label for="setLowLatency" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Buffer Süresi (saniye)</label>
            <input type="number" id="setBufferSec" class="form-input" min="1" max="60" value="30" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Sinema Modu Karartması</label>
            <div class="set-group-inline">
              <input type="range" id="setCinemaDim" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="0.8" class="flex-1" />
              <span id="setCinemaDimVal" class="set-inline-label">80%</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Oynatma Hızı Kaydet</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setRememberSpeed" />
              <label for="setRememberSpeed" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- BİLDİRİMLER -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🔔 Bildirimler</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Program Başlangıcı</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifProg" checked />
              <label for="setNotifProg" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Ön Bildirim (dk)</label>
            <input type="number" id="setNotifPreMin" class="form-input" min="0" max="60" value="5" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>DVR Hatırlatıcı</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifDvr" checked />
              <label for="setNotifDvr" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Watch Party Davetleri</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifWp" checked />
              <label for="setNotifWp" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Ses Efekti</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setNotifSound" checked />
              <label for="setNotifSound" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- AĞ & BAĞLANTI (YENİ) -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🌐 Ağ</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Otomatik Yeniden Bağlan</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAutoReconnect" checked />
              <label for="setAutoReconnect" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Bağlantı Zaman Aşımı (s)</label>
            <input type="number" id="setConnTimeout" class="form-input" min="5" max="120" value="30" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Maksimum Deneme</label>
            <input type="number" id="setMaxRetries" class="form-input" min="1" max="20" value="5" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Yedek Sunucu Kullan</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setFailover" />
              <label for="setFailover" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Bant Genişliği Sınırla</label>
            <div class="set-group-inline">
              <input type="range" id="setBwLimit" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="0" class="flex-1" />
              <span id="setBwLimitVal" class="set-inline-label">Sınırsız</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- GİZLİLİK -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>🔒 Gizlilik</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>İzleme Geçmişi Kaydet</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setHistory" checked />
              <label for="setHistory" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Anonim Analitik</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="setAnalytics" />
              <label for="setAnalytics" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Çerez Tercihi</label>
            <select id="setCookies" class="form-select">
              <option value="all">Tümü</option>
              <option value="essential">Yalnızca Gerekli</option>
              <option value="none">Hiçbir</option>
            </select>
          </div>
        </div>

        // TÜM AYARLARIN JSON YÜKLE/İNDİR (YENİ)
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>💾 Yedekleme</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Ayarları Dışa Aktar</label>
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full" id="setExportAll">📤 İndir (JSON)</button>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Ayarları İçe Aktar</label>
            <div class="drop-zone-sm" id="setImportZone">
              <span>📂 Dosya Sürükleyin</span>
              <input type="file" id="setImportFile" accept=".json" hidden />
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Varsayılanlara Dön</label>
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full" style="background:var(--danger)" id="setResetAll">🔄 Tümünü Sıfırla</button>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- HAKKINDA -->
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>ℹ️ Hakkında</h3>
          <div class="set-info">
            <div class="set-info-row"><span class="text-muted">Sürüm</span><span>5.0.0 Ultra</span></div>
            <div class="set-info-row"><span class="text-muted">Derleme</span><span id="setBuildDate">2025-03-21</span></div>
            <div class="set-info-row"><span class="text-muted">HLS Motoru</span><span>hls.js 1.6.x</span></div>
            <div class="set-info-row"><span class="text-muted">Lisans</span><span>MIT</span></div>
            <div class="set-info-row"><span class="text-muted">Lokal Depo</span><span id="setStorageUsed">—</span></div>
          </div>
          <div class="mt-3">
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mb-2" id="setCheckUpdate">🔄 Güncelleme Kontrol Et</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mb-2" id="setShowKeys">⌨️ Klavye Kısayolları</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mb-2" id="setShowChangelog">📝 Değişiklik Günlüğü</button>
            <button class="btn btn-sm w-full" style="background:var(--danger)" id="setNukeData">💣 Tüm Verileri Sil</button>
          </div>
        </div>

      </div><!-- /settings-grid -->
    </div><!-- /page-settings -->

  </div><!-- /main-wrap -->
</div><!-- /app -->

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     31. FLOATING / OVERLAY BİLEŞENLER
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<!-- MINI PLAYER -->
<div id="miniPlayer" class="mini-player hidden">
  <div class="mp-header">
    <div class="mp-title" id="mpChName">—</div>
    <div class="mp-btns">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpExpand" title="Büyüt">⛶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpClose" title="Kapat">✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="mp-body">
    <video id="mpThumbVideo" muted playsinline></video>
    <div class="mp-controls">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpPlayBtn">▶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="mpMuteBtn">🔊</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- FLOATING PIP WINDOW -->
<div id="pipWin" class="pip-win hidden">
  <div class="pip-title-bar" id="pipTitleBar">
    <span class="pip-name" id="pipChName">—</span>
    <div class="pip-btns">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipFullBtn" title="Tam Ekran">⛶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipCloseBtn" title="Kapat">✕</button>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pip-body">
    <video id="pipVideo" muted playsinline></video>
    <div class="pip-controls">
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipPlayBtn">▶</button>
      <button class="icon-btn" id="pipMuteBtn">🔊</button>
      <input type="range" id="pipVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="1" class="pip-vol" />
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pip-resize" id="pipResize"></div>
</div>

<!-- CONTEXT MENU -->
<div id="ctxMenu" class="ctx-menu">
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="play">▶ Oynat</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="fav">⭐ Favorilere Ekle</div>
  <div class="ctx-divider"></div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="info">ℹ️ Kanal Bilgisi</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="copy">📋 URL Kopyala</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="rec">⏺ Kayıt Başlat</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="dual">🖥️ İkinci Ekrana Ekle</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="mosaic">▦ Mozaikte Göster</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="cast">📺 Yayın Yap</div>
  <div class="ctx-divider"></div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="block">🔒 Aile Kontrolüne Ekle</div>
  <div class="ctx-item" data-action="rename">✏️ Yeniden Adlandır</div>
  <div class="ctx-divider"></div>
  <div class="ctx-item ctx-danger" data-action="remove">🗑️ Listeden Kaldır</div>
</div>

<!-- COMMAND PALETTE -->
<div id="cmdOverlay" class="cmd-overlay">
  <div class="cmd-palette">
    <div class="cmd-search-wrap">
      <span class="cmd-search-icon">🔍</span>
      <input type="text" id="cmdInput" class="cmd-input" placeholder="Komut yaz veya kanal ara…" autofocus />
      <kbd class="cmd-esc">ESC</kbd>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-section" id="cmdSectionQuick">
      <div class="cmd-section-label">Hızlı Erişim</div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="epg"><span class="cmd-item-icon">📅</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">EPG Aç</div><div class="cmd-item-sub">Program Rehberi</div></div><kbd>E</kbd></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="stats"><span class="cmd-item-icon">📊</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">İstatistikler</div><div class="cmd-item-sub">Akış bilgileri</div></div><kbd>S</kbd></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="screenshot"><span class="cmd-item-icon">📸</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">Ekran Görüntüsü</div><div class="cmd-item-sub">Anlık yakala</div></div><kbd>P</kbd></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="fullscreen"><span class="cmd-item-icon">⛶</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">Tam Ekran</div></div><kbd>F</kbd></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="theme"><span class="cmd-item-icon">🎨</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">Tema Değiştir</div></div><kbd>T</kbd></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="pip"><span class="cmd-item-icon">🖼</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">Picture-in-Picture</div></div><kbd>I</kbd></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="dual"><span class="cmd-item-icon">🖥️</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">İki Ekran Modu</div></div><kbd>D</kbd></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="mosaic"><span class="cmd-item-icon">▦</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">Mozaik Görünüm</div></div></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="cinema"><span class="cmd-item-icon">🎥</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">Sinema Modu</div></div></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="mute"><span class="cmd-item-icon">🔇</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">Sessiz</div></div><kbd>M</kbd></div>
      <div class="cmd-item" data-cmd="vr"><span class="cmd-item-icon">🎮</span><div><div class="cmd-item-name">Sanal Kumanda</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-section" id="cmdSectionChannels">
      <div class="cmd-section-label">Kanallar</div>
      <div id="cmdChannelList"><div class="empty"><div class="empty-title">Kanal yazın…</div></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cmd-section" id="cmdSectionRecent">
      <div class="cmd-section-label">Son İzlenenler</div>
      <div id="cmdRecentList"><div class="empty"><div class="empty-title">Henüz kanal seçilmedi</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- NOTIFICATION CENTER -->
<div id="notifCenter" class="notif-center">
  <div class="notif-center-header">
    <h3>🔔 Bildirimler</h3>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="clearAllNotif">Tümünü Temizle</button>
  </div>
  <div class="notif-list" id="notifList">
    <div class="empty">
      <div class="empty-icon">🔕</div>
      <div class="empty-title">Bildirim Yok</div>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- VIRTUAL REMOTE -->
<div id="vrWrap" class="vr-wrap hidden">
  <div class="vr-header">
    <span>🎮 Sanal Kumanda</span>
    <button class="icon-btn" id="vrClose">✕</button>
  </div>
  <div class="vr-body">
    <div class="vr-color-row">
      <button class="vr-color-btn vr-red" data-vk="col_red" title="Canlı TV">🔴</button>
      <button class="vr-color-btn vr-green" data-vk="col_green" title="EPG">🟢</button>
      <button class="vr-color-btn vr-yellow" data-vk="col_yellow" title="Favori">🟡</button>
      <button class="vr-color-btn vr-blue" data-vk="col_blue" title="Ayarlar">🔵</button>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-dpad-area">
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-up" data-vk="up" title="Önceki Kanal">▲</button>
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-left" data-vk="left" title="Geri">◀</button>
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-ok" data-vk="ok" title="Seç">OK</button>
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-right" data-vk="right" title="İleri">▶</button>
      <button class="vr-dpad vr-down" data-vk="down" title="Sonraki Kanal">▼</button>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-ch-display" id="vrChDisplay">—</div>
    <div class="vr-numpad">
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="1">1</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="2">2</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="3">3</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="4">4</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="5">5</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="6">6</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="7">7</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="8">8</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="9">9</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="backspace">⌫</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="0">0</button>
      <button class="vr-num" data-vk="list">📡</button>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-row">
      <div class="vr-col-btns">
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="vol_up" title="Ses +">🔊</button>
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="mute" title="Sessiz">🔇</button>
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="vol_dn" title="Ses -">🔈</button>
      </div>
      <div class="vr-col-btns">
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="ch_up" title="Kanal +">▲CH</button>
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="prev_ch" title="Önceki Kanal">⏮</button>
        <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="ch_dn" title="Kanal -">▼CH</button>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-transport">
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="rew" title="Geri Sar">⏪</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="play" title="Oynat">▶</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="rec" title="Kaydet">⏺</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="fwd" title="İleri Sar">⏩</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="power" title="Kapat">⏻</button>
    </div>
    <div class="vr-extra">
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="info" title="Bilgi">ℹ️</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="epg" title="EPG">📅</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="fav" title="Favori">⭐</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="menu" title="Menü">☰</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="subs" title="Altyazı">💬</button>
      <button class="vr-action-btn" data-vk="audio" title="Ses">🎵</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- PWA INSTALL BANNER -->
<div id="pwaBanner" class="pwa-banner hidden">
  <div class="pwa-banner-content">
    <span class="pwa-banner-icon">📲</span>
    <div>
      <div class="fw-7">StreamVault Pro'yu Yükle</div>
      <div class="fs-xs text-muted">Masaüstü uygulaması olarak hızlı erişim</div>
    </div>
  </div>
  <div class="pwa-banner-actions">
    <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pwaInstallBtn">Yükle</button>
    <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pwaDismiss">Daha Sonra</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- TOAST STACK -->
<div id="toastStack" class="toast-stack" aria-live="polite"></div>

<!-- BOTTOM NAV (Mobile) -->
<nav id="bottomNav" class="bottom-nav" aria-label="Mobil Navigasyon">
  <a class="bn-item active" data-page="live" href="#"><span>📡</span><span class="bn-label">Canlı</span></a>
  <a class="bn-item" data-page="mosaic" href="#"><span>▦</span><span class="bn-label">Mozaik</span></a>
  <a class="bn-item" data-page="epg" href="#"><span>📅</span><span class="bn-label">EPG</span></a>
  <a class="bn-item" data-page="favorites" href="#"><span>⭐</span><span class="bn-label">Favori</span></a>
  <a class="bn-item" data-page="settings" href="#"><span>⚙️</span><span class="bn-label">Ayar</span></a>
</nav>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     32. MODALLAR (Tüm Modaller)
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->

<!-- Confirm Modal -->
<div id="modal-confirm" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-sm">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3 id="confirmTitle">Onayla</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body"><p id="confirmMsg">Emin misin?</p></div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button><button class="btn" id="confirmOk">Onayla</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Add Source Modal (3 Adımlı) -->
<div id="modal-addSource" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3>📥 Kaynak Ekle</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="steps">
        <div class="step active" id="step1dot"><span>1</span></div>
        <div class="step-line" id="step1line"></div>
        <div class="step" id="step2dot"><span>2</span></div>
        <div class="step-line" id="step2line"></div>
        <div class="step" id="step3dot"><span>3</span></div>
      </div>
      <div class="steps-labels"><span>Tür Seç</span><span>Bilgi Gir</span><span>Tamamla</span></div>
      <div id="addStep1" class="mt-4">
        <div class="source-type-grid">
          <div class="source-type-card active" data-type="m3u"><div class="source-type-icon">📋</div><div class="source-type-title">M3U / M3U8</div><div class="source-type-desc">M3U playlist URL veya dosyası</div></div>
          <div class="source-type-card" data-type="xtream"><div class="source-type-icon">⚡</div><div class="source-type-title">Xtream Codes</div><div class="source-type-desc">Xtream API bilgileriyle bağlan</div></div>
          <div class="source-type-card" data-type="stalker"><div class="source-type-icon">📡</div><div class="source-type-title">Stalker Portal</div><div class="source-type-desc">Stalker middleware ile bağlan</div></div>
          <div class="source-type-card" data-type="file"><div class="source-type-icon">📁</div><div class="source-type-title">Dosya Yükle</div><div class="source-type-desc">Bilgisayarından M3U veya JSON</div></div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="addStep2" class="mt-4 hidden">
        <div id="addM3uForm">
          <div class="set-group"><label>Ad</label><input type="text" id="addM3uName" class="form-input" placeholder="Playlist adı" /></div>
          <div class="set-group"><label>URL</label><input type="url" id="addM3uUrl" class="form-input" placeholder="https://example.com/playlist.m3u" /></div>
        </div>
        <div id="addXtreamForm" class="hidden">
          <div class="set-group"><label>Ad</label><input type="text" id="addXtName" class="form-input" placeholder="Hesap adı" /></div>
          <div class="set-group"><label>Host</label><input type="url" id="addXtHost" class="form-input" placeholder="http://example.com" /></div>
          <div class="set-group"><label>Kullanıcı Adı</label><input type="text" id="addXtUser" class="form-input" placeholder="Kullanıcı adı" /></div>
          <div class="set-group"><label>Şifre</label><input type="password" id="addXtPass" class="form-input" placeholder="Şifre" /></div>
        </div>
        <div id="addStalkerForm" class="hidden">
          <div class="set-group"><label>Ad</label><input type="text" id="addStkName" class="form-input" placeholder="Portal adı" /></div>
          <div class="set-group"><label>Portal URL</label><input type="url" id="addStkUrl" class="form-input" placeholder="http://example.com/stalker_portal/c/" /></div>
          <div class="set-group"><label>MAC Adresi</label><input type="text" id="addStkMac" class="form-input" placeholder="00:1A:79:XX:XX:XX" /></div>
        </div>
        <div id="addFileForm" class="hidden">
          <div id="m3uDropZone" class="drop-zone"><div class="drop-zone-icon">📂</div><div class="drop-zone-text">Dosya sürükleyin veya tıklayın</div><div class="drop-zone-sub">.m3u, .m3u8, .json desteklenir</div></div>
          <input type="file" id="m3uFileInput" accept=".m3u,.m3u8,.json" hidden />
        </div>
      </div>
      <div id="addStep3" class="mt-4 hidden">
        <div id="addPreview"><div class="empty"><div class="empty-icon">⏳</div><div class="empty-title">Analiz Ediliyor…</div></div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-ghost" id="addSourceBack">İptal</button><button class="btn" id="addSourceNext">İleri ›</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- EPG Detail Modal -->
<div id="modal-epg-detail" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-sm">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3 id="epgDetailTitle">—</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="epgDetailBody"></div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-ghost" id="epgDetailRecord">⏺ Kaydet</button><button class="btn" id="epgDetailPlay">▶ İzle</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- DVR Timer Modal -->
<div id="modal-dvr-timer" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-md">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3>⏰ DVR Zamanlayıcı</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="set-group"><label>Ad</label><input type="text" id="dvrTimerName" class="form-input" placeholder="Kayıt adı" /></div>
      <div class="set-group"><label>Kanal</label><select id="dvrTimerCh" class="form-select"></select></div>
      <div class="set-group"><label>Başlangıç</label><input type="datetime-local" id="dvrTimerStart" class="form-input" /></div>
      <div class="set-group"><label>Bitiş</label><input type="datetime-local" id="dvrTimerEnd" class="form-input" /></div>
      <div class="set-group"><label>Tekrar</label><select id="dvrTimerRepeat" class="form-select"><option value="none">Tek Seferlik</option><option value="daily">Her Gün</option><option value="weekly">Her Hafta</option><option value="weekdays">Haftaiçi</option></select></div>
      <div class="set-group"><label>Ön Margin (dk)</label><input type="number" id="dvrTimerMarginPre" class="form-input" value="5" min="0" max="30" /></div>
      <div class="set-group"><label>Son Margin (dk)</label><input type="number" id="dvrTimerMarginPost" class="form-input" value="5" min="0" max="30" /></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button><button class="btn" id="dvrTimerSave">💾 Kaydet</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Screenshot Modal -->
<div id="modal-screenshot" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-md">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3>📸 Ekran Görüntüsü</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body text-center"><img id="screenshotImg" style="max-width:100%;border-radius:8px" alt="Screenshot" /></div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-ghost" id="screenshotCopy">📋 Panoya Kopyala</button><button class="btn" id="screenshotDownload">💾 İndir</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Keyboard Shortcuts Modal -->
<div id="modal-keys" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-md">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3>⌨️ Klavye Kısayolları</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="keysModalBody"></div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn modal-close">Kapat</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Watch Party Join Modal -->
<div id="modal-wp-join" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-sm">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3>🔗 Odaya Katıl</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="set-group"><label>Oda Kodu</label><input type="text" id="wpRoomCode" class="form-input" placeholder="XXXX-XXXX" maxlength="9" /></div>
      <div class="set-group"><label>Kullanıcı Adı</label><input type="text" id="wpJoinUsername" class="form-input" placeholder="Kullanıcı adınız" /></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">İptal</button><button class="btn" id="wpJoinConfirm">Katıl</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Movie Detail Modal (YENİ) -->
<div id="modal-movie-detail" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3 id="movieDetailTitle">—</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="movie-detail-layout">
        <div class="movie-detail-poster" id="movieDetailPoster"></div>
        <div class="movie-detail-info">
          <div class="movie-detail-meta" id="movieDetailMeta"></div>
          <p id="movieDetailDesc">—</p>
          <div class="movie-detail-cast" id="movieDetailCast"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">Kapat</button><button class="btn btn-ghost" id="movieDetailFav">☆ Favorilere Ekle</button><button class="btn" id="movieDetailPlay">▶ İzle</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Series Detail Modal (YENİ) -->
<div id="modal-series-detail" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-lg">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3 id="seriesDetailTitle">—</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body">
      <div class="series-detail-seasons" id="seriesDetailSeasons"></div>
      <div class="series-detail-episodes" id="seriesDetailEpisodes"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn btn-ghost modal-close">Kapat</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- Changelog Modal (YENİ) -->
<div id="modal-changelog" class="modal hidden">
  <div class="modal-backdrop"></div>
  <div class="modal-dialog modal-md">
    <div class="modal-header"><h3>📝 Değişiklik Günlüğü</h3><button class="icon-btn modal-close">✕</button></div>
    <div class="modal-body" id="changelogBody"></div>
    <div class="modal-footer"><button class="btn modal-close">Kapat</button></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     33. HIDDEN / UTILITY ELEMENTS
     ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<canvas id="screenshotCanvas" hidden></canvas>

<!-- Scripts -->
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/hls.js@1.6.2/dist/hls.min.js"></script>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/shaka-player@4.12.5/dist/shaka-player.compiled.min.js"></script>
<script src="app.js"></script>

</body>
</html>
```

---

## 📊 YENİ ÖZELLİKLERİN ÖZETİ

| # | Yeni Bileşen | ID | Açıklama |
|---|-------------|-----|----------|
| 1 | **İki Ekran** | `#page-dual` | 2 kanalı yan yana izleme |
| 2 | **Mozaik Görünüm** | `#page-mosaic` | 2×2 / 3×3 / 4×4 / 2+4 grid |
| 3 | **Kanal Numara Girişi** | `#chNumOverlay` | Uzaktan kumanda tarzı kanal geçişi |
| 4 | **Otomatik Kayıt** | `#page-autorec` | Kural tabanlı kayıt |
| 5 | **İzleme Geçmişi** | `#page-history` | Tam izleme günlüğü |
| 6 | **Mod Önerileri** | `#page-ai_mood` | Ruh haline göre öneri |
| 7 | **Akıllı Arama** | `#page-ai_search` | Doğal dil arama |
| 8 | **Harita Görünümü** | `#page-map` | Dünya haritasında yayınlar |
| 9 | **Canlı İzleyici** | `#page-liveviewers` | Anlık izleyici sayaçları |
| 10 | **Aile Kontrolü** | `#page-parental` | PIN, yaş sınırı, kanal engelleme |
| 11 | **Çoklu Favori Listeleri** | `#favTabs` | Birden fazla favori listesi |
| 12 | **Uyku Zamanlayıcısı** | `#sleepPopup` | 15dk'dan 2 saate kadar |
| 13 | **Stalker Portal** | `#addStalkerForm` | Stalker middleware desteği |
| 14 | **Hız Seçici Popup** | `#speedPopup` | 0.25× – 4× hız |
| 15 | **Kalite Seçici Popup** | `#qualityPopup` | Otomatik/manuel kalite |
| 16 | **Altyazı Seçici** | `#subPopup` | Altyazı parça seçimi |
| 17 | **Ses Parça Seçici** | `#audioPopup` | Dil/seçenek seçimi |
| 18 | **Paylaş Popup** | `#sharePopup` | WhatsApp/Telegram/X/QR |
| 19 | **Film Hero Banner** | `#movieHero` | Öne çıkan film banner |
| 20 | **Film Detay Modal** | `#modal-movie-detail` | Oyuncular, özet, fragman |
| 21 | **Dizi Detay Modal** | `#modal-series-detail` | Sezon & bölüm seçimi |
| 22 | **Ağ Ayarları** | Settings kart | Timeout, retry, bant genişliği |
| 23 | **Yedekleme** | Settings kart | JSON export/import |
| 24 | **Bant Genişliği Göstergesi** | `#tbBandwidth` | Topbar'da anlık hız |
| 25 | **Canlı Yayın Noktası** | `#pcLiveDot` | "LIVE" göstergesi |
| 26 | **Changelog Modal** | `#modal-changelog` | Sürüm değişiklikleri |

## 🚀 Eklenecek Yeni Özellikler (Onay Öncesi Özet)

| # | Yeni Özellik | Açıklama |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Multi-View** | 2×1, 2×2, 3×3 grid — aynı anda 1-9 kanal |
| 2 | **10-Band Equalizer** | Ses frekans equalizer paneli |
| 3 | **Radio / Müzik Modu** | Radyo kanal listesi + müzik player UI |
| 4 | **Sports Modu** | Canlı skor, maç timeline, lig filtresi |
| 5 | **Kids Modu** | Ebeveyn PIN korumalı çocuk arayüzü |
| 6 | **Download Manager** | İndirme kuyruğu + progress takibi |
| 7 | **Network Diagnostics** | Ping test, hız testi, yol izleme |
| 8 | **Theme Creator** | Canlı renk paleti + gradient editör |
| 9 | **Sleep Timer Widget** | Ekranda görünür geri sayım |
| 10 | **Parental Control** | PIN kilidi, yaş filtresi, zaman limiti |
| 11 | **Stream Health Panel** | Genişletilmiş gerçek zamanlı metrikler |
| 12 | **AI Search Sayfası** | Doğal dil + filtre arama motoru |
| 13 | **AI Özet Sayfası** | Program özet + içerik analizi |
| 14 | **Haber Tiker** | Topbar altında kayan haber bandı |
| 15 | **Hava Durumu Widget** | Topbar'da şehir bazlı |
| 16 | **Gesture Rehberi** | Dokunma/swipe yardım overlay |
| 17 | **Logo Yöneticisi** | Kanal logosu yükleme/atama |
| 18 | **EPG Kaynak Ekleme** | XMLTV URL ekleme modal |
| 19 | **Detaylı Kanal Bilgisi** | Tam info modal (codec, bitrate vb.) |
| 20 | **Export / Import** | Tüm uygulama verisini yedekle/geri yükle |

## 📄 BÖLÜM 1 — TAM HTML KODU

```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr" data-theme="dark">
<head>
  <!-- ══ META ══ -->
  <meta charset="UTF-8" />
  <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1.0,maximum-scale=1.0,user-scalable=no" />
  <meta name="description" content="StreamVault Pro – Ultra Gelişmiş IPTV Oynatıcı v5.0" />
  <meta name="theme-color" id="themeColorMeta" content="#0d0d0d" />
  <meta name="mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-capable" content="yes" />
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-status-bar-style" content="black-translucent" />
  <meta name="apple-mobile-web-app-title" content="StreamVault Pro" />
  <title>StreamVault Pro v5.0 — Ultra IPTV</title>

  <!-- ══ PWA ══ -->
  <link rel="manifest" href="manifest.json" />
  <link rel="icon" type="image/png" href="icons/icon-192.png" />
  <link rel="apple-touch-icon" href="icons/icon-512.png" />

  <!-- ══ FONTS ══ -->
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com" />
  <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin />
  <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Inter:wght@300;400;500;600;700;800;900&family=JetBrains+Mono:wght@400;500;700&family=Nunito:wght@700;800;900&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

  <!-- ══ LIBRARIES ══ -->
  <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/hls.js@latest/dist/hls.min.js"></script>

  <!-- ══ CSS ══ -->
  <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css" />
  <style id="customThemeVars">/* Tema Yaratıcısı buraya yazar */</style>
</head>

<body class="no-select" id="appBody">
<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     SPLASH SCREEN
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="splash" class="splash">
  <canvas id="splashCanvas"></canvas>
  <div class="splash-content">
    <div class="splash-logo-wrap">
      <div class="splash-logo-ring"></div>
      <div class="splash-logo">🎬</div>
    </div>
    <div class="splash-title">StreamVault <span class="splash-pro">Pro</span></div>
    <div class="splash-version">v5.0.0 — Ultra Edition</div>
    <div class="splash-progress-wrap">
      <div class="splash-bar-track">
        <div class="splash-bar-fill" id="splashBar"></div>
        <div class="splash-bar-glow" id="splashGlow"></div>
      </div>
      <div class="splash-status" id="splashStatus">Başlatılıyor…</div>
      <div class="splash-pct" id="splashPct">0%</div>
    </div>
    <div class="splash-features">
      <span>📡 Canlı TV</span>
      <span>🎬 Film & Dizi</span>
      <span>🤖 Yapay Zekâ</span>
      <span>👥 Watch Party</span>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     PARENTAL LOCK OVERLAY
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="parentalOverlay" class="parental-overlay hidden">
  <div class="parental-box">
    <div class="parental-icon">🔒</div>
    <h2>Ebeveyn Kilidi</h2>
    <p>Bu içeriğe erişmek için PIN girin</p>
    <div class="pin-display" id="pinDisplay">
      <span></span><span></span><span></span><span></span>
    </div>
    <div class="pin-pad">
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="1">1</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="2">2</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="3">3</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="4">4</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="5">5</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="6">6</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="7">7</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="8">8</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="9">9</button>
      <button class="pin-key pin-clear" data-k="clear">✕</button>
      <button class="pin-key" data-k="0">0</button>
      <button class="pin-key pin-del" data-k="del">⌫</button>
    </div>
    <p class="pin-hint text-muted fs-xs" id="pinHintMsg"></p>
    <button class="btn btn-ghost fs-xs mt-2" id="parentalForgot">PIN'i unuttum</button>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     KIDS MODE OVERLAY
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="kidsModeOverlay" class="kids-overlay hidden">
  <div class="kids-header">
    <div class="kids-logo">🧒 Çocuk Modu</div>
    <button class="kids-exit-btn" id="kidsExitBtn">🔒 Çıkış</button>
  </div>
  <div class="kids-content" id="kidsContent">
    <div class="kids-channels" id="kidsChGrid"></div>
  </div>
  <div class="kids-player-wrap" id="kidsPlayerWrap">
    <video id="kidsVideo" playsinline autoplay></video>
    <div class="kids-controls">
      <button class="kids-ctrl-btn" id="kidsPlayBtn">▶</button>
      <button class="kids-ctrl-btn" id="kidsVolUpBtn">🔊+</button>
      <button class="kids-ctrl-btn" id="kidsVolDnBtn">🔉-</button>
      <button class="kids-ctrl-btn" id="kidsBackBtn">🏠</button>
    </div>
    <div class="kids-ch-name" id="kidsChName">—</div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════
     MAIN APP SHELL
═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════ -->
<div id="app" class="app">

  <!-- Mobile overlay -->
  <div id="mobOverlay" class="mob-overlay"></div>

  <!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
       SIDEBAR
  ════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <aside id="sidebar" class="sidebar">
    <!-- Logo -->
    <div class="sb-logo-area">
      <div class="sb-logo-icon">🎬</div>
      <div class="sb-logo-text">
        <div class="sb-logo-title">StreamVault</div>
        <div class="sb-logo-sub">Pro v5.0</div>
      </div>
      <div class="sb-logo-badge">ULTRA</div>
    </div>

    <!-- Search in sidebar -->
    <div class="sb-search-wrap">
      <span class="sb-search-icon">🔍</span>
      <input type="text" class="sb-search-input" id="sbSearch" placeholder="Sayfa ara…" />
    </div>

    <nav class="sb-nav" id="sbNav">
      <!-- LIVE TV -->
      <a class="sb-item active" data-page="live" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📡</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Canlı TV</span>
        <span class="sb-live-dot"></span>
      </a>

      <!-- MOVIES -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="movies" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">🎬</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Filmler</span>
      </a>

      <!-- SERIES -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="series" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📺</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Diziler</span>
      </a>

      <!-- MULTI-VIEW  ★ YENİ -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="multiview" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">🔲</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Multi-View</span>
        <span class="sb-badge sb-badge-new">YENİ</span>
      </a>

      <!-- EPG -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="epg" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">📅</span>
        <span class="sb-text">EPG</span>
      </a>

      <!-- FAVORITES -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="favorites" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⭐</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Favoriler</span>
        <span class="sb-badge" id="sbFavCount">0</span>
      </a>

      <!-- DVR -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="dvr" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⏺</span>
        <span class="sb-text">DVR</span>
        <span class="sb-badge sb-badge-rec hidden" id="sbRecBadge">REC</span>
      </a>

      <!-- CATCH-UP -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="catchup" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">⏪</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Catch-Up</span>
      </a>

      <!-- RADIO ★ YENİ -->
      <a class="sb-item" data-page="radio" href="#">
        <span class="sb-icon">🎵</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Radyo</span>
        <span class="sb-badge sb-badge-new">YENİ</span>
      </a>

      <a class="sb-item" data-page="sports" href="#">

      </a>

        </a>
      </div>

        <span class="sb-icon">📋</span>
        <span class="sb-text">Playlist</span>
      </a>

        <span class="sb-icon">🗂️</span>
