  <!-- ════════════════════════════════════════
       MAIN WRAP
  ════════════════════════════════════════ -->
  <div class="main-wrap" id="mainWrap">

    <!-- ─────────────────────────────────────
         TOPBAR
    ───────────────────────────────────── -->
    <header class="topbar" id="topbar">
      <div class="tb-left">
        <button class="icon-btn" id="mobMenuBtn" title="Mobil Menü">☰</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="sidebarToggle" title="Sidebar Gizle/Göster">◁</button>
        <nav class="tb-breadcrumb">
          <span class="tb-bc-home">🏠</span>
          <span class="tb-bc-sep">›</span>
          <span class="tb-bc-current" id="tbBcCurrent">Canlı TV</span>
        </nav>
      </div>

      <div class="tb-center">
        <div class="search-wrap">
          <span class="search-icon">🔍</span>
          <input type="text" id="globalSearch" class="search-input"
            placeholder="Kanal, film, program ara… ( / )" autocomplete="off" />
          <button class="icon-btn" id="voiceSearchBtn" title="Sesli Arama">🎤</button>
          <kbd class="search-kbd">/</kbd>
          <div id="searchDropdown" class="search-dd"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tb-right">
        <!-- Hava Durumu ★ YENİ -->
        <div class="tb-weather" id="tbWeather" title="Hava Durumu">
          <span id="tbWeatherIcon">—</span>
          <span id="tbWeatherTemp">—°</span>
        </div>

        <!-- Sleep Timer ★ YENİ -->
        <button class="icon-btn tb-sleep-btn hidden" id="tbSleepDisplay" title="Sleep Timer">
          ⏱ <span id="tbSleepCountdown"></span>
        </button>

        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbCmdBtn" title="Komut Paleti (Ctrl+K)">⚡</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbNotifBtn" title="Bildirimler">
          🔔<span id="tbNotifDot" class="notif-dot hidden"></span>
        </button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbParentalBtn" title="Ebeveyn Kilidi">🔒</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbVrBtn" title="Sanal Kumanda">🎮</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbEqBtn" title="Equalizer">🎚</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbSleepBtn" title="Sleep Timer">⏱</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbScreenshotBtn" title="Ekran Görüntüsü (P)">📸</button>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="tbFullBtn" title="Tam Ekran (F)">⛶</button>
        <div class="tb-clock" id="tbClock">—</div>
        <div class="tb-date" id="tbDate">—</div>
      </div>
    </header>

    <!-- NEWS TICKER ★ YENİ -->
    <div class="news-ticker" id="newsTicker">
      <div class="ticker-label">📰 CANLI</div>
      <div class="ticker-track">
        <div class="ticker-content" id="tickerContent">Haberler yükleniyor…</div>
      </div>
      <button class="icon-btn ticker-close" id="tickerClose">✕</button>
    </div>

    <!-- AI RECOMMENDATION STRIP -->
    <div class="ai-rec-strip hidden" id="aiRecStrip">
      <div class="ai-rec-strip-header">
        <span>🤖 AI Önerileri</span>
        <button class="icon-btn" id="aiRecDismiss">✕</button>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-rec-scroll" id="aiRecScroll"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ═════════════════════════════════════
         PAGES
    ═════════════════════════════════════ -->

    <!-- ───── PAGE: LIVE TV ───── -->
    <div id="page-live" class="page active">
      <div class="live-layout">

        <!-- PLAYER AREA -->
        <div class="player-area" id="playerArea">
          <div class="player-wrap" id="playerWrap">
            <video id="mainVideo" playsinline autoplay muted></video>

            <!-- Loader -->
            <div class="vid-loader" id="vidLoader">
              <div class="loader-ring"></div>
              <div class="loader-text" id="vidLoaderText">Bağlanıyor…</div>
              <div class="loader-url hidden" id="vidLoaderUrl"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Error -->
            <div class="vid-error hidden" id="vidError">
              <div class="vid-error-icon">⚠️</div>
              <div class="vid-error-msg" id="vidErrMsg">Bağlantı hatası</div>
              <div class="vid-error-sub" id="vidErrSub"></div>
              <div class="vid-error-code" id="vidErrCode"></div>
              <div class="vid-error-btns">
                <button class="btn btn-sm" id="retryBtn">🔄 Tekrar Dene</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="altStreamBtn">🔀 Alternatif</button>
                <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="errDiagBtn">🌐 Ağ Test</button>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Idle -->
            <div class="vid-idle" id="vidIdle">
              <div class="vid-idle-icon">📡</div>
              <div class="vid-idle-text">Kanal seçin</div>
              <div class="vid-idle-sub">Listeden bir kanal seçin veya Ctrl+K ile arama yapın</div>
              <button class="btn mt-3" id="vidIdleAddBtn">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
            </div>

            <!-- Channel OSD -->
            <div class="ch-osd hidden" id="chOsd">
              <div class="ch-osd-inner">
                <div class="ch-osd-logo" id="chOsdLogo"></div>
                <div class="ch-osd-info">
                  <div class="ch-osd-num" id="chOsdNum">—</div>
                  <div class="ch-osd-name" id="chOsdName">—</div>
                  <div class="ch-osd-prog" id="chOsdProg">—</div>
                </div>
                <div class="ch-osd-quality" id="chOsdQuality">HD</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Generic OSD -->
            <div class="osd-overlay hidden" id="osdOverlay">
              <div class="osd-text" id="osdText"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Volume OSD -->
            <div class="vol-osd hidden" id="volOsd">
              <div class="vol-osd-icon" id="volOsdIcon">🔊</div>
              <div class="vol-osd-bar">
                <div class="vol-osd-fill" id="volOsdFill"></div>
              </div>
              <div class="vol-osd-val" id="volOsdVal">100%</div>
            </div>

            <!-- EPG Strip -->
            <div class="epg-strip" id="epgStrip">
              <div class="epg-strip-now">
                <span class="epg-strip-tag">CANLI</span>
                <span class="epg-now-title" id="epgNowTitle">—</span>
                <div class="epg-strip-prog">
                  <div class="epg-strip-fill" id="epgNowFill"></div>
                </div>
                <span class="epg-now-time" id="epgNowTime">—</span>
              </div>
              <div class="epg-strip-next">
                <span class="epg-strip-tag epg-tag-next">SONRA</span>
                <span class="epg-next-title" id="epgNextTitle">—</span>
                <span class="epg-next-time" id="epgNextTime">—</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Stream Health Indicator -->
            <div class="health-indicator" id="healthIndicator">
              <div class="health-dot" id="healthDot"></div>
              <div class="health-info">
                <span id="healthBitrate">0 Mbps</span>
                <span id="healthDrops">0 dropped</span>
              </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Subtitle Layer -->
            <div class="subtitle-layer" id="subtitleLayer"></div>

            <!-- Zoom Overlay -->
            <div class="zoom-overlay hidden" id="zoomOverlay">
              <div class="zoom-crosshair"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Quality Bars -->
            <div class="quality-bars" id="qualityBars">
              <div class="qb" id="qb1"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb2"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb3"></div>
              <div class="qb" id="qb4"></div>
            </div>

            <!-- Spectrum Canvas -->
            <canvas class="spectrum-canvas" id="spectrumCanvas"></canvas>
          </div>

          <!-- ── PLAYER CONTROLS ── -->
          <div class="player-controls" id="playerControls">
            <div class="pc-row pc-row-top">
              <!-- Progress / Timeline for VOD -->
              <div class="pc-timeline hidden" id="pcTimeline">
                <span class="pc-time-cur" id="pcTimeCur">0:00</span>
                <div class="pc-prog-wrap" id="pcProgWrap">
                  <div class="pc-prog-buf" id="pcProgBuf"></div>
                  <div class="pc-prog-fill" id="pcProgFill"></div>
                  <div class="pc-prog-thumb" id="pcProgThumb"></div>
                  <div class="pc-prog-preview" id="pcProgPreview">
                    <canvas id="previewCanvas"></canvas>
                    <span class="pc-prog-pre-time" id="previewTime"></span>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <span class="pc-time-dur" id="pcTimeDur">0:00</span>
              </div>

              <!-- Live indicator for live stream -->
              <div class="pc-live-bar" id="pcLiveBar">
                <div class="pc-live-dot"></div>
                <span>CANLI</span>
                <div class="pc-live-latency" id="pcLiveLatency">—ms</div>
              </div>
            </div>

            <div class="pc-row pc-row-btns">
              <div class="pc-left">
                <div class="pc-ch-logo" id="pcChLogo"></div>
                <div class="pc-ch-info">
                  <div class="pc-ch-name" id="pcChName">—</div>
                  <div class="pc-ch-epg" id="pcChEpg">—</div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <div class="pc-center">
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPrev" title="Önceki Kanal [←]">⏮</button>
                <button class="pc-btn pc-btn-play" id="pcPlay" title="Oynat / Duraklat [Space]">▶</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcNext" title="Sonraki Kanal [→]">⏭</button>
                <div class="pc-sep"></div>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcMute" title="Sessiz [M]">🔊</button>
                <input type="range" id="pcVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="1"
                  class="pc-vol" title="Ses [↑↓]" />
                <div class="pc-sep"></div>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSpeedBtn" title="Oynatma Hızı">1×</button>
              </div>

              <div class="pc-right">
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSubBtn" title="Altyazı [C]">💬</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcAudioBtn" title="Ses Kanalı [A]">🎵</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcQualBtn" title="Kalite [Q]">⚙</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcEqBtn" title="Equalizer">🎚</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcZoomBtn" title="Zoom [Z]">🔍</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSnapBtn" title="Ekran Görüntüsü [P]">📸</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcRecBtn" title="Kaydet [R]">⏺</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcPipBtn" title="Picture in Picture [I]">🖼</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcMiniBtn" title="Mini Oynatıcı">⊟</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcCinemaBtn" title="Sinema Modu [X]">🎥</button>
                <button class="pc-btn" id="pcSettingsBtn" title="Oynatıcı Ayarları">⚙️</button>
                <button class="pc-btn pc-btn-fs" id="pcFullscreen" title="Tam Ekran [F]">⛶</button>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- PLAYER SETTINGS PANEL -->
          <div class="player-settings hidden" id="playerSettings">
            <div class="ps-header">
              <span>⚙️ Oynatıcı Ayarları</span>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="psClose">✕</button>
            </div>
            <div class="ps-body">
              <div class="ps-tabs">
                <div class="ps-tab active" data-ps="video">🎨 Video</div>
                <div class="ps-tab" data-ps="audio">🎵 Ses</div>
                <div class="ps-tab" data-ps="subtitle">💬 Altyazı</div>
                <div class="ps-tab" data-ps="advanced">🔧 Gelişmiş</div>
              </div>

              <!-- Video Tab -->
              <div id="psTabVideo" class="ps-tab-content active">
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Parlaklık</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psBrightness" min="0.2" max="2" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psBrightnessVal">100%</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Kontrast</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psContrast" min="0.2" max="2" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psContrastVal">100%</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Doygunluk</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psSaturation" min="0" max="3" step="0.05" value="1" />
                  <span id="psSaturationVal">100%</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Renk Tonu</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psHue" min="0" max="360" step="1" value="0" />
                  <span id="psHueVal">0°</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Keskinlik</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psSharpness" min="0" max="100" step="1" value="0" />
                  <span id="psSharpnessVal">0</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Aspect Ratio</label>
                  <select id="psAspect" class="form-select">
                    <option value="auto">Otomatik</option>
                    <option value="16/9">16:9</option>
                    <option value="4/3">4:3</option>
                    <option value="21/9">21:9 (Sinema)</option>
                    <option value="1/1">1:1</option>
                    <option value="stretch">Uzat</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Audio Tab -->
              <div id="psTabAudio" class="ps-tab-content">
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Ses Boost</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psBoost" min="1" max="3" step="0.1" value="1" />
                  <span id="psBoostVal">1×</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Ses Gecikme</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psAudioDelay" min="-2000" max="2000" step="50" value="0" />
                  <span id="psAudioDelayVal">0ms</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Stereo Genişlik</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psStereoWidth" min="0" max="2" step="0.1" value="1" />
                  <span id="psStereoWidthVal">100%</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Normalize</label>
                  <div class="toggle-wrap">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="psNormalize" />
                    <label for="psNormalize" class="toggle-label"></label>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Subtitle Tab -->
              <div id="psTabSubtitle" class="ps-tab-content">
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Boyut</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psSubSize" min="12" max="60" step="1" value="24" />
                  <span id="psSubSizeVal">24px</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Gecikme</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psSubDelay" min="-5000" max="5000" step="100" value="0" />
                  <span id="psSubDelayVal">0ms</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Renk</label>
                  <input type="color" id="psSubColor" value="#ffffff" class="form-color" />
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Arka Plan</label>
                  <input type="color" id="psSubBg" value="#000000" class="form-color" />
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Arka Plan Opaklığı</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psSubBgOpacity" min="0" max="1" step="0.05" value="0.7" />
                  <span id="psSubBgOpacityVal">70%</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Konum</label>
                  <select id="psSubPos" class="form-select">
                    <option value="bottom">Alt</option>
                    <option value="top">Üst</option>
                  </select>
                </div>
              </div>

              <!-- Advanced Tab -->
              <div id="psTabAdvanced" class="ps-tab-content">
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Buffer Boyutu (s)</label>
                  <input type="range" id="psBuffer" min="5" max="60" step="5" value="30" />
                  <span id="psBufferVal">30s</span>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Düşük Gecikme</label>
                  <div class="toggle-wrap">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="psLowLatency" />
                    <label for="psLowLatency" class="toggle-label"></label>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Deinterlace</label>
                  <div class="toggle-wrap">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="psDeinterlace" />
                    <label for="psDeinterlace" class="toggle-label"></label>
                  </div>
                </div>
                <div class="ps-group">
                  <label>Hardware Decode</label>
                  <div class="toggle-wrap">
                    <input type="checkbox" id="psHwDecode" checked />
                    <label for="psHwDecode" class="toggle-label"></label>
                  </div>
                </div>
              </div>

              <button class="btn btn-sm w-full mt-3" id="psReset">🔄 Sıfırla</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- CHANNEL SIDEBAR -->
        <div class="ch-sidebar" id="chSidebar">
          <!-- Search -->
          <div class="ch-search-bar">
            <div class="ch-search-input-wrap">
              <span>🔍</span>
              <input type="text" id="chSearch" class="ch-search" placeholder="Kanal ara…" />
              <button class="icon-btn" id="chSearchClear">✕</button>
            </div>
            <button class="icon-btn" id="chAddBtn" title="Kaynak Ekle">+</button>
            <button class="icon-btn" id="chViewToggle" title="Liste / Grid">⊞</button>
          </div>

          <!-- Category Tabs -->
          <div class="cat-tabs" id="catTabs">
            <div class="cat-tab active" data-cat="all">Tümü</div>
          </div>

          <!-- Filters -->
          <div class="ch-filters">
            <button class="ch-filter-btn active" data-filter="all">Tümü</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="fav">⭐</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="hd">HD</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="4k">4K</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="fhd">FHD</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="online">🟢</button>
            <button class="ch-filter-btn" data-filter="new">🆕</button>
          </div>
          <div class="ch-filters ch-filters-row2">
            <select id="chSort" class="ch-sort">
              <option value="default">Varsayılan</option>
              <option value="alpha">A → Z</option>
              <option value="alpha_rev">Z → A</option>
              <option value="quality">Kalite</option>
              <option value="status">Durum</option>
              <option value="recent">Son İzlenen</option>
            </select>
            <select id="chEpgFilter" class="ch-sort">
              <option value="all">Tüm Türler</option>
              <option value="news">Haber</option>
              <option value="sports">Spor</option>
              <option value="movie">Film</option>
              <option value="kids">Çocuk</option>
            </select>
          </div>

          <!-- Channel List -->
          <div class="ch-list" id="chList">
            <div class="empty" id="chListEmpty">
              <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
              <div class="empty-title">Kanal Yok</div>
              <div class="empty-sub">Bir playlist yükleyin</div>
              <button class="btn btn-sm mt-3" id="chEmptyAddBtn">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Footer -->
          <div class="ch-footer">
            <span id="chCountLabel">0 kanal</span>
            <span id="chOnlineLabel" class="text-success">0 online</span>
            <div class="ch-footer-btns">
              <button class="icon-btn" id="chLogoMgrBtn" title="Logo Yöneticisi">🖼</button>
              <button class="icon-btn" id="chCollapseBtn" title="Grupları Daralt">📥</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: MOVIES ───── -->
    <div id="page-movies" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🎬 Filmler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="moviesCountLabel">0 film</span>
          <select class="ch-sort" id="moviesGenre">
            <option value="">Tüm Türler</option>
            <option value="action">Aksiyon</option>
            <option value="comedy">Komedi</option>
            <option value="drama">Drama</option>
            <option value="horror">Korku</option>
            <option value="scifi">Bilim Kurgu</option>
            <option value="animation">Animasyon</option>
            <option value="documentary">Belgesel</option>
          </select>
          <select class="ch-sort" id="moviesYear">
            <option value="">Tüm Yıllar</option>
          </select>
          <select class="ch-sort" id="moviesSort">
            <option value="default">Sıralama</option>
            <option value="new">Yeni Eklenen</option>
            <option value="rating">Puana Göre</option>
            <option value="az">A → Z</option>
          </select>
          <button class="icon-btn" id="moviesViewToggle">⊞</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-auto" id="moviesGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🎬</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Film Bulunamadı</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Film kaynağı ekleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="pagination" id="moviesPagination"></div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: SERIES ───── -->
    <div id="page-series" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📺 Diziler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="seriesCountLabel">0 dizi</span>
          <select class="ch-sort" id="seriesGenre">
            <option value="">Tüm Türler</option>
          </select>
          <button class="icon-btn" id="seriesViewToggle">⊞</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-auto" id="seriesGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📺</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Dizi Bulunamadı</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: MULTI-VIEW ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-multiview" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🔲 Multi-View</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted">Aynı anda birden fazla kanal izle</span>
          <div class="mv-layout-btns">
            <button class="mv-layout-btn active" data-layout="1x1" title="1 Kanal">⬛</button>
            <button class="mv-layout-btn" data-layout="2x1" title="2 Kanal">▬</button>
            <button class="mv-layout-btn" data-layout="2x2" title="4 Kanal">⊞</button>
            <button class="mv-layout-btn" data-layout="3x3" title="9 Kanal">⊟</button>
            <button class="mv-layout-btn" data-layout="1+5" title="1 Ana + 5 Küçük">⊡</button>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="mvSaveLayout">💾 Düzeni Kaydet</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="mvMuteAll">🔇 Tümünü Sessiz</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="mv-grid" id="mvGrid" data-layout="1x1">
        <!-- Filled by JS with mv-cell divs -->
        <div class="mv-cell mv-cell-empty" data-slot="0">
          <div class="mv-empty-inner">
            <div class="mv-empty-icon">📡</div>
            <div class="mv-empty-text">Kanal seçin</div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm mv-pick-btn" data-slot="0">+ Kanal Ekle</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Quick channel picker for multiview -->
      <div class="mv-ch-picker hidden" id="mvChPicker">
        <div class="mv-picker-header">
          <h4>Kanal Seç</h4>
          <button class="icon-btn" id="mvPickerClose">✕</button>
        </div>
        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="mvPickerSearch" placeholder="Kanal ara…" />
        <div class="mv-picker-list" id="mvPickerList"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: EPG ───── -->
    <div id="page-epg" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📅 Program Rehberi</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <select id="epgDaySelect" class="ch-sort"></select>
          <select id="epgChFilter" class="ch-sort">
            <option value="">Tüm Kanallar</option>
          </select>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="epgSourceBtn">📡 EPG Kaynağı</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="epgJumpNow">⏱ Şu An</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="epg-search-bar">
        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="epgSearch" placeholder="Program ara…" />
      </div>
      <div class="epg-container" id="epgContainer">
        <div class="epg-ch-col" id="epgChCol"></div>
        <div class="epg-scroll-wrap" id="epgScrollWrap">
          <div class="epg-ruler" id="epgRuler"></div>
          <div class="epg-now-line" id="epgNowLine"></div>
          <div class="epg-grid" id="epgGrid"></div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: FAVORITES ───── -->
    <div id="page-favorites" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⭐ Favoriler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="favCountLabel">0 öğe</span>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="favExportBtn">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="favImportBtn">📥 İçe Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" style="background:var(--danger)" id="favClearBtn">🗑️ Tümü</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <!-- Favorite folders -->
      <div class="fav-folders" id="favFolders">
        <div class="fav-folder active" data-folder="all">⭐ Tümü</div>
        <button class="fav-folder fav-add-folder" id="favAddFolder">+ Klasör</button>
      </div>
      <div class="ch-list" id="favList">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">⭐</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Favori Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Kanal üzerinde ☆ tıkla</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: DVR ───── -->
    <div id="page-dvr" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⏺ DVR / Kayıtlar</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <div class="dvr-storage-bar-wrap">
            <span class="text-muted fs-xs">Depolama:</span>
            <div class="dvr-storage-bar">
              <div class="dvr-storage-fill" id="dvrStorageFill" style="width:0%"></div>
            </div>
            <span id="dvrStorageVal" class="fs-xs">0 MB / ∞</span>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="dvrNewTimer">⏰ Zamanlayıcı</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dvrExport">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="tabs-bar">
        <div class="tab-item active" data-dvr="recordings">📁 Kayıtlar</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="timers">⏰ Zamanlayıcılar</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="schedule">📅 Takvim</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dvr="cutlist">✂️ Kırpma Listesi</div>
      </div>
      <div class="tab-content" id="dvrContent">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📁</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Kayıt Yok</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: CATCH-UP ───── -->
    <div id="page-catchup" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⏪ Catch-Up TV</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <select id="catchupDaySelect" class="ch-sort"></select>
          <select id="catchupChSelect" class="ch-sort">
            <option value="">Tüm Kanallar</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="grid-auto" id="catchupGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">⏪</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Catch-Up Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Son 7 günü geri izleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: RADIO ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-radio" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🎵 Radyo</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="radioCountLabel">0 kanal</span>
          <select class="ch-sort" id="radioGenre">
            <option value="">Tüm Türler</option>
            <option value="pop">Pop</option>
            <option value="rock">Rock</option>
            <option value="classical">Klasik</option>
            <option value="jazz">Jazz</option>
            <option value="news">Haber</option>
            <option value="sports">Spor</option>
          </select>
          <select class="ch-sort" id="radioCountry">
            <option value="">Tüm Ülkeler</option>
            <option value="tr">🇹🇷 Türkiye</option>
            <option value="us">🇺🇸 ABD</option>
            <option value="gb">🇬🇧 İngiltere</option>
            <option value="de">🇩🇪 Almanya</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Radio Player -->
      <div class="radio-player-wrap" id="radioPlayerWrap">
        <div class="radio-visualizer">
          <canvas id="radioVisCanvas"></canvas>
          <div class="radio-eq-bars" id="radioEqBars">
            <!-- 20 bars generated by JS -->
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="radio-player-info">
          <div class="radio-station-logo" id="radioStationLogo">📻</div>
          <div class="radio-station-name" id="radioStationName">Kanal Seçin</div>
          <div class="radio-now-playing" id="radioNowPlaying">—</div>
          <div class="radio-genre-tag" id="radioGenreTag"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="radio-controls">
          <button class="radio-btn" id="radioPrev">⏮</button>
          <button class="radio-btn radio-btn-play" id="radioPlay">▶</button>
          <button class="radio-btn" id="radioNext">⏭</button>
          <div class="radio-vol-wrap">
            <span>🔊</span>
            <input type="range" id="radioVol" min="0" max="1" step="0.01" value="1" class="radio-vol" />
          </div>
          <button class="radio-btn" id="radioSleep" title="Uyku Zamanla">⏱</button>
          <button class="radio-btn" id="radioFav" title="Favorilere Ekle">⭐</button>
          <button class="radio-btn" id="radioShare" title="Paylaş">📤</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Station Grid -->
      <div class="radio-grid" id="radioGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📻</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Radyo Kanalı Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">M3U kaynağınızda radyo kanalları varsa burada görünür</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: SPORTS ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-sports" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>⚽ Spor</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <select class="ch-sort" id="sportsLeague">
            <option value="">Tüm Ligler</option>
            <option value="sl">Süper Lig</option>
            <option value="pl">Premier Lig</option>
            <option value="la">La Liga</option>
            <option value="bl">Bundesliga</option>
            <option value="cl">Şampiyonlar Ligi</option>
          </select>
          <select class="ch-sort" id="sportsSport">
            <option value="">Tüm Sporlar</option>
            <option value="football">⚽ Futbol</option>
            <option value="basketball">🏀 Basketbol</option>
            <option value="tennis">🎾 Tenis</option>
            <option value="formula">🏎 Formula 1</option>
          </select>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="sportsRefresh">🔄 Yenile</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Live Matches -->
      <div class="sports-section">
        <h3 class="sports-section-title">🔴 Canlı Maçlar</h3>
        <div class="sports-live-grid" id="sportsLiveGrid">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">⚽</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Canlı Maç Yok</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Upcoming -->
      <div class="sports-section mt-4">
        <h3 class="sports-section-title">📅 Yaklaşan Maçlar</h3>
        <div class="sports-schedule" id="sportsScheduleGrid"></div>
      </div>

      <!-- Sports Channels -->
      <div class="sports-section mt-4">
        <h3 class="sports-section-title">📡 Spor Kanalları</h3>
        <div class="grid-auto" id="sportsChGrid">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Spor kanalı bulunamadı</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: KIDS ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-kids" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🧒 Çocuk Modu</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="kidsConfigBtn">⚙️ Ebeveyn Ayarları</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="kidsEnterBtn">🧒 Çocuk Moduna Gir</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="kids-config-wrap" id="kidsConfigWrap">
        <div class="settings-card">
          <h3>👨‍👩‍👧 Ebeveyn Ayarları</h3>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Çocuk Modu PIN</label>
            <div class="set-group-inline">
              <input type="password" id="kidsPinInput" class="form-input" placeholder="4 haneli PIN" maxlength="4" />
              <button class="btn btn-sm" id="kidsPinSave">Kaydet</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Maksimum İzleme Süresi (dk)</label>
            <input type="number" id="kidsTimeLimit" class="form-input" value="60" min="10" max="480" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>İzin Verilen Kanallar</label>
            <div class="kids-allowed-list" id="kidsAllowedList"></div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm mt-2" id="kidsAddAllowed">+ Kanal Ekle</button>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Ses Limiti</label>
            <input type="range" id="kidsVolLimit" min="0" max="1" step="0.1" value="0.7" />
            <span id="kidsVolLimitVal">70%</span>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Otomatik Kapanma</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="kidsAutoClose" checked />
              <label for="kidsAutoClose" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: AI RECOMMENDATIONS ───── -->
    <div id="page-ai_rec" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🤖 AI Önerileri</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="aiRecRefresh">🔄 Yenile</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="aiRecClear">🗑️ Temizle</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <p class="text-muted mb-4" style="max-width:600px">İzleme alışkanlıklarınıza göre kişiselleştirilmiş öneriler.</p>

      <!-- Categories -->
      <div class="ai-rec-cats" id="aiRecCats">
        <div class="ai-rec-cat active" data-acat="all">Tümü</div>
        <div class="ai-rec-cat" data-acat="channel">Kanal</div>
        <div class="ai-rec-cat" data-acat="movie">Film</div>
        <div class="ai-rec-cat" data-acat="series">Dizi</div>
        <div class="ai-rec-cat" data-acat="sport">Spor</div>
      </div>

      <div class="grid-auto" id="aiRecGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🤖</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Analiz Ediliyor…</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Daha fazla kanal izleyin</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: AI SEARCH ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-ai_search" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🔍 Akıllı Arama</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-search-hero">
        <div class="ai-search-input-wrap">
          <span class="ai-search-icon">🤖</span>
          <input type="text" id="aiSearchInput" class="ai-search-input"
            placeholder="Doğal dille arayın: 'bu akşam canlı futbol maçı var mı?'" />
          <button class="btn" id="aiSearchBtn">Ara</button>
          <button class="icon-btn" id="aiSearchVoice">🎤</button>
        </div>
        <!-- Quick Searches -->
        <div class="ai-quick-searches">
          <button class="ai-qs-btn" data-q="canlı haber">📰 Canlı Haber</button>
          <button class="ai-qs-btn" data-q="futbol maçı">⚽ Futbol</button>
          <button class="ai-qs-btn" data-q="çocuk kanalı">🧒 Çocuk</button>
          <button class="ai-qs-btn" data-q="müzik kanalı">🎵 Müzik</button>
          <button class="ai-qs-btn" data-q="film kanalı">🎬 Film</button>
          <button class="ai-qs-btn" data-q="belgesel">🌍 Belgesel</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Filters -->
      <div class="ai-search-filters" id="aiSearchFilters">
        <div class="set-group-inline">
          <label>Tür:</label>
          <select id="aiSearchType" class="ch-sort">
            <option value="">Tümü</option>
            <option value="channel">Kanal</option>
            <option value="movie">Film</option>
            <option value="series">Dizi</option>
          </select>
          <label>Ülke:</label>
          <select id="aiSearchCountry" class="ch-sort">
            <option value="">Tümü</option>
          </select>
          <label>Kalite:</label>
          <select id="aiSearchQuality" class="ch-sort">
            <option value="">Tümü</option>
            <option value="4k">4K</option>
            <option value="hd">HD</option>
            <option value="sd">SD</option>
          </select>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="ai-search-results" id="aiSearchResults">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🔍</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Arama Yapın</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Doğal dil veya anahtar kelime ile arayın</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: AI SUMMARY ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-ai_sum" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📝 İçerik Özeti</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="ai-sum-layout">
        <div class="ai-sum-left">
          <div class="ai-sum-input-section">
            <h3>Program Özeti Al</h3>
            <div class="set-group">
              <label>Kanal / İçerik Seç</label>
              <select id="aiSumChannel" class="form-select">
                <option value="">— Kanal Seçin —</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="set-group">
              <label>Dil</label>
              <select id="aiSumLang" class="form-select">
                <option value="tr">Türkçe</option>
                <option value="en">English</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <div class="set-group">
              <label>Özet Uzunluğu</label>
              <select id="aiSumLength" class="form-select">
                <option value="short">Kısa (1-2 cümle)</option>
                <option value="medium">Orta (1 paragraf)</option>
                <option value="long">Uzun (Detaylı)</option>
              </select>
            </div>
            <button class="btn w-full" id="aiSumGenerate">🤖 Özet Oluştur</button>
          </div>
          <div class="ai-sum-history mt-4">
            <h4>Son Özetler</h4>
            <div id="aiSumHistory"></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ai-sum-right">
          <div class="ai-sum-result" id="aiSumResult">
            <div class="empty">
              <div class="empty-icon">📝</div>
              <div class="empty-title">Özet Bekleniyor</div>
              <div class="empty-sub">Sol taraftan bir içerik seçin</div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: PLAYLIST EDITOR ───── -->
    <div id="page-playlist" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📋 Playlist Editör</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="pleImportBtn">📥 İçe Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pleExportBtn">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="pleNewBtn">+ Yeni Kaynak</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="ple-layout">
        <div class="ple-sidebar" id="pleSidebar">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Kaynak Yok</div>
            <button class="btn btn-sm mt-3" id="pleAddSource">+ Kaynak Ekle</button>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="ple-editor" id="pleEditor">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📋</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Playlist Seçin</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: DIRECTORY ───── -->
    <div id="page-directory" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🗂️ IPTV Dizin</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <select class="ch-sort" id="dirCountryFilter">
            <option value="">Tüm Ülkeler</option>
          </select>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dirRefresh">🔄 Yenile</button>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="dir-search-wrap">
        <input type="text" class="form-input" id="dirSearch" placeholder="Kaynak ara…" />
      </div>
      <div class="grid-auto" id="dirGrid">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">🗂️</div>
          <div class="empty-title">Yükleniyor…</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: WATCH PARTY ───── -->
    <div id="page-watchparty" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>👥 Watch Party</h2>
      </div>
      <div class="wp-layout">
        <div class="wp-left">
          <div id="wpEmpty" class="wp-empty">
            <div class="wp-empty-icon">👥</div>
            <div class="wp-empty-title">Arkadaşlarınla İzle</div>
            <div class="wp-empty-sub">Aynı anda izleyin, senkronize olun</div>
            <div class="wp-actions">
              <button class="btn" id="wpCreateBtn">🏠 Oda Oluştur</button>
              <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="wpJoinBtn">🔗 Odaya Katıl</button>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="wpMain" class="hidden"></div>
        </div>
        <div class="wp-right">
          <div class="wp-room-info" id="wpRoomInfo"></div>
          <div class="wp-members-section">
            <h3>👥 Üyeler <span class="badge" id="wpMemberCount">0</span></h3>
            <div id="wpMembers"></div>
          </div>
          <div class="wp-chat-section">
            <div class="wp-chat-header">
              <h3>💬 Sohbet</h3>
              <div class="wp-chat-btns">
                <button class="icon-btn" id="wpEmoji">😊</button>
                <button class="icon-btn" id="wpGif">GIF</button>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="wp-chat" id="wpChatMsgs"></div>
            <div class="wp-reactions-bar" id="wpReactionsBar">
              <button class="wp-reaction" data-r="👍">👍</button>
              <button class="wp-reaction" data-r="❤️">❤️</button>
              <button class="wp-reaction" data-r="😂">😂</button>
              <button class="wp-reaction" data-r="😮">😮</button>
              <button class="wp-reaction" data-r="🔥">🔥</button>
              <button class="wp-reaction" data-r="👏">👏</button>
            </div>
            <div class="wp-chat-input-row">
              <input type="text" id="wpChatInput" class="form-input" placeholder="Mesaj yaz…" />
              <button class="btn btn-sm" id="wpChatSend">➤</button>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: CAST ───── -->
    <div id="page-cast" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📲 Yayın Yap</h2>
      </div>
      <p class="text-muted mb-4" style="max-width:600px">
        Chromecast, AirPlay veya DLNA ile TV'nize yayın yapın.
      </p>
      <div class="cast-protocol-tabs">
        <div class="tab-item active" data-cast-tab="chromecast">🔵 Chromecast</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-cast-tab="airplay">🍎 AirPlay</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-cast-tab="dlna">📺 DLNA</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-cast-tab="rtmp">🔴 RTMP</div>
      </div>
      <div class="cast-tab-content" id="castTabContent">
        <div class="cast-controls">
          <button class="btn" id="castScanBtn">📡 Cihaz Tara</button>
        </div>
        <div class="cast-devices" id="castDevices">
          <div class="empty">
            <div class="empty-icon">📡</div>
            <div class="empty-title">Cihaz Aranıyor…</div>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: DOWNLOADS ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-downloads" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>📥 İndirmeler</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <span class="text-muted" id="dlTotalLabel">0 öğe</span>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="dlAddBtn">+ İndirme Ekle</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dlPauseAll">⏸ Tümünü Durdur</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="dlClearDone">✅ Bitenleri Temizle</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Storage Usage -->
      <div class="dl-storage-card">
        <div class="dl-storage-header">
          <span>💾 Toplam Depolama</span>
          <span id="dlTotalStorage">0 MB / 2 GB</span>
        </div>
        <div class="dl-storage-bar">
          <div class="dl-storage-fill" id="dlStorageFill" style="width:0%"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Filter Tabs -->
      <div class="tabs-bar mt-3">
        <div class="tab-item active" data-dl-tab="all">Tümü</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dl-tab="downloading">📥 İndiriliyor</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dl-tab="paused">⏸ Duraklatıldı</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dl-tab="done">✅ Tamamlandı</div>
        <div class="tab-item" data-dl-tab="error">❌ Hatalı</div>
      </div>

      <div class="dl-list" id="dlList">
        <div class="empty">
          <div class="empty-icon">📥</div>
          <div class="empty-title">İndirme Yok</div>
          <div class="empty-sub">Kanal veya içerik indirmek için + İndirme Ekle</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: NETWORK DIAGNOSTICS ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-network" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🌐 Ağ Tanılama</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="netRunAll">▶ Tüm Testleri Çalıştır</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="netExport">📤 Rapor İndir</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Quick Stats -->
      <div class="net-quick-stats" id="netQuickStats">
        <div class="net-stat-card">
          <div class="net-stat-icon">📶</div>
          <div class="net-stat-label">Bağlantı</div>
          <div class="net-stat-val" id="netConnectionType">—</div>
        </div>
        <div class="net-stat-card">
          <div class="net-stat-icon">⬇️</div>
          <div class="net-stat-label">İndirme</div>
          <div class="net-stat-val" id="netDownSpeed">—</div>
        </div>
        <div class="net-stat-card">
          <div class="net-stat-icon">⬆️</div>
          <div class="net-stat-label">Yükleme</div>
          <div class="net-stat-val" id="netUpSpeed">—</div>
        </div>
        <div class="net-stat-card">
          <div class="net-stat-icon">⏱</div>
          <div class="net-stat-label">Gecikme</div>
          <div class="net-stat-val" id="netPing">—</div>
        </div>
        <div class="net-stat-card">
          <div class="net-stat-icon">📊</div>
          <div class="net-stat-label">Jitter</div>
          <div class="net-stat-val" id="netJitter">—</div>
        </div>
        <div class="net-stat-card">
          <div class="net-stat-icon">🔗</div>
          <div class="net-stat-label">DNS</div>
          <div class="net-stat-val" id="netDns">—</div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Test Panels -->
      <div class="net-tests-grid">
        <!-- Speed Test -->
        <div class="net-test-card">
          <div class="net-test-header">
            <h3>⚡ Hız Testi</h3>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" id="netSpeedBtn">Başlat</button>
          </div>
          <div class="net-speedometer" id="netSpeedometer">
            <canvas id="speedometerCanvas"></canvas>
            <div class="speedometer-val" id="speedometerVal">0</div>
            <div class="speedometer-unit">Mbps</div>
          </div>
          <div class="net-speed-history" id="netSpeedHistory">
            <canvas id="netSpeedChart"></canvas>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Ping Test -->
        <div class="net-test-card">
          <div class="net-test-header">
            <h3>📍 Ping Testi</h3>
            <button class="btn btn-sm" id="netPingBtn">Başlat</button>
          </div>
          <div class="net-ping-targets" id="netPingTargets">
            <div class="ping-target">
              <span>Google DNS</span>
              <span class="ping-val" id="ping8888">—</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ping-target">
              <span>Cloudflare</span>
              <span class="ping-val" id="ping1111">—</span>
            </div>
            <div class="ping-target">
              <span>OpenDNS</span>
              <span class="ping-val" id="pingOpendns">—</span>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div class="ping-chart-wrap">
            <canvas id="pingChart"></canvas>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Stream URL Test -->
        <div class="net-test-card">
          <div class="net-test-header">
            <h3>🔗 Stream URL Test</h3>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <input type="url" id="netUrlTest" class="form-input" placeholder="https://example.com/stream.m3u8" />
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm w-full" id="netUrlTestBtn">🔍 Test Et</button>
          <div class="net-url-result" id="netUrlResult"></div>
        </div>

        <!-- DNS Lookup -->
        <div class="net-test-card">
          <div class="net-test-header">
            <h3>🔎 DNS Sorgusu</h3>
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <input type="text" id="netDnsQuery" class="form-input" placeholder="example.com" />
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm w-full" id="netDnsBtn">Sorgula</button>
          <div class="net-dns-result" id="netDnsResult"></div>
        </div>
      </div>

      <!-- Proxy / VPN Settings -->
      <div class="net-proxy-card mt-4">
        <div class="net-test-header">
          <h3>🛡️ Proxy / Yönlendirme</h3>
          <div class="toggle-wrap">
            <input type="checkbox" id="netProxyEnabled" />
            <label for="netProxyEnabled" class="toggle-label"></label>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div id="netProxySettings" class="hidden">
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Proxy URL</label>
            <input type="url" id="netProxyUrl" class="form-input" placeholder="http://proxy.example.com:8080" />
          </div>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Proxy Tipi</label>
            <select id="netProxyType" class="form-select">
              <option value="http">HTTP</option>
              <option value="https">HTTPS</option>
              <option value="socks5">SOCKS5</option>
            </select>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="netProxySave">Kaydet</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- ───── PAGE: THEME CREATOR ★ YENİ ───── -->
    <div id="page-theme_creator" class="page">
      <div class="page-header">
        <h2>🎨 Tema Yaratıcı</h2>
        <div class="page-header-actions">
          <button class="btn btn-sm" id="tcApply">✅ Uygula</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="tcReset">🔄 Sıfırla</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="tcExport">📤 Dışa Aktar</button>
          <button class="btn btn-sm btn-ghost" id="tcImport">📥 İçe Aktar</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      <div class="tc-layout">
        <!-- Preset Themes -->
        <div class="tc-presets-section">
          <h3>🎭 Hazır Temalar</h3>
          <div class="tc-preset-grid" id="tcPresetGrid">
            <div class="tc-preset active" data-preset="dark">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-dark"></div>
              <span>Koyu</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="amoled">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-amoled"></div>
              <span>AMOLED</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="navy">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-navy"></div>
              <span>Lacivert</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="blue">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-blue"></div>
              <span>Okyanus</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="purple">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-purple"></div>
              <span>Mor</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="green">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-green"></div>
              <span>Orman</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="gold">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-gold"></div>
              <span>Altın</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="red">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-red"></div>
              <span>Kırmızı</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="rose">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-rose"></div>
              <span>Gül</span>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-preset" data-preset="light">
              <div class="tc-preset-preview tc-prev-light"></div>
              <span>Açık</span>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Custom Colors -->
        <div class="tc-custom-section">
          <h3>🖌️ Özel Renkler</h3>
          <div class="tc-colors-grid">
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Ana Renk (Accent)</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcAccent" value="#6366f1" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcAccentHex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#6366f1" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Arkaplan</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcBg" value="#0d0d0d" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcBgHex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#0d0d0d" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Yüzey Rengi</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcSurface" value="#1a1a1a" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcSurfaceHex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#1a1a1a" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Metin Rengi</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcText" value="#ffffff" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcTextHex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#ffffff" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Sidebar Rengi</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcSidebar" value="#111111" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcSidebarHex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#111111" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Başarı Rengi</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcSuccess" value="#22c55e" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcSuccessHex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#22c55e" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Hata Rengi</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcDanger" value="#ef4444" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcDangerHex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#ef4444" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Uyarı Rengi</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcWarning" value="#f59e0b" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcWarningHex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#f59e0b" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- Gradient Options -->
          <h4 class="mt-4">🌈 Gradient Efekti</h4>
          <div class="set-group">
            <label>Aktif</label>
            <div class="toggle-wrap">
              <input type="checkbox" id="tcGradient" />
              <label for="tcGradient" class="toggle-label"></label>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div id="tcGradientOptions" class="hidden">
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Gradient Renk 1</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcGrad1" value="#6366f1" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcGrad1Hex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#6366f1" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Gradient Renk 2</label>
              <div class="tc-color-input-row">
                <input type="color" id="tcGrad2" value="#8b5cf6" class="form-color" />
                <input type="text" id="tcGrad2Hex" class="form-input tc-hex" value="#8b5cf6" maxlength="7" />
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="tc-color-item">
              <label>Gradient Yönü</label>
              <select id="tcGradDir" class="form-select">
                <option value="90deg">→ Yatay</option>
                <option value="135deg">↘ Çapraz</option>
                <option value="180deg">↓ Dikey</option>
                <option value="45deg">↗ Ters Çapraz</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>

          <!-- UI Options -->
          <h4 class="mt-4">🖼️ Arayüz Seçenekleri</h4>
          <div class="tc-ui-options">
            <div class="set-group">
              <label>Kenar Yarıçapı</label>
              <input type="range" id="tcRadius" min="0" max="20" step="1" value="8" />
              <span id="tcRadiusVal">8px</span>
            </div>
            <div class="set-group">
              <label>Cam Efekti (Glassmorphism)</label>
              <div class="toggle-wrap">
                <input type="checkbox" id="tcGlass" />
                <label for="tcGlass" class="toggle-label"></label>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="set-group">
              <label>Gölge Efekti</label>
              <div class="toggle-wrap">
                <input type="checkbox" id="tcShadow" checked />
                <label for="tcShadow" class="toggle-label"></label>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div class="set-group">
              <label>Font</label>
              <select id="tcFont" class="form-select">
                <option value="Inter">Inter (Varsayılan)</option>
                <option value="JetBrains Mono">JetBrains Mono</option>
                <option value="Nunito">Nunito</option>
                <option value="system-ui">Sistem Fontu</option>
              </select>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        <!-- Live Preview -->
        <div class="tc-preview-section">
          <h3>👁️ Canlı Önizleme</h3>
          <div class="tc-preview-frame" id="tcPreviewFrame">
            <div class="tc-prev-sidebar">

```css
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   StreamVault Pro v5.0.0 — Ultra Advanced IPTV Player
   Tam CSS Dosyası
   Copyright © 2025 StreamVault Pro
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   1. CSS CUSTOM PROPERTIES — TÜM TEMALAR
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
:root {
  /* ── Base ── */
  --font: 'Inter', -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, 'Segoe UI', Roboto, sans-serif;
  --mono: 'JetBrains Mono', 'Fira Code', 'Cascadia Code', monospace;
  --fs-xs: .7rem; --fs-sm: .78rem; --fs-md: .88rem; --fs-base: .95rem;
  --fs-lg: 1.15rem; --fs-xl: 1.4rem; --fs-2xl: 1.8rem; --fs-3xl: 2.4rem;
  --fw-400: 400; --fw-500: 500; --fw-600: 600; --fw-700: 700; --fw-800: 800;
  --lh: 1.5; --ls: -.01em;
  --ease: cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1); --ease-spring: cubic-bezier(.34,1.56,.64,1);
  --ease-out: cubic-bezier(0,0,.2,1);
  --dur-fast: .12s; --dur-med: .25s; --dur-slow: .4s; --dur-xslow: .6s;
  --sb-w: 260px; --sb-collapsed: 68px; --tb-h: 52px;
  --br-sm: 6px; --br-md: 10px; --br-lg: 16px; --br-xl: 24px; --br-pill: 999px;
  --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.3);
  --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.4);
  --shadow-lg: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  --shadow-xl: 0 16px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.6);
  --shadow-glow: 0 0 20px;
  --z-base: 1; --z-dropdown: 100; --z-sticky: 200;
  --z-overlay: 900; --z-modal: 1000; --z-toast: 1100; --z-top: 1200;
  --overlay-bg: rgba(0,0,0,.6);
  --transition-bg: background var(--dur-med) var(--ease);
  --transition-color: color var(--dur-med) var(--ease);
  --transition-all: all var(--dur-med) var(--ease);

  /* ── Scrollbar ── */
  --sb-size: 6px;
  --sb-track: rgba(255,255,255,.04);
  --sb-thumb: rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  --sb-thumb-hover: rgba(255,255,255,.2);

  /* ── Spacing ── */
  --p-xs: 4px; --p-sm: 8px; --p-md: 12px; --p-lg: 16px; --p-xl: 24px; --p-2xl: 32px;
  --gap-xs: 4px; --gap-sm: 8px; --gap-md: 12px; --gap-lg: 16px; --gap-xl: 24px;
}

/* ══ DARK (DEFAULT) ══ */
[data-theme="dark"] {
  --bg-root: #0a0a0f;
  --bg-sb: #0e0e16;
  --bg-tb: rgba(14,14,22,.92);
  --bg-card: #14141f;
  --bg-card-hover: #1a1a2a;
  --bg-card-active: #1e1e32;
  --bg-input: #1a1a2a;
  --bg-input-focus: #20203a;
  --bg-modal: #12121c;
  --bg-popup: #1a1a28;
  --bg-overlay: rgba(6,6,14,.85);
  --bg-badge: rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  --bg-tag: rgba(255,255,255,.06);
  --bg-tooltip: #22223a;
  --bg-epg-block: #1a1a2a;
  --bg-epg-block-hover: #24243a;
  --bg-epg-block-active: #2a2a4a;
  --bg-epg-strip: rgba(14,14,22,.95);
  --border: rgba(255,255,255,.07);
  --border-light: rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  --border-active: rgba(99,102,241,.5);
  --text: #e8e8f0;
  --text-secondary: #9a9ab0;
  --text-muted: #6a6a82;
  --text-disabled: #4a4a60;
  --text-inverse: #0a0a0f;
  --accent: #6366f1;
  --accent-rgb: 99,102,241;
  --accent-hover: #818cf8;
  --accent-subtle: rgba(99,102,241,.12);
  --accent-glow: rgba(99,102,241,.3);
  --success: #22c55e;
  --success-rgb: 34,197,94;
  --success-subtle: rgba(34,197,94,.12);
  --warning: #f59e0b;
  --warning-rgb: 245,158,11;
  --warning-subtle: rgba(245,158,11,.12);
  --danger: #ef4444;
  --danger-rgb: 239,68,68;
  --danger-subtle: rgba(239,68,68,.12);
  --info: #3b82f6;
  --info-rgb: 59,130,246;
  --info-subtle: rgba(59,130,246,.12);
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1 0%, #a855f7 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(10,10,15,.85) 60%, #0a0a0f 100%);
  --gradient-card: linear-gradient(145deg, rgba(99,102,241,.08) 0%, rgba(168,85,247,.04) 100%);
  --gradient-sidebar: linear-gradient(180deg, #0e0e16 0%, #0a0a12 100%);
}

/* ══ AMOLED ══ */
[data-theme="amoled"] {
  --bg-root: #000; --bg-sb: #000; --bg-tb: rgba(0,0,0,.96);
  --bg-card: #0a0a0a; --bg-card-hover: #141414; --bg-card-active: #1e1e1e;
  --bg-input: #111; --bg-input-focus: #1a1a1a; --bg-modal: #080808;
  --bg-popup: #111; --bg-overlay: rgba(0,0,0,.92); --bg-badge: rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  --bg-tag: rgba(255,255,255,.05);
  --border: rgba(255,255,255,.06); --border-light: rgba(255,255,255,.1);
  --text: #f0f0f0; --text-secondary: #999; --text-muted: #666;
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1 0%, #a855f7 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(0,0,0,.85) 60%, #000 100%);
}

/* ══ NAVY ══ */
[data-theme="navy"] {
  --bg-root: #080c18; --bg-sb: #0a1020; --bg-tb: rgba(10,16,32,.94);
  --bg-card: #0f1528; --bg-card-hover: #151d35; --bg-card-active: #1c2545;
  --bg-input: #111830; --bg-input-focus: #182240; --bg-modal: #0c1020;
  --bg-popup: #121a30;
  --border: rgba(100,140,255,.1); --border-light: rgba(100,140,255,.18);
  --text: #d0daf0; --text-secondary: #8090b8; --text-muted: #50608a;
  --accent: #4f8fff; --accent-rgb: 79,143,255; --accent-hover: #6fa0ff;
  --accent-subtle: rgba(79,143,255,.12); --accent-glow: rgba(79,143,255,.3);
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #4f8fff 0%, #6366f1 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(8,12,24,.85) 60%, #080c18 100%);
  --gradient-sidebar: linear-gradient(180deg, #0a1020 0%, #080c18 100%);
}

/* ══ BLUE (OCEAN) ══ */
[data-theme="blue"] {
  --bg-root: #060e1a; --bg-sb: #081428; --bg-tb: rgba(8,20,40,.94);
  --bg-card: #0c1a2e; --bg-card-hover: #102240; --bg-card-active: #152a50;
  --bg-input: #0e1e35; --bg-input-focus: #132845; --bg-modal: #081428;
  --border: rgba(50,150,255,.1); --border-light: rgba(50,150,255,.18);
  --text: #c8ddf5; --text-secondary: #70a0d0; --text-muted: #4878a8;
  --accent: #2196f3; --accent-rgb: 33,150,243; --accent-hover: #42a5f5;
  --accent-subtle: rgba(33,150,243,.12); --accent-glow: rgba(33,150,243,.3);
  --success: #00e5ff;
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #2196f3 0%, #00bcd4 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(6,14,26,.85) 60%, #060e1a 100%);
}

/* ══ PURPLE ══ */
[data-theme="purple"] {
  --bg-root: #0c0814; --bg-sb: #0e0a1a; --bg-tb: rgba(14,10,26,.94);
  --bg-card: #150e22; --bg-card-hover: #1c1430; --bg-card-active: #241a40;
  --bg-input: #181028; --bg-input-focus: #201838; --bg-modal: #0e0a18;
  --border: rgba(168,85,247,.1); --border-light: rgba(168,85,247,.18);
  --text: #e0d0f0; --text-secondary: #a080c0; --text-muted: #7058a0;
  --accent: #a855f7; --accent-rgb: 168,85,247; --accent-hover: #c084fc;
  --accent-subtle: rgba(168,85,247,.12); --accent-glow: rgba(168,85,247,.3);
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #a855f7 0%, #ec4899 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(12,8,20,.85) 60%, #0c0814 100%);
}

/* ══ GREEN (FOREST) ══ */
[data-theme="green"] {
  --bg-root: #081008; --bg-sb: #0a140a; --bg-tb: rgba(10,20,10,.94);
  --bg-card: #0e180e; --bg-card-hover: #142014; --bg-card-active: #1a2a1a;
  --bg-input: #101e10; --bg-input-focus: #162816; --bg-modal: #0a140a;
  --border: rgba(34,197,94,.1); --border-light: rgba(34,197,94,.18);
  --text: #d0f0d0; --text-secondary: #80b880; --text-muted: #508a50;
  --accent: #22c55e; --accent-rgb: 34,197,94; --accent-hover: #4ade80;
  --accent-subtle: rgba(34,197,94,.12); --accent-glow: rgba(34,197,94,.3);
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #22c55e 0%, #14b8a6 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(8,16,8,.85) 60%, #081008 100%);
}

/* ══ GOLD ══ */
[data-theme="gold"] {
  --bg-root: #100c04; --bg-sb: #141008; --bg-tb: rgba(20,16,8,.94);
  --bg-card: #1a1408; --bg-card-hover: #221a0e; --bg-card-active: #2a2214;
  --bg-input: #1e180c; --bg-input-focus: #262010; --bg-modal: #141008;
  --border: rgba(245,158,11,.12); --border-light: rgba(245,158,11,.2);
  --text: #f0e8d0; --text-secondary: #b8a070; --text-muted: #8a7040;
  --accent: #f59e0b; --accent-rgb: 245,158,11; --accent-hover: #fbbf24;
  --accent-subtle: rgba(245,158,11,.12); --accent-glow: rgba(245,158,11,.3);
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #f59e0b 0%, #eab308 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(16,12,4,.85) 60%, #100c04 100%);
}

/* ══ ROSE ══ */
[data-theme="rose"] {
  --bg-root: #10080c; --bg-sb: #140a10; --bg-tb: rgba(20,10,16,.94);
  --bg-card: #1a0e15; --bg-card-hover: #241420; --bg-card-active: #2e1a28;
  --bg-input: #1e1018; --bg-input-focus: #281820; --bg-modal: #140a10;
  --border: rgba(244,63,94,.1); --border-light: rgba(244,63,94,.18);
  --text: #f0d0e0; --text-secondary: #c08090; --text-muted: #905060;
  --accent: #f43f5e; --accent-rgb: 244,63,94; --accent-hover: #fb7185;
  --accent-subtle: rgba(244,63,94,.12); --accent-glow: rgba(244,63,94,.3);
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #f43f5e 0%, #ec4899 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(16,8,12,.85) 60%, #10080c 100%);
}

/* ══ LIGHT ══ */
[data-theme="light"] {
  --bg-root: #f0f2f5; --bg-sb: #fff; --bg-tb: rgba(255,255,255,.92);
  --bg-card: #fff; --bg-card-hover: #f5f5f5; --bg-card-active: #eaeaea;
  --bg-input: #f0f0f0; --bg-input-focus: #fff; --bg-modal: #fff;
  --bg-popup: #fff; --bg-overlay: rgba(0,0,0,.4); --bg-badge: rgba(0,0,0,.06);
  --bg-tag: rgba(0,0,0,.05);
  --border: rgba(0,0,0,.1); --border-light: rgba(0,0,0,.15);
  --text: #1a1a2e; --text-secondary: #555; --text-muted: #888;
  --text-disabled: #bbb; --text-inverse: #fff;
  --accent: #6366f1; --accent-rgb: 99,102,241;
  --shadow-sm: 0 1px 3px rgba(0,0,0,.1);
  --shadow-md: 0 4px 12px rgba(0,0,0,.12);
  --shadow-lg: 0 8px 30px rgba(0,0,0,.15);
  --shadow-xl: 0 16px 50px rgba(0,0,0,.2);
  --gradient-primary: linear-gradient(135deg, #6366f1 0%, #a855f7 100%);
  --gradient-hero: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent 0%, rgba(240,242,245,.85) 60%, #f0f2f5 100%);
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   2. RESET & BASE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
*, *::before, *::after { box-sizing: border-box; margin: 0; padding: 0; }
html { font-size: 16px; scroll-behavior: smooth; -webkit-text-size-adjust: 100%; }
body {
  font-family: var(--font); font-size: var(--fs-base); font-weight: var(--fw-400);
  line-height: var(--lh); letter-spacing: var(--ls);
  color: var(--text); background: var(--bg-root);
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; -moz-osx-font-smoothing: grayscale;
  overflow: hidden; height: 100vh; width: 100vw;
}
a { color: var(--accent); text-decoration: none; transition: var(--transition-color); }
a:hover { color: var(--accent-hover); }
img, video, canvas, svg { display: block; max-width: 100%; }
input, button, select, textarea { font-family: inherit; font-size: inherit; color: inherit; }
button { cursor: pointer; border: none; background: none; }
h1,h2,h3,h4,h5,h6 { font-weight: var(--fw-700); line-height: 1.25; }
h1 { font-size: var(--fs-3xl); } h2 { font-size: var(--fs-2xl); }
h3 { font-size: var(--fs-xl); } h4 { font-size: var(--fs-lg); }
.hidden { display: none !important; }
.text-muted { color: var(--text-muted); }
.text-secondary { color: var(--text-secondary); }
.fw-7 { font-weight: var(--fw-700); }
.fs-xs { font-size: var(--fs-xs); }
.truncate { overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.flex-1 { flex: 1; }
.mt-2 { margin-top: 8px; } .mt-3 { margin-top: 12px; } .mt-4 { margin-top: 16px; }
.mb-2 { margin-bottom: 8px; } .mb-4 { margin-bottom: 16px; }
.w-full { width: 100%; }
.text-center { text-align: center; }

/* ── Scrollbar ── */
::-webkit-scrollbar { width: var(--sb-size); height: var(--sb-size); }
::-webkit-scrollbar-track { background: var(--sb-track); }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb { background: var(--sb-thumb); border-radius: 10px; }
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover { background: var(--sb-thumb-hover); }
::-webkit-scrollbar-corner { background: transparent; }

/* ── Selection ── */
::selection { background: rgba(var(--accent-rgb), .3); color: var(--text); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   3. SPLASH SCREEN
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.splash {
  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: var(--z-top);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--bg-root); flex-direction: column;
  transition: opacity .6s var(--ease), visibility .6s;
}
.splash.fade-out { opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; pointer-events: none; }
#splashCanvas { position: absolute; inset: 0; width: 100%; height: 100%; z-index: 0; }
.splash-content { position: relative; z-index: 1; text-align: center; }
.splash-logo-wrap { margin-bottom: 32px; animation: splashPulse 2s var(--ease) infinite; }
.splash-logo { font-size: 64px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 30px rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.5)); }
.splash-title {
  font-size: 2rem; font-weight: var(--fw-800); margin-top: 8px;
  background: var(--gradient-primary); -webkit-background-clip: text; -webkit-text-fill-color: transparent;
  background-clip: text;
}
.splash-version { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; letter-spacing: .1em; text-transform: uppercase; }
.splash-progress { width: 280px; }
.splash-bar-track { height: 4px; background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
.splash-bar-fill {
  height: 100%; width: 0; border-radius: 10px;
  background: var(--gradient-primary); transition: width .3s var(--ease);
}
.splash-status { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 12px; }

@keyframes splashPulse {
  0%, 100% { transform: scale(1); } 50% { transform: scale(1.06); }
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   4. APP SHELL
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.app {
  display: flex; height: 100vh; width: 100vw; overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--bg-root);
}
.main-wrap {
  flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden;
  height: 100vh; transition: margin-left var(--dur-med) var(--ease);
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   5. SIDEBAR
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.sidebar {
  width: var(--sb-w); height: 100vh; background: var(--bg-sb);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0; z-index: var(--z-sticky);
  transition: width var(--dur-med) var(--ease), transform var(--dur-med) var(--ease);
  background-image: var(--gradient-sidebar);
}
.sidebar.collapsed { width: var(--sb-collapsed); }
.sidebar.collapsed .sb-text,
.sidebar.collapsed .sb-chevron,
.sidebar.collapsed .sb-shortcut,
.sidebar.collapsed .sb-logo-text,
.sidebar.collapsed .sb-badge { display: none; }
.sidebar.collapsed .sb-item { justify-content: center; padding: 10px; }
.sidebar.collapsed .sb-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; }

.sb-logo-area {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 16px 20px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.sb-logo { font-size: 1.6rem; }
.sb-logo-title { font-size: var(--fs-lg); font-weight: var(--fw-800); }
.sb-logo-sub { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--accent); font-weight: var(--fw-600); text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .06em; }

.sb-nav {
  flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px 0;
}
.sb-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 16px;
  margin: 1px 8px; border-radius: var(--br-md); cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg), color var(--dur-fast);
  font-size: var(--fs-md); color: var(--text-secondary); position: relative;
  white-space: nowrap;
}
.sb-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); color: var(--text); }
.sb-item.active {
  background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--accent);
  font-weight: var(--fw-600);
}
.sb-item.active::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; left: 0; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 3px; height: 60%; border-radius: 0 4px 4px 0; background: var(--accent);
}
.sb-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; width: 24px; text-align: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
.sb-shortcut {
  margin-left: auto; font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted);
  background: var(--bg-badge); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--br-sm);
  font-family: var(--mono);
}
.sb-badge {
  margin-left: auto; font-size: var(--fs-xs); min-width: 20px; height: 20px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-radius: var(--br-pill); padding: 0 6px;
}
.dvr-badge { color: var(--danger); background: var(--danger-subtle); font-size: 10px; }

.sb-group-hdr {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 9px 16px;
  margin: 4px 8px 0; border-radius: var(--br-md); cursor: pointer;
  font-size: var(--fs-md); color: var(--text-secondary); transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.sb-group-hdr:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.sb-chevron { margin-left: auto; transition: transform var(--dur-med); font-size: var(--fs-xs); }
.sb-group-hdr[aria-expanded="true"] .sb-chevron { transform: rotate(90deg); }

.sb-sub {
  max-height: 0; overflow: hidden; transition: max-height var(--dur-slow) var(--ease);
}
.sb-sub.expanded { max-height: 400px; }
.sb-sub-item { padding-left: 48px !important; }

.sb-footer {
  padding: 12px 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
}
.sb-conn-status { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-size: var(--fs-xs); }
.conn-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--danger); }
.conn-dot.online { background: var(--success); box-shadow: 0 0 8px var(--success); animation: pulse-dot 2s infinite; }
.sb-footer-text { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-disabled); text-align: center; }

@keyframes pulse-dot {
  0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: .5; }
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   6. TOP BAR
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.topbar {
  height: var(--tb-h); min-height: var(--tb-h); background: var(--bg-tb);
```
