```css
  backdrop-filter: blur(20px); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex; align-items: center; padding: 0 16px; gap: 12px;
  z-index: var(--z-sticky); flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: transform var(--dur-med) var(--ease);
}
.tb-left, .tb-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.tb-center { flex: 1; max-width: 560px; margin: 0 auto; }
#sidebarToggle { display: none; }

.icon-btn {
  width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: var(--br-md);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: 1rem; transition: var(--transition-bg);
  color: var(--text-secondary); flex-shrink: 0;
}
.icon-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); color: var(--text); }
.icon-btn:active { transform: scale(.93); }

.tb-breadcrumb { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: var(--fs-sm); }
.tb-bc-icon { font-size: 1rem; }
.tb-bc-sep { color: var(--text-muted); }
.tb-bc-current { font-weight: var(--fw-600); }

/* Search */
.search-wrap {
  position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center;
  background: var(--bg-input); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 0 12px;
  transition: border-color var(--dur-fast), box-shadow var(--dur-fast);
}
.search-wrap:focus-within {
  border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-subtle);
}
.search-icon { font-size: .9rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-right: 8px; }
.search-input {
  flex: 1; background: none; border: none; padding: 7px 0;
  color: var(--text); outline: none; font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}
.search-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); }
.search-btn { font-size: .9rem; padding: 4px; margin-left: 4px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); transition: var(--transition-bg); }
.search-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.search-kbd {
  font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--bg-badge);
  padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); font-family: var(--mono); margin-left: 8px;
}

/* Search Dropdown */
.search-dd {
  position: absolute; top: 100%; left: 0; right: 0; margin-top: 4px;
  background: var(--bg-popup); border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
  max-height: 400px; overflow-y: auto; display: none; z-index: var(--z-dropdown);
}
.search-dd.show { display: block; }

.notif-dot {
  position: absolute; top: 4px; right: 4px; width: 8px; height: 8px;
  background: var(--danger); border-radius: 50%; border: 2px solid var(--bg-tb);
}
.tb-clock { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-secondary); font-family: var(--mono); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; min-width: 56px; text-align: center; }
.tb-bandwidth { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }
.tb-bandwidth span:last-child { font-family: var(--mono); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   7. AI RECOMMENDATION STRIP
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.ai-rec-strip {
  background: var(--bg-card); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 0 16px; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
  transition: max-height var(--dur-med) var(--ease), opacity var(--dur-med);
  max-height: 120px; opacity: 1;
}
.ai-rec-strip.collapsed { max-height: 0; opacity: 0; padding: 0 16px; overflow: hidden; }
.ai-rec-strip-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600);
}
.ai-rec-mood-btns { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-left: auto; }
.ai-mood-btn {
  width: 30px; height: 30px; border-radius: var(--br-md);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: .9rem; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.ai-mood-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.ai-mood-btn.active { background: var(--accent-subtle); }

.ai-rec-scroll {
  display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 4px 0 12px; overflow-x: auto;
  scroll-snap-type: x mandatory; -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}
.ai-rec-card {
  flex-shrink: 0; width: 180px; scroll-snap-align: start;
  background: var(--bg-card-hover); border-radius: var(--br-md);
  padding: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg), transform var(--dur-fast);
}
.ai-rec-card:hover { background: var(--bg-card-active); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.ai-rec-card-img { height: 90px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); background: var(--bg-input); margin-bottom: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 2rem; overflow: hidden; }
.ai-rec-card-title { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.ai-rec-card-meta { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; }
.ai-rec-card-reason { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--accent); margin-top: 2px; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   8. PAGE FRAMEWORK
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.page { display: none; flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 20px; }
.page.active { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.page-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 16px; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.page-header h2 { font-size: var(--fs-xl); }
.page-header-actions { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }

/* Grids */
.grid-2 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(260px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
.grid-3 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(240px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
.grid-4 { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 16px; }
.charts-row { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 16px; }

/* Empty State */
.empty { text-align: center; padding: 48px 20px; }
.empty-icon { font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 12px; filter: grayscale(.3); }
.empty-title { font-size: var(--fs-lg); font-weight: var(--fw-600); margin-bottom: 4px; }
.empty-sub { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   9. BUTTONS & FORM CONTROLS
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.btn {
  display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 6px;
  padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: var(--br-md); font-size: var(--fs-sm);
  font-weight: var(--fw-600); cursor: pointer; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-card-hover); color: var(--text);
  transition: var(--transition-bg), transform var(--dur-fast);
  white-space: nowrap; user-select: none;
}
.btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-active); transform: translateY(-1px); }
.btn:active { transform: scale(.96); }
.btn-sm { padding: 5px 10px; font-size: var(--fs-xs); }
.btn-ghost { background: transparent; border-color: var(--border-light); }
.btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.btn-primary { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; border-color: var(--accent); }
.btn-primary:hover { background: var(--accent-hover); border-color: var(--accent-hover); }
.btn-danger { background: var(--danger); color: #fff; border-color: var(--danger); }

.form-input, .form-select {
  background: var(--bg-input); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-md); padding: 8px 12px; color: var(--text);
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); outline: none; transition: border-color var(--dur-fast), box-shadow var(--dur-fast);
  width: 100%;
}
.form-input:focus, .form-select:focus {
  border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px var(--accent-subtle);
}
.form-select-sm { padding: 5px 10px; font-size: var(--fs-xs); }
.form-select option { background: var(--bg-card); }

input[type="range"] {
  -webkit-appearance: none; appearance: none;
  width: 100%; height: 6px; background: var(--bg-input);
  border-radius: 10px; outline: none;
}
input[type="range"]::-webkit-slider-thumb {
  -webkit-appearance: none; width: 18px; height: 18px;
  background: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%; cursor: pointer;
  border: 2px solid var(--bg-card); box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm);
}

/* Toggle */
.toggle-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; }
.toggle-wrap input[type="checkbox"] { display: none; }
.toggle-label {
  width: 44px; height: 24px; background: var(--bg-input); border-radius: var(--br-pill);
  position: relative; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.toggle-label::after {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: 3px; left: 3px; width: 16px; height: 16px;
  background: var(--text-muted); border-radius: 50%; transition: transform var(--dur-med) var(--ease), background var(--dur-med);
}
.toggle-wrap input:checked + .toggle-label { background: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); }
.toggle-wrap input:checked + .toggle-label::after { transform: translateX(20px); background: #fff; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   10. LIVE TV PAGE — PLAYER
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.live-layout { display: flex; gap: 0; height: calc(100vh - var(--tb-h) - 120px); flex: 1; min-height: 0; }
.player-area { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; min-width: 0; position: relative; }

.player-wrap {
  flex: 1; background: #000; border-radius: var(--br-md); overflow: hidden;
  position: relative; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  min-height: 200px;
}
.player-wrap video {
  width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain;
}

/* Loader */
.vid-loader {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,.7);
  z-index: 2; gap: 16px; transition: opacity var(--dur-med);
}
.vid-loader.hidden { opacity: 0; pointer-events: none; }
.loader-spinner {
  width: 48px; height: 48px; border: 3px solid rgba(255,255,255,.15);
  border-top-color: var(--accent); border-radius: 50%;
  animation: spin .8s linear infinite;
}
.loader-text { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-secondary); }
@keyframes spin { to { transform: rotate(360deg); } }

/* Error */
.vid-error {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; background: rgba(0,0,0,.8);
  z-index: 2; gap: 8px; text-align: center; padding: 20px;
}
.vid-error-icon { font-size: 2.5rem; }
.vid-error-msg { font-size: var(--fs-lg); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.vid-error-sub { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); }
.vid-error-btns { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 8px; }

/* Idle */
.vid-idle {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 2; text-align: center;
  background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(10,10,15,.3) 0%, rgba(10,10,15,.7) 100%);
}
.vid-idle-icon { font-size: 4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; filter: drop-shadow(0 0 20px rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.3)); }
.vid-idle-text { font-size: var(--fs-xl); font-weight: var(--fw-700); }
.vid-idle-sub { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; }

/* Channel OSD */
.ch-osd {
  position: absolute; top: 16px; left: 16px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.75); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  padding: 10px 16px; border-radius: var(--br-lg);
  z-index: 3; animation: osdIn .3s var(--ease-out);
}
.ch-osd.hidden { display: none !important; }
.ch-osd-num { font-size: var(--fs-2xl); font-weight: var(--fw-800); font-family: var(--mono); color: var(--accent); min-width: 40px; }
.ch-osd-name { font-size: var(--fs-lg); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.ch-osd-logo { width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); background: var(--bg-input); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; }
.ch-osd-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
.ch-osd-meta { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }

/* General OSD Overlay */
.osd-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; align-items: center;
  justify-content: center; z-index: 4; pointer-events: none;
}
.osd-overlay.hidden { display: none !important; }
.osd-text {
  font-size: var(--fs-3xl); font-weight: var(--fw-800); color: rgba(255,255,255,.8);
  text-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(0,0,0,.5);
  animation: osdFlash .6s var(--ease-out);
}

@keyframes osdIn {
  from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(-10px) scale(.95); }
  to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0) scale(1); }
}
@keyframes osdFlash {
  0% { opacity: 0; transform: scale(.8); }
  30% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1.05); }
  100% { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); }
}

/* EPG Strip (in player) */
.epg-strip {
  position: absolute; bottom: 60px; left: 16px; right: 16px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.7); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  border-radius: var(--br-md); padding: 8px 14px;
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; z-index: 3;
  font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}
.epg-strip-item { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.epg-strip-next { flex: .8; color: var(--text-muted); }
.epg-strip-progress { width: 120px; height: 4px; background: rgba(255,255,255,.1); border-radius: 10px; flex-shrink: 0; overflow: hidden; }
.epg-strip-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 10px; width: 0%; transition: width 1s linear; }

/* Quality Bars */
.quality-bars { position: absolute; top: 16px; right: 16px; display: flex; gap: 3px; align-items: flex-end; z-index: 3; }
.qb { width: 6px; background: var(--text-muted); border-radius: 2px; transition: background var(--dur-med); }
.qb:nth-child(1) { height: 8px; } .qb:nth-child(2) { height: 13px; } .qb:nth-child(3) { height: 18px; } .qb:nth-child(4) { height: 23px; }
.qb.active { background: var(--success); }

/* Spectrum Canvas */
.spectrum-canvas {
  position: absolute; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 40px;
  z-index: 2; pointer-events: none; opacity: .5;
}

/* Channel Number Overlay */
.ch-num-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; z-index: 10;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.6); backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
}
.ch-num-overlay.hidden { display: none !important; }
.ch-num-display {
  font-size: 5rem; font-weight: var(--fw-800); font-family: var(--mono);
  color: var(--accent); min-width: 120px; text-align: center;
  text-shadow: 0 0 30px rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.5);
  animation: numGlow 1.5s ease-in-out infinite;
}
.ch-num-label { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 8px; }
@keyframes numGlow {
  0%, 100% { text-shadow: 0 0 20px rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.4); }
  50% { text-shadow: 0 0 40px rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.7); }
}

/* Fireworks Canvas */
.fireworks-canvas {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 5; pointer-events: none;
}
.fireworks-canvas.hidden { display: none !important; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   11. PLAYER CONTROLS
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.player-controls {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px;
  padding: 8px 12px; background: var(--bg-card);
  border-radius: var(--br-md); margin-top: 8px; flex-shrink: 0;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.pc-left, .pc-center, .pc-right { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; }
.pc-left { flex: 0 0 auto; }
.pc-center { flex: 1; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.pc-right { flex: 0 0 auto; }

.pc-ch-num {
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-700); font-family: var(--mono);
  color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); padding: 3px 8px;
  border-radius: var(--br-sm); min-width: 36px; text-align: center;
}
.pc-ch-name { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600); max-width: 120px; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; white-space: nowrap; }
.pc-live-dot {
  width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--danger);
  animation: pulse-dot 1.5s infinite; flex-shrink: 0;
}

.pc-btn {
  width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: var(--br-sm);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: .9rem; transition: var(--transition-bg);
  color: var(--text-secondary); flex-shrink: 0;
}
.pc-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); color: var(--text); }
.pc-btn.active { color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); }
.pc-btn.recording { color: var(--danger); animation: rec-pulse 1s infinite; }
@keyframes rec-pulse { 0%, 100% { opacity: 1; } 50% { opacity: .5; } }

.pc-sep { width: 1px; height: 20px; background: var(--border); margin: 0 2px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.pc-vol { width: 70px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.pc-vol-val { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--mono); min-width: 28px; text-align: center; }

/* Progress */
.pc-prog-wrap { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; flex: 1; max-width: 300px; }
.pc-prog-time-cur, .pc-prog-time-total { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--mono); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }
.pc-prog-bar {
  flex: 1; height: 6px; background: var(--bg-input); border-radius: 10px;
  cursor: pointer; position: relative; overflow: visible;
}
.pc-prog-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 10px; width: 0%; transition: width .1s; }
.pc-prog-thumb {
  position: absolute; top: 50%; transform: translateY(-50%);
  width: 14px; height: 14px; background: #fff; border-radius: 50%;
  left: 0%; opacity: 0; transition: opacity var(--dur-fast);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-sm); cursor: grab;
}
.pc-prog-bar:hover .pc-prog-thumb { opacity: 1; }

.pc-live-prog { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; font-size: var(--fs-xs); }
.pc-live-prog-label { color: var(--text-muted); }

/* Player Settings Panel */
.player-settings {
  position: absolute; bottom: 60px; right: 16px; width: 340px;
  background: var(--bg-popup); border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
  z-index: var(--z-dropdown); max-height: 70vh; overflow-y: auto;
}
.player-settings.hidden { display: none !important; }
.ps-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-weight: var(--fw-600);
}
.ps-body { padding: 12px 16px; }
.ps-group { margin-bottom: 14px; }
.ps-group label { display: block; font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.ps-row { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.ps-row input[type="range"] { flex: 1; }
.ps-row span { font-size: var(--fs-xs); font-family: var(--mono); color: var(--text-muted); min-width: 48px; text-align: right; }

/* Quality / Sub / Audio / Speed Popups */
.quality-popup, .sub-popup, .audio-popup, .speed-popup, .sleep-popup, .share-popup {
  position: absolute; z-index: var(--z-dropdown);
  background: var(--bg-popup); border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
  overflow: hidden; min-width: 180px;
}
.quality-popup { bottom: 56px; right: 260px; }
.sub-popup { bottom: 56px; right: 300px; }
.audio-popup { bottom: 56px; right: 260px; }
.speed-popup { bottom: 56px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%); }
.sleep-popup { top: 60px; right: 16px; width: 280px; }
.share-popup { bottom: 60px; right: 60px; width: 300px; }

.quality-popup.hidden, .sub-popup.hidden, .audio-popup.hidden,
.speed-popup.hidden, .sleep-popup.hidden, .share-popup.hidden { display: none !important; }

.qp-header, .sp-header, .ap-header, .sp2-header, .slp-header, .share-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-weight: var(--fw-600); font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}
.qp-list, .sp-list, .ap-list, .sp2-list {
  max-height: 300px; overflow-y: auto;
}
.qp-item, .sp-item, .ap-item, .sp2-item {
  padding: 8px 14px; font-size: var(--fs-sm); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.qp-item:hover, .sp-item:hover, .ap-item:hover, .sp2-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.qp-item.active, .sp-item.active, .ap-item.active, .sp2-item.active { color: var(--accent); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }

.slp-body { padding: 12px 14px; }
.slp-options { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.slp-custom label { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); display: block; margin-bottom: 6px; }
.slp-active { text-align: center; padding: 12px 0; }
.slp-remaining { font-size: var(--fs-2xl); font-weight: var(--fw-800); font-family: var(--mono); color: var(--warning); margin-bottom: 12px; }

.share-body { padding: 12px 14px; }
.share-url { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.share-url input { flex: 1; }
.share-social { display: flex; gap: 8px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.share-btn {
  width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: var(--br-md); font-size: 1.2rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--bg-card-hover); transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.share-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-active); transform: scale(1.1); }
.share-qr-canvas { margin: 0 auto; border-radius: var(--br-md); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   12. CHANNEL SIDEBAR
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.ch-sidebar {
  width: 320px; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  background: var(--bg-sb); border-left: 1px solid var(--border);
  height: 100%;
}
.ch-search-bar {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.ch-search-input-wrap {
  flex: 1; display: flex; align-items: center; background: var(--bg-input);
  border-radius: var(--br-md); padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  transition: border-color var(--dur-fast);
}
.ch-search-input-wrap:focus-within { border-color: var(--accent); }
.ch-search-icon { font-size: .85rem; color: var(--text-muted); margin-right: 6px; }
.ch-search { flex: 1; background: none; border: none; padding: 6px 0; outline: none; color: var(--text); font-size: var(--fs-sm); }
.ch-search::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); }

/* Category Tabs */
.cat-tabs {
  display: flex; overflow-x: auto; padding: 8px 12px; gap: 6px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.cat-tab {
  padding: 5px 12px; border-radius: var(--br-pill); font-size: var(--fs-xs);
  cursor: pointer; white-space: nowrap; transition: var(--transition-bg);
  background: var(--bg-tag); color: var(--text-secondary);
}
.cat-tab:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.cat-tab.active { background: var(--accent); color: #fff; font-weight: var(--fw-600); }

/* Channel Filters */
.ch-filters {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; padding: 8px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); flex-wrap: wrap; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.ch-filter-btn {
  padding: 4px 10px; border-radius: var(--br-pill); font-size: var(--fs-xs);
  background: var(--bg-tag); color: var(--text-secondary); cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg); border: 1px solid transparent;
}
.ch-filter-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.ch-filter-btn.active { background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); }
.ch-sort {
  margin-left: auto; background: var(--bg-input); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-sm); padding: 3px 8px; font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text);
}

/* Channel List */
.ch-list {
  flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px 0;
}
.ch-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 8px 14px;
  margin: 2px 8px; border-radius: var(--br-md); cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg); position: relative;
  user-select: none;
}
.ch-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.ch-item.active { background: var(--accent-subtle); }
.ch-item.active::after {
  content: '▶'; position: absolute; right: 10px; font-size: .7rem; color: var(--accent);
}
.ch-item-idx {
  font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--mono);
  min-width: 28px; text-align: center;
}
.ch-item-logo {
  width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); background: var(--bg-input);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.ch-item-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
.ch-item-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.ch-item-name { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-500); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.ch-item-meta { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.ch-item-badges { display: flex; gap: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.ch-item-badge {
  font-size: var(--fs-xs); padding: 1px 5px; border-radius: var(--br-sm);
  background: var(--bg-badge); color: var(--text-muted);
}
.ch-item-badge.hd { background: var(--info-subtle); color: var(--info); }
.ch-item-badge.fourk { background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--accent); }
.ch-item-badge.live { background: var(--success-subtle); color: var(--success); }
.ch-item-badge.rec { background: var(--danger-subtle); color: var(--danger); animation: rec-pulse 1s infinite; }
.ch-item-fav {
  font-size: .9rem; cursor: pointer; transition: transform var(--dur-fast); flex-shrink: 0;
  opacity: .4;
}
.ch-item-fav:hover { transform: scale(1.2); }
.ch-item-fav.active { opacity: 1; }

.ch-footer {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   13. DUAL CHANNEL PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.dual-layout {
  display: flex; gap: 8px; flex: 1; min-height: 0;
}
.dual-pane {
  flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; background: var(--bg-card);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); overflow: hidden; border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.dual-pane-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600);
}
.dual-video { flex: 1; background: #000; min-height: 200px; }
.dual-pane-empty {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; color: var(--text-muted);
  font-size: var(--fs-lg); gap: 8px;
}
.dual-pane-controls {
  display: flex; gap: 4px; padding: 8px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  justify-content: center;
}
.dual-separator {
  width: 24px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.dual-sep-btn {
  width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: .9rem; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.dual-sep-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   14. MOSAIC PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.mosaic-layout-btns { display: flex; gap: 4px; }
.mosaic-grid {
  flex: 1; display: grid; gap: 6px;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); grid-template-rows: repeat(2, 1fr);
  min-height: 0; overflow: hidden;
}
.mosaic-grid[data-cols="3"] { grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); }
.mosaic-grid[data-rows="3"] { grid-template-rows: repeat(3, 1fr); }
.mosaic-grid[data-cols="4"] { grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); }
.mosaic-grid[data-rows="4"] { grid-template-rows: repeat(4, 1fr); }

.mosaic-cell {
  background: #000; border-radius: var(--br-md); overflow: hidden;
  position: relative; border: 1px solid var(--border);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  cursor: pointer; transition: border-color var(--dur-fast);
}
.mosaic-cell:hover { border-color: var(--accent); }
.mosaic-cell video { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
.mosaic-cell-label {
  position: absolute; bottom: 6px; left: 6px; right: 6px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.7); padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: var(--br-sm);
  font-size: var(--fs-xs); font-weight: var(--fw-600); z-index: 2;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
}
.mosaic-cell-empty { font-size: var(--fs-3xl); color: var(--text-muted); opacity: .3; }
.mosaic-cell-remove {
  position: absolute; top: 4px; right: 4px; width: 24px; height: 24px;
  border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(0,0,0,.6); color: var(--text-muted);
  display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: .7rem;
  z-index: 3; cursor: pointer;
}
.mosaic-cell:hover .mosaic-cell-remove { display: flex; }

.mosaic-ch-select-bar { padding: 8px 12px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }
.mosaic-ch-list { max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; margin-top: 6px; display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr)); gap: 4px; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   15. CARDS
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.card {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); overflow: hidden; transition: var(--transition-bg), transform var(--dur-fast);
  cursor: pointer;
}
.card:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); transform: translateY(-3px); box-shadow: var(--shadow-md); }
.card-poster {
  aspect-ratio: 16/9; background: var(--bg-input); display: flex;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 2.5rem;
  position: relative; overflow: hidden;
}
.card-poster img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: cover; }
.card-poster-overlay {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; background: var(--gradient-hero);
  opacity: 0; transition: opacity var(--dur-med); display: flex;
  align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.card:hover .card-poster-overlay { opacity: 1; }
.card-play-btn {
  width: 50px; height: 50px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(var(--accent-rgb),.9);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.3rem;
  transform: scale(.7); transition: transform var(--dur-med) var(--ease-spring);
}
.card:hover .card-play-btn { transform: scale(1); }
.card-body { padding: 12px; }
.card-title { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600); margin-bottom: 4px; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.card-sub { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }
.card-tags { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-top: 6px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.card-tag {
  font-size: var(--fs-xs); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--br-sm);
  background: var(--bg-tag); color: var(--text-muted);
}
.card-tag.accent { background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--accent); }

/* Chart Card */
.chart-card {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 16px;
}
.chart-card h3 { font-size: var(--fs-md); margin-bottom: 12px; }
.chart-container { position: relative; height: 160px; }
.chart-container canvas { width: 100% !important; height: 100% !important; }
.chart-overlay {
  position: absolute; top: 0; right: 0; font-size: var(--fs-xl);
  font-weight: var(--fw-700); font-family: var(--mono); color: var(--accent);
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   16. MOVIES PAGE — HERO BANNER
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.movie-hero {
  position: relative; border-radius: var(--br-lg); overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 280px; display: flex; align-items: flex-end; margin-bottom: 20px;
  background: var(--bg-card);
}
.movie-hero-bg {
  position: absolute; inset: 0; background-size: cover; background-position: center;
}
.movie-hero-info {
  position: relative; z-index: 1; padding: 24px;
  background: var(--gradient-hero); width: 100%;
}
.movie-hero-desc {
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-secondary); margin: 8px 0 12px;
  max-width: 600px; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 3; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden;
}
.movie-hero-meta { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 12px; display: flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.movie-hero-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }

/* Movie Detail Modal */
.movie-detail-layout { display: flex; gap: 20px; }
.movie-detail-poster {
  width: 200px; min-height: 280px; border-radius: var(--br-lg); background: var(--bg-input);
  flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 4rem;
}
.movie-detail-info { flex: 1; }
.movie-detail-meta { display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 12px; font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); flex-wrap: wrap; }
.movie-detail-cast { margin-top: 12px; font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-secondary); }

/* Series Detail */
.series-detail-seasons { display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 16px; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 4px; }
.series-detail-episodes { display: grid; gap: 8px; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   17. EPG PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.epg-container {
  display: flex; flex: 1; min-height: 0; overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--br-lg);
}
.epg-sidebar-ch {
  width: 200px; flex-shrink: 0; border-right: 1px solid var(--border);
  overflow-y: auto; background: var(--bg-card);
}
.epg-sidebar-ch-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 10px 12px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-size: var(--fs-sm);
  cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg); min-height: 56px;
}
.epg-sidebar-ch-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.epg-sidebar-ch-item.active { background: var(--accent-subtle); }
.epg-sidebar-ch-logo { width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); background: var(--bg-input); flex-shrink: 0; overflow: hidden; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; }
.epg-sidebar-ch-logo img { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
.epg-sidebar-ch-name { flex: 1; white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }

.epg-content { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; overflow: hidden; }
.epg-ruler {
  display: flex; height: 36px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  background: var(--bg-card); overflow: hidden; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.epg-ruler-slot {
  flex-shrink: 0; padding: 6px 8px; font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted);
  border-right: 1px solid var(--border); font-family: var(--mono);
  display: flex; align-items: center;
}

.epg-grid-scroll {
  flex: 1; overflow: auto; position: relative;
}
.epg-grid { position: relative; }
.epg-row {
  display: flex; min-height: 56px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
  position: relative;
}
.epg-cell {
  position: absolute; top: 4px; bottom: 4px;
  background: var(--bg-epg-block); border-radius: var(--br-sm);
  padding: 6px 10px; cursor: pointer; overflow: hidden;
  transition: background var(--dur-fast);
  border: 1px solid transparent;
}
.epg-cell:hover { background: var(--bg-epg-block-hover); border-color: var(--accent); }
.epg-cell.now { background: var(--bg-epg-block-active); border-color: var(--accent); }
.epg-cell-title { font-size: var(--fs-xs); font-weight: var(--fw-600); white-space: nowrap; overflow: hidden; text-overflow: ellipsis; }
.epg-cell-time { font-size: calc(var(--fs-xs) - 1px); color: var(--text-muted); }

.epg-now-line {
  position: absolute; top: 0; bottom: 0; width: 2px; background: var(--danger);
  z-index: 10; pointer-events: none;
}
.epg-now-line::before {
  content: ''; position: absolute; top: -4px; left: -5px;
  width: 12px; height: 12px; background: var(--danger); border-radius: 50%;
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   18. FAVORITES PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.fav-tabs {
  display: flex; gap: 6px; margin-bottom: 12px; overflow-x: auto;
  padding-bottom: 4px; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.fav-tab {
  padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: var(--br-pill); font-size: var(--fs-sm);
  cursor: pointer; background: var(--bg-tag); color: var(--text-secondary);
  white-space: nowrap; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.fav-tab:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.fav-tab.active { background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--accent); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   19. DVR PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.tabs-bar {
  display: flex; gap: 2px; margin-bottom: 16px; background: var(--bg-card);
  border-radius: var(--br-md); padding: 3px; flex-shrink: 0; overflow-x: auto;
}
.tab-item {
  padding: 7px 14px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); font-size: var(--fs-sm);
  cursor: pointer; color: var(--text-secondary); white-space: nowrap;
  transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.tab-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.tab-item.active { background: var(--accent-subtle); color: var(--accent); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }

.dvr-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px;
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-md); margin-bottom: 8px; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.dvr-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.dvr-item-thumb {
  width: 80px; height: 45px; background: var(--bg-input); border-radius: var(--br-sm);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0;
}
.dvr-item-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.dvr-item-title { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.dvr-item-meta { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; }
.dvr-item-actions { display: flex; gap: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   20. HISTORY PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.history-list { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; }
.history-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 10px 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.history-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.history-item-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; width: 36px; text-align: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
.history-item-info { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.history-item-name { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-500); }
.history-item-meta { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }
.history-item-time { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--mono); flex-shrink: 0; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   21. AI PAGES
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.ai-mood-selector {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(120px, 1fr));
  gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 16px;
}
.ai-mood-card {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 20px 16px; text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg), transform var(--dur-fast);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
}
.ai-mood-card span:first-child { font-size: 2rem; }
.ai-mood-card span:last-child { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.ai-mood-card:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); transform: translateY(-3px); }
.ai-mood-card.active { border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); }

/* AI Search */
.ai-search-area { margin-bottom: 24px; }
.ai-search-big {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px;
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-xl); padding: 6px 12px 6px 20px;
  transition: border-color var(--dur-fast), box-shadow var(--dur-fast);
}
.ai-search-big:focus-within { border-color: var(--accent); box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px var(--accent-subtle); }
.ai-search-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
.ai-search-input {
  flex: 1; background: none; border: none; outline: none;
  font-size: var(--fs-lg); padding: 10px 0; color: var(--text);
}
.ai-search-suggestions { display: flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.ai-suggestion {
  padding: 6px 14px; border-radius: var(--br-pill); font-size: var(--fs-xs);
  background: var(--bg-tag); color: var(--text-secondary); cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg); border: 1px solid transparent;
}
.ai-suggestion:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); border-color: var(--accent); }

.ai-search-results { display: grid; gap: 12px; }
.ai-result-item {
  display: flex; gap: 12px; padding: 14px; background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--br-md); cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.ai-result-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }

/* Mood Wheel */
.mood-wheel { display: flex; gap: 8px; flex-wrap: wrap; }
.mood-segment {
  padding: 16px 20px; border-radius: var(--br-lg);
  background: hsla(var(--hue), 60%, 40%, .15); border: 1px solid hsla(var(--hue), 60%, 50%, .3);
  cursor: pointer; font-weight: var(--fw-600); transition: var(--transition-bg), transform var(--dur-fast);
}
.mood-segment:hover { transform: translateY(-2px); background: hsla(var(--hue), 60%, 40%, .25); }
.mood-segment.active { background: hsla(var(--hue), 60%, 40%, .35); border-color: hsla(var(--hue), 60%, 60%, .6); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   22. PLAYLIST EDITOR PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.ple-layout { display: flex; gap: 12px; flex: 1; min-height: 0; }
.ple-sidebar {
  width: 260px; flex-shrink: 0; background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--br-lg);
  overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px 0;
}
.ple-source-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 8px 12px;
  cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
  font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}
.ple-source-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.ple-source-item.active { background: var(--accent-subtle); }
.ple-editor {
  flex: 1; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); overflow: auto; padding: 12px;
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   23. IPTV DIRECTORY
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.dir-item {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 16px; transition: var(--transition-bg), transform var(--dur-fast);
  cursor: pointer;
}
.dir-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); transform: translateY(-2px); }
.dir-item-title { font-size: var(--fs-md); font-weight: var(--fw-700); margin-bottom: 4px; }
.dir-item-desc { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 8px; }
.dir-item-meta { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); display: flex; gap: 12px; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   24. WATCH PARTY PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.wp-layout { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex: 1; min-height: 0; }
.wp-left { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.wp-right { width: 300px; flex-shrink: 0; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; }

.wp-empty {
  text-align: center; padding: 48px 20px;
  background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: var(--br-lg); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
}
.wp-empty-icon { font-size: 4rem; margin-bottom: 16px; }
.wp-empty-title { font-size: var(--fs-xl); font-weight: var(--fw-700); margin-bottom: 4px; }
.wp-empty-sub { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-muted); margin-bottom: 20px; }
.wp-actions { display: flex; gap: 12px; }

.wp-members-section, .wp-chat-section {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 12px;
}
.wp-members-section h3, .wp-chat-section h3 {
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); margin-bottom: 8px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px;
}

.wp-member-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 4px 0;
  font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}
.wp-member-avatar {
  width: 28px; height: 28px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent-subtle);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-size: .8rem;
}
.wp-member-name { flex: 1; }
.wp-member-role { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }

.wp-reactions { display: flex; gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.reaction-btn {
  padding: 4px 8px; border-radius: var(--br-md); font-size: 1.1rem;
  background: var(--bg-tag); transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.reaction-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); transform: scale(1.15); }

.wp-chat {
  height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; margin-bottom: 8px;
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px;
}
.wp-chat-msg {
  font-size: var(--fs-xs); padding: 4px 8px;
  background: var(--bg-tag); border-radius: var(--br-sm);
}
.wp-chat-msg .wp-chat-author { font-weight: var(--fw-600); color: var(--accent); }
.wp-chat-input { display: flex; gap: 6px; }
.wp-chat-input input { flex: 1; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   25. CAST PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cast-protocols {
  display: flex; gap: 12px; margin-bottom: 20px; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.cast-proto {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 12px 20px;
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.cast-proto:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); border-color: var(--accent); }
.cast-proto.active { border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); }
.cast-proto-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; }

.cast-devices { display: grid; gap: 12px; }
.cast-device-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 14px;
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.cast-device-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.cast-device-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; }
.cast-device-info { flex: 1; }
.cast-device-name { font-weight: var(--fw-600); font-size: var(--fs-sm); }
.cast-device-ip { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   26. MAP PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.map-container {
  flex: 1; position: relative; border-radius: var(--br-lg);
  overflow: hidden; background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  min-height: 400px;
}
.map-container canvas { width: 100%; height: 100%; }
.map-overlay-info {
  position: absolute; bottom: 16px; left: 16px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.75); backdrop-filter: blur(10px);
  padding: 12px 16px; border-radius: var(--br-md); display: none;
}
.map-overlay-info.show { display: block; }
.map-info-title { font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.map-info-ch { font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-secondary); }
.map-info-viewers { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--accent); margin-top: 2px; }
.map-legend {
  position: absolute; top: 12px; right: 12px;
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.7); padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: var(--br-md);
  font-size: var(--fs-xs);
}
.map-legend-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; margin: 2px 0; }
.map-dot { width: 10px; height: 10px; border-radius: 50%; }
.map-dot.high { background: var(--danger); }
.map-dot.mid { background: var(--warning); }
.map-dot.low { background: var(--success); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   27. STATISTICS PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.stats-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(160px, 1fr));
  gap: 12px;
}
.stat-card {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 16px;
  transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.stat-card:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.stat-card-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.stat-card-value { font-size: var(--fs-2xl); font-weight: var(--fw-800); font-family: var(--mono); }
.stat-card-label { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 2px; }
.stat-card-change { font-size: var(--fs-xs); margin-top: 4px; }
.stat-card-change.up { color: var(--success); }
.stat-card-change.down { color: var(--danger); }

.top-ch-list { display: grid; gap: 6px; }
.top-ch-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 14px;
  background: var(--bg-card); border-radius: var(--br-md);
}
.top-ch-rank { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-700); color: var(--accent); width: 28px; font-family: var(--mono); }
.top-ch-name { flex: 1; font-size: var(--fs-sm); }
.top-ch-bar-wrap { flex: 2; height: 6px; background: var(--bg-input); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
.top-ch-bar { height: 100%; background: var(--gradient-primary); border-radius: 10px; }
.top-ch-time { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); font-family: var(--mono); min-width: 60px; text-align: right; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   28. LIVE VIEWERS PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.lv-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(200px, 1fr)); gap: 12px; }
.lv-item {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 16px; text-align: center;
}
.lv-item-count { font-size: var(--fs-2xl); font-weight: var(--fw-800); color: var(--accent); font-family: var(--mono); }
.lv-item-name { font-size: var(--fs-sm); margin-top: 4px; }
.lv-item-bar { margin-top: 8px; height: 4px; background: var(--bg-input); border-radius: 10px; overflow: hidden; }
.lv-item-fill { height: 100%; background: var(--accent); border-radius: 10px; transition: width 1s var(--ease); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   29. PARENTAL CONTROLS PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.parental-container { max-width: 600px; }
.parental-pin-area {
  text-align: center; padding: 32px; background: var(--bg-card);
  border: 1px solid var(--border); border-radius: var(--br-lg);
}
.parental-lock-icon { font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.parental-status { font-size: var(--fs-lg); font-weight: var(--fw-600); margin-bottom: 16px; }
.pin-input-group { display: flex; gap: 8px; align-items: center; justify-content: center; max-width: 300px; margin: 0 auto; }
.parental-blocked-list { max-height: 200px; overflow-y: auto; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   30. SETTINGS PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.settings-grid {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(320px, 1fr));
  gap: 16px;
}
.settings-card {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 20px;
}
.settings-card h3 { font-size: var(--fs-lg); margin-bottom: 16px; padding-bottom: 8px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
.set-group { margin-bottom: 14px; }
.set-group > label { display: block; font-size: var(--fs-sm); color: var(--text-secondary); margin-bottom: 6px; }
.set-group-inline { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; }
.set-inline-label { font-size: var(--fs-xs); font-family: var(--mono); color: var(--text-muted); min-width: 48px; text-align: right; }
.set-info { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; }
.set-info-row { display: flex; justify-content: space-between; font-size: var(--fs-sm); }

.drop-zone, .drop-zone-sm {
  border: 2px dashed var(--border); border-radius: var(--br-lg);
  padding: 32px 20px; text-align: center; cursor: pointer;
  transition: border-color var(--dur-fast), background var(--dur-fast);
}
.drop-zone:hover { border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); }
.drop-zone.drag-over { border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); }
.drop-zone-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.drop-zone-text { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.drop-zone-sub { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 4px; }
.drop-zone-sm { padding: 12px; font-size: var(--fs-sm); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   31. AUTOREC PAGE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.autorec-list { display: grid; gap: 8px; }
.autorec-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 12px 16px;
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-md);
}
.autorec-icon { font-size: 1.3rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
.autorec-info { flex: 1; }
.autorec-name { font-weight: var(--fw-600); font-size: var(--fs-sm); }
.autorec-meta { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }
.autorec-actions { display: flex; gap: 4px; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   32. FLOATING COMPONENTS
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

/* Mini Player */
.mini-player {
  position: fixed; bottom: 70px; right: 16px; width: 320px;
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
  z-index: var(--z-overlay); overflow: hidden;
}
.mini-player.hidden { display: none !important; }
.mp-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 8px 12px; background: var(--bg-tb); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.mp-title { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.mp-body { position: relative; aspect-ratio: 16/9; background: #000; }
.mp-body video { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
.mp-controls { position: absolute; bottom: 6px; left: 6px; display: flex; gap: 4px; }

/* PiP Window */
.pip-win {
  position: fixed; width: 360px; height: 220px; z-index: var(--z-top);
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
  overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  resize: both; min-width: 200px; min-height: 130px;
}
.pip-win.hidden { display: none !important; }
.pip-title-bar {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 4px 10px; background: var(--bg-tb); cursor: move; flex-shrink: 0;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.pip-name { font-size: var(--fs-xs); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.pip-btns { display: flex; gap: 2px; }
.pip-body { flex: 1; position: relative; background: #000; }
.pip-body video { width: 100%; height: 100%; object-fit: contain; }
.pip-controls { position: absolute; bottom: 4px; left: 4px; right: 4px; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 4px; }
.pip-vol { width: 60px; }
.pip-resize {
  position: absolute; bottom: 0; right: 0; width: 16px; height: 16px;
  cursor: nwse-resize; opacity: .3;
}
.pip-resize::after { content: '⋰'; position: absolute; right: 2px; bottom: 0; }

/* Context Menu */
.ctx-menu {
  position: fixed; z-index: var(--z-top); min-width: 200px;
  background: var(--bg-popup); border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: var(--br-md); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
  padding: 4px 0; display: none; animation: ctxIn .15s var(--ease-out);
}
.ctx-menu.show { display: block; }
.ctx-item {
  padding: 7px 14px; font-size: var(--fs-sm); cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg); white-space: nowrap;
}
.ctx-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.ctx-item.ctx-danger { color: var(--danger); }
.ctx-item.ctx-danger:hover { background: var(--danger-subtle); }
.ctx-divider { height: 1px; background: var(--border); margin: 4px 0; }

@keyframes ctxIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(.95); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1); } }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   33. COMMAND PALETTE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.cmd-overlay {
  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: var(--z-modal);
  background: rgba(0,0,0,.6); backdrop-filter: blur(6px);
  display: none; align-items: flex-start; justify-content: center; padding-top: 15vh;
}
.cmd-overlay.open { display: flex; }
.cmd-palette {
  width: 560px; max-height: 70vh; background: var(--bg-popup);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius: var(--br-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl); overflow: hidden; animation: ctxIn .2s var(--ease-out);
}
.cmd-search-wrap {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 16px;
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.cmd-search-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cmd-input {
  flex: 1; background: none; border: none; outline: none;
  font-size: var(--fs-lg); color: var(--text); padding: 4px 0;
}
.cmd-input::placeholder { color: var(--text-muted); }
.cmd-esc {
  font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); background: var(--bg-badge);
  padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); font-family: var(--mono);
}
.cmd-section { padding: 8px 0; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }
.cmd-section:last-child { border-bottom: none; }
.cmd-section-label {
  padding: 4px 16px; font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted);
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .06em; font-weight: var(--fw-600);
}
.cmd-item {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 16px;
  cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.cmd-item:hover, .cmd-item.focused { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.cmd-item-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; width: 28px; text-align: center; flex-shrink: 0; }
.cmd-item-name { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-500); }
.cmd-item-sub { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }
.cmd-item kbd {
  margin-left: auto; font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted);
  background: var(--bg-badge); padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: var(--br-sm);
  font-family: var(--mono); flex-shrink: 0;
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   34. NOTIFICATION CENTER
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.notif-center {
  position: fixed; top: var(--tb-h); right: 0; width: 360px;
  max-height: 500px; background: var(--bg-popup); border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: 0 0 var(--br-lg) var(--br-lg); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
  z-index: var(--z-dropdown); display: none; overflow: hidden;
}
.notif-center.show { display: flex; flex-direction: column; }
.notif-center-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.notif-center-header h3 { font-size: var(--fs-md); }
.notif-list { flex: 1; overflow-y: auto; padding: 8px 0; }
.notif-item {
  display: flex; gap: 10px; padding: 10px 16px; cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg); border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.notif-item:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.notif-item-icon { font-size: 1.2rem; flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; }
.notif-item-body { flex: 1; }
.notif-item-title { font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.notif-item-text { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 2px; }
.notif-item-time { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); flex-shrink: 0; margin-top: 2px; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   35. VIRTUAL REMOTE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.vr-wrap {
  position: fixed; bottom: 70px; left: 50%; transform: translateX(-50%);
  width: 280px; background: var(--bg-popup); border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: var(--br-xl); box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl);
  z-index: var(--z-overlay); overflow: hidden;
}
.vr-wrap.hidden { display: none !important; }
.vr-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 10px 14px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); font-weight: var(--fw-600); font-size: var(--fs-sm);
}
.vr-body { padding: 12px; }

.vr-color-row { display: flex; gap: 6px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.vr-color-btn {
  width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: var(--br-sm); font-size: 1rem;
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--bg-card-hover); transition: var(--transition-bg);
  border: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.vr-color-btn:hover { transform: scale(1.1); }
.vr-red { border-color: var(--danger); } .vr-green { border-color: var(--success); }
.vr-yellow { border-color: var(--warning); } .vr-blue { border-color: var(--info); }

.vr-dpad-area {
  display: grid; grid-template-areas:
    ". up ."
    "left ok right"
    ". down .";
  grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr; grid-template-rows: 1fr 1fr 1fr;
  gap: 4px; width: 160px; height: 160px; margin: 0 auto 12px;
}
.vr-dpad {
  border-radius: var(--br-md); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  background: var(--bg-card-hover); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-size: 1.1rem; cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.vr-dpad:hover { background: var(--bg-card-active); }
.vr-dpad:active { transform: scale(.92); }
.vr-up { grid-area: up; } .vr-left { grid-area: left; }
.vr-ok { grid-area: ok; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--accent); color: #fff; font-weight: var(--fw-700); border-color: var(--accent); }
.vr-right { grid-area: right; } .vr-down { grid-area: down; }

.vr-ch-display {
  text-align: center; font-family: var(--mono); font-size: var(--fs-xl);
  font-weight: var(--fw-700); color: var(--accent); margin-bottom: 12px;
  min-height: 30px;
}

.vr-numpad {
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 4px; margin-bottom: 12px;
}
.vr-num {
  padding: 10px; border-radius: var(--br-md); text-align: center;
  background: var(--bg-card-hover); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-size: var(--fs-md); font-weight: var(--fw-600); cursor: pointer;
  transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.vr-num:hover { background: var(--bg-card-active); }
.vr-num:active { transform: scale(.92); }

.vr-row { display: flex; gap: 8px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.vr-col-btns { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; }
.vr-action-btn {
  padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: var(--br-md); text-align: center;
  background: var(--bg-card-hover); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg);
}
.vr-action-btn:hover { background: var(--bg-card-active); }

.vr-transport { display: flex; gap: 4px; justify-content: center; margin-bottom: 12px; }
.vr-extra { display: flex; gap: 4px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: wrap; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   36. MODALS
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.modal {
  position: fixed; inset: 0; z-index: var(--z-modal);
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  animation: modalIn .25s var(--ease-out);
}
.modal.hidden { display: none !important; }
.modal-backdrop { position: absolute; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,.5); backdrop-filter: blur(4px); }
.modal-dialog {
  position: relative; z-index: 1; background: var(--bg-modal);
  border: 1px solid var(--border-light); border-radius: var(--br-xl);
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-xl); max-height: 85vh; display: flex; flex-direction: column;
  animation: modalContentIn .3s var(--ease-spring);
}
.modal-sm { width: 400px; } .modal-md { width: 560px; } .modal-lg { width: 720px; }
.modal-header {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  padding: 16px 20px; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border);
}
.modal-header h3 { font-size: var(--fs-lg); }
.modal-body { padding: 20px; overflow-y: auto; flex: 1; }
.modal-footer {
  display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: flex-end; gap: 8px;
  padding: 12px 20px; border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
}

@keyframes modalIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
@keyframes modalContentIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: scale(.95) translateY(10px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: scale(1) translateY(0); } }

/* Steps (Add Source) */
.steps { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 0; }
.step {
  width: 32px; height: 32px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--bg-input);
  border: 2px solid var(--border); display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center;
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-700); transition: var(--transition-all);
}
.step.active { border-color: var(--accent); color: var(--accent); }
.step.done { background: var(--accent); border-color: var(--accent); color: #fff; }
.step-line { width: 40px; height: 2px; background: var(--border); }
.steps-labels { display: flex; justify-content: space-around; font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); margin-top: 6px; }

/* Source Type Cards */
.source-type-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 12px; }
.source-type-card {
  background: var(--bg-card); border: 1px solid var(--border);
  border-radius: var(--br-lg); padding: 20px; text-align: center;
  cursor: pointer; transition: var(--transition-bg), border-color var(--dur-fast);
}
.source-type-card:hover { background: var(--bg-card-hover); }
.source-type-card.active { border-color: var(--accent); background: var(--accent-subtle); }
.source-type-icon { font-size: 2rem; margin-bottom: 8px; }
.source-type-title { font-weight: var(--fw-600); font-size: var(--fs-md); margin-bottom: 4px; }
.source-type-desc { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-muted); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   37. TOAST NOTIFICATIONS
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.toast-stack {
  position: fixed; bottom: 80px; right: 20px; z-index: var(--z-toast);
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 8px; pointer-events: none;
}
.toast {
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 10px; padding: 12px 16px;
  background: var(--bg-popup); border: 1px solid var(--border-light);
  border-radius: var(--br-md); box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
  pointer-events: auto; animation: toastIn .3s var(--ease-spring);
  font-size: var(--fs-sm); max-width: 380px; min-width: 240px;
}
.toast.toast-out { animation: toastOut .25s var(--ease) forwards; }
.toast-icon { font-size: 1.1rem; flex-shrink: 0; }
.toast-body { flex: 1; min-width: 0; }
.toast-title { font-weight: var(--fw-600); }
.toast-msg { font-size: var(--fs-xs); color: var(--text-secondary); margin-top: 2px; }
.toast-close { font-size: .8rem; cursor: pointer; padding: 4px; flex-shrink: 0; }
.toast.toast-success { border-left: 3px solid var(--success); }
.toast.toast-error { border-left: 3px solid var(--danger); }
.toast.toast-warning { border-left: 3px solid var(--warning); }
.toast.toast-info { border-left: 3px solid var(--info); }

@keyframes toastIn { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(30px) scale(.9); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0) scale(1); } }
@keyframes toastOut { from { opacity: 1; transform: translateX(0); } to { opacity: 0; transform: translateX(30px); } }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   38. PWA BANNER
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.pwa-banner {
  position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; z-index: var(--z-overlay);
  background: var(--bg-card); border-top: 1px solid var(--border);
  padding: 12px 20px; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between;
  box-shadow: var(--shadow-lg);
}
.pwa-banner.hidden { display: none !important; }
.pwa-banner-content { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; }
.pwa-banner-icon { font-size: 1.5rem; }
.pwa-banner-actions { display: flex; gap: 8px; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   39. BOTTOM NAV (Mobile)
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.bottom-nav {
  position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; height: 56px;
  background: var(--bg-tb); backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(20px);
  border-top: 1px solid var(--border); z-index: var(--z-sticky);
  display: none; align-items: center; justify-content: space-around;
}
.bn-item {
  display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 2px;
  padding: 6px 12px; color: var(--text-muted); font-size: 1.2rem;
  text-decoration: none; transition: var(--transition-color);
}
.bn-item.active { color: var(--accent); }
.bn-label { font-size: var(--fs-xs); }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   40. MOBILE OVERLAY
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.mob-overlay {
  position: fixed; inset: 0; background: rgba(0,0,0,.5); z-index: calc(var(--z-sticky) - 1);
  opacity: 0; visibility: hidden; transition: opacity var(--dur-med), visibility var(--dur-med);
}
.mob-overlay.active { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   41. ANIMATIONS & UTILITIES
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.fade-in { animation: fadeIn var(--dur-med) var(--ease-out); }
.slide-up { animation: slideUp var(--dur-med) var(--ease-out); }
@keyframes fadeIn { from { opacity: 0; } to { opacity: 1; } }
@keyframes slideUp { from { opacity: 0; transform: translateY(16px); } to { opacity: 1; transform: translateY(0); } }

/* Skeleton Loader */
.skeleton {
  background: var(--bg-input); border-radius: var(--br-md);
  animation: shimmer 1.5s infinite; background-size: 200% 100%;
  background-image: linear-gradient(90deg, var(--bg-input) 25%, var(--bg-card-hover) 50%, var(--bg-input) 75%);
}
@keyframes shimmer { from { background-position: 200% 0; } to { background-position: -200% 0; } }

/* Screen recording indicator */
.rec-indicator {
  position: fixed; top: 12px; right: 12px; z-index: var(--z-toast);
  background: var(--danger); color: #fff; padding: 6px 14px;
  border-radius: var(--br-pill); font-size: var(--fs-sm); font-weight: var(--fw-600);
  display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; animation: rec-pulse 1s infinite;
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   42. RESPONSIVE DESIGN
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

/* Tablet: ≤1024px */
@media (max-width: 1024px) {
  .ch-sidebar { width: 260px; }
  .epg-sidebar-ch { width: 150px; }
  .wp-right { width: 240px; }
  .settings-grid { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(280px, 1fr)); }
  .grid-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(180px, 1fr)); }
}

/* Mobile: ≤768px */
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  /* Sidebar hidden, bottom nav shown */
  .sidebar { position: fixed; left: 0; top: 0; transform: translateX(-100%); z-index: var(--z-overlay); }
  .sidebar.open { transform: translateX(0); }
  .sidebar.open ~ .mob-overlay { opacity: 1; visibility: visible; }
  #sidebarToggle { display: none; }
  #mobMenuBtn { display: flex; }
  .bottom-nav { display: flex; }

  /* Layouts */
  .live-layout { flex-direction: column; height: auto; }
  .player-area { min-height: 240px; }
  .player-wrap { min-height: 200px; aspect-ratio: 16/9; }
  .ch-sidebar { width: 100%; height: auto; max-height: 50vh; border-left: none; border-top: 1px solid var(--border); }

  /* Controls */
  .player-controls { flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; padding: 6px 8px; }
  .pc-left { display: none; }
  .pc-sep { display: none; }
  .pc-vol { width: 50px; }

  /* EPG */
  .epg-container { flex-direction: column; }
  .epg-sidebar-ch { width: 100%; max-height: 120px; border-right: none; border-bottom: 1px solid var(--border); }

  /* Dual */
  .dual-layout { flex-direction: column; }
  .dual-separator { width: 100%; height: 24px; flex-direction: row; }

  /* WP */
  .wp-layout { flex-direction: column; }
  .wp-right { width: 100%; }

  /* Pages */
  .page { padding: 12px; }
  .page-header { flex-direction: column; align-items: flex-start; }
  .page-header-actions { width: 100%; overflow-x: auto; padding-bottom: 4px; }

  /* Settings */
  .settings-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }

  /* Cards */
  .grid-2, .grid-3, .grid-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(150px, 1fr)); }

  /* Charts */
  .charts-row { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }

  /* Modals */
  .modal-sm, .modal-md, .modal-lg { width: calc(100vw - 32px); max-height: 85vh; }

  /* PiP */
  .pip-win { width: 200px; height: 130px; }

  /* Mini Player */
  .mini-player { width: 260px; bottom: 64px; }

  /* VR */
  .vr-wrap { width: 240px; }

  /* Command Palette */
  .cmd-palette { width: calc(100vw - 32px); }

  /* Player Settings */
  .player-settings { width: calc(100vw - 32px); right: 8px; }

  /* Speed/Quality/Share popups */
  .quality-popup, .sub-popup, .audio-popup { right: 8px; left: 8px; width: auto; }
  .speed-popup { left: 50%; }
  .sleep-popup, .share-popup { right: 8px; left: 8px; width: auto; }

  /* Source type grid */
  .source-type-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; }

  /* Notification Center */
  .notif-center { width: 100%; border-radius: 0; }

  /* Movie Hero */
  .movie-hero { min-height: 200px; }
  .movie-detail-layout { flex-direction: column; }
  .movie-detail-poster { width: 100%; min-height: 200px; }

  /* Search */
  .search-kbd { display: none; }
}

/* Small Mobile: ≤480px */
@media (max-width: 480px) {
  .topbar { padding: 0 8px; gap: 4px; }
  .tb-center { max-width: none; }
  .tb-bandwidth { display: none; }
  .pc-play-btn { font-size: 1.2rem; }
  .cat-tabs { padding: 6px 8px; }
  .grid-2, .grid-3, .grid-4 { grid-template-columns: repeat(auto-fill, minmax(130px, 1fr)); gap: 8px; }
  .card-body { padding: 8px; }
  .dual-layout { gap: 4px; }
  .mosaic-grid { gap: 2px; }
  .splash-logo { font-size: 48px; }
  .splash-title { font-size: 1.4rem; }
}

/* Landscape phone */
@media (max-height: 500px) and (orientation: landscape) {
  .live-layout { flex-direction: row; }
  .player-wrap { min-height: 100%; }
  .epg-strip { bottom: 44px; }
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   43. PRINT STYLES
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media print {
  .sidebar, .topbar, .bottom-nav, .player-controls, .ch-sidebar,
  .mini-player, .pip-win, .vr-wrap, .toast-stack, .cmd-overlay,
  .notif-center, .pwa-banner { display: none !important; }
  .main-wrap { margin: 0; }
  .page { padding: 20px; overflow: visible; }
  .app { display: block; height: auto; }
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   44. HIGH CONTRAST / ACCESSIBILITY
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
@media (prefers-contrast: high) {
  :root {
    --border: rgba(255,255,255,.25);
    --border-light: rgba(255,255,255,.35);
    --text-muted: #999;
  }
}

/* Reduced motion */
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) {
  *, *::before, *::after {
    animation-duration: 0.01ms !important;
    animation-iteration-count: 1 !important;
    transition-duration: 0.01ms !important;
  }
}

/* Focus visible */
:focus-visible {
  outline: 2px solid var(--accent);
  outline-offset: 2px;
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   45. THEME TRANSITION
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
.theme-transition,
.theme-transition *,
.theme-transition *::before,
.theme-transition *::after {
  transition: background-color .35s var(--ease),
              color .35s var(--ease),
              border-color .35s var(--ease),
              box-shadow .35s var(--ease) !important;
}
```

# BÖLÜM 3 — TAM JAVASCRIPT (DEMO VERİLER + TÜM İŞLEVLER)

```js
/* ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   StreamVault Pro v5.0.0 — Ultra Advanced IPTV Player
   Tam JavaScript Dosyası
   Copyright © 2025 StreamVault Pro
   ═══════════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
(() => {
'use strict';

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   0. UTILITY HELPERS
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const $ = (sel, ctx = document) => ctx.querySelector(sel);
const $$ = (sel, ctx = document) => [...ctx.querySelectorAll(sel)];
const qs = sel => document.querySelector(sel);
const ce = (tag, cls) => { const e = document.createElement(tag); if (cls) e.className = cls; return e; };

function uid() { return Math.random().toString(36).slice(2, 10); }
function clamp(v, lo, hi) { return Math.max(lo, Math.min(hi, v)); }
function rand(lo, hi) { return Math.floor(Math.random() * (hi - lo + 1)) + lo; }
function pad2(n) { return String(n).padStart(2, '0'); }
function fmtTime(d) { return `${pad2(d.getHours())}:${pad2(d.getMinutes())}`; }
function fmtDur(ms) { const s = Math.floor(ms/1000), m = Math.floor(s/60), h = Math.floor(m/60); return h > 0 ? `${h}sa ${m%60}dk` : `${m}dk`; }
function debounce(fn, ms = 250) { let t; return (...a) => { clearTimeout(t); t = setTimeout(() => fn(...a), ms); }; }
function throttle(fn, ms = 100) { let last = 0; return (...a) => { const now = Date.now(); if (now - last >= ms) { last = now; fn(...a); } }; }

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   1. STATE
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */

  page: 'live',

  { id:1, title:'TRT 1 - Diriliş Ertuğrul - Bölüm 145', duration:'45dk', date:'2025-01-14', status:'completed', emoji:'⚔' },

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   3. EPG GENERATOR
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
const EPG_PROGRAMS = ['Ana Haber Bülteni','Dizi','Film','Spor Gündemi','Belgesel','Çizgi Film','Müzik Dinletisi','Canlı Yayın','Özel Röportaj','Yarışma Programı','Hava Durumu','Spor Haberleri','Magazin','Talk Show','Reality Show','Komedi Dizisi','Macera Film','Korku Film','Tarih Programı','Sağlık Programı'];

function genEPG(channelId, count = 24) {
  const now = new Date();
  const items = [];
  let t = new Date(now); t.setMinutes(0,0,0); t.setHours(t.getHours() - 2);
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    const dur = rand(30, 120);
    const prog = EPG_PROGRAMS[rand(0, EPG_PROGRAMS.length - 1)];
    const start = new Date(t);
    t = new Date(t.getTime() + dur * 60000);
    items.push({ id: uid(), channelId, title: prog, start, end: new Date(t), duration: dur });
  }
  return items;
}

/* ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
   4. DOM REFERENCES
   ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── */
```
