<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="tr">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>StreamVault Pro</title>
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{margin:0;padding:0;box-sizing:border-box}
:root{
  --bg0:#08080f;--bg1:#0f0f1a;--bg2:#161624;--bg3:#1e1e30;--bg4:#26263c;--bg5:#2e2e48;
  --acc:#7c6ff7;--acc2:#f76fc0;--acc3:#6ff7c0;--acc4:#f7c06f;
  --t0:#fff;--t1:#c8c8e0;--t2:#8888a8;--t3:#505068;
  --bd:rgba(255,255,255,0.07);--bd2:rgba(124,111,247,0.28);
  --live:#ff4757;--ok:#2ed573;--warn:#ffa502;
  --sw:200px;--th:56px;--pw:300px;--r:10px;--r2:6px;--tr:0.2s ease;
}
html,body{height:100%;background:var(--bg0);color:var(--t0);font-family:'Segoe UI',system-ui,sans-serif;font-size:14px;overflow:hidden}
::-webkit-scrollbar{width:4px;height:4px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-track{background:transparent}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb{background:var(--bg5);border-radius:2px}
::-webkit-scrollbar-thumb:hover{background:var(--acc)}

/* ── LAYOUT ── */
.app{display:grid;grid-template-columns:var(--sw) 1fr var(--pw);grid-template-rows:var(--th) 1fr;height:100vh;transition:grid-template-columns var(--tr)}
.app.sc{--sw:54px}
.app.ph{--pw:0px}

/* ── TOPBAR ── */
.topbar{grid-column:1/-1;grid-row:1;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;padding:0 14px;background:var(--bg1);border-bottom:1px solid var(--bd);z-index:100;flex-shrink:0}
.logo{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-size:17px;font-weight:800;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc),var(--acc2));-webkit-background-clip:text;-webkit-text-fill-color:transparent;background-clip:text;cursor:pointer;user-select:none;white-space:nowrap}
.logo-icon{font-size:22px;-webkit-text-fill-color:initial}
.tog-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--t2);cursor:pointer;padding:8px;border-radius:var(--r2);font-size:18px;transition:all var(--tr);flex-shrink:0}
.tog-btn:hover{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--t0)}
.srch-wrap{flex:1;max-width:460px;position:relative}
.srch-in{width:100%;background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:24px;color:var(--t0);padding:7px 14px 7px 38px;font-size:13px;outline:none;transition:all var(--tr)}
.srch-in:focus{border-color:var(--acc);background:var(--bg2);box-shadow:0 0 0 3px rgba(124,111,247,.15)}
.srch-ic{position:absolute;left:13px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);color:var(--t3);font-size:14px;pointer-events:none}
.tr{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px}
.ib{background:none;border:none;color:var(--t2);cursor:pointer;padding:7px;border-radius:var(--r2);font-size:17px;transition:all var(--tr);position:relative}
.ib:hover{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--t0)}
.bdg{position:absolute;top:3px;right:3px;background:var(--live);color:#fff;font-size:9px;font-weight:700;padding:1px 4px;border-radius:10px;min-width:15px;text-align:center;display:none}
.th-sel{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:var(--r2);color:var(--t1);padding:5px 10px;cursor:pointer;font-size:12px;outline:none;transition:all var(--tr)}
.th-sel:hover{border-color:var(--acc);color:var(--acc)}
.avatar{width:30px;height:30px;border-radius:50%;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--acc),var(--acc2));display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:15px;cursor:pointer;border:2px solid var(--bd2);transition:all var(--tr)}
.avatar:hover{border-color:var(--acc);transform:scale(1.08)}

/* ── SIDEBAR ── */
.sidebar{grid-column:1;grid-row:2;background:var(--bg1);border-right:1px solid var(--bd);display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;z-index:50;transition:all var(--tr)}
.nav-sec{padding:10px 6px;flex:1;overflow-y:auto}
.nav-lbl{font-size:10px;font-weight:600;color:var(--t3);letter-spacing:1px;text-transform:uppercase;padding:8px 8px 4px;white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden}
.ni{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;padding:8px 9px;border-radius:var(--r2);cursor:pointer;transition:all var(--tr);color:var(--t2);white-space:nowrap;overflow:hidden}
.ni:hover{background:var(--bg3);color:var(--t0)}
.ni.on{background:rgba(124,111,247,.14);color:var(--acc)}
.ni-ic{font-size:17px;flex-shrink:0}
.ni-tx{font-size:13px;font-weight:500;overflow:hidden;text-overflow:ellipsis}
.ni-ct{margin-left:auto;background:var(--bg4);color:var(--t2);font-size:10px;padding:1px 6px;border-radius:10px;flex-shrink:0}
.ni.on .ni-ct{background:var(--acc);color:#fff}
.sdiv{height:1px;background:var(--bd);margin:4px 10px}
.sb-bot{padding:10px 6px;border-top:1px solid var(--bd)}

/* ── MAIN ── */
.main{grid-column:2;grid-row:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;overflow:hidden;background:var(--bg0)}

/* ── PLAYER VIEW ── */
.pv{display:flex;flex-direction:column;height:100%;overflow:hidden}
.stats-bar{display:flex;gap:10px;padding:10px 14px 8px;flex-shrink:0;overflow-x:auto;scrollbar-width:none}
.stats-bar::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none}
.stat{background:var(--bg2);border:1px solid var(--bd);border-radius:var(--r2);padding:5px 10px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px;font-size:11px;color:var(--t2);white-space:nowrap;flex-shrink:0}
.stat-v{color:var(--acc);font-weight:700}
.pc{position:relative;background:#000;flex:1;overflow:hidden;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;min-height:0;cursor:pointer}
.pc:hover .p-top-ov{opacity:1}

/* player bg anim */
.p-bg{position:absolute;inset:0;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
.p-anim{position:absolute;inset:0;opacity:0;transition:opacity .5s}
.p-anim.on{opacity:1}
.ag{position:absolute;inset:0;animation:gs 9s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes gs{
  0%{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0533,#0a1a3a,#0a2a1a)}
  25%{background:linear-gradient(225deg,#2a0a1a,#1a1a0a,#0a0a2a)}
  50%{background:linear-gradient(315deg,#0a2a2a,#1a0a2a,#2a1a0a)}
  75%{background:linear-gradient(45deg,#1a2a0a,#0a1a2a,#2a0a2a)}
  100%{background:linear-gradient(135deg,#1a0533,#0a1a3a,#0a2a1a)}
}
.scanlines{position:absolute;inset:0;background:repeating-linear-gradient(0deg,transparent,transparent 2px,rgba(0,0,0,.04) 2px,rgba(0,0,0,.04) 4px);pointer-events:none}

/* noise overlay */
.p-anim.on::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.04'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");opacity:.4;pointer-events:none;animation:noise 0.5s steps(2) infinite}
@keyframes noise{0%,100%{transform:translate(0,0)}25%{transform:translate(-1%,1%)}50%{transform:translate(1%,-1%)}75%{transform:translate(-1%,-1%)}

}

.no-sig{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:12px;color:var(--t3);text-align:center;padding:20px}
.no-sig-em{font-size:60px}
.no-sig-tx{font-size:15px;font-weight:600}
.no-sig-sub{font-size:12px;color:var(--t3)}

.ch-disp{position:relative;z-index:2;display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:14px;display:none}
.ch-big-em{font-size:76px;filter:drop-shadow(0 0 28px rgba(255,255,255,.3));animation:pls 3s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pls{0%,100%{transform:scale(1)}50%{transform:scale(1.06)}}
.ch-big-nm{font-size:26px;font-weight:800;color:#fff;text-shadow:0 2px 20px rgba(0,0,0,.8)}
.ch-big-pr{font-size:14px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);text-align:center;max-width:380px}

@keyframes chIn{from{opacity:0;transform:scale(.92) brightness(2)}to{opacity:1;transform:scale(1) brightness(1)}}
.ch-in-anim{animation:chIn .55s ease}

/* player top overlay */
.p-top-ov{position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;padding:14px 18px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,rgba(0,0,0,.72),transparent);display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;z-index:10;opacity:0;transition:opacity var(--tr)}
.live-bdg{background:var(--live);color:#fff;font-size:10px;font-weight:800;padding:3px 8px;border-radius:4px;letter-spacing:.8px;animation:lp 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes lp{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.65}}
.p-ch-info{flex:1}
.p-ch-nm{font-weight:700;font-size:14px}
.p-pr-nm{font-size:11px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.65);margin-top:2px}
.p-top-btns{display:flex;gap:7px}
.ptb{background:rgba(0,0,0,.4);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:var(--r2);color:#fff;padding:5px 11px;cursor:pointer;font-size:11px;transition:all var(--tr);backdrop-filter:blur(4px)}
.ptb:hover{background:rgba(255,255,255,.12)}

/* controls */
.cb{background:var(--bg1);border-top:1px solid var(--bd);padding:10px 14px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:8px;flex-shrink:0}
.pr-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:9px}
.pr-tr{flex:1;height:4px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:2px;cursor:pointer;position:relative;transition:height var(--tr)}
.pr-tr:hover{height:6px}
.pr-fi{height:100%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--acc),var(--acc2));border-radius:2px;transition:width .5s linear;position:relative}
.pr-fi::after{content:'';position:absolute;right:-4px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);width:8px;height:8px;background:#fff;border-radius:50%;box-shadow:0 0 4px rgba(0,0,0,.4);opacity:0;transition:opacity var(--tr)}
.pr-tr:hover .pr-fi::after{opacity:1}
.pr-tm{font-size:11px;color:var(--t2);white-space:nowrap;font-variant-numeric:tabular-nums}
.ctl-row{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px}
.cb-btn{background:none;border:none;color:var(--t1);cursor:pointer;padding:5px;border-radius:var(--r2);font-size:19px;transition:all var(--tr);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;line-height:1}
.cb-btn:hover{color:var(--t0);background:var(--bg3)}
.cb-btn.on{color:var(--acc)}
.play-btn{background:var(--acc);color:#fff;border-radius:50%;width:38px;height:38px;font-size:16px}
.play-btn:hover{background:var(--acc2);color:#fff}
.vol-w{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:5px}
.vol-sl{-webkit-appearance:none;width:76px;height:4px;background:var(--bg4);border-radius:2px;outline:none;cursor:pointer}
.vol-sl::-webkit-slider-thumb{-webkit-appearance:none;width:12px;height:12px;background:var(--acc);border-radius:50%;cursor:pointer}
.vol-sl::-moz-range-thumb{width:12px;height:12px;background:var(--acc);border-radius:50%;border:none}
.csp{flex:1}
.q-bdg{background:var(--bg3);border:1px solid var(--bd);color:var(--acc);font-size:11px;font-weight:
